title: The Effects of Population Size on the Performance of BEAGLE GPU-Based Genetic Programming Runs
summary: The Beagle framework, through GPU-based Genetic Programming, enables population dynamics previously unattainable (within practical time frames) by CPU-constrained Genetic Programming systems. This work explores how GPU-enabled population sizes impact the success of training for symbolic regression problems. Specifically, when using constant population sizes, we see benefits of using very narrow and deep searches (as narrow as 1000 individuals) for some problems, while other problems benefit from very broad and shallow searches (as broad as 10 million individuals). We also explore stepped population sizes that start with large populations and drop to small populations to balance the breadth and depth of search.

AI.tldr: Beagle框架利用GPU实现了遗传编程，支持此前CPU系统无法实现的大规模种群动态。研究表明，对于符号回归问题，不同问题适合不同策略：有些受益于极窄而深的搜索（1000个体），有些则受益于极宽而浅的搜索（1000万个体），而阶梯式种群大小（从大到小）可平衡搜索的广度与深度。
AI.motivation: 探索GPU加速的遗传编程如何突破CPU系统的种群规模限制，以及不同种群大小策略对符号回归问题训练效果的影响。
AI.method: 使用Beagle框架（GPU-based Genetic Programming），对比恒定种群大小（从1000到1000万）以及阶梯式种群大小（先大后小）策略在符号回归问题上的表现。
AI.result: 不同符号回归问题对种群规模策略的偏好不同：部分问题在窄而深（小种群）搜索中表现更好，部分在宽而浅（大种群）搜索中表现更好；阶梯式种群大小能有效平衡搜索的广度与深度。
AI.conclusion: GPU加速使得超大种群遗传编程成为可能，且不同问题需要匹配不同的种群规模策略；阶梯式策略是一种有效的折中方案。

title: Benchmarking Stopping Criteria for Evolutionary Multi-objective Optimization
comment: This is an accepted version of a paper published in the proceedings of GECCO 2026
summary: Stopping criteria automatically determine when to stop an evolutionary algorithm, so as not to waste function evaluations on a stagnant population. Although stopping criteria play an important role in real-world applications, they have attracted little attention in the evolutionary multi-objective optimization (EMO) community. In fact, new stopping criteria for EMO have been rarely developed in recent years. One reason for the stagnation in developing stopping criteria for EMO is a lack of effective benchmarking methodologies. To address this issue, this paper proposes (i) a performance measure of stopping criteria for EMO and (ii) a file-based benchmarking approach. This paper also proposes (iii) a data representation method that effectively stores population states in text files. (i) The proposed measure represents the performance of stopping criteria as a single scalar value, making comparison easy. (ii) The proposed file-based approach not only simplifies the benchmarking process but also facilitates reproducibility. (iii) The proposed data representation method addresses the issue of file size in (ii). We demonstrate the effectiveness of our three contributions (i)--(iii) by benchmarking five representative stopping criteria for EMO.

AI.tldr: 本文针对进化多目标优化(EMO)中停滞的终止准则研究，提出了性能度量、基于文件的基准测试方法和数据表示方法三大贡献，并通过五个代表性终止准则的基准测试验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: EMO领域近年来很少开发新的终止准则，主要原因在于缺乏有效的基准测试方法。本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: (i) 提出将终止准则性能表示为单一标量值的度量方法；(ii) 提出基于文件的基准测试方法以简化流程并促进可重复性；(iii) 提出有效存储种群状态的数据表示方法以解决文件大小问题。
AI.result: 通过五个代表性EMO终止准则的基准测试，验证了所提三种方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献为终止准则研究提供了有效的基准测试方法论，有望推动EMO终止准则领域的发展。

title: EvoTSC: Evolving Feature Learning Models for Time Series Classification via Genetic Programming
summary: Time series classification is an important analytical task across diverse domains. However, its practical application is often hindered by the scarcity of labeled data and the requirement for substantial computational resources. To address these challenges, this paper proposes EvoTSC, a novel genetic programming approach designed to automatically evolve lightweight feature learning models for time series classification. The core of EvoTSC is a carefully designed multi-layer program structure that strategically embeds diverse forms of prior expert knowledge into the evolutionary process, effectively guiding the search toward operations known to be highly effective for time series analysis. To mitigate the common overfitting problem in time series classification, a tailored Pareto tournament selection strategy is proposed to favor models that perform consistently well across varying training data subsets, promoting the discovery of highly generalizable models. Extensive experiments conducted on univariate time series classification datasets demonstrate that EvoTSC significantly outperforms eleven benchmark methods in most comparisons. Further analyses verify the contribution of each component and the resource efficiency of the evolved models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoTSC，一种基于遗传编程的方法，能自动演化轻量级特征学习模型用于时间序列分类，通过嵌入领域先验知识和Pareto锦标赛选择策略，在保持资源高效的同时显著提升分类性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 时间序列分类在实际应用中面临标注数据稀缺和计算资源需求大的双重挑战，现有方法难以兼顾性能与效率。
AI.method: 提出EvoTSC方法，核心包括：(1) 多层程序结构，嵌入多样化的专家先验知识以引导演化搜索；(2) 定制化的Pareto锦标赛选择策略，通过评估模型在不同训练子集上的一致性表现来缓解过拟合，促进高泛化能力模型的发现。
AI.result: 在单变量时间序列分类数据集上的大量实验表明，EvoTSC在大多数比较中显著优于11种基准方法，且进一步分析验证了各组件贡献及演化模型的资源效率。
AI.conclusion: EvoTSC通过遗传编程自动演化轻量级模型，有效解决了时间序列分类中数据稀缺与资源需求大的问题，为实际应用提供了一种高效且可泛化的解决方案。

title: Hierarchies of No-regret Algorithms
summary: Our paper studies the setting of players using no-regret algorithms in various two-player games. We address whether having stronger regret guarantees or playing against an opponent with weaker regret guarantees yields higher utilities for the player in question. We consider a hierarchy of algorithms from weakest to strongest: uniform random play, no-regret, and no-swap-regret. We find, counterintuitively, that in many games, no-swap-regret is a worse choice for players (and gives better utility for their opponents). We find the root cause of this phenomenon to be a difference in effective learning rate between the two algorithms, where the no-swap-regret algorithms learn $N$ times slower than no-regret algorithms. To address this, we attempt to equalize learning rates, leading to closer utility between no-regret and no-swap-regret players. Finally, we show that for certain random games with $7$ actions per player, no-swap-regret algorithms can perform noticeably better than no-regret algorithms in a manner that cannot be explained away by unfairly adjusted learning rates.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在两人博弈中，使用不同强度遗憾最小化算法（无遗憾、无交换遗憾）的玩家收益差异。发现无交换遗憾算法虽更强，但在许多博弈中反而导致更低收益，原因是其有效学习率比无遗憾算法慢N倍。在调整学习率后，两者收益接近。但在某些7动作随机游戏中，无交换遗憾算法表现更优且无法用学习率差异解释。
AI.motivation: 探究在博弈中，拥有更强遗憾保证（如无交换遗憾）的玩家是否一定比使用较弱遗憾保证（如无遗憾）的玩家获得更高收益，以及对手的遗憾保证强度对自身收益的影响。
AI.method: 1. 将算法按强度分层：均匀随机、无遗憾、无交换遗憾。2. 在多种两人博弈中对比各层级算法的实际收益。3. 分析收益差异的根本原因，发现有效学习率差异是关键因素。4. 通过调整学习率使两者可比。5. 在7动作随机博弈中进一步验证。
AI.result: 1. 无交换遗憾算法在许多博弈中反而比无遗憾算法表现更差（收益更低）。2. 无交换遗憾算法的有效学习率比无遗憾算法慢N倍。3. 等化学习率后，两者收益接近。4. 在7动作随机博弈中，无交换遗憾算法显著优于无遗憾算法，且无法用学习率差异解释。
AI.conclusion: 更强的遗憾保证并不总能带来更高收益，学习率差异是关键影响因素；但在某些复杂博弈中，无交换遗憾算法仍可能展现不可替代的优势。

title: Asymmetric-Information Resource Allocation Games: An LP Approach to Purposeful Deception
summary: In this work, we introduce the Deceptive Resource Allocation Game (DRAG), which studies purposeful deception within a Bayesian game framework. In DRAG, a Defender allocates resources across the true asset and several decoys to influence an Attacker's beliefs and actions, with the goal of diverting the Attacker away from the true asset. We seek to characterize purposeful deception, whereby the Defender deceives only when doing so improves its performance. To this end, we solve for the Perfect Bayesian Nash Equilibrium (PBNE) of the corresponding game. We show that, despite the coupled belief-policy interdependence, the problem admits an efficient, non-iterative linear programming formulation. Numerical results demonstrate that the resulting policies naturally balance effective allocation and belief manipulation, giving rise to purposeful and emergent deceptive behaviors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"欺骗性资源分配博弈"(DRAG)的贝叶斯博弈框架，研究防御方通过资源分配来策略性地误导攻击方，以保护真实资产。作者求解了完美贝叶斯纳什均衡(PBNE)，并发现该问题可转化为高效的线性规划形式，数值实验表明该方法能自然产生有目的性的欺骗行为。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对"有目的的欺骗"(即仅在欺骗能提升性能时才进行欺骗)的严格理论刻画。作者希望在一个博弈框架内系统性地研究防御方如何在资源分配中主动操纵攻击方的信念，实现资源分配与信念操控的平衡。
AI.method: 构建了贝叶斯博弈框架(DRAG)：防御方在真实资产和多个诱饵之间分配资源，以影响攻击方的信念和行动。求解完美贝叶斯纳什均衡(PBNE)，发现尽管信念与策略存在耦合依赖，但该问题可转化为高效的、非迭代的线性规划问题。
AI.result: 证明了该博弈问题可转化为非迭代线性规划形式，具备高效求解的特性。数值结果显示，求解得到的策略能够自然地平衡有效资源分配与信念操控，产生有目的性的、涌现式的欺骗行为。
AI.conclusion: DRAG框架为研究博弈中的有目的性欺骗提供了理论工具，线性规划的可解性使其具备实际应用潜力，产生的欺骗行为是博弈均衡的自然结果而非人为预设。

title: Elderly-Contextual Data Augmentation via Speech Synthesis for Elderly ASR
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, under review at IEEE Signal Processing Letters
summary: Despite recent progress in automatic speech recognition (ASR), elderly ASR (EASR) remains challenging due to limited training data and the distinct acoustic and linguistic characteristics of elderly speech. In this work, we address data scarcity in EASR through a data augmentation pipeline that combines large language model (LLM)-based transcript paraphrasing with text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis. Given an elderly speech dataset, the LLM first generates elderly-contextual paraphrases of the original transcripts, and the TTS model then synthesizes corresponding speech using elderly reference speakers. The resulting synthetic audio-text pairs are merged with the original data to fine-tune Whisper without architectural modification. We further analyze the effects of augmentation ratio and reference-speaker composition in low-resource EASR. Experiments on English and Korean elderly speech datasets from speakers aged 70 and above show that the proposed method consistently improves performance over conventional augmentation baselines, achieving up to a 58.2% reduction in word error rate (WER) compared with the Whisper baseline.

AI.tldr: 针对老年人语音识别数据稀缺问题，提出基于LLM文本释义+TTS语音合成的数据增强方法，在Whisper模型上实现高达58.2%的WER下降。
AI.motivation: 老年人自动语音识别（EASR）因训练数据有限且老年语音在声学和语言学特征上具有独特性而极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效解决数据稀缺问题。
AI.method: 构建数据增强流水线：先用LLM对原始转录文本进行老年人语境相关的释义生成，再用TTS模型结合老年人参考说话人合成对应语音，将生成的合成音频-文本对与原始数据合并，直接微调Whisper模型（无需架构修改），并分析了增强比例和参考说话人组成的影响。
AI.result: 在英语和韩语70岁以上老年语音数据集上，该方法始终优于传统增强基线，相比Whisper基线最高实现58.2%的词错误率（WER）降低。
AI.conclusion: LLM+TTS的数据增强流水线能有效缓解EASR数据稀缺问题，显著提升识别性能，且无需修改模型架构。

title: Versioned Late Materialization for Ultra-Long Sequence Training in Recommendation Systems at Scale
summary: Modern Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) follow scaling laws with sequence length, driving the frontier toward ultra-long User Interaction History (UIH). However, the industry-standard "Fat Row" paradigm, which pre-materializes these sequences into every training example, creates a storage and I/O wall where data infrastructure usage exceeds GPU training capacity due to data redundancy that is amplified in multi-tenant environments where models with vastly different sequence length requirements share a union dataset. We present a \emph{versioned late materialization} paradigm that eliminates this redundancy by storing UIH once in a normalized, immutable tier and reconstructing sequences just-in-time during training via lightweight versioned pointers. The system ensures Online-to-Offline (O2O) consistency through a bifurcated protocol that prevents future leakage across both streaming and batch training, while a read-optimized immutable storage layer provides multi-dimensional projection pushdown for heterogeneous model tenants. Disaggregated data preprocessing with pipelined I/O prefetching and data-affinity optimizations masks the latency of training-time sequence reconstruction, keeping training throughput compute-bound by GPUs. Deployed on production DLRMs, the system reduces training data infrastructure resource usage while enabling aggressive sequence length scaling that delivers significant model quality gains, serving as the foundational data infrastructure for modern recommendation model architectures, including HSTU and ULTRA-HSTU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种版本化延迟物化范式，通过归一化、不可变存储层和轻量级版本指针，在训练时即时重建用户交互历史序列，消除了数据冗余，显著降低存储和I/O开销，同时支持更长的序列长度以提升模型质量。
AI.motivation: 现代推荐模型随序列长度扩展而获益，但行业标准的"Fat Row"范式因数据冗余导致存储和I/O开销超过GPU训练能力，尤其在多租户环境中问题加剧，因此需要消除冗余并实现高效的序列重建。
AI.method: 版本化延迟物化范式：UIH仅存储一次于归一化、不可变存储层；通过轻量级版本指针在训练时即时重建序列；采用分叉协议保证在线到离线一致性；支持多维投影下推以满足异构模型租户需求；结合数据预处理的流水线I/O预取和数据亲和优化以掩蔽延迟。
AI.result: 在生产级DLRM上部署后，训练数据基础设施资源使用显著降低，同时支持激进的序列长度扩展，带来显著的模型质量提升，并作为HSTU、ULTRA-HSTU等现代架构的基础数据基础设施。
AI.conclusion: 版本化延迟物化范式有效解决了推荐模型训练中的数据冗余和I/O瓶颈问题，实现了存储效率与计算效率的统一，为下一代推荐模型架构提供了可扩展的数据基础设施。

title: ESICA: A Scalable Framework for Text-Guided 3D Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Text guided 3D medical image segmentation offers a flexible alternative to class based and spatial prompt based models by allowing users to specify regions of interest directly in natural language. This paradigm avoids reliance on predefined label sets, reduces ambiguous outputs, and aligns more naturally with clinical workflows. However, existing text guided frameworks are often computationally expensive, exhibit weak text volume feature alignment, and fail to capture fine anatomical details. We propose ESICA, a lightweight and scalable framework that addresses these challenges through three innovations: (1) a similarity matrix based mask prediction formulation that enhances semantic alignment, (2) an efficient decomposed decoder with adapter modules for accurate volumetric decoding, and (3) a two pass refinement strategy that sharpens boundaries and resolves uncertain regions. To improve training stability and generalization, ESICA adopts a two stage scheme consisting of positive only pretraining followed by balanced fine tuning. On the CVPR BiomedSegFM benchmark spanning five imaging modalities (CT, MRI, PET, ultrasound, and microscopy), ESICA achieves state of the art segmentation accuracy, while the compact ESICA4 Lite variant attains similar segmentation performance with substantially fewer parameters, yielding a superior efficiency accuracy trade off. Our framework advances text guided segmentation toward efficient, scalable, and clinically deployable systems. Code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/mirthAI/ESICA.

AI.tldr: ESICA是一个轻量级、可扩展的文本引导3D医学图像分割框架，通过相似性矩阵掩码预测、高效分解解码器和两遍细化策略，在CVPR BiomedSegFM基准上实现了最先进的分割精度，同时其精简版ESICA4 Lite以更少参数达到相近性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导分割框架存在计算成本高、文本-体素特征对齐弱、无法捕捉细粒度解剖细节等问题，且缺乏高效可部署的临床方案。
AI.method: (1) 基于相似性矩阵的掩码预测，增强语义对齐；(2) 高效分解解码器+适配器模块，实现精确体积解码；(3) 两遍细化策略，锐化边界并解决不确定区域；(4) 两阶段训练：仅正样本预训练+平衡微调。
AI.result: 在CVPR BiomedSegFM基准（5种模态：CT、MRI、PET、超声、显微镜）上达到最先进分割精度，ESICA4 Lite以更少参数实现相近性能，效率-精度权衡更优。
AI.conclusion: ESICA推动了文本引导分割向高效、可扩展、临床可部署系统的方向发展，代码将开源。

title: SWE-QA: A Dataset and Benchmark for Complex Code Understanding
summary: In this paper, we introduce SWE-QA, a text and code corpus aimed at benchmarking multi-hop code comprehension, addressing the gap between simplified evaluation tasks and the complex reasoning required in real-world software development. While existing code understanding benchmarks focus on isolated snippets, developers must routinely connect information across multiple dispersed code segments. The dataset comprises 9,072 multiple-choice questions systematically generated from 12 Python repositories of SWE-bench, evaluating several recurrent reasoning patterns like Declaration-and-Call questions that link entity definitions to their usage, and Interacting-Entity questions that examine the dynamic relationships among multiple collaborating components. Generated through parsing-based entity extraction and Large Language Model assisted question construction with carefully validated distractors, the benchmark distinguishes genuine comprehension from superficial pattern matching. Evaluation of 15 language models (360M to 671B parameters) reveals significant challenges in multi-hop reasoning, with best performance reaching 74.41% accuracy. Dense architectures consistently outperform mixture-of-experts models by 10-14 percentage points, while reasoning-enhanced variants show inconsistent benefits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SWE-QA基准测试集，包含9,072道多选题，用于评估多跳代码理解能力。该基准从12个Python仓库中生成，涵盖声明-调用、交互实体等多种推理模式。对15个语言模型（360M-671B参数）的评估显示最佳准确率仅74.41%，密集架构优于混合专家模型10-14个百分点，表明多跳代码推理仍具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有代码理解基准主要评估孤立代码片段的简单理解，而实际软件开发中开发者需要跨越多处分散代码段进行信息关联推理，因此存在简化评测与现实需求间的差距。
AI.method: 基于SWE-bench中12个Python仓库，通过解析实体提取和大语言模型辅助构建问题，配合精心验证的干扰项，系统生成9,072道多选题，涵盖声明-调用、交互实体等多种递归推理模式。
AI.result: 15个语言模型（360M-671B参数）评估显示最佳准确率74.41%，密集架构比混合专家模型高10-14个百分点，推理增强型变体的改进不一致。
AI.conclusion: 多跳代码推理对现有模型仍具重大挑战，密集架构在当前任务中表现更优，推理增强机制未能稳定提升效果，指向更深层次代码理解能力的研究方向。

title: GCA-BULF: A Bottom-Up Framework for Short-Term Load Forecasting Using Grouped Critical Appliances
summary: With the rise of time-of-use and tiered electricity pricing, energy consumers are encouraged to adopt peak-shifting strategies by automatically controlling high-power appliances. These help lower energy costs while enhancing the power grid's stability. To support such energy management with high resilience and responsiveness, reliable short-term load forecasting (STLF) plays a critical role. STLF predicts electricity consumption over time horizons ranging from minutes to days, using historical data, temporal patterns, and contextual factors. Traditional top-down forecasting methods struggle to capture the complex consumption patterns of diverse and mixed appliance loads. Although bottom-up methods improve forecasting accuracy by integrating appliance-level data, monitoring all appliances is costly, and many do not meaningfully impact total load prediction. Therefore, we propose GCA-BULF, a bottom-up short-term load forecasting framework based on grouped critical appliances, supported by three key designs. First, the Critical Appliance Filtering module ranks appliances according to their power consumption, switching frequency, and usage pattern periodicity, and identifies critical ones through iterative load decomposition. Next, the Related Appliance Grouping module clusters these appliances based on spatial and temporal correlations for group-level forecasting. Finally, the Collaborative Load Forecasting module refines the total load prediction by combining multiple group-level forecasts. We evaluate GCA-BULF on residential and office building load forecasting tasks. Experimental results reveal that GCA-BULF improves hourly total load forecasting by 20.85%-57.88% compared to existing top-down methods and by 33.03%-92.48% compared to bottom-up methods.

AI.tldr: 提出GCA-BULF，一种基于关键分组电器的自底向上短期负荷预测框架，通过过滤关键电器、聚类分组和协同预测三个模块，显著提升了住宅和办公楼的负荷预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统自顶向下方法难以捕捉多样混合负荷的复杂消耗模式，自底向上方法虽精度高但监测所有电器成本高昂且许多电器对总负荷预测贡献不大，因此需要一种高效且精准的负荷预测方法。
AI.method: 提出GCA-BULF框架，包含三个关键设计：1) 关键电器过滤模块，根据功率、切换频率和使用模式周期性对电器排序，并通过迭代负荷分解识别关键电器；2) 相关电器分组模块，基于时空相关性对关键电器聚类并进行组级预测；3) 协同负荷预测模块，融合多组预测结果优化总负荷预测。
AI.result: 在住宅和办公楼负荷预测任务上，相比现有自顶向下方法，小时级总负荷预测提升20.85%-57.88%；相比自底向上方法提升33.03%-92.48%。
AI.conclusion: GCA-BULF通过聚焦关键电器并分组协同预测，在降低监测成本的同时显著提升了短期负荷预测精度，为智能电网需求侧管理提供了有效方案。

title: Co-Director: Agentic Generative Video Storytelling
summary: While diffusion models generate high-fidelity video clips, transforming them into coherent storytelling engines remains challenging. Current agentic pipelines automate this via chained modules but suffer from semantic drift and cascading failures due to independent, handcrafted prompting. We present Co-Director, a hierarchical multi-agent framework formalizing video storytelling as a global optimization problem. To ensure semantic coherence, we introduce hierarchical parameterization: a multi-armed bandit globally identifies promising creative directions, while a local multimodal self-refinement loop mitigates identity drift and ensures sequence-level consistency. This balances the exploration of novel narrative strategies with the exploitation of effective creative configurations. For evaluation, we introduce GenAD-Bench, a 400-scenario dataset of fictional products for personalized advertising. Experiments demonstrate that Co-Director significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, offering a principled approach that seamlessly generalizes to broader cinematic narratives. Project Page: https://co-director-agent.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出Co-Director，一个层次化多智能体框架，将视频故事生成形式化为全局优化问题，通过多臂老虎机进行全局创意方向探索与局部多模态自反馈循环解决语义漂移和身份不一致问题，在自建GenAD-Bench数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频片段，但难以将其整合为连贯的故事叙述；当前基于agent的流水线方法因独立的手工提示设计导致语义漂移和级联失败。
AI.method: 提出Co-Director层次化多智能体框架：(1) 多臂老虎机算法全局识别有前景的创意方向；(2) 局部多模态自反馈循环缓解身份漂移并确保序列级一致性，实现探索-利用平衡。
AI.result: 在自建的GenAD-Bench数据集（400个虚构产品广告场景）上显著优于现有基线方法，并能泛化到更广泛的电影叙事场景。
AI.conclusion: Co-Director提供了一种原则性强的视频故事生成方法，通过层次化优化有效解决了语义连贯性问题，具有良好的泛化能力。

title: Optimally Auditing Adversarial Agents
comment: Published in Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), 2026, pages 16787-16794
summary: Fraud can pose a challenge in many resource allocation domains, including social service delivery and credit provision. For example, agents may misreport private information in order to gain benefits or access to credit. To mitigate this, a principal can design strategic audits to verify claims and penalize misreporting. In this paper, we introduce a general model of audit policy design as a principal-agent game with multiple agents, where the principal commits to an audit policy, and agents collectively choose an equilibrium that minimizes the principal's utility. We examine both adaptive and non-adaptive settings, depending on whether the principal's policy can be responsive to the distribution of agent reports. Our work provides efficient algorithms for computing optimal audit policies in both settings and extends these results to a setting with limited audit budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究资源分配中的欺诈问题，提出了一种审计政策设计的通用模型（主从博弈），涵盖自适应和非自适应两种场景，并提供了计算最优审计策略的高效算法，包括有限审计预算下的扩展。
AI.motivation: 为了解决资源分配（如社会服务、信贷）中代理人虚报信息以获取利益的欺诈问题，委托人需要设计策略性审计来验证声明并惩罚谎报。
AI.method: 将审计政策设计建模为多代理人主从博弈：委托人承诺审计政策，代理人集体选择最小化委托人效用的均衡。分别研究了自适应（政策可响应报告分布）和非自适应设定，并考虑了有限审计预算约束。
AI.result: 在自适应和非自适应两种设定下均提出了计算最优审计政策的高效算法，并将结果成功扩展到有限审计预算的情形。
AI.conclusion: 本文为欺诈防范中的审计机制设计提供了理论框架和高效求解方法，拓展了审计策略在资源分配问题中的适用边界。

title: Beyond Isolated Utterances: Cue-Guided Interaction for Context-Dependent Conversational Multimodal Understanding
summary: Conversational multimodal understanding aims to infer the meaning or label of the current utterance from its preceding dialogue context together with textual, acoustic, and visual signals. Existing methods mainly strengthen contextual modeling through enhanced encoding, fusion, or propagation, but rarely abstract the context-utterance dependency into an explicit cue and incorporate it into later multimodal reasoning. To address this issue, we propose CUCI-Net for conversational multimodal understanding. CUCI-Net fully preserves the structural distinction between context and utterance during encoding, effectively abstracts their dependency into an interpretation cue by combining local modality evidence with global contextual evidence, and seamlessly integrates the resulting cue into the final multimodal interaction stage for context-conditioned prediction. Extensive experiments on mainstream benchmark datasets fully demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出CUCI-Net，通过将上下文-话语依赖关系抽象为显式线索并融入多模态交互阶段，提升对话多模态理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽加强了上下文建模，但很少将上下文-话语之间的依赖关系抽象为显式线索并用于后续多模态推理。
AI.method: CUCI-Net：编码时保留上下文与话语的结构区分，通过局部模态证据与全局上下文证据结合，将依赖关系抽象为解释线索，并整合到最终多模态交互阶段进行上下文条件预测。
AI.result: 主流基准数据集上的大量实验充分证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将上下文-话语依赖抽象为显式线索并融入多模态推理是提升对话理解的可行且有效方案。

title: Large Language Models Explore by Latent Distilling
summary: Generating diverse responses is crucial for test-time scaling of large language models (LLMs), yet standard stochastic sampling mostly yields surface-level lexical variation, limiting semantic exploration. In this paper, we propose Exploratory Sampling (ESamp), a decoding approach that explicitly encourages semantic diversity during generation. ESamp is motivated by the well-known observation that neural networks tend to make lower-error predictions on inputs similar to those encountered before, and incur higher prediction error on novel ones. Building on this property, we train a lightweight Distiller at test time to predict deep-layer hidden representations of the LLM from its shallow-layer representations to model the LLM's depth-wise representation transitions. During decoding, the Distiller continuously adapts to the mappings induced by the current generation context. ESamp uses the prediction error as a novelty signal to reweight candidate token extensions conditioned on the current prefix, thereby biasing decoding toward less-explored semantic patterns. ESamp is implemented with an asynchronous training--inference pipeline, with less than 5% worst case overhead (1.2% in the optimized release). Empirical results show that ESamp significantly boosts the Pass@k efficiency of reasoning models, showing superior or comparable performance to strong stochastic and heuristic baselines. Notably, ESamp achieves robust generalization across mathematics, science, and code generation benchmarks and breaks the trade-off between diversity and coherence in creative writing. Our code has released at: https://github.com/LinesHogan/tLLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出探索性采样（ESamp），一种通过训练轻量级Distiller在测试时预测LLM深层表示误差作为新颖性信号，以重加权候选token、鼓励语义多样性的解码方法，在数学、科学、代码生成和创意写作中均取得优异效果。
AI.motivation: 标准随机采样仅产生表层词汇变化，限制了语义层面的探索，亟需一种能显式鼓励语义多样性的解码方法以提升大语言模型的测试时扩展能力。
AI.method: 训练轻量级Distiller在测试时从LLM浅层表示预测深层表示，利用预测误差作为新颖性信号；在解码过程中，Distiller持续适应当前生成上下文，根据预测误差重加权候选token扩展，偏向选择语义上未被充分探索的路径；采用异步训练-推理流水线实现。
AI.result: 显著提升推理模型的Pass@k效率，在数学、科学、代码生成基准上表现优于或媲美强随机与启发式基线，在创意写作中打破了多样性与连贯性之间的权衡，最坏情况开销低于5%（优化版仅1.2%）。
AI.conclusion: ESamp通过利用神经网络对新颖输入的预测误差特性，有效实现了语义多样性的显式控制，是一种实用且高效的解码策略，在多个领域展现出强大的泛化能力。

title: Offline Evaluation Measures of Fairness in Recommender Systems
summary:
The evaluation of recommender system fairness has become increasingly important, especially with recent legislation that emphasises the development of fair and responsible artificial intelligence. This has led to the emergence of various fairness evaluation measures, which quantify fairness based on different definitions. However, many of such measures are simply proposed and used without further analysis on their robustness. As a result, there is insufficient understanding and awareness of the measures' limitations. Among other issues, it is not known what kind of model outputs produce the (un)fairest score, how the measure scores are empirically distributed, and whether there are cases where the measures cannot be computed (e.g., due to division by zero). These issues cause difficulty in interpreting the measure scores and confusion on which measure(s) should be used for a specific case.
  This thesis presents a series of papers that assess and overcome various theoretical, empirical, and conceptual limitations of existing recommender system fairness evaluation measures. We investigate a wide range of offline evaluation measures for different fairness notions, divided based on the evaluation subjects (users and items) and for different evaluation granularities (groups of subjects and individual subjects). Firstly, we perform theoretical and empirical analysis on the measures, exposing flaws that limit their interpretability, expressiveness, or applicability. Secondly, we contribute novel evaluation approaches and measures that overcome these limitations. Finally, considering the measures' limitations, we recommend guidelines for the appropriate measure usage, thereby allowing for more precise selection of fairness evaluation measures in practical scenarios.
  Overall, this thesis contributes to advancing the state-of-the-art offline evaluation of fairness in recommender systems.

AI.tldr: 本论文系统分析了现有推荐系统公平性评估指标在理论、经验及概念层面的局限性，提出了新的评估方法，并给出实际使用指南。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统公平性评估指标缺乏鲁棒性分析，导致对其局限性认知不足，难以解释评分结果及选择合适的指标。
AI.method: 对多种离线公平性评估指标（按评估主体：用户/物品，按粒度：群体/个体）进行理论与实证分析，揭示其缺陷；提出新的评估方法与指标；制定使用指南。
AI.result: 揭示了现有指标在可解释性、表达力或适用性上的局限，提出了克服这些局限的新方法，并给出了指标选择指南。
AI.conclusion: 该论文推进了推荐系统公平性的离线评估研究，提升了对指标局限性的理解，并为实际场景中精准选择公平性评估指标提供了指导。

title: Learning Illumination Control in Diffusion Models
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026 ReALM-GEN Workshop on Diffusion Models. Project Website: https://nishitanand.github.io/relighting-diffusion-website
summary: Controlling illumination in images is essential for photography and visual content creation. While closed-source models have demonstrated impressive illumination control, open-source alternatives either require heavy control inputs like depth maps or do not release their data and code. We present a fully open-source and reproducible pipeline for learning illumination control in diffusion models. Our approach builds a data engine that transforms well-lit images into supervised training triplets consisting of a poorly-illuminated input image, a natural language lighting instruction, and a well-illuminated output image. We finetune a diffusion model on this data and demonstrate significant improvements over baseline SD 1.5, SDXL, and FLUX.1-dev models in perceptual similarity, structural similarity, and identity preservation. Our work provides a reproducible solution built entirely with open-source tools and publicly available data. We release all our code, data, and model weights publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个完全开源且可复现的扩散模型照明控制管线，通过构建数据引擎生成弱照明图像、文本指令和良好照明图像的三元组训练数据，微调扩散模型后在感知相似度、结构相似度和身份保持上显著优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 封闭源模型已展现出强大的照明控制能力，但开源替代方案要么需要深度图等繁重的控制输入，要么未公开数据和代码。作者旨在提供一个完全开源、可复现的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建数据引擎，将良好照明的图像转换为弱照明输入图像、自然语言照明指令和良好照明输出图像的三元组监督数据；基于该数据微调扩散模型。
AI.result: 在感知相似度、结构相似度和身份保持方面，显著优于SD 1.5、SDXL和FLUX.1-dev等基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了完全使用开源工具和公开数据构建的可复现解决方案，并公开了所有代码、数据和模型权重。

title: Programming with Data: Test-Driven Data Engineering for Self-Improving LLMs from Raw Corpora
summary: Reliably transferring specialized human knowledge from text into large language models remains a fundamental challenge in artificial intelligence. Fine-tuning on domain corpora has enabled substantial capability gains, but the process operates without feedback: when a model fails on a domain task, there is no method to diagnose what is deficient in the training data, and the only recourse is to add more data indiscriminately. Here we show that when a structured knowledge representation extracted from the source corpus serves as the shared foundation for both training data and evaluation, the complete data-engineering lifecycle maps onto the software development lifecycle in a precise and operative way: training data becomes source code specifying what the model should learn, model training becomes compilation, benchmarking becomes unit testing, and failure-driven data repair becomes debugging. Under this correspondence, model failures decompose into concept-level gaps and reasoning-chain breaks that can be traced back to specific deficiencies in the data and repaired through targeted patches, with each repair cycle producing consistent improvements across model scales and architectures without degrading general capabilities. We formalize this principle as Programming with Data and instantiate it across sixteen disciplines spanning the natural sciences, engineering, biomedicine, and the social sciences, releasing a structured knowledge base, benchmark suite, and training corpus as open resources. By demonstrating that the relationship between training data and model behaviour is structurally traceable and systematically repairable, this work establishes a principled foundation for the reliable engineering of human expertise into language models.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"用数据编程"（Programming with Data）范式，将结构化知识表示作为训练数据和评估的共同基础，将数据工程生命周期映射到软件开发周期，使模型失败可追溯到具体数据缺陷并通过针对性补丁修复。在16个学科中验证，修复能持续提升模型表现且不损害通用能力。
AI.motivation: 当前微调领域模型缺乏反馈机制：模型在领域任务上失败时，无法诊断训练数据中具体缺失什么，只能盲目添加数据。需要一种可追溯、可修复的数据工程方法论。
AI.method: 提出"用数据编程"（Programming with Data）原则：从源语料中提取结构化知识表示，作为训练数据和评估的共同基础。将数据工程映射为软件开发流程——训练数据=源代码，模型训练=编译，基准测试=单元测试，失败驱动的数据修复=调试。模型失败分解为概念级缺口和推理链断裂，可追溯到数据缺陷并通过针对性补丁修复。
AI.result: 在16个学科（自然科学、工程、生物医学、社会科学）中验证该范式，每次修复循环都能在不同模型规模和架构上产生一致的改进，且不损害通用能力。发布了结构化知识库、基准套件和训练语料作为开放资源。
AI.conclusion: 证明了训练数据与模型行为之间的关系在结构上是可追溯的、可系统修复的，为将人类专业知识可靠地工程化到语言模型中建立了原则性基础。

title: Automated detection of pediatric congenital heart disease from phonocardiograms using deep and handcrafted feature fusion
comment: 9 Pages, 5 figures. Computers in Biology and Medicine, 2025
summary: Congenital heart disease (CHD) is the most common type of birth defect, impacting about 1% of live births worldwide. Echocardiography, the gold-standard diagnostic method, is costly and inaccessible in low-resource settings. Diagnosis is delayed due to limited skilled experts, whose ability to interpret pathological patterns varies significantly, causing inter- and intra-clinician variability. Therefore, we present a new method for a more accessible diagnostic modality, the digital stethoscope, to detect CHDs. Our method is based on deep feature fusion, integrating deep and handcrafted features for the automated early detection of CHDs. For this work, Phonocardiography (PCG) recordings were obtained from 751 pediatric subjects (Age:1 month- 16 years) in Bangladesh, ranging from infants to adults at four auscultation locations: mitral valve (MV), aortic valve (AV), pulmonary valve (PV), and tricuspid valve (TV). These recordings were labeled based on confirmed diagnoses by cardiologists as either cases of CHD or non-CHD. The results demonstrated that our proposed model achieved an accuracy of 92%, a sensitivity of 91%, and a specificity of 91%, based on a patient-wise split of 70% training, 20% validation, and 10% testing. Furthermore, the Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve (AUROC) of 96%, and an F1-score of 92%. This model promises efficient real-time remote detection of CHDs as a cost-effective screening tool for low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度特征融合的数字听诊器方法，通过心音信号自动检测先天性心脏病，在751名儿童数据上达到92%准确率，为低资源环境提供经济高效的筛查工具。
AI.motivation: 超声心动图作为CHD诊断金标准，成本高且在低资源环境下难以普及；专业医师资源匮乏且诊断存在主观差异性，导致CHD诊断延迟。因此需要一种更易获取、更经济的诊断方法。
AI.method: 基于深度特征融合，将深度学习特征与人工设计特征结合，对数字听诊器采集的心音信号（PCG）进行自动分析。数据来自751名儿童（1个月-16岁），在四个听诊位置（二尖瓣、主动脉瓣、肺动脉瓣、三尖瓣）采集，按70%/20%/10%划分训练/验证/测试集。
AI.result: 准确率92%，灵敏度91%，特异度91%，AUROC 96%，F1-score 92%。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可作为低资源环境下高效、实时的CHD远程筛查工具，具有经济成本优势。

title: Latent Agents: A Post-Training Procedure for Internalized Multi-Agent Debate
summary: Multi-agent debate has been shown to improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, it is compute-intensive, requiring generation of long transcripts before answering questions. To address this inefficiency, we develop a framework that distills multi-agent debate into a single LLM through a two-stage fine-tuning pipeline combining debate structure learning with internalization via dynamic reward scheduling and length clipping. Across multiple models and benchmarks, our internalized models match or exceed explicit multi-agent debate performance using up to 93% fewer tokens. We then investigate the mechanistic basis of this capability through activation steering, finding that internalization creates agent-specific subspaces: interpretable directions in activation space corresponding to different agent perspectives. We further demonstrate a practical application: by instilling malicious agents into the LLM through internalized debate, then applying negative steering to suppress them, we show that distillation makes harmful behaviors easier to localize and control with smaller reductions in general performance compared to steering base models. Our findings offer a new perspective for understanding multi-agent capabilities in distilled models and provide practical guidelines for controlling internalized reasoning behaviors. Code available at https://github.com/johnsk95/latent_agents

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将多智能体辩论蒸馏到单个LLM的两阶段微调框架（辩论结构学习+动态奖励调度与长度裁剪），使单模型在匹配甚至超越显式多智能体辩论性能的同时，最多减少93%的token消耗。通过激活引导发现辩论蒸馏创造了可解释的智能体特定子空间，并证明了该方法有助于更容易地定位和控制有害行为。
AI.motivation: 多智能体辩论虽然能提升LLM推理能力，但计算成本高昂，需要生成长篇辩论记录才能回答问题。为了提高效率，作者希望将多智能体辩论能力蒸馏到单个模型中。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段微调流水线：第一阶段进行辩论结构学习，第二阶段通过动态奖励调度和长度裁剪实现能力内化。此外，使用激活引导探索模型内部机制。
AI.result: 内化后的模型在多个模型和基准上匹配或超越显式多智能体辩论性能，token消耗最高减少93%；发现辩论内化创建了可解释的智能体特定子空间；通过恶意智能体内化+负向引导，有害行为更易定位和控制，且对通用性能的损失更小。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解蒸馏模型中的多智能体能力提供了新视角，并为控制内化推理行为提供了实用指南。

title: Job-Scheduling Games with Time-Dependent Processing Times
summary:
Job-scheduling games have traditionally assumed fixed processing times. However, in many realistic environments, ranging from cyber-security response to high-frequency trading, a task's duration depends on its starting time. We study job-scheduling games with time-dependent processing times, where job lengths are linear functions of their start times, exhibiting either positive deterioration (increasing length) or negative deterioration (decreasing length). We analyze these games under various coordination mechanisms and priority policies. By introducing the concept of delay-averse agents, we provide a unifying framework to characterize equilibrium existence. For delay-averse jobs, we show that stability is maintained and pure Nash equilibria (NE) can be computed efficiently. In contrast, for non-delay-averse jobs, we demonstrate that a NE may not exist, and prove that deciding its existence is NP-complete, even on identical machines - a fundamental departure from classical coordination mechanisms.
  Regarding equilibrium inefficiency, we show that the Price of Anarchy (PoA) can be significantly higher than in environments with fixed processing times. To mitigate this, we propose and analyze three coordination mechanisms: SBPT (Shortest Basic Processing Time), which reduces the PoA in games with positive deterioration to a constant, and SDR (Smallest Deterioration Rate) and LBDR (Largest Basic-Deterioration Ratio) for negative deterioration, which achieve tight constant PoA bounds of $2$ and $\max\{\frac{e}{e-1}, 2-\frac{1}{m}\}$, respectively. Our results bridge the gap between centralized time-dependent scheduling and decentralized game-theoretic analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有时间依赖处理时间的作业调度博弈，分析了在固定处理时间假设下不存在的均衡复杂性，并提出了三种协调机制来降低无政府代价（PoA）。
AI.motivation: 传统作业调度博弈假设处理时间固定，但在网络安全响应、高频交易等现实场景中，任务时长依赖于开始时间。本文旨在填补集中式时间依赖调度与分散式博弈分析之间的空白。
AI.method: 引入"延迟厌恶"（delay-averse）概念统一分析均衡存在性；针对正恶化（处理时间递增）和负恶化（处理时间递减）两类场景，提出SBPT、SDR、LBDR三种协调机制，并证明其PoA上界。
AI.result: 延迟厌恶作业的纯纳什均衡存在且可高效计算；非延迟厌恶作业的NE存在性判定是NP完全的。SBPT将正恶化场景PoA降为常数，SDR和LBDR分别实现2和max{e/(e-1), 2-1/m}的紧常数PoA界。
AI.conclusion: 时间依赖处理时间显著改变了调度博弈的均衡性质，但通过合理的协调机制设计仍可保证稳定性和效率。

title: MarkIt: Training-Free Visual Markers for Precise Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG) aims to localize the start and end timestamps of the event described by a given query within an untrimmed video. Despite the strong open-world video understanding and recognition ability of video language large models (Vid-LLMs), outputting precise temporal grounding information remains challenging, since explicit temporal cues are scarce in untrimmed videos, and query-relevant entities are hard to track consistently across the video timeline. In this paper, we present \MarkIt{}, a training-free framework that transforms an input video into a query-conditioned marked video, which empowers Vid-LLMs to generate more reliable temporal localization predictions. The core component of \MarkIt{} is an annotation-free query-to-mask grounding bridge (Q2M-Bridge). Given a natural-language query, it automatically derives a compact set of canonical subject tags through linguistic parsing and normalization, then maps these tags to query-conditioned instance masks using text-conditioned open-vocabulary segmentation. The bridge also embeds lightweight semantic instance markers and a persistent frame index into each frame, effectively transforming long-range temporal reasoning into explicit visual cues for Vid-LLMs. \MarkIt{} adopts an inference-time plug-and-play design, needs no modifications to Vid-LLM weights, and is fully compatible with supervised fine-tuning. Experiments conducted on multiple mainstream moment retrieval and highlight detection benchmarks demonstrate that \MarkIt {} achieves state-of-the-art results, delivering consistent temporal grounding improvements across a wide range of existing models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MarkIt，一种无需训练的框架，通过将输入视频转换为查询条件标记视频，显著提升视频语言大模型(Vid-LLMs)在时间定位任务上的表现。核心组件Q2M-Bridge自动将自然语言查询映射为实例掩码并嵌入语义标记，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有Vid-LLMs虽然具备强大的开放世界视频理解能力，但在输出精确的时间定位信息时面临挑战：(1)未修剪视频中显式时间线索稀缺；(2)查询相关实体难以在时间轴上持续跟踪。
AI.method: 提出MarkIt框架，核心是Q2M-Bridge（查询到掩码桥接模块）：(1)通过语言解析和归一化从自然语言查询中自动提取一组规范的主语标签；(2)利用文本条件开放词汇分割将标签映射为查询条件实例掩码；(3)在每帧中嵌入轻量语义实例标记和持久帧索引，将长程时间推理转化为显式视觉线索。该框架无需训练，即插即用，兼容微调。
AI.result: 在多个主流时刻检索和精彩片段检测基准上达到SOTA结果，在多种现有模型上均实现一致的时间定位提升。
AI.conclusion: MarkIt是一种有效的训练无关框架，通过增强视频中的时间线索来提升Vid-LLMs的时间定位能力，具有即插即用、无需修改模型权重等优势。

title: GAIA-v2-LILT: Multilingual Adaptation of Agent Benchmark beyond Translation
summary: Agent benchmarks remain largely English-centric, while their multilingual versions are often built with machine translation (MT) and limited post-editing. We argue that, for agentic tasks, this minimal workflow can easily break benchmark validity through query-answer misalignment or culturally off-target context. We propose a refined workflow for adapting English benchmarks into multiple languages with explicit functional alignment, cultural alignment, and difficulty calibration using both automated checks and human review. Using this workflow, we introduce GAIA-v2-LILT, a re-audited multilingual extension of GAIA covering five non-English languages. In experiments, our workflow improves agent success rates by up to 32.7% over minimally translated versions, bringing the closest audited setting to within 3.1% of English performance while substantial gaps remain in many other cases. This indicates that a substantial share of the multilingual performance gap is benchmark-induced measurement error, motivating task-level alignment when adapting English benchmarks across languages. The data is available as part of the MAPS package at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Fujitsu-FRE/MAPS/viewer/GAIA-v2-LILT. We also release the code used in our experiments at https://github.com/lilt/gaia-v2-lilt.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有智能体基准测试主要局限于英语，机器翻译+少量人工校对的多语言版本容易产生查询与答案不匹配或文化语境偏差。作者提出了一套融合功能对齐、文化对齐和难度校准的多语言适配流程，并基于此构建了GAIA-v2-LILT（覆盖5种非英语语言）。实验表明，该流程相比简单机器翻译版本可将智能体成功率提升高达32.7%，说明多语言性能差距中很大一部分是基准测试本身引入的测量误差。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试以英语为中心，其多语言版本大多依赖机器翻译和有限的人工校对，在智能体任务中容易导致查询-答案错位或文化语境不准确，从而破坏基准的有效性。
AI.method: 提出一套包含功能对齐（确保查询与答案意图一致）、文化对齐（调整语境以符合目标文化）、难度校准（通过自动检查和人工审核）的精细化工作流，用于将英语基准适配到多种语言。
AI.result: 在GAIA-v2-LILT数据集上，所提工作流相比最小翻译版本将智能体成功率提升最高达32.7%；最佳对齐设置下，某些语言与英语性能差距缩小至3.1%，但多数语言仍存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 多语言性能差距中有相当大一部分是基准测试本身引入的测量误差，因此在将英语基准适配到其他语言时，需要进行任务级别的对齐。

title: UnIte: Uncertainty-based Iterative Document Sampling for Domain Adaptation in Information Retrieval
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation generalizes neural retrievers to an unseen domain by generating pseudo queries on target domain documents. The quality and efficiency of this adaptation critically depend on which documents are selected for pseudo query generation. The existing document sampling method focuses on diversity but fails to capture model uncertainty. In contrast, we propose **Un**certainty-based **Ite**rative Document Sampling (UnIte) addressing these limitations by (1) filtering documents with high aleatoric uncertainty and (2) prioritizing those with high epistemic uncertainty, maximizing the learning utility of the current model. We conducted extensive experiments on a large corpus of BEIR with small and large models, showing significant gains of +2.45 and +3.49 nDCG@10 with a smaller training sample size, 4k on average.

AI.tldr: 提出基于不确定性的迭代文档采样方法(UnIte)，通过过滤高偶然不确定性和优先选择高认知不确定性的文档来生成伪查询，提升无监督领域自适应效果，在BEIR数据集上仅用平均4k训练样本即可获得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有文档采样方法仅关注多样性，未能捕捉模型不确定性，导致伪查询生成的质量和效率受限。
AI.method: 提出UnIte方法：(1)过滤高偶然不确定性(aleatoric uncertainty)的文档；(2)优先选择高认知不确定性(epistemic uncertainty)的文档，最大化当前模型的学习效用。
AI.result: 在BEIR大规模语料库上，使用小模型和大模型分别获得+2.45和+3.49 nDCG@10的提升，且仅需平均4k训练样本。
AI.conclusion: 基于不确定性的迭代文档采样策略相比传统多样性采样更有效，能以更少样本实现更好的域自适应效果。

title: VibeToken: Scaling 1D Image Tokenizers and Autoregressive Models for Dynamic Resolution Generations
comment: Accepted at CVPR'26 | Project Page: https://github.com/SonyResearch/VibeToken
summary: We introduce an efficient, resolution-agnostic autoregressive (AR) image synthesis approach that generalizes to arbitrary resolutions and aspect ratios, narrowing the gap to diffusion models at scale. At its core is VibeToken, a novel resolution-agnostic 1D Transformer-based image tokenizer that encodes images into a dynamic, user-controllable sequence of 32-256 tokens, achieving a state-of-the-art efficiency and performance trade-off. Building on VibeToken, we present VibeToken-Gen, a class-conditioned AR generator with out-of-the-box support for arbitrary resolutions while requiring significantly fewer compute resources. Notably, VibeToken-Gen synthesizes 1024x1024 images using only 64 tokens and achieves 3.94 gFID; by comparison, a diffusion-based state-of-the-art alternative requires 1,024 tokens and attains 5.87 gFID. In contrast to fixed-resolution AR models such as LlamaGen -- whose inference FLOPs grow quadratically with resolution (11T FLOPs at 1024x1024) -- VibeToken-Gen maintains a constant 179G FLOPs (63.4x efficient) independent of resolution. We hope VibeToken can help unlock the wide adoption of AR visual generative models in production use cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VibeToken，一种分辨率无关的自回归图像生成方法，通过1D Transformer将图像编码为32-256个动态token，在显著降低计算成本的同时实现与扩散模型相当的性能。VibeToken-Gen仅用64个token即可生成1024x1024图像（gFID 3.94），计算量恒定179G FLOPs，比LlamaGen高效63.4倍。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归（AR）图像生成模型受限于固定分辨率，推理计算量随分辨率二次增长；扩散模型虽性能优异但计算成本高。作者希望弥合AR模型与扩散模型之间的性能差距，并推动AR模型在生产场景中的广泛应用。
AI.method: 提出VibeToken——一种基于1D Transformer的分辨率无关图像分词器，可将图像编码为32-256个动态长度的token序列。基于此构建VibeToken-Gen，一个类别条件自回归生成器，支持任意分辨率且计算量恒定。核心创新在于token数量用户可控且与分辨率解耦。
AI.result: VibeToken-Gen生成1024x1024图像仅需64个token，gFID为3.94，优于扩散模型的5.87 gFID（需1024 token）；推理FLOPs恒定179G（与分辨率无关），而LlamaGen在相同分辨率下需11T FLOPs，VibeToken-Gen高效63.4倍。
AI.conclusion: VibeToken在效率-性能权衡上达到SOTA，成功缩小了AR模型与扩散模型之间的差距，有望推动AR视觉生成模型在生产中的广泛采用。

title: A systematic literature Review for Transformer-based Software Vulnerability detection
summary: Context: Software vulnerabilities pose significant security threats to software systems, especially as software is increasingly used across many areas of daily life, including health, government, and finance. Recently, transformer-based models have demonstrated promising results in automatic software vulnerability identification due to their robust contextual modelling and representation learning capabilities. Objectives: While numerous systematic literature reviews (SLRs) have examined machine learning and deep learning methods for identifying vulnerabilities, a more transformer-centric analysis remains to be explored. This SLR critically analysed 80 studies published between 2021 and 2025 that utilised transformer models to identify software vulnerabilities. Methods: Using Kitchenhams SLR guidelines, we methodically evaluate current research from various perspectives, encompassing study trends, datasets and sources, programming languages, transformer frameworks, detection detail levels, assessment metrics, reference models, types of vulnerabilities, and experimental configurations. Results: We classify transformer models into encoder, decoder, and combined architectures and analyse both pre-trained and fine-tuned versions utilized on source code, logs, and smart contracts. The results emphasise prevailing research trends, frequently utilised benchmarks, and main baselines. It also uncovers crucial technical issues like data imbalance, interpretability, scalability, and generalization across programming languages. Conclusion: By integrating current evidence and recognising unaddressed research areas, this SLR provides a consolidated resource for researchers and professionals seeking to develop more reliable, precise, and interpretable transformer-based vulnerability identification systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文对2021-2025年间80项使用Transformer模型识别软件漏洞的研究进行了系统性文献综述，将模型分为编码器、解码器和混合架构三类，分析了数据集、编程语言、评估指标等维度，并指出了数据不平衡、可解释性、可扩展性等关键问题。
AI.motivation: 软件漏洞对健康、政府、金融等领域构成严重安全威胁。虽然已有关于机器学习和深度学习方法识别漏洞的系统综述，但缺乏以Transformer为中心的专门分析。
AI.method: 遵循Kitchenham的系统文献综述指南，从研究趋势、数据集与来源、编程语言、Transformer框架、检测细节级别、评估指标、参考模型、漏洞类型和实验配置等多个视角，系统性地评估了2021至2025年间发表的80篇相关研究。
AI.result: 将Transformer模型分为编码器、解码器和混合架构三类；分析了预训练和微调版本在源代码、日志和智能合约上的应用；揭示了研究趋势、常用基准和主要基线；发现了数据不平衡、可解释性、可扩展性及跨语言泛化等关键技术问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合现有证据并识别未被充分研究的领域，为研究人员和从业者开发更可靠、精确且可解释的基于Transformer的漏洞识别系统提供了综合资源。

title: Comparative Study of Bending Analysis using Physics-Informed Neural Networks and Numerical Dynamic Deflection in Perforated nanobeam
summary: In this chapter, we investigate the bending behavior of a perforated nanobeam subjected to sinusoidal loading using an efficient and computationally robust Physics-Informed Functional Link Constrained Framework with Domain Mapping (DFL-TFC) method. Our aim is to determine the relationship between static bending response and dynamic deflection of a perforated nanobeam for various perforation cases. The static bending is obtained using the FL-TFC with Domain mapped method, whereas dynamic deflection is determined using the Galerkin method. The proposed approach employs the theory of functional connections (TFC) to systematically embed governing differential equation constraints into a constrained expression (CE), which exactly satisfies all prescribed initial and boundary conditions (ICs and BCs) and domain of differential equation is mapped to domain of orthogonal polynomials. Within this framework, the free function appearing in the constrained expression is expressed through a functional link neural network (FLNN). The cost is minimized by the mean square residual of DE, allowing training without requiring complex deep network architectures. Relationship between static and dynamic defection of simply-supported (S-S) perforated nanobeams has been investigated here. FL-TFC with Domain mapped method eliminates the need for deep and complex neural network architectures while ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and strict satisfaction of boundary conditions as compared to standard PINN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的函数链接约束框架（DFL-TFC）方法，用于研究穿孔纳米梁在正弦载荷下的弯曲行为，建立了静态弯曲与动态挠度之间的关系，并通过域映射技术避免了复杂深度网络结构，同时保证了精度和边界条件的严格满足。
AI.motivation: 研究穿孔纳米梁在不同穿孔情况下的静态弯曲响应与动态挠度之间的关系，旨在开发一种高效、计算稳健且无需复杂深度网络架构的方法。
AI.method: 采用DFL-TFC方法：利用函数连接理论（TFC）将控制微分方程约束嵌入约束表达式（CE），严格满足初始和边界条件；将微分方程域映射到正交多项式域；自由函数通过函数链接神经网络（FLNN）表达；通过均方残差最小化训练；静态弯曲用FL-TFC域映射法，动态挠度用Galerkin法。
AI.result: 该方法在保证准确性和效率的同时，严格满足边界条件，较标准PINN方法无需深度复杂网络架构；成功建立了简支穿孔纳米梁静态与动态挠度之间的关系。
AI.conclusion: DFL-TFC方法是一种高效、稳健的穿孔纳米梁弯曲行为分析框架，有效替代了传统深度神经网络方法，为纳米梁的静动态分析提供了新途径。

title: S-SONDO: Self-Supervised Knowledge Distillation for General Audio Foundation Models
comment: Accepted at IEEE ICASSP 2026. 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Equal contribution by first two authors. Code: https://github.com/MedAliAdlouni/ssondo | Models: https://huggingface.co/mohammedali2501/ssondo | Package: https://pypi.org/project/ssondo/
summary: General audio foundation models have recently achieved remarkable progress, enabling strong performance across diverse tasks. However, state-of-the-art models remain extremely large, often with hundreds of millions of parameters, leading to high inference costs and limited deployability on edge devices. Knowledge distillation is a proven strategy for model compression, but prior work in audio has mostly focused on supervised settings, relying on class logits, intermediate features, or architecture-specific techniques. Such assumptions exclude models that output only embeddings, such as self-supervised or metric-learning models. We introduce S-SONDO (Self-Supervised KnOwledge DistillatioN for General AuDio FOundation Models), the first framework to distill general audio models using only their output embeddings. By avoiding the need for logits or layer-level alignment, S-SONDO is architecture-agnostic and broadly applicable to embedding-based teachers. We demonstrate its effectiveness by distilling two audio foundation models into three efficient students that are up to 61 times smaller while retaining up to 96% of teacher performance. We also provide practical insights on loss choice and clustering-based balanced data sampling. Code is available here: https://github.com/MedAliAdlouni/ssondo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S-SONDO，首个仅利用输出嵌入对通用音频基础模型进行知识蒸馏的框架，无需类别logits或中间特征，可将模型压缩至最高61倍且保持96%性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音频基础模型规模庞大（数亿参数），推理成本高、难以部署到边缘设备；而先前的音频知识蒸馏方法大多依赖类别logits、中间特征或特定架构，无法适用于仅输出嵌入的模型（如自监督或度量学习模型）。
AI.method: 提出S-SONDO框架，仅利用教师模型的输出嵌入（embedding）来蒸馏学生模型，不依赖logits或层级对齐，因此架构无关且广泛适用；同时结合聚类均衡采样策略和损失函数选择提供实用指导。
AI.result: 将两个音频基础模型蒸馏为三个高效学生模型，规模缩小高达61倍，同时保留教师模型高达96%的性能。
AI.conclusion: S-SONDO证明了仅利用输出嵌入即可有效蒸馏通用音频模型，为自监督和度量学习等嵌入型模型的压缩与边缘部署提供了可行方案。

title: Credit Limits beyond Full Collateralization in Decentralized Micropayments: Incentive Conditions
summary: In decentralized non-custodial micropayments, the central challenge is not whether payments can be executed directly, but under what conditions such systems can offer credit limits without requiring full collateral backing. Existing approaches typically tie available credit to posted collateral, causing liquidity requirements to scale with transaction volume and settlement exposure and limiting the practical usefulness of credit-based micropayments. This paper characterizes the incentive conditions under which credit-based non-custodial micropayments can operate beyond full collateralization while remaining incentive compatible. We model repeated buyer--merchant interactions under public monitoring and identify the roles of bounded exposure, verifiable settlement outcomes, and continuation value in deterring strategic default under non-custodial execution. The resulting characterization clarifies the trade-off between capital efficiency and the enforcement conditions required to sustain under-collateralized credit expansion without custodial trust. As an illustrative application-layer instantiation, an Arbitrum Nitro prototype provides execution-level evidence that the settlement, commitment, and incentive-enforcement paths of a credit-limit-based design can be realized with low on-chain overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了去中心化非托管微支付系统中，如何在不要求全额抵押的情况下实现信用额度，并保证激励相容。通过建模重复博弈，分析了有限暴露、可验证结算结果和延续价值在阻止策略性违约中的作用，阐明了资本效率与执行条件之间的权衡，并在Arbitrum Nitro上进行了原型验证。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化非托管微支付方案要求信用额度与抵押物挂钩，导致流动性需求随交易量增长而扩大，限制了信用微支付的实用性。本文旨在探究在非托管执行下，信用微支付能否在低于全额抵押的条件下保持激励相容。
AI.method: 构建重复买卖双方博弈模型（公开监测），分析有限暴露、可验证结算结果和延续价值对策略性违约的抑制作用，并在Arbitrum Nitro上实现原型系统进行执行层验证。
AI.result: 给出了低于全额抵押的信用扩张的激励相容条件，明确了资本效率与执行条件之间的权衡关系；Arbitrum Nitro原型证明了信用限额设计方案的低链上开销可行性。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化非托管微支付可以在不依赖全额抵押的情况下运行，关键在于通过博弈论条件约束违约激励；该工作在资本效率和去信任化之间提供了理论指导和实践验证。

title: ADE: Adaptive Dictionary Embeddings -- Scaling Multi-Anchor Representations to Large Language Models
comment: 13 pages (9 pages main text + 4 pages appendix), 6 tables, 1 algorithm
summary: Word embeddings are fundamental to natural language processing, yet traditional approaches represent each word with a single vector, creating representational bottlenecks for polysemous words and limiting semantic expressiveness. While multi-anchor representations have shown promise by representing words as combinations of multiple vectors, they have been limited to small-scale models due to computational inefficiency and lack of integration with modern transformer architectures. We introduce Adaptive Dictionary Embeddings (ADE), a framework that successfully scales multi-anchor word representations to large language models. ADE makes three key contributions: (1) Vocabulary Projection (VP), which transforms the costly two-stage anchor lookup into a single efficient matrix operation; (2) Grouped Positional Encoding (GPE), a novel positional encoding scheme where anchors of the same word share positional information, preserving semantic coherence while enabling anchor-level variation; and (3) context-aware anchor reweighting, which leverages self-attention to dynamically compose anchor contributions based on sequence context. We integrate these components into the Segment-Aware Transformer (SAT), which provides context-aware reweighting of anchor contributions at inference time. We evaluate ADE on AG News and DBpedia-14 text classification benchmarks. With 98.7% fewer trainable parameters than DeBERTa-v3-base, ADE surpasses DeBERTa on DBpedia-14 (98.06% vs. 97.80%) and approaches it on AG News (90.64% vs. 94.50%), while compressing the embedding layer over 40x -- demonstrating that multi-anchor representations are a practical and parameter-efficient alternative to single-vector embeddings in modern transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应字典嵌入（ADE），通过词汇投影、分组位置编码和上下文感知锚点重加权三大创新，将多锚点词表示成功扩展到大型语言模型，在参数量减少98.7%的情况下，在DBpedia-14上超越DeBERTa-v3-base，并将嵌入层压缩40倍以上。
AI.motivation: 传统词嵌入用单一向量表示每个词，无法有效处理多义词，表达能力受限；已有的多锚点表示方法因计算效率低且无法融入Transformer架构，仅限于小规模模型。
AI.method: 提出ADE框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 词汇投影(VP)，将两阶段锚点查找转化为单次矩阵运算；(2) 分组位置编码(GPE)，同词锚点共享位置信息以保持语义连贯性；(3) 上下文感知锚点重加权，利用自注意力机制动态组合锚点贡献。集成到分段感知Transformer(SAT)中实现推理时的上下文感知重加权。
AI.result: 在AG News和DBpedia-14文本分类基准上，ADE参数量比DeBERTa-v3-base减少98.7%，在DBpedia-14上超越DeBERTa (98.06% vs 97.80%)，在AG News上接近 (90.64% vs 94.50%)，嵌入层压缩超40倍。
AI.conclusion: 多锚点表示是一种实用且参数高效的单向量嵌入替代方案，可成功扩展到现代Transformer架构中。

title: From Local Indices to Global Identifiers: Generative Reranking for Recommender Systems via Global Action Space
summary: In modern recommender systems, list-wise reranking serves as a critical phase within the multi-stage pipeline, finalizing the exposed item sequence and directly impacting user satisfaction by modeling complex intra-list item dependencies. Existing methods typically formulate this task as selecting indices from the local input list. However, this approach suffers from a semantically inconsistent action space: the same output neuron (logits) represents different items across different samples, preventing the model from establishing a stable, intrinsic understanding of the items. To address this, we propose GloRank (Global Action Space Ranker), a generative framework that shifts reranking from selecting local indices to generating global identifiers. Specifically, we represent items as sequences of discrete tokens and reformulate reranking as a token generation task. This design effectively decouples the scoring mechanism from the variable input order, ensuring that items are evaluated against a consistent global standard. We further enhance this with a two-stage optimization pipeline: a supervised pre-training phase to initialize the model with high-quality demonstrations, followed by a reinforcement learning-based post-training phase to directly maximize list-wise utility. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks and a large-scale industrial dataset, coupled with online A/B tests, demonstrate that GloRank consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and achieves superior robustness in cold-start scenarios.

AI.tldr: GloRank 提出将列表重排序从局部索引选择转变为全局标识符生成，通过离散标记序列表示物品，并采用两阶段优化（监督预训练+强化学习后训练），在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有列表重排序方法将任务建模为从局部输入列表中选择索引，导致动作空间语义不一致——相同输出神经元在不同样本中代表不同物品，模型无法建立稳定的物品内在理解。
AI.method: 提出 GloRank，一个生成式框架：1) 将物品表示为离散标记序列，将重排序重构为标记生成任务；2) 采用两阶段优化：监督预训练初始化模型，强化学习后训练直接最大化列表级效用。
AI.result: 在两个公开基准、一个大规模工业数据集以及在线 A/B 测试中，GloRank 一致优于最先进基线方法，并在冷启场景下表现更优的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局动作空间设计，GloRank 有效解决了局部索引选择带来的语义不一致问题，将重排序从选择转为生成，显著提升了推荐列表质量和模型鲁棒性。

title: Interactive Episodic Memory with User Feedback
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project Page: https://nsubedi11.github.io/refocus
summary: In episodic memory with natural language queries (EM-NLQ), a user may ask a question (e.g., "Where did I place the mug?") that requires searching a long egocentric video, captured from the user's perspective, to find the moment that answers it. However, queries can be ambiguous or incomplete, leading to incorrect responses. Current methods ignore this key aspect and address EM-NLQ in a one-shot setup, limiting their applicability in real-world scenarios. In this work, we address this gap and introduce the Episodic Memory with Questions and Feedback task (EM-QnF). Here, the user can provide feedback on the model's initial prediction or add more information (e.g., "Before this. I'm looking for the big blue mug not the white one"), helping the model refine its predictions interactively. To this end, we collect datasets for feedback-based interaction and propose a lightweight training scheme that avoids expensive sequential optimization. We also introduce a plug-and-play Feedback ALignment Module (FALM) that enables existing EM-NLQ models to incorporate user feedback effectively. Our approach significantly improves over the state of the art on three challenging benchmarks and is better than or competitive with commercial large vision-language models while remaining efficient. Evaluation with human-generated feedback shows that it generalizes well to real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EM-QnF任务，允许用户在问答过程中提供反馈来修正模型预测，并设计了FALM模块使现有模型能有效整合用户反馈，在三个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有EM-NLQ方法采用一次性查询方式，无法处理用户的模糊或不完整查询，且不支持交互式反馈修正，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 1) 提出EM-QnF任务定义，支持用户交互式反馈；2) 收集反馈交互数据集；3) 设计轻量训练方案避免昂贵的序列优化；4) 提出即插即用的反馈对齐模块(FALM)。
AI.result: 在三个挑战性基准上显著优于SOTA，与商业大型视觉语言模型相比表现更好或相当，同时保持高效性；在人生成反馈的评估中泛化能力良好。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入用户反馈机制，有效解决了EM-NLQ中查询歧义性问题，提升了模型在真实场景下的适用性和准确性。

title: FGDM: Reasoning Aware Multi-Agentic Framework for Software Bug Detection using Chain of Thought and Tree of Thought Prompting
summary: Deep Learning methods are becoming prominent in automated software bug detection; however, they lack the global understanding of the given code. Consequently, their performance tends to degrade, especially when they are applied to large interconnected code bases or complex modular programs. Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have proven to be effective at capturing dependencies among multiple interconnected modules in the codebase. This motivated us to propose the Flow-Graph-Driven Multi-Agent Framework (FGDM), which is composed of four agents that operate in a sequential manner. The framework converts the received code to a flow graph, identifies the erroneous segments, and further generates the repaired code. All the employed agents utilize Chain-of-Thought (COT) and Tree-of-Thoughts (TOT) prompts. Additionally, we also integrated with the FAISS vector database to retrieve similar previous bugs and their repairs. We demonstrated the efficacy of the proposed framework over 100 programs from several projects, including Ansible, Black, FastAPI, Keras, Luigi, Matplotlib, Pandas, Scrapy, SpaCy, and Tornado in both C and Python programs. Our experiments demonstrate that the FGDM outperforms the extant approaches and yielded reductions with a mean of 24.33 and 8.37 in Levenshtein distance and similarities of 0.951 and 0.974 in cosine similarity for Python and C, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出FGDM多智能体框架，利用流图驱动和LLM进行代码bug检测与修复，在C和Python程序上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习方法缺乏对代码的全局理解，在大型互连代码库或复杂模块程序上性能下降，因此需要一种能捕获模块间依赖关系的更好方法。
AI.method: FGDM框架包含四个顺序运行的智能体：将代码转换为流图、识别错误段、生成修复代码。所有智能体使用链式思维(COT)和树状思维(TOT)提示，并集成FAISS向量数据库检索相似历史bug及修复。
AI.result: 在10个项目的100个程序上测试，Python和C的Levenshtein距离平均降低24.33和8.37，余弦相似度达0.951和0.974，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FGDM多智能体框架通过流图驱动和LLM结合，能有效处理复杂代码的bug检测与修复，性能显著优于传统方法。

title: Liquid Neural Network Models for Natural Gas Spot Price Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Natural gas is undoubtedly an essential component of the global energy system. Accurate short-term forecasting of natural gas price is challenging due to pronounced volatility driven by seasonal demand patterns, geopolitical developments, and shifting macroeconomic conditions. The nonlinear dynamics and frequent regime changes can limit the effectiveness of traditional time-series models. In this study, we explore the use of Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs) for short-horizon forecasting of the Henry Hub spot price, a primary benchmark for pricing. LNNs are designed to adapt continuously to evolving temporal patterns through dynamic internal state updates, making them well suited for nonstationary price behavior. By improving forecast accuracy in volatile market conditions, this work aims to reduce uncertainty and enhance decision support across energy trading and power market applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨使用液态神经网络（LNNs）对Henry Hub现货价格进行短期预测，旨在应对天然气价格的高波动性和非线性动态特征。
AI.motivation: 天然气价格受季节性需求、地缘政治和宏观经济变化影响，波动剧烈且存在体制转换，传统时间序列模型效果有限，需更适应的预测方法。
AI.method: 采用液态神经网络（LNNs）进行短期预测，LNN通过动态内部状态更新持续适应时变模式，适用于非平稳价格行为。
AI.result: LNN在波动性市场条件下能提升预测准确性，减少不确定性。
AI.conclusion: LNN为能源交易和电力市场应用提供了有效的决策支持工具。

title: Adaptive Prompt Embedding Optimization for LLM Jailbreaking
summary: Existing white-box jailbreak attacks against aligned LLMs typically append discrete adversarial suffixes to the user prompt, which visibly alters the prompt and operates in a combinatorial token space. Prior work has avoided directly optimizing the embeddings of the original prompt tokens, presumably because perturbing them risks destroying the prompt's semantic content. We propose Prompt Embedding Optimization (PEO), a multi-round white-box jailbreak that directly optimizes the embeddings of the original prompt tokens without appending any adversarial tokens, and show that the concern is unfounded: the optimized embeddings remain close enough to their originals that the visible prompt string is preserved exactly after nearest-token projection, and quantitative analysis shows the model's responses stay on topic for the large majority of prompts. PEO combines continuous embedding-space optimization with structured continuation targets and an adaptive failure-focused schedule. Counterintuitively, later PEO rounds can benefit from heuristic composite response scaffolds that are not natural standalone templates, yet ASR-Judge shows that the resulting gains are not merely empty formatting or scaffold-only outputs. Across two standard harmful-behavior benchmarks and competing white-box attacks spanning discrete suffix search, appended adversarial embeddings, and search-based adversarial generation, PEO outperforms all of them in our experiments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为PEO的白盒越狱攻击方法，直接在原始提示词的嵌入空间进行优化，而不添加任何对抗性后缀。该方法通过多轮连续优化、结构化续写目标和自适应失败聚焦调度，在保持原提示语义不变的前提下，成功越狱对齐LLM，并在两个有害行为基准上超越多种现有白盒攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 现有白盒越狱攻击通常向用户提示附加离散的对抗性后缀，这不仅明显改变了提示文本，而且在离散的token空间中操作效率低下。此前的工作避免直接优化原始提示词的嵌入，担心这会破坏提示的语义内容。本文旨在挑战这一假设。
AI.method: 提出Prompt Embedding Optimization (PEO)，一种多轮白盒越狱方法：(1) 直接在原始提示词的嵌入空间进行连续优化；(2) 采用结构化续写目标引导模型生成有害内容；(3) 设计自适应失败聚焦调度策略，重点关注难攻克的样本；(4) 在后续轮次中引入启发式复合响应支架增强攻击效果。
AI.result: 实验在两个标准有害行为基准上进行，与多种白盒攻击（包括离散后缀搜索、附加对抗嵌入、基于搜索的对抗生成）对比，PEO在越狱成功率上全面超越所有对比方法。定量分析显示优化后的嵌入在近邻token投影后保持原始提示字符串不变，且模型响应在绝大多数情况下保持主题相关性。
AI.conclusion: 直接优化原始提示词的嵌入是一种可行的白盒越狱策略，消除了此前对破坏语义内容的担忧。PEO方法在保持提示可见性不变的同时实现了更强的攻击性能，揭示了连续嵌入空间优化在红队测试中的潜力。

title: FCMBench-Video: Benchmarking Document Video Intelligence
summary: Document understanding is a critical capability in financial credit review, onboarding, and remote verification, where both decision accuracy and evidence traceability matter. Compared with static document images, document videos present a temporally redundant and sequentially unfolding evidence stream, require evidence integration across frames, and preserve acquisition-process cues relevant to authenticity-sensitive and anti-fraud review. We introduce FCMBench-Video, a benchmark for document-video intelligence that evaluates document perception, temporal grounding, and evidence-grounded reasoning under realistic capture conditions. For privacy-compliant yet realistic data at scale, we organize construction as an atomic-acquisition and composition workflow that records reusable single-document clips, applies controlled degradations, and assembles long-form multi-document videos with prescribed temporal spans. FCMBench-Video is built from 495 atomic videos composed into 1,200 long-form videos paired with 11,322 expert-annotated question--answer instances, covering 28 document types over 20s--60s duration tiers and 5,960 Chinese / 5,362 English instances. Evaluations on nine recent Video-MLLMs show that FCMBench-Video provides meaningful separation across systems and capabilities: counting is the most duration-sensitive task, Cross-Document Validation and Evidence-Grounded Selection probe higher-level evidence integration, and Visual Prompt Injection provides a complementary robustness dimension. The overall score distribution is broad and approximately bell-shaped, indicating a benchmark that is neither saturated nor dominated by trivial cases. Together, these results position FCMBench-Video as a reproducible benchmark for tracking Video-MLLM progress on document-video understanding and probing capability boundaries in authenticity-sensitive credit-domain applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FCMBench-Video，一个面向文档视频理解的基准测试，通过原子采集与组合工作流构建大规模隐私合规数据集，评估视频多模态大模型在文档感知、时间定位和证据推理方面的能力。实验表明该基准具有良好区分度，未被现有模型饱和。
AI.motivation: 文档视频理解在金融信贷审核、远程验证等场景中至关重要，但现有基准缺乏对文档视频中时间冗余、帧间证据整合以及采集过程线索的系统评估。作者旨在构建一个隐私合规、规模可观且能真实模拟采集条件的基准，以推动文档视频智能的发展。
AI.method: 采用原子采集与组合工作流：先录制可复用的单文档片段，施加受控退化，再组装成长篇多文档视频。包含495个原子视频，组合成1,200个长视频，搭配11,322个专家标注的问答实例，涵盖28种文档类型，中英文双语（5,960中文/5,362英文），时长20-60秒。
AI.result: 在9个近期视频多模态大模型上评估显示：FCMBench-Video能有效区分不同模型和能力的差异；计数任务对时长最敏感；跨文档验证与证据选择任务考验高层次证据整合能力；视觉提示注入提供了鲁棒性评估维度；整体得分分布呈宽钟形，表明基准未饱和。
AI.conclusion: FCMBench-Video是一个可复现的基准，可用于追踪视频多模态大模型在文档视频理解上的进展，并探测在信贷领域真实性敏感应用中的能力边界。

title: Independent-Component-Based Encoding Models of Brain Activity During Story Comprehension
summary: Encoding models provide a powerful framework for linking continuous stimulus features to neural activity; however, traditional voxelwise approaches are limited by measurement noise, inter-subject variability, and redundancy arising from spatially correlated voxels encoding overlapping neural signals. Here, we propose an independent component (IC)-based encoding framework that dissociates stimulus-driven and noise-driven signals in fMRI data. We decompose continuous fMRI data from naturalistic story listening into ICs using one subset of the data, and train encoding models on independent data to predict IC time series from large language model representations of linguistic input. Across subjects, a subset of ICs exhibited consistently high predictivity. These ICs were spatially and temporally consistent across subjects and included cognitive networks known to respond during story listening (auditory and language). Auditory component time series were strongly correlated with acoustic stimulus features, highlighting the interpretability of identified component time series. Components identified as noise or motion-related artifacts by ICA-AROMA showed uniformly poor predictive performance, confirming that highly predicted components reflect genuine stimulus-related neural signals rather than confounds. Overall, IC-based encoding models enable analyses at the level of functional networks, accommodating the variability in network locations across individuals and providing interpretable results that are easy to compare across subjects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于独立成分（IC）的编码框架，用于从fMRI数据中分离刺激驱动和噪声驱动的信号。通过将自然故事聆听的fMRI数据分解为ICs，并使用大语言模型特征训练编码模型，发现部分ICs在受试者间表现出高可预测性，且与听觉、语言等认知网络对应，而噪声成分预测性能差。该方法可在功能网络层面进行分析，适应个体差异，结果可解释性强。
AI.motivation: 传统体素级编码模型受限于测量噪声、个体差异以及空间相关体素造成的冗余信号，难以有效分离真实神经活动与噪声。
AI.method: 对自然故事聆听任务的fMRI数据进行独立成分分析（ICA），分解为ICs；利用大语言模型表示的语言特征，在独立数据上训练编码模型来预测IC时间序列。
AI.result: 部分ICs在受试者间具有高可预测性，空间和时间上一致，对应听觉和语言等认知网络；听觉成分与声学特征高度相关；ICA-AROMA识别的噪声成分预测性能差。
AI.conclusion: 基于IC的编码框架能够在功能网络层面进行分析，适应个体间网络位置的差异，提供可解释且易于跨受试者比较的结果。

title: Stop Using the Wilcoxon Test: Myth, Misconception and Misuse in IR Research
summary: In benchmarking of Information Retrieval systems, the Wilcoxon signed-rank test is often treated as a safer alternative to the t-test. This belief is fueled by textbooks and recommendations that portray Wilcoxon as the proper non-parametric alternative because metric scores are not normally distributed. We argue that this narrative is misleading and harmful. A careful review of Statistics textbooks reveals inconsistencies and omissions in how the assumptions underlying these tests are presented, fostering confusion that has propagated into IR research. As a result, Wilcoxon has been routinely misapplied for decades, creating a false sense of safety against a threat that was never there to begin with, while introducing another one so severe that it virtually guarantees the test will break down and mislead researchers. Through a combination of systematic literature review, analysis and empirical demonstrations with TREC data, we show how and why the Wilcoxon test easily loses control of its Type I error rate in IR settings. We conclude that the continued use of Wilcoxon in IR evaluation is unjustified and that abandoning it would improve the methodological soundness of our field.

AI.tldr: 本文批判了信息检索领域长期滥用Wilcoxon符号秩检验的现象，指出其并非t检验的合适非参数替代，在IR场景下极易失去对Type I error的控制，建议弃用该检验方法。
AI.motivation: IR领域普遍认为Wilcoxon检验是t检验的更安全替代方案，但这一认知源于教科书假设的模糊与误导，导致该方法被错误使用数十年，造成虚假的安全感并引入新的严重问题。
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述、理论分析以及基于TREC数据的实证演示，检验Wilcoxon检验在IR场景下对Type I error的控制能力。
AI.result: Wilcoxon检验在IR设定下极易失去对Type I error率的控制，其误用几乎必然导致检验失效并误导研究者。
AI.conclusion: 在IR评估中继续使用Wilcoxon检验是不合理的，放弃该方法将有助于提升领域的方法论严谨性。

title: Agentic AI for Remote Sensing: Technical Challenges and Research Directions
summary: Earth Observation (EO) is moving beyond static prediction toward multi-step analytical workflows that require coordinated reasoning over data, tools, and geospatial state. While foundation models and vision-language models have expanded representation learning and language-grounded interaction for remote sensing, and agentic AI has demonstrated long-horizon reasoning and external tool use, EO is not a straightforward extension of generic agentic AI. EO workflows operate over georeferenced, multi-modal, and temporally structured data, where operations such as reprojection, resampling, compositing, and aggregation actively transform the underlying state and can constrain subsequent analysis. As a result, errors may propagate silently across steps, and correctness depends not only on internal coherence, but also on geospatial consistency, temporally valid comparisons, and physical validity. This position paper argues that these challenges are structural rather than incidental. We identify the implicit assumptions commonly made in generic agentic models, analyze how they break in geospatial workflows, and characterize the resulting failure modes in multi-step EO pipelines. We then outline design principles for EO-native agents centered on structured geospatial state, tool-aware reasoning, verifier-guided execution, and learning objectives aligned with geospatial and physical validity. Finally, we present research directions spanning EO-specific benchmarks, hybrid supervised and reinforcement learning, constrained self-improvement, and trajectory-level evaluation beyond final-answer accuracy. Building reliable geospatial agents therefore requires rethinking agent design around the physical, geospatial, and workflow constraints that govern EO analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文指出地球观测（EO）正从静态预测转向多步骤分析工作流，而通用智能体AI无法直接适用于EO，因为EO涉及地理参考、多模态、时序数据，且操作（如重投影、重采样）会主动改变状态并导致错误静默传播。文章分析了通用代理模型在EO中的失效模式，提出了面向EO的原生代理设计原则（结构化地理空间状态、工具感知推理、验证器引导执行），并给出了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管基础模型、视觉语言模型和智能体AI在遥感领域取得了进展，但EO工作流具有地理空间一致性、时序有效性和物理有效性等独特约束，通用智能体方法直接迁移会因隐含假设不匹配而产生结构性问题，因此需要专门为EO设计代理系统。
AI.method: 本文为立场论文，通过识别通用智能体模型中的隐含假设（如状态不可变性、操作独立性），分析它们在EO工作流中如何失效，并分类多步骤EO流水线的故障模式。在此基础上提出EO原生代理的设计原则，包括：结构化地理空间状态管理、工具感知推理机制、验证器引导的执行流程，以及面向地理空间和物理有效性的学习目标。
AI.result: 识别出通用代理AI在EO中的结构性问题及故障模式，提出了EO原生代理的设计原则框架，并给出了具体的研究方向：EO专用基准测试、混合监督与强化学习、约束自改进、以及超越最终答案准确性的轨迹级评估。
AI.conclusion: 构建可靠的地理空间代理需要围绕物理、地理空间和工作流约束重新设计智能体，而非简单扩展通用AI方法。

title: Supporting Belonging in Software Engineering Through Role Models Exposure
summary: Role models are widely discussed in educational research as influential in students identity development and sense of belonging, yet less attention has been given to how role model visibility can be systematically embedded within everyday engineering instruction. This paper presents an analytic autoethnographic account of integrating historically grounded role models into routine software engineering teaching practice. Drawing on reflective memos and instructional artifacts across multiple course offerings, we characterize how brief, topic aligned contextualizations of pioneers were incorporated into core technical lectures without altering learning objectives or assessments. The findings indicate that this structurally embedded approach functioned as a low disruption pedagogical practice that aligned representation with disciplinary substance, situating diverse contributors as foundational to the development of software architecture. The integration was iterative and refined across semesters to strengthen topic alignment and instructional flow. These results suggest that embedding historically grounded representation within technical content may serve as a practical mechanism for supporting inclusivity while preserving technical rigor in engineering education.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自我民族志方法，探讨了将历史性榜样系统性地嵌入日常软件工程教学中的实践，发现这种低干扰的教学方式能在不改变学习目标的前提下，将多样化贡献者自然地融入技术课程，兼顾包容性与学术严谨性。
AI.motivation: 现有教育研究虽广泛讨论榜样对学生身份认同和归属感的影响，但较少关注如何将榜样的可见性系统性地嵌入日常工程教学之中。
AI.method: 采用分析性自我民族志方法，基于反思性备忘录和跨多轮课程的教学材料，描述将历史性榜样以简短、与主题对齐的方式融入核心技术讲座中的过程。
AI.result: 这种结构性嵌入方法作为一种低干扰的教学实践，能够将代表性内容与学科实质对齐，将多样化贡献者定位为软件架构发展的基础性人物。该整合过程在多学期中迭代优化，以加强主题对齐与教学流畅性。
AI.conclusion: 将历史性表征嵌入技术内容中，可能作为一种实用机制，在保持工程教育技术严谨性的同时支持包容性。

title: Architecture Determines Observability in Transformers
comment: 31 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/tmcarmichael/nn-observability
summary:
Autoregressive transformers make confident errors, but activation monitoring can catch them only if the model preserves an internal signal that output confidence does not expose. This preservation is determined by architecture and training recipe. We define observability as the linear readability of per-token decision quality from frozen mid-layer activations after controlling for max-softmax confidence and activation norm. The correction is essential. Confidence controls absorb 57.7% of raw probe signal on average across 13 models in 6 families.
  Observability is not a generic property of transformers. In Pythia's controlled suite, every tested run with the 24-layer, 16-head configuration collapses to rho_partial ~0.10 across a 3.5x parameter gap and two Pile variants, while six other configurations occupy a separated healthy band from 0.21 to 0.38. The output-controlled residual collapses at the same points, and neither tested nonlinear probes nor layer sweeps recover healthy-range signal. Checkpoint dynamics show the collapse is emergent during training. Both configurations at matched hidden dimension form the signal at the earliest measured checkpoint, but training erases it in the (24L, 16H) class while predictive loss continues improving.
  Across independent recipes the collapse map changes but the phenomenon persists. Qwen 2.5 and Llama differ by 2.9x at matched 3B scale with probe seed distributions that do not overlap, while Mistral 7B preserves observability where Llama 3.1 8B collapses despite similar broad architecture. A WikiText-trained observer transfers to downstream QA without training on those tasks, catching errors confidence misses. At 20% flag rate, its exclusive catch rate is 10.9-13.4% of all errors in seven of nine model-task cells. Architecture selection is a monitoring decision.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自回归Transformer模型在输出自信但实际出错时，中间层激活能否提供可观测的错误信号。通过控制置信度和激活范数，发现可观测性并非Transformer的通用属性，而是取决于架构和训练方式。某些架构（如24层、16头）会出现可观测性崩溃，而其他架构则保持良好。该信号可用于跨任务错误检测，且架构选择直接影响监控能力。
AI.motivation: 自回归Transformer常以高置信度输出错误答案（"自信的错误"），而标准输出置信度无法暴露这些错误。因此需要探究模型内部是否存在可被线性探针读取的错误信号，以及这种信号是否受架构和训练方式的影响。
AI.method: 定义"可观测性"（observability）为：在控制max-softmax置信度和激活范数后，从冻结的中间层激活中线性读取每个token决策质量的能力。通过偏相关分析消除置信度和范数的干扰，利用探针（线性/非线性）在不同架构、训练配置和检查点下评估信号强度。
