AI.result: 混合模型始终优于纯GNN；在Devign上，PLM特征源比GNN骨干对性能和鲁棒性影响更大；更大的PLM不一定是更好的特征提取器；PLM选择比GNN选择对结果影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 总结了PLM-GNN混合设计的实用指南，强调在代码理解和漏洞检测中应优先关注PLM的选择而非GNN架构。

title: Heterogeneous Variational Inference for Markov Degradation Hazard Models: Discretized Mixture with Interpretable Clusters
summary: Bayesian finite mixture models can identify discrete risk clusters (low-risk vs. high-risk equipment), but face three critical bottlenecks: (1) insufficient degradation signals from coarse state discretization, (2) unstable cluster identification when data inherently supports fewer clusters than explored, and (3) computational infeasibility of Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods for production deployment (7+ hours per model). We propose a practical framework combining (1) 8-state global percentile discretization that amplifies degradation events, (2) 30-dimensional feature engineering integrating statistical trends (22 features), continuous health indicators, and text embeddings (PCA-compressed to 3 dimensions), (3) interpretable model selection rules enforcing minimum cluster share and separation alongside WAIC, and (4) Automatic Differentiation Variational Inference (ADVI) with full-rank covariance for stable, fast estimation. Applied to 280 industrial pump equipment with 104,703 inspection records, we demonstrate: (1) Random effect models (baseline) show ADVI and NUTS produce nearly identical estimates with 15$\times$ speedup, validating ADVI accuracy. (2) Finite mixture models identify optimal number of clusters with interpretability constraints. (3) NUTS exhibits severe convergence issues and label switching, while ADVI provides stable results in 84$\times$ less time. We contributed that (1) First demonstration that fine-grained state discretization (8-state) is essential for mixture model stability in survival analysis.(2) Comprehensive feature engineering strategy combining statistical, continuous, and semantic signals. (3) Practical interpretability rules preventing overfitting in automated model selection. (4) Empirical evidence that ADVI outperforms NUTS for finite mixture models in terms of convergence, stability, and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文针对贝叶斯有限混合模型在工业设备风险聚类中的应用瓶颈，提出了一套实用框架，包含8状态全局百分位离散化、30维特征工程、可解释模型选择规则和ADVI快速估计方法。在280台工业泵数据上验证，ADVI相比NUTS实现84倍加速且结果更稳定。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯有限混合模型能够识别设备风险聚类（如低风险vs高风险），但在实际应用中面临三个关键瓶颈：粗粒度状态离散化导致退化信号不足、数据本身支持较少聚类时识别不稳定、MCMC方法计算时间过长（7+小时）无法投入生产部署。
AI.method: 提出四部分实用框架：(1) 8状态全局百分位离散化放大退化事件；(2) 30维特征工程，整合22个统计趋势特征、连续健康指标和PCA压缩至3维的文本嵌入；(3) 可解释模型选择规则，结合最小聚类份额、分离度和WAIC；(4) 采用全秩协方差的自动微分变分推断（ADVI）实现稳定快速估计。
AI.result: 在280台工业泵、104,703条检测记录上验证：(1) 随机效应模型中ADVI与NUTS估计几乎一致，加速15倍；(2) 有限混合模型在可解释约束下识别出最优聚类数；(3) NUTS出现严重收敛问题和标签交换，ADVI以84倍时间提供稳定结果。
AI.conclusion: 贡献包括：(1) 首次证明细粒度8状态离散化对生存分析中混合模型稳定性的必要性；(2) 提出综合统计、连续和语义信号的特征工程策略；(3) 提出防止过拟合的可解释模型选择规则；(4) 实证表明ADVI在收敛性、稳定性和计算效率上优于NUTS。

title: Doing More With Less: Revisiting the Effectiveness of LLM Pruning for Test-Time Scaling
summary: While current Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit remarkable reasoning capabilities through test-time compute scaling (TTS), their massive parameter counts and high inference costs have motivated the development of pruning methods that can reduce model size without sacrificing performance. However, specific to reasoning LLMs, prior work has shown that structured pruning (methods which removes entire set of layer blocks), significantly degrades TTS reasoning performance. In this work, we revisit this assumption and instead investigate whether unstructured pruning (methods that carefully remove only certain redundant/detrimental weights) exhibits similar limitations. Surprisingly, our extensive experiments across four reasoning benchmarks on two reasoning LLMs: s1.1-7B and Qwen3-8B, consistently show that unstructured pruning augments TTS performance compared to structured pruning, and at times can even outperform the unpruned full-weight LLMs. Furthermore, we also empirically study the impact of different layer-wise sparsity allocation strategies, which are an important parametric choice for instantiating unstructured pruning methods. These findings challenge the conventional notion that pruning always reduces TTS performance and in fact, suggest that carefully undertaken pruning can improve TTS effectiveness even further.

AI.tldr: 本文发现非结构化剪枝（移除冗余权重）反而能增强推理型LLM的测试时计算扩展性能，有时甚至超过未剪枝的完整模型，挑战了“剪枝必然损害推理能力”的传统认知。
AI.motivation: 现有推理型大语言模型参数庞大、推理成本高，但结构化剪枝严重损害其测试时计算扩展性能。作者希望探究非结构化剪枝是否也存在类似问题。
AI.method: 在s1.1-7B和Qwen3-8B两个推理模型上，针对四个推理基准，对比结构化剪枝与非结构化剪枝对TTS性能的影响，并进一步研究不同层间稀疏度分配策略的效果。
AI.result: 非结构化剪枝一致地优于结构化剪枝，且有时能超越完整未剪枝模型的性能；不同的层间稀疏度分配策略对效果有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了“剪枝必然降低TTS性能”的传统观点，表明精心设计的非结构化剪枝可以进一步提升推理型LLM的测试时计算扩展效果。

title: Analyzing LLM Reasoning to Uncover Mental Health Stigma
summary: While large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being explored for mental health applications, recent studies reveal that they can exhibit stigma toward individuals with psychological conditions. Existing evaluations of this stigma primarily rely on multiple-choice questions (MCQs), which fail to capture the biases embedded within the models' underlying logic. In this paper, we analyze the intermediate reasoning steps of LLMs to uncover hidden stigmatizing language and the internal rationales driving it. We leverage clinical expertise to categorize common patterns of stigmatizing language directed at individuals with psychological conditions and use this framework to identify and tag problematic statements in LLM reasoning. Furthermore, we rate the severity of these statements, distinguishing between overt prejudice and more subtle, less immediately harmful biases. To broaden the reasoning domain and capture a wider array of patterns, we also extend an existing mental health stigma benchmark by incorporating additional psychological conditions. Our findings demonstrate that evaluating model reasoning not only exposes substantially more stigma than traditional MCQ-based methods but it helps to identify the flaws in the LLMs' logic and their understanding of mental health conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析LLM的中间推理步骤，发现其比传统多选题方法暴露更多的心理疾病污名化问题，并构建了基于临床知识的污名化分类框架来识别和评估这些偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有评估LLM对心理疾病污名化的方法主要依赖多选题，无法捕捉模型底层逻辑中嵌入的偏见，因此需要从推理过程本身更深入地揭示隐藏的污名化语言和内在推理机制。
AI.method: 利用临床专业知识对针对心理疾病个体的污名化语言进行常见模式分类，基于此框架识别和标记LLM推理中的问题陈述，并对严重程度进行评级（区分公开偏见与微妙偏见）；同时扩展现有心理健康污名基准，纳入更多心理疾病类型以扩大推理领域。
AI.result: 评估模型推理比传统基于多选题的方法暴露显著更多的污名化内容，并有助于识别LLM逻辑中的缺陷及其对心理健康状况理解的不足。
AI.conclusion: 分析模型推理过程是揭示和评估LLM中心理健康污名化问题的有效途径，能发现传统方法遗漏的偏见，并帮助理解模型在心理健康领域的逻辑缺陷。

title: Break the Inaccessible Boundary: Distilling Post-Conversion Content for User Retention Modeling
summary: User retention is a key metric to measure long-term engagement in modern platforms. In real-time bidding (RTB) advertising system for user re-engagement, the retention model is required to predict future revisit probability at bidding time, before the user converts and consumes any content. Although post-conversion content, termed Onboarding Content, provides highly informative signals for retention prediction, directly using it in training causes severe feature leakage and creates a gap between training and serving. To address this issue, we propose OCARM, a two-stage distillation-aligned framework for Onboarding Content Augmented Retention Modeling, enabling the model to implicitly capture future content using only observable features during inference. In the first stage, we deliberately expose onboarding content to train a hierarchical encoder that produces teacher representations. In the second stage, a user encoder is aligned with the frozen teacher through distillation, allowing the model to approximate the inaccessible onboarding signals without leakage. Extensive offline experiments and online A/B tests demonstrate that our framework achieves consistent improvements in a real-world growth scenario.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OCARM框架，通过两阶段蒸馏对齐方法，在实时竞价广告的留存预测中，允许模型在推理时仅使用可观测特征隐式捕捉未来内容信息，避免了特征泄露问题。
AI.motivation: 在RTB广告系统中，用户留存预测需要在用户转化前进行，但转化后的内容（Onboarding Content）对预测非常有价值。直接使用会导致特征泄露，造成训练与服务之间的差距。作者希望在不泄露的情况下利用这些信息。
AI.method: 提出两阶段蒸馏对齐框架OCARM：第一阶段，暴露onboarding内容训练分层编码器生成教师表征；第二阶段，通过蒸馏将用户编码器与冻结的教师模型对齐，使模型在推理时仅用可观测特征逼近不可访问的onboarding信号。
AI.result: 离线实验和在线A/B测试均表明，该框架在真实增长场景中取得了一致的改进效果。
AI.conclusion: OCARM能有效利用onboarding内容信号提升留存预测，同时规避特征泄露问题，具有实际应用价值。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Benchmarking Cross-Task Consistency in Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (uMMs) aim to support both visual understanding and visual generation within a shared representation. However, existing evaluation protocols assess these two capabilities independently and do not examine whether they are semantically aligned. As a result, it remains unclear whether current uMMs learn coherent unified representations that remain consistent across tasks given a visual concept. We introduce XTC-Bench, a scene-graph-grounded evaluation framework that measures cross-task visual semantic consistency. By deriving both generation prompts and understanding queries from a structured scene graph, our framework enables fact-level alignment analysis across objects, attributes, and relations. We propose Continuous Cross-Task Agreement (CCTA), a fine-grained metric that quantifies semantic agreement between generation and understanding over matched atomic facts, isolating internal consistency from standalone task accuracy. Extensive experiments on eight open-source and one commercial unified models reveal that high generation or understanding performance does not imply strong cross-task alignment, and architectural analysis shows consistency is governed by how tightly learning objectives are coupled across modalities, not by architectural unification alone. XTC-Bench provides a reproducible and model-agnostic framework for diagnosing representation-level misalignment, offering a concrete direction for advancing unified multimodal modeling beyond isolated task performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出XTC-Bench，一个基于场景图的多模态评估框架，用于衡量统一多模态模型在视觉理解与生成任务间的语义一致性，发现高任务性能不代表良好的跨任务对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有评估协议独立测试理解与生成能力，无法检验两者是否语义对齐，因此不清楚当前统一多模态模型是否学习到跨任务一致的统一表示。
AI.method: 提出XTC-Bench框架，基于结构化场景图导出生成提示和理解查询，实现对象、属性和关系的事实级对齐分析；并提出CCTA（连续跨任务一致性）指标，量化生成与理解在匹配原子事实上的语义一致性。
AI.result: 对8个开源和1个商业统一模型的实验表明，高生成或理解性能并不保证跨任务对齐；架构分析显示，一致性由学习目标跨模态耦合紧密度决定，而非仅靠架构统一。
AI.conclusion: XTC-Bench提供了可复现、模型无关的诊断框架，有助于在孤立任务性能之外推进统一多模态建模。

title: Using Large Language Models for Black-Box Testing of FMU-Based Simulations
summary: We propose a human in the loop approach for black-box testing of Functional Mock-up Units (FMUs) using Large Language Models (LLMs). The goal is to reduce the manual effort in defining test scenarios for dynamic simulation models and to improve the interpretability of results. The approach takes the functional and interface specifications of an FMU as input, and prompts an LLM to generate structured scenario goals in Given-When-Then format that define the initial input conditions of the simulation, a possible change in those conditions, and the expected output behaviour of the system against those changes. The corresponding scenario plans specify input patterns and add assertion oracles that describe expected output patterns defined in scenario goals. The approach generates a complete input time series for the scenario plans, runs the FMU simulation, and evaluates assertions on the recorded outputs. It produces human-readable logs and plots that show statistics for each scenario with overlays, aggregate pass rates, and per-goal outcomes. The generated scenarios and results are stored for evaluation and later re-execution. We evaluate the approach on a Lube Oil Cooling system and discuss design choices that make the approach practical for everyday use. Results suggest that LLM-assisted scenario generation can facilitate automatic test design and verification of dynamic simulation models.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于大语言模型的人机协同方法，用于对功能样机单元进行黑盒测试，通过LLM生成Given-When-Then格式的场景目标、规划输入模式、执行仿真并评估断言，从而减少手动测试工作量并提升结果可解释性。
AI.motivation: 动态仿真模型（FMU）的黑盒测试中，手动定义测试场景耗时耗力，且结果的可解释性不足，因此需要一种自动化方法降低人工成本并提升测试效率。
AI.method: 1) 以FMU的功能与接口规范为输入，提示LLM生成结构化场景目标（Given-When-Then格式）；2) 制定对应场景计划（含输入模式与断言）；3) 生成完整输入时间序列并执行FMU仿真；4) 评估输出断言，生成可读日志与统计图表。
AI.result: 在滑油冷却系统上进行了评估，结果表明LLM辅助的场景生成能够有效自动化动态仿真模型的测试设计与验证。
AI.conclusion: LLM辅助的场景生成方法可促进动态仿真模型的自动测试设计与验证，且实用性设计选择使其适合日常使用。

title: Negative Ontology of True Target for Machine Learning: Towards Evaluation and Learning under Democratic Supervision
summary: This article philosophically examines how shifts in assumptions regarding the existence and non-existence of the true target (TT) give rise to new perspectives and insights for machine learning (ML)-based predictive modeling and, correspondingly, proposes a knowledge system for evaluation and learning under Democratic Supervision. By systematically analysing the existence assumption of the TT in current mainstream ML paradigms, we explicitly adopt a negative ontology perspective, positing that the TT does not objectively exist in the real world, and, grounded in this non-existence assumption, define Democratic Supervision for ML. We further present Multiple Inaccurate True Targets (MIATTs) as an instance-level realization of Democratic Supervision. Building upon MIATTs, we derive principles, for the logic-driven generation and assessment of MIATTs, a logical assessment formulation for evaluation with MIATTs, and undefinable true target learning for learning with MIATTs. Based on these components, we establish the evaluation and learning with MIATTs (EL-MIATTs) framework for ML-based predictive modelling. A real-world application demonstrates the potential of the proposed EL-MIATTs framework in supporting education and professional development for individuals, aligning with prior discussions of Democratic Supervision in the fields of education and professional development.

AI.tldr: 本文从哲学层面审视了"真实目标（TT）"存在性假设的转变如何为机器学习预测建模带来新视角，并基于TT不存在于现实世界的否定本体论立场，提出了"民主监督"概念及其实例化实现——多重不准确真实目标（MIATTs），进而构建了EL-MIATTs框架，用于机器学习的评估与学习，并在教育和个人专业发展领域展示了应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 当前主流机器学习范式默认假设"真实目标（TT）"客观存在，但这一假设在哲学上值得商榷。作者希望通过对TT存在性的哲学反思，突破现有ML范式的局限，提出更具包容性和民主性的学习与评估框架。
AI.method: 采用否定本体论立场，假设TT在现实世界中并不客观存在；在此基础上定义民主监督；提出MIATTs作为民主监督的实例化实现；基于MIATTs推导逻辑驱动的生成与评估原则、逻辑评估公式以及不可定义的TT学习方法；最终构建EL-MIATTs框架。
AI.result: 提出了EL-MIATTs框架，并通过真实世界的应用案例展示了该框架在支持个人教育与专业发展方面的潜力，与教育和专业发展领域已有的民主监督讨论相呼应。
AI.conclusion: 通过否定TT的客观存在性，民主监督与EL-MIATTs框架为ML预测建模提供了全新的认识论基础，有望在教育与专业发展等需要多元视角的领域中发挥独特价值。

title: Semantic Layers for Reliable LLM-Powered Data Analytics: A Paired Benchmark of Accuracy and Hallucination Across Three Frontier Models
summary: LLMs deployed for natural-language querying of analytical databases suffer from two intertwined failures - incorrect answers and confident hallucinations - both rooted in the same cause: the model is forced to infer business semantics that the schema does not encode. We test whether supplying those semantics as context closes the gap. We benchmark three frontier LLMs (Claude Opus 4.7, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.4) on 100 natural-language questions over the Cleaned Contoso Retail Dataset in ClickHouse, using a paired single-shot protocol. Each model is evaluated twice: once given only the warehouse schema, and once given the schema plus a 4 KB hand-authored markdown document describing the dataset's measures, conventions, and disambiguation rules. Adding the document improves accuracy by +17 to +23 percentage points across all three models. With it, the three models are statistically indistinguishable (67.7-68.7%); without it, they are also indistinguishable (45.5-50.5%). Every cross-cluster comparison is significant at p < 0.01. The presence of the semantic-layer document accounts for essentially all of the significant variance; model choice within tier does not. We interpret this as a structural result: explicit business semantics suppress the dominant class of text-to-SQL errors not by making the model more capable, but by changing what the model is being asked to do.

AI.tldr: 为分析型数据库自然语言查询部署的大语言模型存在两个问题：错误答案和自信幻觉，根源都是模型被迫推断模式未编码的业务语义。通过添加4KB语义文档（描述度量、约定和消歧规则），三个前沿LLM准确率提升17-23个百分点（从45.5-50.5%提升至67.7-68.7%），且模型间差异不显著。语义文档的存在解释了几乎所有显著方差，模型选择影响不大。
AI.motivation: LLM在分析型数据库自然语言查询中常给出错误答案或自信幻觉，根本原因是模型被迫推断数据库模式未编码的业务语义，缺乏显式的领域知识。
AI.method: 在Clean Contoso Retail数据集上，对Claude Opus 4.7、Claude Sonnet 4.6、GPT-5.4三个前沿LLM进行100个自然语言问题的配对单次实验，分别测试仅给模式与给模式加4KB业务语义文档两种情况。
AI.result: 添加语义文档后准确率提升17-23个百分点（有文档67.7-68.7%，无文档45.5-50.5%）。有或无文档时各模型间无统计显著差异，跨群比较p<0.01。语义文档解释了几乎所有显著方差，模型选择影响不显著。
AI.conclusion: 显式业务语义通过改变模型任务本身（而非提升模型能力）来抑制text-to-SQL的主要错误类别。这是一个结构性结果：提供领域语义上下文比选择更强的模型更关键。

title: The Dynamics of Delusion: Modeling Bidirectional False Belief Amplification in Human-Chatbot Dialogue
summary: There is growing concern that AI chatbots might fuel delusional beliefs in users. Some have suggested that humans and chatbots mutually reinforce false beliefs over time, but quantitative evidence is lacking. Using a unique dataset of chat logs from individuals who exhibited delusional thinking, we developed a latent state model that captures accumulating and decaying influences between humans and chatbots. We find that a bidirectional influence model substantially outperforms a unidirectional alternative where humans are the primary driver of delusion. We find that humans exert strong but short-lived influence on chatbots, whereas chatbots exert longer-lasting influence on humans. Moreover, chatbots exert strong, stable self-influence over their own future outputs that tends to perpetuate delusions over long stretches of conversation. In fact, this chatbot self-influence constituted the dominant pathway when considering accumulated influence over time. Overall, these results indicate that humans tend to drive sharp, immediate increases in delusion, whereas chatbots sustain and propagate these effects over longer timescales. Together, these findings provide the first quantitative evidence that human-chatbot interactions can form feedback loops of delusion, decomposable into distinct pathways with dissociable temporal dynamics. By doing so, they can inform the development of safer AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用聊天记录数据，通过潜在状态模型量化了人类与AI聊天机器人之间的妄想信念双向影响机制。研究发现，人类对聊天机器人产生强烈但短暂的影响，而聊天机器人对人类的影响更持久，且其自我影响是长期传播妄想的主导路径，形成了可分解的妄想反馈循环。
AI.motivation: 现有研究担忧AI聊天机器人可能助长用户的妄想信念，但缺乏定量证据来证明人类与聊天机器人之间是否存在相互强化虚假信念的反馈循环。
AI.method: 收集表现出妄想思维的个体的聊天记录数据集，开发了一个潜在状态模型，用以捕捉人类与聊天机器人之间累积和衰减的双向影响。
AI.result: 双向影响模型显著优于单向模型；人类对聊天机器人影响强烈但短暂，聊天机器人对人类影响更持久；聊天机器人对自身未来输出有强大且稳定的自我影响，是长期传播妄想的主导路径。
AI.conclusion: 人类驱动妄想的短期急剧增长，而聊天机器人则在更长时间尺度上维持和传播这些效应，形成了可分解为不同时间动态路径的妄想反馈循环，为设计更安全的AI系统提供了依据。

title: Make Any Collection Navigable: Methods for Constructing and Evaluating Hypergraph of Text
summary: One reason the Web is more useful than a simple collection of documents is that the structure created by hyperlinks enables flexible navigation from one web page to another. However, hyperlinks are typically created manually and cannot fully capture a corpus' implicit semantic structures. Is there a general way to make an arbitrary collection navigable? Recent work has formalized this problem generally as constructing a Hypergraph of Text (HoT), which provides a formal mathematical structure for supporting navigation and browsing. However, how to construct and evaluate a Hypergraph of Text remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose and study several methods for constructing a HoT. We also propose a novel quantitative metric, effort ratio, for evaluating the structural quality of a constructed HoT. Experimental results show that even simple TF-IDF baselines can match LLM-based methods on our proposed effort ratio metric.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从文本集合中自动构建超图（Hypergraph of Text, HoT）以支持导航浏览，提出了多种构建方法和一种新的量化评估指标——effort ratio，实验表明简单TF-IDF方法在指标上可媲美基于LLM的方法。
AI.motivation: 超链接虽然增强了Web的可用性，但手动创建无法充分捕捉语料库的隐含语义结构，需要一种通用的、自动化的方法来使任意文档集合具备可导航性。
AI.method: 提出了多种构建超图（HoT）的方法，并设计了一种新的量化评估指标——effort ratio（努力比），用于衡量所构建超图的结构质量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，即便是简单的TF-IDF基线方法，在新提出的effort ratio指标上也能与基于大型语言模型（LLM）的方法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 简单的TF-IDF方法在effort ratio指标上表现不逊于复杂LLM方法，说明超图构建任务可能不需要过度依赖大模型，为后续研究提供了新的评估基准和思考方向。

title: One Perturbation, Two Failure Modes: Probing VLM Safety via Embedding-Guided Typographic Perturbations
summary: Typographic prompt injection exploits vision language models' (VLMs) ability to read text rendered in images, posing a growing threat as VLMs power autonomous agents. Prior work typically focus on maximizing attack success rate (ASR) but does not explain \emph{why} certain renderings bypass safety alignment. We make two contributions. First, an empirical study across four VLMs including GPT-4o and Claude, twelve font sizes, and ten transformations reveals that multimodal embedding distance strongly predicts ASR ($r{=}{-}0.71$ to ${-}0.93$, $p{<}0.01$), providing an interpretable, model agnostic proxy. Since embedding distance predicts ASR, reducing it should improve attack success, but the relationship is mediated by two factors: perceptual readability (whether the VLM can parse the text) and safety alignment (whether it refuses to comply). Second, we use this as a red teaming tool: we directly maximize image text embedding similarity under bounded $\ell_\infty$ perturbations via CWA-SSA across four surrogate embedding models, stress testing both factors without access to the target model. Experiments across five degradation settings on GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Mistral-Large-3, and Qwen3-VL confirm that optimization recovers readability and reduces safety aligned refusals as two co-occurring effects, with the dominant mechanism depending on the model's safety filter strength and the degree of visual degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态嵌入距离能强预测VLMs的提示注入攻击成功率（r=-0.71至-0.93），并提出CWA-SSA优化方法，通过最大化文本嵌入相似度在五种退化设置下提升攻击效果，揭示了可读性与安全对齐两个中介因素。
AI.motivation: 现有 typographic prompt injection 研究主要追求攻击成功率最大化，但缺乏对"为什么某些渲染能绕过安全对齐"的解释机制。
AI.method: 提出 CWA-SSA（有界ℓ∞扰动下直接最大化图像文本嵌入相似度）优化方法，使用四个替代嵌入模型进行红队测试；并在GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5等四个VLMs上跨五种退化设置进行实验。
AI.result: 多模态嵌入距离与ASR强相关(r=-0.71至-0.93)；CWA-SSA优化能同时恢复可读性并减少安全对齐拒绝，主导机制取决于模型安全过滤强度与视觉退化程度。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入距离可作为模型无关的可解释代理指标，通过优化嵌入相似度可系统性地绕过VLMs的安全对齐，为红队测试提供了新工具。

title: Spreadsheet Modeling Experiments Using GPTs on Small Problem Statements and the Wall Task
summary: This paper investigates how GPT-based tools can assist in building reusable analytical spreadsheet models. After a screening, we evaluate five GPT extensions and select Excel AI by pulsrai.com for detailed testing. Through structured experiments on simple problem statements, we assess Excel AI's performance against the ERFR criteria (each input in a cell; cell formulas; no hardwired numbers; labels; accurate). Results show that while Excel AI can produce well-structured models, it is inconsistent and often non-reproducible. We identify two central challenges - "the problem of confidence" and "the problem of workflow" - which highlight the need for skilled users to verify and adapt GPT-generated spreadsheets. Though GPTs show promise for generating draft models that may reduce development time or lower skill requirements, current tools remain unreliable for professional use. We conclude with recommendations for future research into prompt engineering, reproducibility, and larger-scale modeling tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了GPT工具（尤其是Excel AI）在构建可复用的分析性电子表格模型方面的能力。尽管能生成结构良好的模型，但存在不一致、不可复现等问题，当前尚不适合专业使用。
AI.motivation: 探索GPT工具是否能帮助用户构建可复用的分析性电子表格模型，降低开发时间或技能门槛。
AI.method: 筛选了5个GPT扩展工具，选定Excel AI（pulsrai.com）进行详细测试；通过结构化实验，基于ERFR标准评估其表现。
AI.result: Excel AI能生成结构良好的模型，但结果不一致、不可复现，存在“置信度问题”和“工作流问题”。
AI.conclusion: 当前GPT工具在专业场景下尚不可靠，需有经验的用户验证和调整；未来研究应关注提示工程、可复现性及更大规模建模任务。

title: Incompressible Knowledge Probes: Estimating Black-Box LLM Parameter Counts via Factual Capacity
summary:
Closed-source frontier labs do not disclose parameter counts, and the standard alternative -- inference economics -- carries $2\times$+ uncertainty from hardware, batching, and serving-stack assumptions external to the model. We exploit a tighter intrinsic bound: storing $F$ facts requires at least $F/$(bits per parameter) weights, so measuring how much a model \emph{knows} lower-bounds how many parameters it \emph{has}. We introduce \textbf{Incompressible Knowledge Probes (IKPs)}, a benchmark of 1{,}400 factual questions spanning 7 tiers of obscurity, designed to isolate knowledge that cannot be derived by reasoning or compressed by architectural improvements.
  We calibrate a log-linear mapping from IKP accuracy to parameter count on 89 open-weight models (135M--1,600B) spanning 19 vendors, achieving $R^2 = 0.917$; leave-one-out cross-validation confirms generalization (median fold error $1.59\times$, $68.5\%$ within $2\times$ and $87.6\%$ within $3\times$). For Mixture-of-Experts models, total parameters predict knowledge ($R^2 = 0.79$) far better than active parameters ($R^2 = 0.51$). We evaluate 188 models from 27 vendors and estimate effective knowledge capacity for all major proprietary frontier models; for heavily safety-tuned models the estimates are lower bounds, since refusal policy can hide tens of percentage points of "refused but known" capacity.
  The widely-reported saturation of reasoning benchmarks does not imply the end of scaling. Procedural capability compresses under the "Densing Law," but across 96 dated open-weight models the IKP time coefficient is $-0.0010$/month (95\% CI $[-0.0031, +0.0008]$) -- indistinguishable from zero, and rejecting the Densing prediction of $+0.0117$/month at $p < 10^{-15}$. Factual capacity continues to scale log-linearly with parameters across generations and across vendors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需参数公开即可估计大模型参数规模的方法——不可压缩知识探测（IKPs），通过测量模型掌握的事实知识量来下界推断其参数量，并在大量模型上验证了该方法的准确性。
AI.motivation: 封闭源前沿实验室不公开模型参数数量，而现有替代方法（推理经济学）存在硬件、批处理和服务栈等外部假设带来的2倍以上不确定性。因此需要一种更紧致、内在的估计方法。
AI.method: 提出IKP基准测试，包含1,400个跨7个难度等级的事实问题，设计为无法通过推理推导或架构改进压缩的知识。对89个开源模型（135M-1,600B参数）建立IKP准确率到参数量的对数线性映射（R²=0.917），并通过留一法交叉验证验证泛化性。
AI.result: 留一法交叉验证中位数误差1.59倍，68.5%在2倍以内，87.6%在3倍以内。MoE模型中总参数预测知识（R²=0.79）远优于活跃参数（R²=0.51）。评估了27个供应商的188个模型，给出了主要专有前沿模型的有效知识容量估计。IKP时间系数为-0.0010/月，与零无显著差异，拒绝了“紧缩定律”预测的+0.0117/月（p<10⁻¹⁵）。
AI.conclusion: 推理基准的饱和并不意味着规模扩展的终结。事实性知识容量随参数对数线性增长，这一规律在不同代际和供应商之间持续成立。安全微调会隐藏模型的知识能力，使估计值成为下界。

title: Training Transformers as a Universal Computer
summary: We demonstrate that a small transformer can learn to execute programs in MicroPy, a simplified yet computationally universal programming language. Given procedure definitions together with an expression to evaluate, the transformer predicts small-step execution using PENCIL scaffolding for space-efficient execution within a bounded context window. After training on randomly generated, meaningless MicroPy programs, the learned transformer generalizes to various human-written programs including bit copying and flipping, binary addition and multiplication, and SAT verification and solving. We note that the trained model can achieve out-of-distribution generalization; i.e., evaluate novel programs from distribution on programs. Since MicroPy can express any computation, our results provide empirical evidence that a standard transformer can be trained to act as a universal computer.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了一个小型Transformer可以通过PENCIL框架学习执行MicroPy语言（一种简化但图灵完备的编程语言）中的程序，并在随机生成的无意义程序上训练后，泛化到各种人类编写的程序，实现分布外泛化，为Transformer可作为通用计算机提供了经验证据。
AI.motivation: 探索标准Transformer是否能够通过学习执行通用计算（即作为通用计算机），验证其超越语言建模的计算能力。
AI.method: 使用MicroPy（简化但图灵完备的语言），通过PENCIL框架进行小步执行的空间高效推理，在随机生成的程序上训练小型Transformer，然后测试其对人类编写程序的泛化能力。
AI.result: 训练后的Transformer不仅能执行随机程序，还能泛化到各种人类编写的程序（如位操作、二进制运算、SAT验证与求解），并实现了分布外泛化。
AI.conclusion: 标准Transformer可以通过训练充当通用计算机，因为MicroPy可表达任何计算，实验结果为此提供了经验证据。

title: Diagnosis, Bad Planning & Reasoning. Treatment, SCOPE -- Planning for Hybrid Querying over Clinical Trial Data
summary: We study clinical trial table reasoning, where answers are not directly stored in visible cells but must be reasoned from semantic understanding through normalization, classification, extraction, or lightweight domain reasoning. Motivated by the observation that current LLM approaches often suffer from "bad reasoning" under implicit planning assumptions, we focus on settings in which the model must recover implicit attributes such as therapy type, added agents, endpoint roles, or follow-up status from partially observed clinical-trial tables. We propose SCOPE (Structured Clinical hybrid Planning for Evidence retrieval in clinical trials), a multi-LLM planner-based framework that decomposes the task into row selection, structured planning, and execution. The planner makes the source field, reasoning rules, and output constraints explicit before answer generation, reducing ambiguity relative to direct prompting. We evaluate SCOPE on 1,500 hybrid reasoning questions over oncology clinical-trial tables against zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, TableGPT2, Blend-SQL, and EHRAgent. Results show that explicit multi-LLM planning improves accuracy for reasoning-based questions while offering a stronger accuracy-efficiency tradeoff than heavier agentic baselines. Our findings position clinical trial reasoning as a distinct table understanding problem and highlight hybrid planner-based decomposition as an effective solution

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCOPE框架，通过多LLM规划器将临床实验表格推理任务分解为行选择、结构化规划和执行，在1500个推理问题上相比现有方法取得更好精度与效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM方法在处理临床实验表格推理时，由于隐式规划假设常出现"错误推理"问题，因此需要一种显式规划机制来减少歧义。
AI.method: 提出SCOPE框架，采用多LLM规划器架构，将推理任务分解为三个步骤：行选择（定位相关行）、结构化规划（显式明确来源字段、推理规则和输出约束）、执行（生成答案）。
AI.result: 在1500个肿瘤学临床实验表格推理问题上，与zero-shot、few-shot、CoT、TableGPT2、Blend-SQL、EHRAgent等基线相比，SCOPE在推理类问题上准确率更高，且在精度-效率权衡上优于更重的Agent基线。
AI.conclusion: 临床实验推理应被视为一个独特的表格理解问题，基于混合规划器的分解策略是有效的解决方案。

title: CiteRadar: A Citation Intelligence Platform for Researcher Profiling and Geographic Visualization
summary: Understanding the geographic reach and community structure of one's scholarly citations is increasingly valuable for career development, grant applications, and collaboration discovery -- yet accessible tools for answering these questions remain scarce. Existing bibliometric platforms either require costly institutional subscriptions or expose only aggregate citation counts without granular per-author metadata. We present CiteRadar, an open-source system that accepts a single Google Scholar user identifier and automatically produces a structured output folder containing: the author's complete publication list, all retrieved citing papers with enriched author metadata, two ranked author tables (by citation frequency and by h-index), a plain-text statistical summary, and a self-contained interactive HTML world map -- all from a single command-line invocation. CiteRadar integrates five heterogeneous data sources -- Google Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, Semantic Scholar, and OpenStreetMap Nominatim -- through a carefully engineered five-stage pipeline. Key technical contributions include: (1) a Scholar meta-string parser resilient to Unicode non-breaking-space separators, a pervasive but undocumented quirk in Scholar's HTML that silently corrupts venue and year fields when unhandled; (2) a two-stage author disambiguation system using stop-word-filtered institution name similarity to guard against the well-known same-name entity-merging failure mode in bibliometric databases, demonstrated to eliminate h-index attribution errors of up to 9x the correct value; (3) an OpenAlex web-URL to API-URL conversion fix that raises the fraction of author records with city-level location data from 0% to ~60%; and (4) a logarithmically-scaled interactive Folium world map with per-city researcher popups, rendered as a fully self-contained HTML file.

AI.tldr: CiteRadar是一个开源系统，输入Google Scholar用户ID即可自动生成包含完整论文列表、引文元数据、作者排名表、统计摘要和交互式世界地图的结构化输出，解决了现有平台需付费订阅或缺乏细粒度元数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 学者了解自己引文的地理覆盖范围和社区结构对职业发展、基金申请和合作发现越来越重要，但现有工具要么需要昂贵的机构订阅，要么只提供聚合引用计数而缺少细粒度的作者元数据。
AI.method: CiteRadar集成了Google Scholar、OpenAlex、CrossRef、Semantic Scholar和OpenStreetMap Nominatim五个异构数据源，通过五阶段管道处理。关键技术贡献包括：Unicode不间断空格解析器、两阶段作者消歧系统、OpenAlex URL转换修复、对数缩放交互式Folium世界地图。
AI.result: 作者消歧系统消除了高达9倍正确值的h-index归属错误；OpenAlex URL修复将拥有城市级位置数据的作者记录从0%提升到约60%；系统生成完全自包含的交互式HTML地图。
AI.conclusion: CiteRadar作为一个开源工具填补了现有平台空白，能够从单条命令中为学者提供结构化的引文地理分布和作者社区分析，且无需付费订阅。

title: M$^3$-VQA: A Benchmark for Multimodal, Multi-Entity, Multi-Hop Visual Question Answering
summary: We present M$^3$-VQA, a novel knowledge-based Visual Question Answering (VQA) benchmark, to enhance the evaluation of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in fine-grained multimodal entity understanding and complex multi-hop reasoning. Unlike existing VQA datasets that focus on coarse-grained categories and simple reasoning over single entities, M$^3$-VQA introduces diverse multi-entity questions involving multiple distinct entities from both visual and textual sources. It requires models to perform both sequential and parallel multi-hop reasoning across multiple documents, supported by traceable, detailed evidence and a curated multimodal knowledge base. We evaluate 16 leading MLLMs under three settings: without external knowledge, with gold evidence, and with retrieval-augmented input. The poor results reveal significant challenges for MLLMs in knowledge acquisition and reasoning. Models perform poorly without external information but improve markedly when provided with precise evidence. Furthermore, reasoning-aware agentic retrieval surpasses heuristic methods, highlighting the importance of structured reasoning for complex multimodal understanding. M$^3$-VQA presents a more challenging evaluation for advancing the multimodal reasoning capabilities of MLLMs. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/M3VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M³-VQA基准，用于评估多模态大模型在细粒度多实体理解和复杂多跳推理方面的能力，实验表明现有模型在缺乏外部知识时表现不佳，而推理感知的检索能显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA数据集仅关注粗粒度类别和单实体简单推理，缺乏对多实体、多文档、多跳推理的评估，无法全面衡量多模态大模型在复杂知识推理上的能力。
AI.method: 构建M³-VQA基准，包含多实体、多文档问题，要求模型进行串行和并行多跳推理；提供可追溯的详细证据和人工构建的多模态知识库；评估16个主流MLLM在无外部知识、有黄金证据、检索增强三种设置下的表现。
AI.result: 模型在无外部知识时表现差，有精确证据时显著提升；推理感知的智能检索优于启发式检索方法，揭示了结构化推理对复杂多模态理解的重要性。
AI.conclusion: M³-VQA是一个更具挑战性的基准，有助于推动多模态大模型在细粒度实体理解和复杂多跳推理能力上的发展。

title: Bug-Report-Driven Fault Localization: Industrial Benchmarking and Lesson Learned at ABB Robotics
summary:
Software quality assurance remains a major challenge in industrial environments, where large-scale and long-lived systems inevitably accumulate defects. Identifying the location of a fault is often time-consuming and costly, particularly during maintenance phases when developers must rely primarily on textual bug reports rather than complete runtime or code-level context. In this study, we investigated if artificial intelligence can support fault localization using only the natural-language content of bug reports. By relying only on textual information, our approach requires no access to source code, execution traces, or static analysis artifacts, making it directly deployable within existing industrial maintenance workflows. We framed fault localization as a supervised text classification problem and evaluated three traditional machine learning models (Logistic Regression, Support Vector Machine, and Random Forest) and two fine-tuned transformer-based language models (RoBERTa-Base and Distil-RoBERTa). Our evaluation used proprietary data from ABB Robotics in Sweden, comprising five years of resolved industrial bug reports, each linked to its verified code fix. This setting allowed us to assess model effectiveness under realistic industrial constraints.
  Our results showed that traditional models using term frequency-inverse document features consistently outperformed the fine-tuned language models on this dataset, while data augmentation improved Random Forest performance. These findings challenge the assumption that transformer-based models universally outperform classical approaches in industrial contexts with domain-specific data. We demonstrated that historical bug reports can be systematically used for text-based, artificial intelligence-assisted fault localization, providing a scalable, low-cost, and empirically grounded complement to common debugging practices in industry.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了仅使用自然语言形式的bug报告进行基于AI的故障定位（无需源代码、执行轨迹等），在ABB Robotics工业数据集上，传统机器学习模型（结合TF-IDF特征）表现优于微调的Transformer模型，其中数据增强提升了随机森林的性能。
AI.motivation: 工业环境中，大规模、长期运行的系统难免积累缺陷，但故障定位成本高昂，尤其在维护阶段开发者主要依赖文本型bug报告，缺乏运行时或代码级上下文。现有方法通常需要访问源代码或执行轨迹，在工业实践中部署受限。
AI.method: 将故障定位建模为监督文本分类问题，评估三种传统ML模型（逻辑回归、SVM、随机森林）和两种微调Transformer模型（RoBERTa-Base、Distil-RoBERTa），使用ABB Robotics五年间已解决的工业bug报告（含验证后的代码修复）进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 使用TF-IDF特征的传统模型在性能上持续优于微调的语言模型；数据增强能够提升随机森林的表现。
AI.conclusion: 历史bug报告可系统用于基于文本的AI辅助故障定位，为工业调试实践提供可扩展、低成本且基于经验证据的补充方案，挑战了Transformer模型在工业领域数据上普遍优于传统方法的假设。

title: On the Trainability of Masked Diffusion Language Models via Blockwise Locality
summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to standard autoregressive large language models (AR-LLMs), yet their optimization can be substantially less stable. We study blockwise MDMs and compare them with AR-LLMs on three controlled tasks that stress different aspects of structured generation: in-context linear regression, graph path-finding, and Sudoku solving. We find that standard random-masking MDMs fail to reliably learn linear regression, exhibit high variance training dynamics on graph path-finding, while outperforming AR-LLMs on Sudoku. To mitigate these instabilities, we propose two locality aware blockwise models, namely Jigsaw and Scatter, that inject left-to-right inductive bias by enforcing autoregressive locality within blocks while preserving iterative refinement at the block level. Empirically, Jigsaw matches AR-LLM stability on linear regression and remains strong on Sudoku, while Scatter retains diffusion's planning advantage on path-finding. Our results indicate that standard random-masking MDMs, even with blockwise variants, may be a suboptimal instantiation of diffusion LMs for ordered generation, motivating models beyond random masking.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了掩码扩散语言模型（MDM）在结构化生成任务中的不稳定性问题，并提出两种局部感知的块级模型Jigsaw和Scatter，通过注入从左到右的归纳偏置来缓解训练不稳定，实验表明不同任务需要不同的掩码策略。
AI.motivation: 标准自回归大语言模型（AR-LLM）虽然性能强大，但掩码扩散语言模型（MDM）作为替代方案在优化过程中存在显著的不稳定性问题，尤其是在需要结构化生成的任务中表现不佳，因此需要探索更稳定的训练方法和模型设计。
AI.method: 研究了块级MDM在三个受控任务（上下文线性回归、图路径查找、数独求解）上的表现，并提出两种局部感知块级模型：Jigsaw（注入从左到右的归纳偏置以匹配AR-LLM的稳定性）和Scatter（保留扩散模型在规划任务上的优势），同时对比了标准随机掩码MDM与AR-LLM。
AI.result: 标准随机掩码MDM在线性回归上无法可靠学习，在图路径查找上表现出高方差训练动态，但在数独上优于AR-LLM。Jigsaw在线性回归上匹配了AR-LLM的稳定性并在数独上保持优势，Scatter保留了扩散模型在路径查找上的规划优势。
AI.conclusion: 标准随机掩码MDM（包括其块级变体）对于有序生成任务可能不是最优的扩散语言模型实例化，未来需要研究超越随机掩码的模型设计。

title: From Insight to Action: A Novel Framework for Interpretability-Guided Data Selection in Large Language Models
summary: While mechanistic interpretability tools like Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) can uncover meaningful features within Large Language Models (LLMs), a critical gap remains in transforming these insights into practical actions for model optimization. We bridge this gap with the hypothesis that data selection guided by a model's internal task features is a effective training strategy. Inspired by this, we propose Interpretability-Guided Data Selection (IGDS), a framework that first identifies these causal task features through frequency recall and interventional filtering, then selects ``Feature-Resonant Data'' that maximally activates task features for fine-tuning. We validate IGDS on mathematical reasoning, summarization, and translation tasks within Gemma-2, LLaMA-3.1, and Qwen3 models. Our experiments demonstrate exceptional data efficiency: on the Math task, IGDS surpasses full-dataset fine-tuning by a remarkable 17.4% on Gemma-2-2B while using only 50% of the data, and outperforms established baselines focused on data quality and diversity. Analysis confirms a strong positive correlation between feature amplification and task performance improvement. IGDS thus provides a direct and effective framework to enhance LLMs by leveraging their internal mechanisms, validating our core hypothesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IGDS框架，通过识别模型内部因果任务特征并筛选"特征共振数据"进行微调，在数学推理、摘要、翻译任务上超越全数据集微调，数学任务上仅用50%数据即提升17.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有机械可解释性工具（如SAE）能发现LLM中的有意义特征，但缺乏将这些发现转化为模型优化实际操作的桥梁。
AI.method: 提出IGDS框架：首先通过频率召回（frequency recall）和干预过滤（interventional filtering）识别因果任务特征，然后筛选能够最大化激活任务特征的"特征共振数据"用于微调。
AI.result: 在数学任务上，IGDS仅用50%数据即在Gemma-2-2B上超越全数据集微调17.4%，并在多个模型（Gemma-2, LLaMA-3.1, Qwen3）和任务上优于数据质量/多样性基线。特征放大与任务性能提升呈强正相关。
AI.conclusion: IGDS提供了一个直接有效的框架，通过利用模型内部机制来增强LLM，验证了"基于模型内部任务特征选择数据是有效训练策略"的核心假设。

title: LongSumEval: Question-Answering Based Evaluation and Feedback-Driven Refinement for Long Document Summarization
summary: Evaluating long document summaries remains the primary bottleneck in summarization research. Existing metrics correlate weakly with human judgments and produce aggregate scores without explaining deficiencies or guiding improvement, preventing effective refinement in applications requiring verifiable accuracy. We introduce LongSumEval, a unified framework bridging evaluation and generation through structured question-answering feedback. The framework operationalizes summary quality as answerability and factual alignment of question-answer pairs, generating interpretable scores and actionable feedback that identifies coverage gaps and factual inconsistencies. This resolves the misalignment where evaluation operates independently of generation objectives. Meta-evaluation of our QA-based evaluation module across seven benchmarks demonstrates substantially stronger agreement with human judgments compared to established metrics. Structured feedback enables significant quality improvements through self-refinement without retraining. By demonstrating that evaluation feedback can serve as executable instructions for generation, this work establishes a generalizable paradigm for aligning assessment with improvement, with direct implications for controllable text generation requiring verifiable accuracy and transparent quality control. All code and datasets will be released in GitHub for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: LongSumEval 是一个通过结构化问答反馈来评估和改进长文档摘要的统一框架，它把摘要质量转化为问题的可回答性和事实一致性，在7个基准上比现有指标与人类判断更一致，并能通过自我优化显著提升摘要质量。
AI.motivation: 现有摘要评估指标与人类判断相关性弱，只能给出总分而无法解释缺陷或指导改进，导致在需要可验证准确性的应用中难以有效优化摘要。
AI.method: 提出 LongSumEval 框架，将摘要质量操作化为问答对的可回答性（覆盖度）和事实对齐（一致性），通过 QA 模块生成可解释的评分和结构化反馈，将评估反馈作为可执行指令用于生成阶段的自我优化。
AI.result: 在7个基准上的元评估显示，QA-based 评估模块与人类判断的一致性显著优于已有指标；结构化反馈能够在不重新训练的情况下通过自我优化大幅提升摘要质量。
AI.conclusion: 评估反馈可以作为生成的可执行指令，建立了一种可泛化的评估-改进对齐范式，对需要可验证准确性和透明质量控制的可控文本生成有直接意义。

title: LLM-ReSum: A Framework for LLM Reflective Summarization through Self-Evaluation
summary: Reliable evaluation of large language model (LLM)-generated summaries remains an open challenge, particularly across heterogeneous domains and document lengths. We conduct a comprehensive meta-evaluation of 14 automatic summarization metrics and LLM-based evaluators across seven datasets spanning five domains, covering documents from short news articles to long scientific, governmental, and legal texts (2K-27K words) with over 1,500 human-annotated summaries. Our results show that traditional lexical overlap metrics (e.g., ROUGE, BLEU) exhibit weak or negative correlation with human judgments, while task-specific neural metrics and LLM-based evaluators achieve substantially higher alignment, especially for linguistic quality assessment. Leveraging these findings, we propose LLM-ReSum, a self-reflective summarization framework that integrates LLM-based evaluation and generation in a closed feedback loop without model finetuning. Across three domains, LLM-ReSum improves low-quality summaries by up to 33% in factual accuracy and 39% in coverage, with human evaluators preferring refined summaries in 89% of cases. We additionally introduce PatentSumEval, a new human-annotated benchmark for legal document summarization comprising 180 expert-evaluated summaries. All code and datasets will be released in GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文对14种自动摘要评估指标进行元评估，提出无需微调的闭环自反思摘要框架LLM-ReSum，在三个领域将低质量摘要的事实准确率提升33%、覆盖率提升39%，并发布了法律文档摘要基准PatentSumEval。
AI.motivation: 大模型生成摘要的可靠评估仍是一个开放挑战，尤其是在跨领域和文档长度异构的情况下，现有指标与人类判断的一致性存在显著差异。
AI.method: 对14种评估指标（含传统指标、神经网络指标和LLM评估器）在7个数据集上进行元评估；基于发现提出LLM-ReSum框架，将LLM评估与生成闭环集成，无需微调模型。
AI.result: 传统词重叠指标与人类判断弱相关甚至负相关；LLM-ReSum将事实准确率提升33%、覆盖率提升39%；人类评估者在89%的情况下偏好精炼后的摘要。
AI.conclusion: 任务特定神经网络指标和LLM评估器与人类判断对齐更好；闭环自反思框架能有效提升摘要质量；法律文档摘要领域需要专门的评估基准（PatentSumEval）。

title: ResetEdit: Precise Text-guided Editing of Generated Image via Resettable Starting Latent
summary: Recent advances in diffusion models have enabled high-quality image generation, leading to increasing demand for post-generation editing that modifies local regions while preserving global structure. Achieving such flexible and precise editing requires a high-quality starting point, a latent representation that provides both the freedom needed for diverse modifications and the precision required for fine-grained, region-specific control. However, existing inversion-based approaches such as DDIM inversion often yield unsatisfactory starting latents, resulting in degraded edit fidelity and structural inconsistency. Ideally, the most suitable editing anchor should be the original latent used during the generation process, as it inherently captures the scene's structure and semantics. Yet, storing this latent for every generated image is impractical due to massive storage and retrieval costs. To address this challenge, we propose ResetEdit, a proactive diffusion editing framework that embeds recoverable latent information directly into the generation process. By injecting the discrepancy between the clean and diffused latents into the diffusion trajectory and extracting it during inversion, ResetEdit reconstructs a resettable latent that closely approximates the true starting state. Additionally, a lightweight latent optimization module compensates for reconstruction bias caused by VAE asymmetry. Built upon Stable Diffusion, ResetEdit integrates seamlessly with existing tuning-free editing methods and consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both controllability and visual fidelity.

AI.tldr: ResetEdit通过将可恢复的潜在信息嵌入扩散过程，解决了扩散模型图像编辑中起始潜在表示质量不佳的问题，实现了优于现有方法的可控编辑和视觉保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在图像编辑时，基于反演的方法（如DDIM反演）得到的起始潜在表示质量差，导致编辑保真度下降和结构不一致。理想的编辑锚点是生成过程中的原始潜在表示，但存储所有生成图像的潜在表示成本过高。
AI.method: 提出ResetEdit框架：1) 将干净潜在与扩散潜在之间的差异注入扩散轨迹，并在反演时提取，重建接近真实起始状态的可重置潜在；2) 轻量级潜在优化模块补偿VAE不对称性引起的重建偏差。
AI.result: ResetEdit与现有免调优编辑方法无缝集成，在可控性和视觉保真度方面持续优于最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ResetEdit通过主动嵌入可恢复潜在信息，在不增加存储成本的前提下获得了高质量的编辑起始点，为基于扩散模型的图像编辑提供了一种高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Learning Generalizable Multimodal Representations for Software Vulnerability Detection
summary: Source code and its accompanying comments are complementary yet naturally aligned modalities-code encodes structural logic while comments capture developer intent. However, existing vulnerability detection methods mostly rely on single-modality code representations, overlooking the complementary semantic information embedded in comments and thus limiting their generalization across complex code structures and logical relationships. To address this, we propose MultiVul, a multimodal contrastive framework that aligns code and comment representations through dual similarity learning and consistency regularization, augmented with diverse code-text pairs to improve robustness. Experiments on widely adopted DiverseVul and Devign datasets across four large language models (LLMs) (i.e., DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B, Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, StarCoder2-7B, and CodeLlama-7B) show that MultiVul achieves up to 27.07% F1 improvement over prompting-based methods and 13.37% over code-only Fine-Tuning, while maintaining comparable inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出MultiVul多模态对比学习框架，通过对齐代码和注释的双模态表示，在漏洞检测任务上相比提示方法和仅代码微调分别提升最高27.07%和13.37%的F1值。
AI.motivation: 现有漏洞检测方法大多只使用单一模态的代码表示，忽略了注释中蕴含的开发意图等语义信息，导致在复杂代码结构和逻辑关系上泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 提出MultiVul多模态对比框架，通过双重相似度学习和一致性正则化来对齐代码和注释表示，并使用多样化的代码-文本对增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在DiverseVul和Devign数据集上，基于四类LLM（DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B等）的实验中，相比提示方法提升最高27.07% F1，相比仅代码微调提升最高13.37% F1，且推理效率相当。
AI.conclusion: 融合代码和注释的双模态表示能有效提升漏洞检测性能，MultiVul在保持推理效率的同时显著优于单模态方法。

title: Transformer Approximations from ReLUs
summary: We provide a systematic recipe for translating ReLU approximation results to softmax attention mechanism. This recipe covers many common approximation targets. Importantly, it yields target-specific, economic resource bounds beyond universal approximation statements. We showcase the recipe on multiplication, reciprocal computation, and min/max primitives. These results provide new analytical tools for analyzing softmax transformer models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统方法，将ReLU近似结果迁移到softmax注意力机制中，并针对乘法、倒数计算和最大/最小值等目标给出了经济高效的资源界限。
AI.motivation: 现有的ReLU神经网络近似结果丰富，但softmax注意力机制的近似能力分析尚不系统。作者希望建立一种翻译机制，将ReLU的近似理论迁移到softmax注意力场景，并提供比通用近似定理更精细（target-specific）的资源界限。
AI.method: 提出一个系统性的"翻译配方"（systematic recipe），将ReLU近似结果转化为softmax注意力机制的近似结果。该配方覆盖多种常见近似目标，并能给出针对特定目标的经济资源界限（而非泛泛的通用近似结论）。
AI.result: 成功将该方法应用于乘法、倒数计算、以及最小/最大值计算等基本运算原语，展示了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为分析softmax Transformer模型提供了新的分析工具，使得研究者能够更好地理解和刻画softmax注意力机制的表达能力与资源需求。

title: DATAREEL: Automated Data-Driven Video Story Generation with Animations
summary: Data videos are a powerful medium for visual data based storytelling, combining animated, chart-centric visualizations with synchronized narration. Widely used in journalism, education, and public communication, they help audiences understand complex data through clear and engaging visual explanations. Despite their growing impact, generating data-driven video stories remains challenging, as it requires careful coordination of visual encoding, temporal progression, and narration and substantial expertise in visualization design, animation, and video-editing tools. Recent advances in large language models offer new opportunities to automate this process; however, there is currently no benchmark for rigorously evaluating models on animated visualization-based video storytelling. To address this gap, we introduce DataReel, a benchmark for automated data-driven video story generation comprising 328 real-world stories. Each story pairs structured data, a chart visualization, and a narration transcript, enabling systematic evaluation of models' abilities to generate animated data video stories. We further propose a multi-agent framework that decomposes the task into planning, generation, and verification stages, mirroring key aspects of the human storytelling process. Experiments show that this multi-agent approach outperforms direct prompting baselines under both automatic and human evaluations, while revealing persistent challenges in coordinating animation, narration, and visual emphasis. We release DataReel at https://github.com/vis-nlp/DataReel.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DataReel基准，包含328个真实数据视频故事，用于评估模型自动生成动画数据视频故事的能力，并设计了一个多智能体框架（规划-生成-验证）来提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 数据视频作为强大的数据故事媒介，但其生成需要视觉编码、时间推进和旁白的协调，且需要专业可视化、动画和视频编辑技能。现有大语言模型虽有潜力自动化该过程，但缺乏用于严格评估的基准。
AI.method: 构建DataReel基准（328个真实故事，每个包含结构化数据、图表可视化和叙事文本）；提出多智能体框架，将任务分解为规划、生成和验证三个阶段，模拟人类故事讲述过程。
AI.result: 多智能体方法在自动和人工评估中均优于直接提示基线；同时揭示了在协调动画、旁白和视觉强调方面仍存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: DataReel为自动数据视频故事生成提供了首个标准化评估基准，多智能体框架展示了更优性能，但动画、旁白与视觉强调的协调仍是开放问题。

title: What Makes Good Instruction-Tuning Data? An In-Context Learning Perspective
summary: Instruction-tuning datasets often contain substantial redundancy and low-quality samples, necessitating effective data selection methods. We propose an instruction data selection framework based on weighted in-context influence (wICI), which measures how effectively each candidate example reduces instruction-following difficulty for semantically related peers. Through systematic experiments, we address three key questions: what constitutes effective instruction tuning data from an in-context perspective, whether sample difficulty correlates with in-context influence, and how in-context influence translates to instruction tuning effectiveness. Experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing baselines under constrained data budgets, while empirically showing that sample difficulty negatively correlates with in-context influence.

AI.tldr: 提出基于加权上下文影响力(wICI)的指令数据选择框架，通过衡量候选样本对语义相关样本的指令跟随难度降低程度来选择数据，实验证明该方法在有限数据预算下优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 指令微调数据集中存在大量冗余和低质量样本，需要有效的数据选择方法来提升训练效率。
AI.method: 提出加权上下文影响力(wICI)框架，从上下文视角衡量每个候选样本对语义相关样本指令跟随难度的降低效果，据此进行数据选择。
AI.result: 在多个模型和基准测试上，该方法在有限数据预算下持续优于现有基线方法；同时发现样本难度与上下文影响力呈负相关。
AI.conclusion: 从上下文影响力角度出发的数据选择策略是有效的，且样本难度不能直接作为衡量上下文影响力的指标。

title: Can Code Evaluation Metrics Detect Code Plagiarism?
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, accepted at LEARNER 2026 workshop (associated with EASE 2026)
summary:
Source Code Plagiarism Detection (SCPD) plays an important role in maintaining fairness and academic integrity in software engineering education. Code Evaluation Metrics (CEMs) are developed for assessing code generation tasks. However, it remains unclear whether such metrics can reliably detect plagiarism across different levels of modification (L1-L6), increasing in complexity.
  In this paper, we perform a comparative empirical study using two open-source labelled datasets, ConPlag (raw and template-free versions) and IRPlag. We evaluate five CEMs, namely CodeBLEU, CrystalBLEU, RUBY, Tree Structured Edit Distance (TSED), and CodeBERTScore. The performance is evaluated using threshold-free ranking-based measures to assess overall, per dataset, and per-level plagiarism performance. The results are compared against state-of-the-art (SOTA) Source Code Plagiarism Detection Tools (SCPDTs), JPlag and Dolos.
  Our findings show that without preprocessing, Dolos achieves the highest overall ranking performance, while among the individual metrics, CrystalBLEU, CodeBLEU, and RUBY outperform JPlag. Performance is strongest at L1 and drops from L4 onward, while CrystalBLEU remains competitive on L6. With preprocessing, CrystalBLEU surpasses Dolos overall. Per dataset, Dolos achieved the best ranking on the ConPlag raw dataset, while CrystalBLEU was the best-performing metric on the remaining datasets. At the plagiarism levels, Dolos remains strongest on L4, while Crystal-BLEU leads most of the remaining difficult levels. These results indicate that CEMs are comparable to dedicated tools in terms of ranking metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了五种代码评估指标（CEMs）与两种专用抄袭检测工具（JPlag和Dolos）在不同修改级别下的抄袭检测能力。结果表明，CrystalBLEU在预处理后整体表现优于Dolos，CEMs在排名指标上与专用工具具有可比性。
AI.motivation: 现有代码评估指标主要用于评估代码生成任务，但它们在源代码抄袭检测中的可靠性尚不明确，尤其在不同修改级别（L1-L6）下是否有效缺乏系统性研究。
AI.method: 使用ConPlag（原始与无模板版本）和IRPlag两个开源数据集，评估CodeBLEU、CrystalBLEU、RUBY、TSED和CodeBERTScore五种CEMs，与JPlag和Dolos两种SOTA工具对比，采用无阈值排名指标评估整体、各数据集及各层面表现。
AI.result: 无预处理时Dolos整体最优，CrystalBLEU、CodeBLEU和RUBY优于JPlag；L1表现最强，L4后下降，CrystalBLEU在L6仍有竞争力。预处理后CrystalBLEU整体超越Dolos。各数据集上Dolos在ConPlag原始数据最优，CrystalBLEU在其余数据集最优。
AI.conclusion: CEMs在排名指标上与专用抄袭检测工具表现相当，具有替代或补充专用工具的潜力。

title: IAM: Identity-Aware Human Motion and Shape Joint Generation
summary: Recent advances in text-driven human motion generation enable models to synthesize realistic motion sequences from natural language descriptions. However, most existing approaches assume identity-neutral motion and generate movements using a canonical body representation, ignoring the strong influence of body morphology on motion dynamics. In practice, attributes such as body proportions, mass distribution, and age significantly affect how actions are performed, and neglecting this coupling often leads to physically inconsistent motions. We propose an identity-aware motion generation framework that explicitly models the relationship between body morphology and motion dynamics. Instead of relying on explicit geometric measurements, identity is represented using multimodal signals, including natural language descriptions and visual cues. We further introduce a joint motion-shape generation paradigm that simultaneously synthesizes motion sequences and body shape parameters, allowing identity cues to directly modulate motion dynamics. Extensive experiments on motion capture datasets and large-scale in-the-wild videos demonstrate improved motion realism and motion-identity consistency while maintaining high motion quality. Project page: https://vjwq.github.io/IAM

AI.tldr: 提出身份感知运动生成框架IAM，通过多模态身份信号（语言+视觉）显式建模身体形态与运动动力学的耦合关系，同时生成运动序列和身体形状参数，提升运动真实感和身份一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动运动生成方法使用标准身体模型，忽略了身体比例、质量分布、年龄等形态特征对运动动力学的显著影响，导致生成的运动在物理上不一致。
AI.method: 1) 使用多模态信号（自然语言描述+视觉线索）表示身份，而非显式几何测量；2) 提出联合运动-形状生成范式，同时合成运动序列和身体形状参数，使身份线索直接调节运动动力学。
AI.result: 在运动捕捉数据集和大规模野外视频上的实验表明，该方法在保持高质量运动的同时，提高了运动真实感和运动-身份一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模身体形态与运动动力学的耦合关系，实现了身份感知的运动生成，为生成更真实、物理一致的人体运动提供了新思路。

title: SAFEdit: Does Multi-Agent Decomposition Resolve the Reliability Challenges of Instructed Code Editing?
comment: Accepted to the EQUISA (Evaluation of Qualitative Aspects of Intelligent Software Assistants) workshop at EASE (Evaluation and Assessment in Software Engineering) 2026
summary: Instructed code editing is a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs). On the EditBench benchmark, 39 of 40 evaluated models obtain a task success rate (TSR) below 60 percent, highlighting a gap between general code generation and the ability to perform instruction-driven editing under executable test constraints. To address this, we propose SAFEdit, a multi-agent framework for instructed code editing that decomposes the editing process into specialized roles to improve reliability and reduce unintended code changes. A Planner Agent produces an explicit, visibility-aware edit plan, an Editor Agent applies minimal, literal code modifications, and a Verifier Agent executes real test runs. When tests fail, SAFEdit uses a Failure Abstraction Layer (FAL) to transform raw test logs into structured diagnostic feedback, which is fed back to the Editor to support iterative refinement. We compare SAFEdit against both prior single-model results reported for EditBench and an implemented ReAct single-agent baseline under the same evaluation conditions. We used EditBench to evaluate SAFEdit on 445 code editing instances in five languages (English, Polish, Spanish, Chinese, and Russian) under varying spatial context variants. SAFEdit achieved 68.6 percent TSR, outperforming the single-model baseline by 3.8 percentage points and the ReAct single-agent baseline by 8.6 percentage points. The iterative refinement loop was found to contribute 17.4 percentage points to SAFEdit's overall success rate. SAFEdit's automated error analysis further indicates a reduction in instruction-level hallucinations compared to single-agent approaches, providing an additional framework component for interpreting failures beyond pass or fail outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAFEdit多智能体框架，通过规划、编辑、验证三个专用智能体协同工作，并引入故障抽象层(FAL)提供结构化诊断反馈，在EditBench基准上实现68.6%的任务成功率，比单一模型基线高3.8个百分点，迭代改进贡献了17.4个百分点的提升。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在指令式代码编辑任务上表现不佳（EditBench上39/40模型TSR低于60%），通用代码生成能力与指令驱动编辑能力之间存在显著差距，需要更可靠的方法来减少非预期的代码变更。
AI.method: 提出SAFEdit多智能体框架，包含三个角色：Planner Agent生成可见性感知编辑计划，Editor Agent执行最小字面修改，Verifier Agent运行测试验证。测试失败时通过故障抽象层(FAL)将原始日志转化为结构化诊断反馈，供Editor进行迭代改进。
AI.result: 在EditBench的445个代码编辑实例上，SAFEdit达到68.6% TSR，优于单一模型基线3.8个百分点和ReAct单智能体基线8.6个百分点。迭代改进贡献了17.4个百分点的成功率提升。
AI.conclusion: SAFEdit有效弥补了代码编辑能力的差距，其故障抽象层和迭代机制显著提升性能，并能减少指令层面的幻觉，提供超越二分类通过/失败的失败分析能力。

title: Contrastive Image-Metadata Pre-Training for Materials Transmission Electron Microscopy
summary: The vast majority of transmission electron microscopy (TEM) data never gets published and ends up on a backup drive until deleted to free up space. These left-over datasets are rich in detail and variation, often paired with automatically saved metadata of instrument state and acquisition parameters. In this work, we introduce a dataset of 7,330 high-angle annular dark-field scanning-TEM (HAADF-STEM) images from a single instrument to learn a joint embedding space between image metadata and HAADF image. These embeddings link image style with acquisition parameters, which allows us to train a generative style transfer network that can convert experimental images into the style they would have had if they were recorded with different instrument parameters. We evaluate the performance of the network and explore the usefulness of the technique for physical denoising.

AI.tldr: 本文利用7,330张HAADF-STEM图像，通过联合嵌入空间连接图像元数据与图像风格，训练生成式风格迁移网络，实现将实验图像转换为不同仪器参数下的风格，并探索其在物理去噪中的应用。
AI.motivation: 大量TEM数据未被发表而被删除，这些数据包含丰富的细节和仪器元数据，作者希望利用这些被遗弃的数据来建立图像与采集参数之间的关联。
AI.method: 收集7,330张HAADF-STEM图像及其自动保存的元数据，学习图像与元数据的联合嵌入空间，训练生成式风格迁移网络，实现不同仪器参数下的图像风格转换。
AI.result: 成功训练了风格迁移网络，能够将实验图像转换为不同仪器参数下的风格，并评估了该方法在物理去噪方面的效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效利用未发表的数据集，通过风格迁移实现图像转换和物理去噪，为TEM数据的再利用提供了新思路。

title: ValueAlpha: Agreement-Gated Stress Testing of LLM-Judged Investment Rationales Before Returns Are Observable
comment: 9 pages, Submitted to IEEE Computational Intelligence in Financial Engineering and Economics (CIFEr) 2026, Tokyo, Japan
summary:
Long-horizon investment decisions create a pre-realization evaluation problem: realized returns are the eventual arbiter of investment quality, but they arrive too late and are too noisy to guide many model-development and governance decisions. LLM judges offer a tempting substitute for pre-deployment evaluation of AI-finance systems, but unvalidated judges may reward verbosity, confidence, or rubric mimicry rather than financial judgment. This paper introduces \textbf{ValueAlpha}, a preregistered agreement-gated stress-test protocol for deciding when LLM-judged investment-rationale claims are publishable, qualified, or invalid.
  In a controlled market-state capital-allocation prototype with 1,000 honest decision cycles and 100 preregistered adversarial controls (1,100 trajectories, 5,500 judge calls), ValueAlpha clears the aggregate agreement gate at \(\barκ_w = 0.7168\) but prevents several overclaims. Lower-rank systems collapse into a tie-class, one rubric dimension fails the per-dimension gate (\texttt{constraint\_awareness}, \(\barκ_w = 0.2022\)), single-judge rankings are family-dependent, and terse-correct rationales receive a \(Δ= -2.81\) rubric-point penalty relative to honest rationales. A targeted anchor-specificity probe further shows that financial constructs such as constraint awareness are operationally load-bearing.
  The contribution is therefore not a leaderboard and not a claim to measure true investment skill. ValueAlpha is a pre-calibration metrology layer for AI-finance evaluation: it determines whether a proposed LLM-judge-based investment-rationale claim is stable enough, agreed enough, and uncontaminated enough to be reported at all.

AI.tldr: ValueAlpha是一个预注册的一致性门控压力测试协议，用于判断LLM评判的投资理由声明是否可发表、合格或无效。通过1100条轨迹、5500次评判调用实验，该协议在聚合一致性门控(κ̄w=0.7168)通过，但防止了过度声明，发现低排名系统崩溃为平局类、单维度门控失败(约束意识κ̄w=0.2022)、单评判者排名存在家族依赖、简洁正确理由遭受评分惩罚等问题。
AI.motivation: 长期投资决策面临"预实现评估困境"：已实现回报作为投资质量的最终仲裁者，但来得太晚且噪声太大，难以指导模型开发和治理决策。LLM评判提供了替代方案，但未经验证的评判者可能奖励冗长、自信或模仿评分标准而非真正的金融判断能力。
AI.method: 设计预注册的一致性门控压力测试协议ValueAlpha，在受控市场状态资本分配原型中进行1000个诚实决策周期和100个预注册对抗控制实验(共1100条轨迹、5500次评判调用)，通过聚合一致性门控和按维度门控来验证LLM评判的可靠性。
AI.result: 聚合一致性门控通过(κ̄w=0.7168)，但发现：低排名系统崩溃为平局类；约束意识维度门控失败(κ̄w=0.2022)；单评判者排名存在家族依赖；简洁正确理由相比诚实理由遭受-2.81分的评分惩罚；锚特定性探测表明金融概念(如约束意识)具有操作性承重作用。
AI.conclusion: ValueAlpha的贡献不是排行榜，也不是声称能衡量真正的投资技能。它是一个用于AI金融评估的预校准计量层，用于判断基于LLM评判的投资理由声明是否足够稳定、足够一致、足够未被污染以至于可以报告。

title: Korean aegyo speech shows systematic F1 increase to signal childlike qualities
summary: Korean aegyo is a socially recognized childlike speaking style used predominantly in romantic interactions among adults. This study examined vowel space modification in aegyo by analyzing formant frequencies from twelve Seoul Korean speakers who produced identical scripts in aegyo and non-aegyo styles. Results show that aegyo speech features a significant increase in F1 values across vowels and selective fronting of front vowels, leading to vowel space expansion but mainly a shift to higher F1. These findings suggest that adult speakers stylize childlike speech by imitating the shorter vocal tract of children, mainly through global vowel lowering and partial fronting.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了首尔韩语使用者在撒娇风格下的元音空间变化，发现撒娇时元音F1显著增加，前元音选择性前移，导致元音空间扩展但主要是F1升高，表明成人通过全局元音降低和部分前移模仿儿童较短的声道。
AI.motivation: 探究韩语"撒娇"(aegyo)这一社交认可的儿童化说话风格在成人浪漫互动中的声学特征，特别是元音空间的修饰模式。
AI.method: 12名首尔韩语使用者朗读相同脚本，分别采用撒娇和非撒娇风格，分析其元音共振峰频率(F1、F2)。
AI.result: 撒娇风格下所有元音的F1显著增加，前元音出现选择性前移，元音空间扩大但主要表现为F1升高。
AI.conclusion: 成人说话者通过全局元音降低和部分前移来模仿儿童的较短声道，从而风格化地呈现儿童化言语。

title: Action-Aware Generative Sequence Modeling for Short Video Recommendation
summary: With the rapid development of the Internet, users have increasingly higher expectations for the recommendation accuracy of online content consumption platforms. However, short videos often contain diverse segments, and users may not hold the same attitude toward all of them. Traditional binary-classification recommendation models, which treat a video as a single holistic entity, face limitations in accurately capturing such nuanced preferences. Considering that user consumption is a temporal process, this paper demonstrates that the timing of user actions can represent diverse intentions through statistical analysis and examination of action patterns. Based on this insight, we propose a novel modeling paradigm: Action-Aware Generative Sequence Network (A2Gen), which refines user actions along the temporal dimension and chains them into sequences for unified processing and prediction. First, we introduce the Context-aware Attention Module (CAM) to model action sequences enriched with item-specific contextual features. Building upon this, we develop the Hierarchical Sequence Encoder (HSE) to learn temporal action patterns from users' historical actions. Finally, through leveraging CAM, we design a module for action sequence generation: the Action-seq Autoregressive Generator (AAG). Extensive offline experiments on the Kuaishou's dataset and the Tmall public dataset demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model. Furthermore, through large-scale online A/B testing deployed on Kuaishou's platform, our model achieves significant improvements over baseline methods in multi-task prediction by leveraging sequential information. Specifically, it yields increases of 0.34% in user watch time, 8.1% in interaction rate, and 0.162% in overall user retention (LifeTime-7), leading to successful deployment across all traffic, serving over 400 million users every day.

AI.tldr: 本文提出A2Gen模型，通过感知用户动作时序来捕捉对短视频不同片段的细粒度偏好，替代传统整体式推荐方法。模型包含上下文感知注意力模块(CAM)、层次序列编码器(HSE)和动作序列自回归生成器(AAG)，在快手和天猫数据集上表现优异，线上部署后服务超4亿日活用户。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐模型将视频视为整体进行二分类，无法捕捉用户对短视频内不同片段的多样化偏好。用户消费是时序过程，动作时机可表征不同意图，需更细粒度的建模方法。
AI.method: 提出A2Gen框架，包含三个模块：(1) CAM模块对动作序列注入物品上下文特征；(2) HSE编码器学习用户历史动作的时序模式；(3) AAG模块利用CAM进行动作序列的自回归生成。
AI.result: 离线实验在快手和天猫数据集上超越基线；线上A/B测试在快手平台实现多任务预测提升：观看时长+0.34%、交互率+8.1%、用户留存(LifeTime-7)+0.162%，已全量部署服务超4亿日活用户。
AI.conclusion: 通过将用户动作沿时间维度精细化并链式建模，A2Gen能更精准捕捉用户对视频片段的细粒度偏好，验证了时序动作模式在推荐系统中的有效性和商业价值。

title: Benchmarking OCR Pipelines with Adaptive Enhancement for Multi-Domain Retail Bill Digitization
summary: The digitization of multi-domain retail billing documents remains a challenging task due to variability in scan quality, layout heterogeneity, and domain diversity across commercial sectors. This paper proposes and benchmarks an intelligent, quality-aware adaptive Optical Character Recognition (OCR) pipeline for retail bill digitization spanning five domains: grocery stores, restaurants, hardware shops, footwear outlets, and clothing retailers. The proposed system integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based image enhancement module trained via self-supervised denoising, a Laplacian variance-based image quality analyzer with three-tier routing, a confidence-driven adaptive feedback loop with iterative retry, and an NLP-based post-OCR correction layer. Experiments were conducted on a real-world dataset of 360 heterogeneous retail bill images. Ground truth for quantitative evaluation was generated using an OCR ensemble majority voting strategy, a validated approach for scenarios without manual annotation. The proposed pipeline achieves a Character Error Rate (CER) of 18.4% and Word Error Rate (WER) of 27.6%, representing improvements of 26.4% and 31.2% respectively over the Raw Tesseract baseline. The pipeline additionally achieves a text density of 108.3 words per image, a noise ratio of 2.3%, and a processing time of 3.64 seconds per image - a 6.4x speed advantage over EasyOCR. Image quality PSNR analysis on enhanced MEDIUM and LOW quality images yields an average of 28.7 dB, confirming meaningful enhancement. These results establish a reproducible benchmark for multi-domain retail bill OCR research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一种智能、质量自适应的OCR流水线，用于多领域零售账单数字化，包含CNN图像增强、拉普拉斯方差质量分析、自适应反馈循环和NLP后纠错层，在360张异构零售账单图像上实现了18.4%的CER和27.6%的WER，较原始Tesseract分别提升26.4%和31.2%。
AI.motivation: 多领域零售账单数字化面临扫描质量差异大、布局异构性强、商业领域多样性高等挑战，现有OCR方法难以通用适配，亟需一种质量感知的、可跨领域泛化的智能OCR方案。
AI.method: 提出质量自适应OCR流水线：1）CNN自监督去噪图像增强模块；2）拉普拉斯方差三级质量分析路由；3）置信度驱动的自适应反馈迭代重试机制；4）NLP后OCR纠错层。采用OCR集成多数投票生成真实标注，在5个领域（超市、餐厅、五金店、鞋店、服装店）共360张图像上评估。
AI.result: CER 18.4%，WER 27.6%，相比原始Tesseract分别降低26.4%和31.2%；文本密度108.3词/图，噪声比2.3%，处理时间3.64秒/图（比EasyOCR快6.4倍）；中度/低质图像增强后PSNR平均28.7dB。
AI.conclusion: 该质量自适应OCR流水线在多种零售领域账单上均优于基线方法，兼顾准确率、速度与鲁棒性，为多领域零售账单OCR研究建立了可复现的基准。

title: Scenario-based System Testing for Distributed Robotics Applications
summary: We present the SCenario Specification Language (SCSL) for automated generation and execution of system-level tests. SCSL targets complex distributed systems (e.g., collaborating autonomous robots) where classical model-based testing becomes impractical because (1) the overall system complexity is too high for a single monolithic model, (2) test behaviour cannot be fully precomputed due to substantial nondeterminism in the distributed system under test (SUT), and (3) the SUT configuration may change dynamically at runtime. Challenge (1) is addressed by scenarios: each scenario specifies test-specific expected SUT behaviour and/or stimuli to be applied during execution. Complex system tests are composed from elementary scenarios using sequential and parallel composition. To address (2), the SCSL tool platform supports online (on-the-fly) testing, selecting and executing test steps during runtime. For (3), SCSL provides a collaboration construct that supports dynamic reconfiguration: removing unavailable components, registering newly joining components, and rewiring interfaces during test execution. We illustrate the syntax and semantics of SCSL using a system-test example in which robots perform a salvage mission, and we use an automatically generated test execution to demonstrate the concepts supported by our prototype tool platform.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SCSL（场景规范语言），用于自动化生成和执行系统级测试，特别针对复杂的分布式系统（如协作机器人）。通过场景组合、在线测试和动态重配置机制，解决了传统模型测试在复杂分布式系统中的三大挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统模型测试在复杂分布式系统中面临三个问题：系统复杂度高难以建立统一模型、分布式系统的非确定性导致测试行为无法完全预计算、系统配置可能在运行时动态变化。
AI.method: SCSL通过三个核心机制解决上述挑战：(1) 场景（scenario）机制，每个场景描述特定的测试行为和预期，复杂测试由基本场景通过顺序和并行组合而成；(2) 在线（on-the-fly）测试，在运行时选择和执行测试步骤；(3) 协作（collaboration）构造，支持动态重配置，包括移除不可用组件、注册新加入组件、重新连接接口。
AI.result: 通过机器人执行打捞任务的系统测试示例，展示了SCSL的语法和语义，并利用原型工具平台自动生成测试执行，验证了所提概念的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SCSL有效解决了复杂分布式系统测试的三大挑战，场景组合、在线测试和动态重配置相结合，为自动化系统级测试提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Learning with Embedded Linear Equality Constraints via Variational Bayesian Inference
comment: Part of the OPTIMAL: Optimisation and Post-Bayesian Inference in Machine Learning Workshop at AISTATS 2026
summary: Machine Learning is becoming more prevalent in science and engineering, but many approaches do not provide meaningful uncertainty estimates and predictions may also violate known physical knowledge. We propose a Bayesian framework to embed linear relationships across inputs and outputs into the learning process, whilst characterizing full predictive uncertainty over both the model parameters and the domain knowledge. We evaluated our method on learning the single particle battery model subject to voltage and energy balances, showing its ability to provide reduced credible intervals and constraint violations compared to standard Bayesian neural networks based on variational inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯框架，将输入与输出之间的线性关系嵌入学习过程，同时刻画模型参数和领域知识的完整预测不确定性。在单粒子电池模型上的实验表明，相比标准贝叶斯神经网络，该方法能提供更窄的置信区间并减少约束违反。
AI.motivation: 机器学习方法在科学和工程中日益普及，但许多方法不能提供有意义的的不确定性估计，且预测可能违反已知的物理知识。因此，作者旨在解决如何在模型中嵌入物理约束并同时量化不确定性的问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种贝叶斯框架，将输入与输出之间的线性关系作为领域知识嵌入学习过程，并对模型参数和领域知识都进行完整的不确定性刻画。
AI.result: 在单粒子电池模型上的实验结果显示，相比基于变分推断的标准贝叶斯神经网络，该方法能够提供更窄的置信区间并减少约束违反。
AI.conclusion: 将线性物理关系嵌入贝叶斯学习框架，可以在保证预测精度的同时，有效降低不确定性并减少对物理约束的违反。

title: AutoResearchBench: Benchmarking AI Agents on Complex Scientific Literature Discovery
summary: Autonomous scientific research is significantly advanced thanks to the development of AI agents. One key step in this process is finding the right scientific literature, whether to explore existing knowledge for a research problem, or to acquire evidence for verifying assumptions and supporting claims. To assess AI agents' capability in driving this process, we present AutoResearchBench, a dedicated benchmark for autonomous scientific literature discovery. AutoResearchBench consists of two complementary task types: (1) Deep Research, which requires tracking down a specific target paper through a progressive, multi-step probing process, and (2) Wide Research, which requires comprehensively collecting a set of papers satisfying given conditions. Compared to previous benchmarks on agentic web browsing, AutoResearchBench is distinguished along three dimensions: it is research-oriented, calling for in-depth comprehension of scientific concepts; literature-focused, demanding fine-grained utilization of detailed information; and open-ended, involving an unknown number of qualified papers and thus requiring deliberate reasoning and search throughout. These properties make AutoResearchBench uniquely suited for evaluating autonomous research capabilities, and extraordinarily challenging. Even the most powerful LLMs, despite having largely conquered general agentic web-browsing benchmarks such as BrowseComp, achieve only 9.39% accuracy on Deep Research and 9.31% IoU on Wide Research, while many other strong baselines fall below 5%. We publicly release the dataset and evaluation pipeline to facilitate future research in this direction. We publicly release the dataset, evaluation pipeline, and code at https://github.com/CherYou/AutoResearchBench.

AI.tldr: AutoResearchBench是一个用于评估AI代理在自主科学文献发现能力上的基准测试，包含Deep Research（深度研究）和Wide Research（广泛研究）两类任务。当前最强LLM在该基准上仅达到约9%的准确率，表现远低于通用网页浏览基准。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理在自主科学研究中的发展，评估其科学文献发现能力变得至关重要，而现有基准无法充分测试这一能力。
AI.method: 构建包含两类任务的基准：Deep Research（多步渐进式搜索目标论文）和Wide Research（全面收集满足条件的论文集合），并设计了研究导向、文献聚焦、开放式的评估维度。
AI.result: 最强LLM在Deep Research上仅达9.39%准确率，Wide Research上仅达9.31% IoU，多数基线低于5%。
AI.conclusion: AutoResearchBench是极具挑战性的自主科学文献发现评估基准，现有最强AI代理表现远不理想，为未来研究提供了明确方向。

title: FAMA: Failure-Aware Meta-Agentic Framework for Open-Source LLMs in Interactive Tool Use Environments
summary: Large Language Models are being increasingly deployed as the decision-making core of autonomous agents capable of effecting change in external environments. Yet, in conversational benchmarks, which simulate real-world customer-centric issue resolution scenarios, these agents frequently fail due to the cascading effects of incorrect decision-making. These challenges are particularly pronounced for open-source LLMs with smaller parameter sizes, limited context windows, and constrained inference budgets, which contribute to increased error accumulation in agentic settings. To tackle these challenges, we present the Failure-Aware Meta-Agentic (FAMA) framework. FAMA operates in two stages: first, it analyzes failure trajectories from baseline agents to identify the most prevalent errors; second, it employs an orchestration mechanism that activates a minimal subset of specialized agents tailored to address these failures by injecting a targeted context for the tool-use agent before the decision-making step. Experiments across open-source LLMs demonstrate performance gains up to 27% across evaluation modes over standard baselines. These results highlight that targeted curation of context through specialized agents to address common failures is a valuable design principle for building reliable, multi-turn tool-use LLM agents that simulate real-world conversational scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出FAMA框架，通过分析失败轨迹并激活最小化专用智能体子集来注入针对性上下文，使开源LLM在多轮工具使用场景中性能提升高达27%。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为自主智能体决策核心时，在真实客服场景中因错误决策的级联效应而频繁失败，开源小参数模型受限于上下文窗口和推理预算，错误累积问题更为严重。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段分析基线智能体的失败轨迹以识别最普遍的错误类型；第二阶段通过编排机制激活最小专用智能体子集，在决策前注入针对性上下文给工具使用智能体。
AI.result: 在开源LLM上，跨评估模式相比标准基线性能提升高达27%。
AI.conclusion: 通过专用智能体针对常见失败进行上下文的精准策展，是构建可靠多轮工具使用LLM智能体的有价值设计原则。

title: Lightweight Real-Time Rendering Parameter Optimization via XGBoost-Driven Lookup Tables
summary: Achieving a desirable balance between rendering quality and real-time performance is a long-standing challenge in modern game and rendering engines, particularly on resource-constrained mobile devices such as laptops, tablets, and smartphones. Existing approaches to automatic rendering parameter optimization either depend on exhaustive per-scene pre-computation that spans several days, suffer from the prohibitive inference overhead of neural networks that prevents per-frame adaptation, or lack generalizability across heterogeneous hardware and diverse scenes. In this paper, we propose \textbf{LUT-Opt}, a lightweight, general-purpose framework for adaptive per-frame rendering parameter optimization. Our method decomposes the joint optimization of rendering time and image quality into a tractable two-stage pipeline. In the offline stage, we train a pair of XGBoost regressors to predict rendering time and image quality from rendering parameters, hardware state, and scene complexity descriptors. The trained ensemble models are then distilled into compact lookup tables (LUTs) through systematic discretization and a two-phase linear search that first constrains rendering time and subsequently maximizes structural similarity (SSIM). During runtime, the pre-computed LUT is queried every frame in sub-millisecond time, enabling truly adaptive parameter selection with negligible computational overhead. We validate LUT-Opt on two representative rendering techniques -- subsurface scattering (SSS) and hybrid-pipeline ambient occlusion (AO) -- implemented within Unreal Engine 5. Extensive experiments across multiple scenes and GPU configurations demonstrate that LUT-Opt reduces subsurface scattering rendering time by approximately 40\% and ambient occlusion rendering time by roughly 70\%, while incurring only about 2\% increase in image quality error, with per-frame inference latency below 0.1\ ms.

AI.tldr: 提出LUT-Opt框架，利用离线训练的XGBoost模型蒸馏为查找表(LUT)，实现亚毫秒级逐帧渲染参数自适应优化，在SSS和AO任务上分别降低约40%和70%渲染时间，仅增加约2%图像质量误差。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的移动设备上，现有渲染参数优化方法存在预计算耗时过长、神经网络推理开销大、泛化性差等问题，无法实现高效的逐帧自适应优化。
AI.method: 两阶段流水线：(1) 离线阶段：训练XGBoost回归器预测渲染时间和图像质量，通过系统化离散化和两阶段线性搜索（先约束时间再最大化SSIM）蒸馏为紧凑查找表(LUT)；(2) 运行时阶段：每帧以亚毫秒级时间查询LUT实现自适应参数选择。
AI.result: 在UE5的SSS和AO任务上，渲染时间分别降低约40%和70%，图像质量误差仅增加约2%，逐帧推理延迟低于0.1ms。
AI.conclusion: LUT-Opt是一种轻量级、通用且泛化性强的逐帧渲染参数优化框架，在移动和桌面设备上均能实现高效的自适应渲染。

title: Generative diffusion models for spatiotemporal influenza forecasting
summary: Forecasting infectious disease incidence can provide important information to guide public health planning, yet is difficult because epidemic dynamics are complex. Current mechanistic and statistical approaches often struggle to capture multimodal uncertainty or emergent trends. Influpaint adapts denoising diffusion probabilistic models to epidemic forecasting.
