By encoding influenza seasons as spatiotemporal images in which pixel intensity represents incidence, Influpaint learns a rich distribution of disease dynamics from a hybrid dataset of surveillance and simulated trajectories. Forecasting is formulated as a conditional generation (inpainting) task from partial observations. We show that Influpaint generates realistic, diverse epidemic trajectories and achieves forecast accuracy that is competitive with leading ensemble methods in retrospective evaluation. In real-time evaluation during the 2023--2025 U.S. CDC FluSight challenges, performance improved substantially across seasons, with highly accurate but somewhat overconfident projections in 2024--2025. The best performance was achieved with a training dataset containing 30% surveillance and 70% simulated trajectories. These results show that diffusion models can capture important spatiotemporal structure in influenza dynamics and provide a flexible framework for probabilistic infectious disease forecasting.

AI.tldr: Influpaint利用去噪扩散概率模型，将流感季节编码为时空图像，通过条件生成（图像修复）实现传染病概率预测，在2023-2025年美国CDC FluSight挑战中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传染病预测对公共卫生规划至关重要，但现有机械模型和统计方法难以捕捉多模态不确定性及新兴趋势。
AI.method: 将流感季节编码为时空图像（像素强度代表发病率），使用去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）从真实监测与模拟轨迹的混合数据集中学习疾病动态分布，将预测任务转化为条件图像修复任务。
AI.result: 预测准确性与领先集成方法相当；2023-2025年实时评估中性能显著提升；30%监测+70%模拟数据训练效果最佳；2024-2025年预测准确但略显过度自信。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型能够捕捉流感动态的重要时空结构，为概率性传染病预测提供了灵活框架。

title: Plausible but Wrong: A case study on Agentic Failures in Astrophysical Workflows
summary: Agentic AI systems are increasingly being integrated into scientific workflows, yet their behavior under realistic conditions remains insufficiently understood. We evaluate CMBAgent across two workflow paradigms and eighteen astrophysical tasks. In the One-Shot setting, access to domain-specific context yields an approximately ~6x performance improvement (0.85 vs. ~0 without context), with the primary failure mode being silent incorrect computation - syntactically valid code that produces plausible but inaccurate results. In the Deep Research setting, the system frequently exhibits silent failures across stress tests, producing physically inconsistent posteriors without self-diagnosis. Overall, performance is strong on well-specified tasks but degrades on problems designed to probe reasoning limits, often without visible error signals. These findings highlight that the most concerning failure mode in agentic scientific workflows is not overt failure, but confident generation of incorrect results. We release our evaluation framework to facilitate systematic reliability analysis of scientific AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了CMBAgent在18个天体物理任务上的表现，发现其在有领域上下文时性能提升约6倍（准确率0.85 vs 无上下文时的~0），但存在“静默错误”这一主要失败模式——生成语法正确但结果错误的代码。在深度研究设置下，系统频繁出现静默失败，产生物理上不一致的后验结果而不自知。结论是：智能体科学工作流中最令人担忧的并非明显失败，而是自信地生成错误结果。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI智能体越来越多地被用于科学工作流，但在现实条件下其行为尚未被充分理解，尤其缺乏对其失败模式的系统分析。
AI.method: 在两种工作流范式（One-Shot和Deep Research）下，对18个天体物理任务评估CMBAgent，分析了有无领域特定上下文对性能的影响，并对其失败模式进行归类分析。
AI.result: (1) One-Shot设置中，有领域上下文时性能约0.85，无上下文时约0，提升约6倍；(2) 主要失败模式为静默错误（语法正确但结果不准确）；(3) Deep Research设置中，系统在压力测试下频繁产生物理不一致的后验而不自知。
AI.conclusion: 智能体科学工作流中最令人担忧的失败模式不是明显的失败，而是自信地生成错误结果。作者发布了评估框架以促进科学AI智能体的可靠性分析。

title: Frictive Policy Optimization for LLMs: Epistemic Intervention, Risk-Sensitive Control, and Reflective Alignment
comment: Frictive Policy Optimization; epistemic alignment; risk-sensitive control; LLM alignment; clarification and refusal; preference learning; trust regions; dialogue agents
summary: We propose Frictive Policy Optimization (FPO), a framework for learning language model policies that regulate not only what to say, but when and how to intervene in order to manage epistemic and normative risk. Unlike standard alignment methods that optimize surface-level preference or task utility, FPO treats clarification, verification, challenge, redirection, and refusal as explicit control actions whose purpose is to shape the evolution of belief, commitment, and uncertainty over time. We formalize alignment as a risk-sensitive epistemic control problem in which intervention decisions are selected based on their expected effect on downstream epistemic quality rather than on immediate reward alone. We introduce a compact taxonomy of frictive interventions, a structured friction functional that operationalizes multiple alignment failure modes, and a unified family of FPO methods spanning reward shaping, preference pairing, group-relative ranking, and risk-conditioned trust regions. We further propose an evaluation framework that measures epistemic competence directly through clarification behavior, calibration, contradiction repair, refusal proportionality, and information efficiency. Together, these results provide a formal and algorithmic foundation for learning agents that are aligned not only in outcome, but in epistemic conduct.

AI.tldr: 提出Frictive Policy Optimization (FPO)框架，将语言模型对齐问题形式化为风险敏感 epistemic 控制问题，使模型不仅能决定说什么，还能决定何时以及如何干预（澄清、验证、挑战、重定向、拒绝等），以管理认知和规范性风险。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法仅优化表面偏好或任务效用，忽略了模型在交互过程中的认知行为管理（如何时澄清、何时拒绝等），缺乏对认知和规范性风险的系统性处理。
AI.method: 将对齐形式化为风险敏感的epistemic控制问题；提出摩擦干预的分类法；设计结构化摩擦泛函以量化多种对齐失败模式；统一多个FPO方法族（奖励塑造、偏好配对、分组相对排序、风险条件信任区域）。
AI.result: 提出一个直接通过澄清行为、校准度、矛盾修复、拒绝比例和信息效率来评估认知能力的评价框架。
AI.conclusion: 为学习不仅在结果上对齐、更在认知行为上对齐的智能体提供了形式化和算法化基础。

title: Key Developer Roles and Organizational Coupling in Microservices: A Longitudinal Analysis
summary: Microservice-based systems impose significant organizational coordination challenges, yet the role of individual developers in shaping organizational coupling (OC) remains underexplored. Prior work largely focuses on structural architectural aspects, leaving gaps in understanding how developer roles influence coordination dynamics over time. This study investigates how different developer roles contribute to OC in a large-scale microservices system. The analysis focuses on three key roles, namely Jacks, representing broad knowledge holders, Mavens, representing deep specialists, and Connectors, representing organizational bridges. A longitudinal repository mining analysis of GitHub data, including commits and issue and pull request interactions, is conducted to operationalize OC and quantify its evolution over time. The results show that Connectors are consistently associated with higher levels of OC, while the co-occurrence of multiple roles within the same developer further amplifies coupling effects. In contrast, Jacks and Mavens exhibit more localized and role-specific influences. These findings indicate that OC in microservices is primarily a role-driven phenomenon rather than an inevitable structural property, providing a foundation for role-aware organizational design and targeted decoupling strategies.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对GitHub数据的纵向分析，探讨了微服务系统中不同开发者角色（Jacks、Mavens、Connectors）对组织耦合的影响。发现Connectors与高组织耦合持续相关，多重角色共存会放大耦合效应，而Jacks和Mavens的影响更具局部性。结论表明组织耦合主要是角色驱动而非结构固有属性。
AI.motivation: 微服务系统面临显著的组织协调挑战，但现有研究多关注结构性架构方面，忽略了开发者个体角色如何随时间影响协调动态，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 采用纵向仓库挖掘分析方法，对GitHub数据（包括提交记录、问题和拉取请求交互）进行分析，操作化定义组织耦合（OC）并量化其随时间演化，聚焦三类角色：Jacks（广泛知识持有者）、Mavens（深度专家）、Connectors（组织桥梁）。
AI.result: Connectors与高组织耦合水平持续相关；同一开发者内多重角色共存会进一步放大耦合效应；Jacks和Mavens表现出更局部化、角色特定的影响。
AI.conclusion: 微服务中的组织耦合主要是角色驱动现象而非结构固有属性，为角色感知的组织设计和针对性解耦策略提供了基础。

title: A Unifying Framework for Unsupervised Concept Extraction
summary: Techniques for concept extraction, such as sparse autoencoders and transcoders, aim to extract high-level symbolic concepts from low-level nonsymbolic representations. When these extracted concepts are used for downstream tasks such as model steering and unlearning, it is essential to understand their guarantees, or lack thereof. In this work, we present a unified theoretical framework for unsupervised concept extraction, in which we frame the task of concept extraction as identifying a generative model. We present a general meta-theorem for identifiability, which reduces the problem of establishing identifiability guarantees to the problem of characterizing the intersection of two sets. As we demonstrate on a range of widely-used approaches, this meta-theorem substantially simplifies the task of proving such guarantees, thus paving the way for the development of new, principled approaches for concept extraction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于无监督概念提取的统一理论框架，将概念提取任务视为识别生成模型，并通过一个通用元定理简化了可识别性保证的证明过程。
AI.motivation: 现有概念提取技术（如稀疏自编码器和转码器）在下游任务（如模型引导和遗忘）中被广泛使用，但缺乏对其保证的严格理解，亟需一个统一的理论框架来建立可识别性保证。
AI.method: 将概念提取形式化为识别生成模型的问题，提出一个通用的元定理，将建立可识别性保证的问题简化为刻画两个集合交集的问题。
AI.result: 该元定理显著简化了多种主流方法（如稀疏自编码器、转码器等）的可识别性证明过程。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为开发新的、有原则的概念提取方法铺平了道路。

title: Multi-action Tangled Program Graphs for Multi-task Reinforcement Learning with Continuous Control
summary: Over the past few decades, machine learning has been widely used to learn complex tasks. Reinforcement Learning (RL), inspired by human behavior, is a great example, as it involves developing specific behaviours for specific tasks. To further challenge algorithms, Multi-Task RL (MTRL) environments have been introduced, requiring a single model to learn multiple behaviors. The Tangled Program Graph (TPG) algorithm is a Genetic Programming (GP) algorithm designed for discrete MTRL environments. Recently, the MAPLE algorithm has been proposed, as another GP algorithm that achieves high results in single task continuous RL environments. A variation of the TPG is proposed alongside MAPLE, named Multi-Action TPG (MATPG) that aggregates MAPLE agents, and creates a control flow to activate them. Initially tested on single task RL environments only, MATPG achieved similar results to MAPLE. In this work, we present a new benchmark based on the MuJoCo Half Cheetah from Gymnasium. This benchmark features five distinct obstacles that are randomly positioned in front of the agent, each of which demands a unique behavior. This benchmark serves as a use case for MATPG, to prove its ability as a GP solution for continuous MTRL environments. Our experiments demonstrate its superiority in this multi-task use case when combined with lexicase selection. Furthermore, we examine the interpretability of the evolved graph, revealing that the decision flow of the model is fully interpretable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于MATPG算法的连续多任务强化学习框架，在MuJoCo Half Cheetah障碍物赛道中验证了其优越性，并证明模型决策流具有完全可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有TPG算法仅适用于离散MTRL环境，而MAPLE算法虽在单任务连续RL中表现优异但无法直接处理多任务场景。MATPG需证明其在连续MTRL环境中的能力。
AI.method: 基于MuJoCo Half Cheetah设计包含五种随机障碍物的多任务基准测试；采用MATPG算法（融合MAPLE代理并通过控制流激活的变体TPG）结合lexicase选择进行训练。
AI.result: MATPG在多任务连续RL环境中表现优于其他方法；结合lexicase选择后优势更显著；演化出的图结构决策流完全可解释。
AI.conclusion: MATPG是连续MTRL环境中有效的GP解决方案，兼具高性能与可解释性。

title: CroSearch-R1: Better Leveraging Cross-lingual Knowledge for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: A multilingual collection may contain useful knowledge in other languages to supplement and correct the facts in the original language for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). However, the vanilla approach that simply concatenates multiple pieces of knowledge from different languages into the context may fail to improve effectiveness due to the potential disparities across languages. To better leverage multilingual knowledge, we propose CroSearch-R1, a search-augmented reinforcement learning framework to integrate multilingual knowledge into the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) process. In particular, the approach adopts a multi-turn retrieval strategy with cross-lingual knowledge integration to dynamically align the knowledge from other languages as supplementary evidence into a unified representation space. Furthermore, we introduce a multilingual rollout mechanism to optimize reasoning transferability across languages. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework effectively leverages cross-lingual complementarity and improves the effectiveness of RAG with multilingual collections.

AI.tldr: 提出CroSearch-R1框架，通过搜索增强的强化学习将多语言知识整合到GRPO过程中，采用多轮检索策略和跨语言知识对齐，提升多语言RAG的有效性。
AI.motivation: 多语言语料库中蕴含丰富的知识，但不同语言间的知识存在差异，简单拼接多语言知识的RAG方法效果不佳，需要更好的跨语言知识融合方案。
AI.method: 提出CroSearch-R1框架，包含：(1)多轮检索策略与跨语言知识对齐，将异语言知识映射到统一表示空间；(2)多语言rollout机制，优化跨语言推理迁移能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效利用跨语言互补性，提升多语言RAG的效果。
AI.conclusion: CroSearch-R1通过强化学习框架成功整合多语言知识，验证了跨语言互补性在RAG中的价值。

title: Image Classification via Random Dilated Convolution with Multi-Branch Feature Extraction and Context Excitation
summary: Image classification remains a fundamental yet challenging task in computer vision, particularly when fine-grained feature extraction and background noise suppression are required simultaneously. Conventional convolutional neural networks, despite their remarkable success in hierarchical feature learning, often struggle with capturing multi-scale contextual information and are susceptible to overfitting when confronted with noisy or irrelevant image regions. In this paper, we propose RDCNet (Image Classification Network with Random Dilated Convolution), a novel architecture built upon ResNet-34 that integrates three synergistic innovations to address these limitations: (1) a Multi-Branch Random Dilated Convolution (MRDC) module that employs parallel branches with varying dilation rates combined with a stochastic masking mechanism to capture fine-grained features across multiple scales while enhancing robustness against noise and overfitting; (2) a Fine-Grained Feature Enhancement (FGFE) module embedded within MRDC that bridges global contextual information with local feature representations through adaptive pooling and bilinear interpolation, thereby amplifying sensitivity to subtle visual patterns; and (3) a Context Excitation (CE) module that leverages softmax-based spatial attention and channel recalibration to dynamically emphasize task-relevant features while suppressing background interference. Extensive experiments conducted on five benchmark datasets -- CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, SVHN, Imagenette, and Imagewoof -- demonstrate that RDCNet consistently achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy, outperforming the second-best competing methods by margins of 0.02\%, 1.12\%, 0.18\%, 4.73\%, and 3.56\%, respectively, thereby validating the effectiveness and generalizability of the proposed approach across diverse visual recognition scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出RDCNet架构，通过多分支随机膨胀卷积、细粒度特征增强和上下文激励模块，在五个基准数据集上达到最先进分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在细粒度特征提取和背景噪声抑制方面存在不足，难以捕获多尺度上下文信息且容易过拟合。
AI.method: 基于ResNet-34，集成三个创新模块：MRDC（多分支随机膨胀卷积+随机掩码）、FGFE（自适应池化+双线性插值融合全局与局部特征）、CE（Softmax空间注意力+通道重校准）。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、SVHN、Imagenette、Imagewoof上分别超越第二名0.02%、1.12%、0.18%、4.73%、3.56%。
AI.conclusion: RDCNet在多种视觉识别场景中验证了其有效性和泛化能力，有效解决了细粒度分类中的噪声和过拟合问题。

title: Does social identity matter in software engineering? Assessing the case of research software engineers
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures. International Conference on Evaluation and Assessment in Software Engineering. June 9-12, 2026, Glasgow, United Kingdom
summary: Social identity is a concept from psychology that refers to the part of an individual's identity that derives from their group membership(s). In this paper, we explore social identity in members of the professional community of Research Software Engineers (RSEs). Using a mixed-methods approach, our study combined computational linguistic analysis and inferential statistics to examine over 28,000 social media posts, 1,700 blogs, and survey responses from 381 professional RSEs. The findings highlight the emergence of a collective RSE identity and demonstrate its role in shaping professional wellbeing. This study contributes an interdisciplinary perspective by integrating social psychology and software engineering to show how a professional identity evolves and why it matters.

AI.tldr: 本文通过混合方法（分析28,000+社交媒体帖子、1,700篇博客及381份调查问卷）探索了研究软件工程师（RSE）的职业社会认同，发现集体RSE身份正在形成并正向影响职业幸福感。
AI.motivation: 将社会心理学中的"社会认同"概念引入软件工程领域，探究RSE这一新兴职业群体是否形成集体认同，以及该认同如何影响从业者的职业幸福感。
AI.method: 采用混合研究方法：结合计算语言学分析（处理社交媒体和博客文本）与推论统计（分析调查问卷数据），样本量涵盖28,000+帖子、1,700篇博客和381份问卷。
AI.result: 发现了RSE集体身份认同的涌现证据，并证实该认同对职业幸福感具有塑造作用。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过整合社会心理学与软件工程的跨学科视角，揭示了专业身份如何演变及其重要性。

title: Rethinking Layer Redundancy in Large Language Models: Calibration Objectives and Search for Depth Pruning
summary: Depth pruning improves the inference efficiency of large language models by removing Transformer blocks. Prior work has focused on importance criteria and search algorithms, often treating layer redundancy as an inherent structural property of pretrained networks. In contrast, we adopt a \emph{functional perspective}, where redundancy is jointly influenced by the model and the evaluation objective, suggesting that a universal ranking may not be sufficient. Through an empirical study across three LLM families, two calibration objectives, and seven search algorithms, we observe that different objectives yield qualitatively different redundant layers, and that perplexity and downstream accuracy rankings do not consistently align. Under a fixed objective, however, search algorithms tend to produce similar solutions. Overall, our results suggest that the calibration objective may play a more influential role than the choice of search algorithm, indicating that further attention to objective design could be beneficial.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验发现，大语言模型深度剪枝中，校准目标（objective）对冗余层的影响比搜索算法更大，不同目标下冗余层不同，困惑度和下游任务准确率的排名也不总是一致。
AI.motivation: 以往工作将层冗余视为预训练网络的固有结构属性，采用通用排名方法。作者提出功能视角，认为冗余受模型和评估目标共同影响，通用排名可能不足。
AI.method: 对三个LLM家族、两种校准目标和七种搜索算法进行实证研究，比较不同目标下冗余层的差异以及搜索算法的影响。
AI.result: 不同目标产生定性不同的冗余层；困惑度与下游准确率的排名并不总一致；在固定目标下，不同搜索算法趋于得到相似解。
AI.conclusion: 校准目标比搜索算法对剪枝结果的影响更大，未来应更多关注目标函数的设计。

title: JURY-RL: Votes Propose, Proofs Dispose for Label-Free RLVR
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) enhances the reasoning of large language models (LLMs), but standard RLVR often depends on human-annotated answers or carefully curated reward specifications. In machine-checkable domains, label-free alternatives such as majority voting or LLM-as-a-judge remove annotation cost but can introduce false positives that destabilize training. We introduce JURY-RL, a label-free RLVR framework that decouples answer proposal from reward disposal: votes from model rollouts propose a candidate answer, and a formal verifier determines whether that candidate can receive positive reward. Concretely, only rollouts matching the plurality-voted answer are rewarded when that answer is successfully verified in Lean. When verification is inconclusive, we invoke ResZero (Residual-Zero), a fallback reward that discards the unverified plurality proposal and redistributes a zero-mean, variance-preserving signal over the residual answers. This design maintains a stable optimization gradient without reinforcing unverifiable consensus. Across three backbone models trained on mathematical data, JURY-RL consistently outperforms other label-free baselines on mathematical reasoning benchmarks and transfers competitively to code generation and general benchmarks. It attains pass@1 performance comparable to supervised ground-truth training, with superior generalization demonstrated by higher pass@k and response diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出JURY-RL，一种无标签的RLVR框架，通过解耦答案提议与奖励分配，利用形式化验证器（Lean）确保奖励可靠性，并引入ResZero回退机制处理未验证情况，在数学推理、代码生成等任务上达到与有监督训练相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准RLVR依赖人工标注答案或精心设计的奖励规范，成本高昂；无标签方法（如多数投票、LLM-as-a-judge）虽省去标注成本，但引入假阳性，导致训练不稳定。需要一种无需人工标注但奖励信号可靠的RLVR方法。
AI.method: 将答案提议与奖励分配解耦：模型rollout投票产生候选答案，形式化验证器（Lean）决定是否给予正奖励。仅当多数投票答案通过Lean验证时才给予奖励；验证不通过时，采用ResZero回退机制——舍弃未验证的多数答案，将零均值、保持方差的信号重新分配给其余答案，维持稳定梯度。
AI.result: 在三种基座模型上，JURY-RL在数学推理基准上持续优于其他无标签基线，并迁移至代码生成和通用基准；pass@1性能与有监督真实标签训练相当，pass@k和响应多样性更优。
AI.conclusion: JURY-RL证明了解耦答案提议与奖励分配、结合形式化验证与ResZero回退机制的有效性，为无标签RLVR提供了一种稳定且高性能的替代方案。

title: BARRED: Synthetic Training of Custom Policy Guardrails via Asymmetric Debate
summary: Deploying guardrails for custom policies remains challenging, as generic safety models fail to capture task-specific requirements, while prompting LLMs suffers from inconsistent boundary-case performance and high inference costs. Training custom classifiers achieves both accuracy and efficiency, yet demands substantial labeled data that is costly to obtain. We present BARRED (Boundary Alignment Refinement through REflection and Debate), a framework for generating faithful and diverse synthetic training data using only a task description and a small set of unlabeled examples. Our approach decomposes the domain space into dimensions to ensure comprehensive coverage, and employs multi-agent debate to verify label correctness, yielding a high-fidelity training corpus. Experiments across diverse custom policies demonstrate that small language models finetuned on our synthetic data consistently outperform state-of-the-art proprietary LLMs (including reasoning models) and dedicated guardrail models. Ablation studies confirm that both dimension decomposition and debate-based verification are critical for ensuring the diversity and label fidelity required for effective fine-tuning. The BARRED framework eliminates the reliance on extensive human annotation, offering a scalable solution for accurate custom guardrails.

AI.tldr: BARRED是一个通过维度分解和多智能体辩论生成高质量合成数据来训练自定义安全护栏的框架，仅需任务描述和少量未标注示例，在小模型上微调即可超越顶级LLM和专用护栏模型。
AI.motivation: 通用安全模型无法捕捉特定任务需求，而用LLM提示推理存在边界案例性能不一致和高推理成本的问题。训练自定义分类器虽准确高效，但需要大量昂贵的标注数据。
AI.method: 将领域空间分解为多个维度以确保全面覆盖，使用多智能体辩论验证标签正确性，生成高保真的合成训练数据，再用这些数据微调小语言模型。
AI.result: 在多种自定义策略上，微调后的小模型持续超越最先进的专有LLM（包括推理模型）和专用护栏模型。消融实验证明维度分解和基于辩论的验证对于数据多样性和标签保真度至关重要。
AI.conclusion: BARRED消除了对大量人工标注的依赖，为构建准确的自定义护栏提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Towards Seamless Lunar Mosaics: Deep Radiometric Normalization for Cross-Sensor Orbital Imagery Using Chandrayaan-2 TMC Data
summary:
Radiometric inconsistencies remain a major challenge in generating seamless lunar mosaics from multi-mission orbital imagery due to variability in illumination geometry, sensor characteristics, and acquisition conditions. This paper presents a deep learning-based radiometric normalization framework for multi-mission lunar mosaics constructed primarily from ISRO's Chandrayaan-2 Terrain Mapping Camera (TMC) data, supplemented with auxiliary imagery from the SELENE (Kaguya) mission.
  The proposed approach employs a conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN) comprising a U-Net-based generator and a PatchGAN discriminator to learn a nonlinear radiometric mapping from conventionally mosaicked lunar imagery to a photometrically consistent reference derived from LROC Wide Angle Camera (WAC) data. A patch-based training strategy with overlap-aware inference is adopted to enable scalable processing of large-area mosaics while preserving structural continuity across tile boundaries.
  Quantitative evaluation using Structural Similarity Index (SSIM), Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR), and Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) demonstrates consistent improvements over traditional histogram-based normalization techniques. The proposed framework achieves enhanced tonal uniformity, reduced seam artifacts, and improved structural coherence across multi-source lunar datasets.
  These results highlight the effectiveness of learning-based radiometric normalization for large-scale planetary mosaicking and demonstrate its potential for generating high-fidelity lunar surface maps from heterogeneous orbital imagery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的月球多任务影像辐射归一化框架，利用U-Net生成器和PatchGAN判别器学习非线性映射，有效提升拼接月图的色调均匀性和结构一致性，优于传统直方图方法。
AI.motivation: 多任务月球轨道影像因光照几何、传感器特性和获取条件差异存在辐射不一致性，传统直方图方法难以消除拼接伪影，亟需更有效的辐射归一化技术。
AI.method: 采用cGAN架构，U-Net作为生成器、PatchGAN作为判别器，学习从传统拼接影像到LROC WAC光度一致参考图的非线性辐射映射；配合分块训练和重叠感知推理实现大规模拼接。
AI.result: 在SSIM、PSNR、RMSE指标上持续优于传统直方图归一化方法，实现了更好的色调均匀性、更少的拼接伪影和更优的结构连贯性。
AI.conclusion: 基于学习的辐射归一化方法在大规模行星拼图中效果显著，具备从异构轨道影像生成高保真月球表面地图的潜力。

title: RESTestBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating the Effectiveness of LLM-Generated REST API Test Cases from NL Requirements
summary: Existing REST API testing tools are typically evaluated using code coverage and crash-based fault metrics. However, recent LLM-based approaches increasingly generate tests from NL requirements to validate functional behaviour, making traditional metrics weak proxies for whether generated tests validate intended behaviour. To address this gap, we present RESTestBench, a benchmark comprising three REST services paired with manually verified NL requirements in both precise and vague variants, enabling controlled and reproducible evaluation of requirement-based test generation. RESTestBench further introduces a requirements-based mutation testing metric that measures the fault-detection effectiveness of a generated test case with respect to a specific requirement, extending the property-based approach of Bartocci et al. . Using RESTestBench, we evaluate two approaches across multiple state-of-the-art LLMs: (i) non-refinement-based generation, and (ii) refinement-based generation guided by interaction with the running SUT. In the refinement experiments, RESTestBench assesses how exposure to the actual implementation, valid or mutated, affects test effectiveness. Our results show that test effectiveness drops considerably when the generator interacts with faulty or mutated code, especially for vague requirements, sometimes negating the benefit of refinement and indicating that incorporating actual SUT behaviour is unnecessary when requirement detail is high.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RESTestBench基准，用于评估基于NL需求的REST API测试生成。通过需求变异测试度量与两种生成策略实验，发现高精度需求下与SUT交互的细化方法收益有限，甚至可能降低测试有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有REST API测试工具依赖代码覆盖率和崩溃指标评估，但LLM方法基于自然语言需求生成测试，传统度量无法衡量测试是否验证了预期功能行为，存在评估空白。
AI.method: 构建RESTestBench，包含3个REST服务+人工验证的NL需求（精确/模糊变体）；提出基于需求的变异测试度量指标；比较非细化生成与细化生成（与运行中SUT交互）两种方法在多LLM上的效果。
AI.result: 与错误/变异代码交互时测试有效性显著下降，尤其在模糊需求下，有时完全抵消细化收益；高需求细节下无需引入实际SUT行为。
AI.conclusion: 需求精度是关键因素：高精度需求下细化方法无必要，模糊需求下细化反而有害；RESTestBench为需求驱动的API测试评估提供了标准化基准。

title: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Efficient and Open Multimodal Intelligence
summary: We introduce Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, the latest model in the Nemotron multimodal series and the first to natively support audio inputs alongside text, images, and video. Nemotron 3 Nano Omni delivers consistent accuracy improvements over its predecessor, Nemotron Nano V2 VL, across all modalities, enabled by advances in architecture, training data and recipes. In particular, Nemotron 3 delivers leading results in real-world document understanding, long audio-video comprehension, and agentic computer use. Built on the highly efficient Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B backbone, Nemotron 3 Nano Omni further incorporates innovative multimodal token-reduction techniques to deliver substantially lower inference latency and higher throughput than other models of similar size. We are releasing model checkpoints in BF16, FP8, and FP4 formats, along with portions of the training data and codebase to facilitate further research and development.

AI.tldr: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 是 Nemotron 多模态系列的最新模型，原生支持音频输入及文本、图像、视频，在架构、训练数据和配方上取得进展，实现了跨模态的准确性提升，尤其在文档理解、长音视频理解和智能体计算机使用方面表现领先，并通过创新的令牌缩减技术降低推理延迟、提高吞吐量，同时开源模型权重、部分训练数据和代码。
AI.motivation: 开发一个原生支持音频输入的多模态模型，提升跨模态理解能力，并在实际应用场景（如文档理解、长音视频理解、智能体计算机使用）中取得领先性能，同时实现高效的推理效率。
AI.method: 基于 Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B 高效骨干网络，采用创新的多模态令牌缩减技术，在架构、训练数据和配方上进行了改进，并发布了 BF16、FP8、FP4 多种精度的模型检查点。
AI.result: 在所有模态上相比前代 Nemotron Nano V2 VL 实现了一致的准确性提升，在真实世界文档理解、长音视频理解、智能体计算机使用方面取得了领先结果，同时推理延迟更低、吞吐量更高。
AI.conclusion: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 是多模态模型领域的重要进步，实现了性能与效率的平衡，并开源部分资源以促进进一步研究。

title: PI-TTA: Physics-Informed Source-Free Test-Time Adaptation for Robust Human Activity Recognition on Mobile Devices
summary: Source-free test-time adaptation (TTA) is appealing for mobile and wearable sensing because it enables on-device personalization from unlabeled test streams without centralizing private data. However, sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) poses challenges that are less pronounced in standard vision benchmarks: behavioral inertial streams are temporally correlated and often exhibit within-session shifts caused by sensor rotation, placement change, and sampling-rate drift. Under this streaming non-i.i.d. setting, widely used vision-style TTA objectives can become unstable, leading to overconfident errors, representation collapse, and catastrophic forgetting. We propose PI-TTA, a lightweight source-free adaptation framework that stabilizes online updates through three physics-consistent constraints: gravity consistency, short-horizon temporal continuity, and spectral stability. PI-TTA updates the same small parameter subset as strong source-free baselines and incurs only modest overhead, making it suitable for on-device deployment. Experiments on USCHAD, PAMAP2, and mHealth under long-sequence stress tests and factorized shift protocols show that PI-TTA mitigates the severe degradation observed in confidence-driven baselines and preserves stable adaptation under sustained streaming conditions. It improves long-sequence accuracy by up to 9.13% and reduces physical-violation rates by 27.5%, 24.1%, and 45.4% on USCHAD, PAMAP2, and mHealth, respectively. These results demonstrate that physics-informed adaptation can improve accuracy, stability, and deployment reliability for real-world mobile sensing systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PI-TTA，一种针对移动/可穿戴传感中人类活动识别的轻量级源无关测试时自适应框架，通过引入重力一致性、短时时间连续性和频谱稳定性三个物理约束，解决了流式非独立同分布数据下现有TTA方法的不稳定性问题，在三个公开数据集上显著提升了长序列准确率并降低了物理违背率。
AI.motivation: 现有源无关测试时自适应方法主要面向视觉基准任务，难以直接应用于传感器人体活动识别领域，因为行为惯性数据具有时间相关性和会话内偏移（如传感器旋转、放置变化、采样率漂移），导致流式非独立同分布场景下出现过度自信错误、表征坍塌和灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出PI-TTA框架，包含三个物理一致性约束：重力一致性（利用重力方向不变性约束特征）、短时时间连续性（保持相邻时间步特征平滑过渡）和频谱稳定性（维持频域特征分布的稳定性），仅更新少量参数子集，适用于设备端部署。
AI.result: 在USCHAD、PAMAP2和mHealth数据集的长序列压力测试和因子化偏移协议下，PI-TTA相比强基线方法将长序列准确率提升最高9.13%，并在三个数据集上分别将物理违背率降低27.5%、24.1%和45.4%。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息引导的自适应方法能够提升真实移动传感系统的准确性、稳定性和部署可靠性，为可穿戴设备上的在线个性化提供了有效解决方案。

title: Below-Chance Blindness: Prompted Underperformance in Small LLMs Produces Positional Bias Rather than Answer Avoidance
summary: Detecting sandbagging--the deliberate underperformance on capability evaluations--is an open problem in AI safety. We tested whether symptom validity testing (SVT) logic from clinical malingering detection could identify sandbagging through below-chance performance (BCB) on forced-choice items. In a pre-registered pilot at the 7-9 billion parameter instruction-tuned scale (3 models, 4 MMLU-Pro domains, 4 conditions, 500 items per cell, 24,000 total trials), the plausibility gate failed. Zero of 12 model-domain cells showed significant below-chance performance under sandbagging instruction. Exploratory analyses revealed three qualitatively distinct failure modes. Qwen-2.5-7B and Phi-3.5-mini largely ignored the sandbagging instruction, with 62-88% response identity with the honest baseline. Llama-3-8B complied substantially but implemented underperformance as a positional heuristic, collapsing its response distribution onto middle-alphabet options (E at 31.8%, F at 26.1%) regardless of where the correct answer fell. This produced accuracy boosts of up to 33 percentage points when the correct answer coincidentally occupied the model's preferred position. An explicit anti-task instruction ("pick the least likely answer") drove two of three models below chance, with accuracy as low as 0.024. The capability for answer-aware avoidance therefore exists but is not activated by "deliberately underperform." BCB did not fail as a logical marker of answer-aware avoidance. It was not observed in this regime because the model showing the largest behavioural shift exhibited behaviour consistent with a position-dominant response policy rather than content-aware answer avoidance. We propose that positional-distribution shift may be a more effective behavioural signature than below-chance accuracy for detecting prompted underperformance at this model scale.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文探索了将临床诈病检测中的症状效度测试（SVT）逻辑应用于AI安全中的"sandbagging"（故意表现不佳）检测。研究发现，在7-9B参数的指令微调模型中，基于低于随机水平（BCB）表现的检测方法失败，模型并未在故意表现不佳指令下显著低于随机水平。相反，模型表现出三种不同的失败模式：忽略指令、采用位置启发式（倾向于选择中间选项，如E/F），或只在明确的反任务指令下才低于随机水平。论文提出，位置分布偏移可能是检测这类模型故意表现不佳的更有效行为特征。
AI.motivation: 检测AI模型在能力评估中故意表现不佳（sandbagging）是AI安全中的一个开放问题，现有检测方法不足。
AI.method: 在预注册的实验中，将临床心理学中的SVT逻辑（低于随机水平的表现作为诈病标志）迁移到AI领域，在3个7-9B参数指令微调模型上使用MMLU-Pro数据集进行测试，设置4种实验条件，共24000次试验。
AI.result: 零个模型-领域组合在sandbagging指令下表现出显著低于随机水平的准确性。发现了三种失败模式：Qwen-2.5-7B和Phi-3.5-mini基本忽略指令；Llama-3-8B采用位置启发式（集中选择E/F选项）；仅在明确的"选最少可能答案"指令下，才观察到低于随机水平的表现。
AI.conclusion: 低于随机水平（BCB）作为逻辑标记并未失效，但在当前规模下未被激活，因为模型采用的是位置主导响应策略而非内容感知的回避策略。位置分布偏移可能是更有效的检测信号。

title: When the Forger Is the Judge: GPT-Image-2 Cannot Recognize Its Own Faked Documents
summary: OpenAI's GPT-Image-2 has effectively erased the visual boundary between authentic and AI-edited document images: a single number on a receipt can be replaced in under a second for a few cents. We release AIForge-Doc v2, a paired dataset of 3,066 GPT-Image-2 document forgeries with pixel-precise masks in DocTamper-compatible format, and benchmark four lines of defence: human inspectors (N=120, n=365 pair-votes via the public 2AFC site CanUSpotAI.com), TruFor (generic forensic), DocTamper (qcf-568, document-specific), and the same GPT-Image-2 model as a zero-shot self-judge -- asked, to avoid the trivial "image is mostly real" reading, whether any region was generated or edited by an AI image model. Human 2AFC accuracy is 0.501, indistinguishable from chance: even side-by-side, inspectors cannot tell GPT-Image-2 receipt forgeries from authentic counterparts. The three computational judges sit only modestly above (TruFor 0.599, DocTamper 0.585, self-judge 0.532). The self-judge fails consistently, not by chance: across five prompt strategies and four policies for handling ambiguous responses, AUC never rises above 0.59. To rule out the possibility that the two forensic detectors are broken on our source domain rather than blind to AI inpainting, we calibrate each on a same-domain traditional-tampering set built for its training distribution: TruFor reaches AUC 0.962 on cross-camera splicing of our dataset, DocTamper reaches 0.852 on cross-document OCR-token splicing with two-pass JPEG re-encoding. Both retain near-published performance on traditional tampering; switching to GPT-Image-2 inpainting drops AUC by 0.27-0.36 (0.962->0.599 TruFor; 0.852->0.585 DocTamper), isolating a detection gap specific to GPT-Image-2 inpainting. We release the dataset, pipeline, four-judge protocol, and calibration sets.

AI.tldr: 本文发布AIForge-Doc v2数据集（含3,066张GPT-Image-2伪造文档图像及像素级掩码），并基准测试了四类检测方法：人类检测者（准确率0.501，相当于随机猜测）、通用取证工具TruFor（AUC 0.599）、文档专用工具DocTamper（AUC 0.585）以及GPT-Image-2自判（AUC ≤0.59）。研究者通过校准实验证明，传统篡改检测性能良好（TruFor AUC 0.962，DocTamper AUC 0.852），但面对GPT-Image-2修补时AUC骤降0.27-0.36，揭示出针对AI修补的检测空白。
AI.motivation: GPT-Image-2能以极低成本快速篡改文档图像（如替换收据上的数字），打破了真实与AI编辑图像之间的视觉界限。现有检测方法是否有效？人类和计算模型能否识别此类伪造？这是该研究要回答的核心问题。
AI.method: 构建AIForge-Doc v2数据集（3,066张GPT-Image-2伪造文档），采用四类检测方法：（1）120名人类通过2AFC网站进行侧对侧判断；（2）通用取证工具TruFor；（3）文档专用工具DocTamper；（4）GPT-Image-2零样本自判（五种提示策略+四种歧义处理策略）。并通过校准实验（同域传统篡改集）隔离检测下降原因。
AI.result: 人类2AFC准确率0.501（随机水平）；TruFor AUC 0.599；DocTamper AUC 0.585；自判AUC始终≤0.59。校准实验中，TruFor在传统跨相机拼接上AUC≈0.962，DocTamper在OCR令牌拼接上AUC≈0.852，而面对GPT-Image-2修补时分别降至0.599和0.585，下降0.27-0.36。
AI.conclusion: 当前最先进的文档图像伪造检测工具（包括人类和算法）在面对GPT-Image-2修补时几乎失效，传统篡改检测能力正常但无法泛化到AI修补场景。需要开发专门针对AI图像修补的新型检测方法。

title: From Threads to Trajectories: A Multi-LLM Pipeline for Community Knowledge Extraction from GitHub Issue Discussions
summary: Resolution of complex post-production issues in large-scale open-source software (OSS) projects requires significant cognitive effort, as developers need to go through long, unstructured and fragmented issue discussion threads before that. In this paper, we present SWE-MIMIC-Bench, an issue trajectory dataset generated from raw GitHub discussions using an automated multi-LLM pipeline. Unlike simple summarization, this pipeline utilizes a group of closed-source LLMs to perform granular tasks: analyzing individual comments with awareness of externally-linked resources, classifying comment analyses into label-specific fields (e.g., root cause, solution plan, implementation progress), and synthesizing label-aware trajectories which capture a structured and coherent narrative of the entire discussion thread. Our pipeline uses five closed-source LLM configurations for distinct purposes: label classification, inline code block and external link summarization, comment analysis, label-specific field classification and trajectory synthesis. By generating concise and reliable trajectories from complex conversation threads, this system can assist developers and researchers of broader software engineering community to understand the experience-driven collaborative approach for issue diagnosis. Furthermore, the generated trajectories can be used to train modern LLM agents to think and act like an expert developer. We evaluated our system on 800 real-world GitHub issues drawn from the SWE-Bench-Pro, SWE-Bench-Multilingual and SWE-Bench-Verified dataset, achieving a 91.7% success rate in extracting 734 high-fidelity reasoning trajectories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SWE-MIMIC-Bench，一个利用多LLM流水线从GitHub讨论中自动生成结构化问题轨迹数据集的方法，成功从800个真实issue中提取734条高保真推理轨迹（成功率91.7%）。
AI.motivation: 大型开源项目中的复杂问题排查需要开发者阅读大量冗长、非结构化的讨论线程，认知负担极重，亟需自动化手段将碎片化对话转化为结构化、可理解的推理过程。
AI.method: 构建自动化多LLM流水线，使用五个闭源LLM配置分别负责：标签分类、内联代码块和外部链接摘要、评论分析、标签特定字段分类、轨迹合成。流水线逐步将原始评论经外部资源感知分析后，分类到根因、解决方案、实施进度等标签字段，最终合成结构化的标签感知轨迹。
AI.result: 在800个来自SWE-Bench系列数据集（Pro、Multilingual、Verified）的真实GitHub issue上评估，成功提取734条高保真推理轨迹，成功率达91.7%。
AI.conclusion: 该轨迹数据集不仅可以辅助开发者和研究人员理解经验驱动的协作式问题诊断过程，还可用于训练LLM智能体模仿专家开发者的推理与行为方式，具有显著的软件工程实践价值。

title: Compute Aligned Training: Optimizing for Test Time Inference
summary: Scaling test-time compute has emerged as a powerful mechanism for enhancing Large Language Model (LLM) performance. However, standard post-training paradigms, Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL), optimize the likelihood of individual samples under a base policy, creating a misalignment with test time procedures that rely on aggregated or filtered outputs. In this work, we propose Compute Aligned Training, which aligns training objectives with test-time strategies. By conceptualizing inference strategies as operators on the base policy, we derive new loss functions that maximize performance when said strategies are applied. We instantiate such loss functions for SFT and RL across common test time strategies. Finally, we provide empirical evidence that this training method substantially improves test time scaling over standard training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"计算对齐训练"(Compute Aligned Training)方法，通过将训练目标与测试时策略对齐，解决标准后训练范式（SFT和RL）与测试时计算扩展之间的不匹配问题，实验证明该方法能显著提升测试时扩展性能。
AI.motivation: 标准后训练范式（SFT和RL）优化的是基策略下单个样本的似然，这与测试时依赖聚合或过滤输出的策略存在不匹配，因此需要一种使训练目标与测试时策略对齐的新方法。
AI.method: 将推理策略概念化为基策略上的算子，推导出在应用这些策略时能最大化性能的新损失函数，并在常见的测试时策略下为SFT和RL实例化了这些损失函数。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法相比标准训练方法能显著提升测试时计算扩展的性能。
AI.conclusion: 计算对齐训练通过弥合训练与测试时策略之间的差距，为提升LLM测试时计算扩展提供了一种有效的新范式。

title: SciEval: A Benchmark for Automatic Evaluation of K-12 Science Instructional Materials
summary: The need to evaluate instructional materials for K-12 science education has become increasingly important, as more educators use generative AI to create instructional materials. However, the review of instructional materials is time-consuming, expertise-intensive, and difficult to scale, motivating interest in automated evaluation approaches. While large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on general evaluation tasks, their performance and reliability on instructional materials remain unclear. To address this gap, we formulate Automatic Instructional Materials Evaluation (AIME) as a generative AI task that predicts scores and evidence using the rubric designed by the educator. We create a benchmark dataset and develop baseline models for AIME. First, we curate the first AIME dataset, SciEval, consisting of instructional materials annotated with pedagogy-aligned evaluation scores and evidence-based rationales. Expert annotations achieve high inter-rater reliability, resulting in a dataset of 273 lesson-level instructional materials evaluated across 13 criteria (N=3549) using the EQuIP rubric. Second, we test mainstream LLMs (GPT, Gemini, Llama, and Qwen) on SciEval and find that none achieve strong performance. Then we fine-tune Qwen3 on SciEval. Results on a held-out test set show that domain-aligned fine-tuning can achieve up to 11 percent performance gains, highlighting the importance of domain-specific fine-tuning for AIME and facilitating the use of LLMs in other educational tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了自动教学材料评估（AIME）任务，构建了首个基于EQuIP量表的科学教学材料评估数据集SciEval（273份材料，13个标准，共3549条标注），并测试了主流LLMs，发现通用模型表现不佳，而领域微调（如Qwen3）可提升最多11%的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着教师越来越多使用生成式AI创建教学材料，对K-12科学教学材料的评估需求日益迫切。但人工评估耗时、依赖专家且难以规模化，而LLMs在通用评估任务上表现虽好，但在教学材料评估上的性能和可靠性尚不明确，因此需要构建自动评估方法。
AI.method: 1）形式化定义AIME任务，要求模型预测得分并提供循证理由；2）构建SciEval数据集，由专家使用EQuIP量表对273份教学材料进行13个标准的评估，具备高评分者信度；3）测试GPT、Gemini、Llama、Qwen等主流LLMs；4）对Qwen3进行领域微调并评估性能提升。
AI.result: 主流LLMs在SciEval上均未取得强性能；对Qwen3进行领域微调后，在保留测试集上性能提升最高达11%，表明领域特定微调对AIME任务至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 领域对齐的微调能显著提升LLMs在教学材料自动评估任务上的表现，为LLMs在教育任务中的应用提供了重要思路和基线。

title: Learning from Medical Entity Trees: An Entity-Centric Medical Data Engineering Framework for MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown transformative potential in medical applications, yet their performance is hindered by conventional data curation strategies that rely on coarse-grained partitioning by modality or department. Such fragmented approaches fail to capture the hierarchical and interconnected nature of clinical medical knowledge, limiting the models' ability to perform fine-grained recognition and complex reasoning. In this paper, we propose a novel Entity-Centric Medical Data Engineering framework. We automatically extract entities from authoritative medical literature to construct a Medical Entity Tree (MET), a hierarchical structure that systematically encodes diseases, anatomical structures, modalities, and symptoms into a unified knowledge repository. Building upon the MET, we propose an advanced data engine that includes: (1) node-guided retrieval to anchor raw data to specific medical concepts, (2) a two-stage hybrid filtering and alignment pipeline to ensure precise visual-semantic correspondence, and (3) knowledge-aware data synthesis to generate enriched captions and targeted reasoning VQA pairs, leveraging structural constraints. Extensive evaluations across six medical benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances the medical capabilities of general-purpose MLLMs, improving their ability to handle complex clinical queries and achieve state-of-the-art performance in diverse medical contexts.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种实体为中心的医学数据工程框架，通过构建医学实体树（MET）分层组织疾病、解剖结构、模态和症状等知识，并基于此设计了节点引导检索、两阶段混合过滤对齐和知识感知数据合成三大模块，显著提升多模态大模型在医学任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在医学应用中受限于粗粒度的数据策划分割方式（按模态或科室），未能捕捉临床医学知识的层次性和互联性，导致模型在细粒度识别和复杂推理方面能力不足。
AI.method: (1) 从权威医学文献自动提取实体，构建分层结构的医学实体树（MET）；(2) 节点引导检索，将原始数据锚定到特定医学概念；(3) 两阶段混合过滤与对齐流程，确保精确的视觉-语义对应；(4) 基于知识感知的数据合成，生成丰富的描述和推理VQA对。
AI.result: 在六个医学基准测试上的广泛评估表明，该方法显著提升了通用MLLM的医学能力，使其能够处理复杂的临床查询，并在多种医学场景中达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 以实体为中心、层次化组织医学知识的数据工程策略，能够有效弥合通用MLLM与专业医学能力之间的鸿沟，为提升AI在医学领域的应用提供了可行路径。

title: DRAGON: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Visual Reasoning over Diagrams
summary: Diagram question answering (DQA) requires models to interpret structured visual representations such as charts, maps, infographics, circuit schematics, and scientific diagrams. Recent vision-language models (VLMs) often achieve high answer accuracy on these tasks, yet correct answers do not guarantee that models ground their reasoning in the diagram regions that support the prediction. Models may instead rely on textual correlations or dataset artifacts without identifying the visual evidence required to verify the answer. This limitation prevents reliable evaluation of diagram reasoning and reduces interpretability. We introduce DRAGON, a benchmark for evaluating evidence-grounded visual reasoning in diagrams. Given a diagram, a question, and the correct answer, a model must predict bounding boxes that correspond to the visual elements required to justify the answer. These evidence regions may include answer-bearing components, textual labels, legends, axes, connectors, and other supporting structures involved in the reasoning process. The DRAGON dataset contains 11,664 annotated question instances collected from six diagram QA datasets: ChartQA, Circuit-VQA, InfographicsVQA, MapIQ, MapWise, and AI2D. We release a 2,445-instance benchmark test set with human-verified reasoning evidence annotations and a standardized evaluation framework. We evaluate eight recent VLMs and analyze their ability to localize reasoning evidence across diverse diagram domains. DRAGON enables systematic evaluation of diagram reasoning and supports future research on models that ground their predictions in visual evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRAGON基准，用于评估图表问答模型中定位推理证据（即支撑答案的视觉区域）的能力，包含11,664个标注实例和2,445个人工验证的测试集，对八个前沿视觉语言模型进行了系统评估。
AI.motivation: 现有图表问答模型虽在答案准确率上表现良好，但无法保证模型的推理过程真正基于图表中的视觉证据，可能依赖文本相关性或数据集伪影，缺乏可解释性和可靠评估。
AI.method: 构建DRAGON基准，从六个图表QA数据集（ChartQA、Circuit-VQA、InfographicsVQA、MapIQ、MapWise、AI2D）收集11,664个问答实例，并进行人类验证的推理证据标注（边界框），定义标准化评估框架。
AI.result: 对八个前沿视觉语言模型进行了系统评估，分析了它们在不同图表领域（图表、电路图、信息图、地图、科学图示）中定位推理证据的能力。
AI.conclusion: DRAGON实现了对图表推理的系统化评估，支持未来研究构建真正基于视觉证据进行推理的模型，提升可解释性和可靠性。

title: Carbon-Taxed Transformers: A Green Compression Pipeline for Overgrown Language Models
summary: The accelerating adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in software engineering (SE) has brought with it a silent crisis: unsustainable computational cost. While these models demonstrate remarkable capabilities in different SE tasks, they are unmanageably large, slow to deploy, memory-intensive, and carbon-heavy. This reality threatens not only the scalability and accessibility of AI-powered SE, but also its long-term environmental sustainability. The research challenge is clear: we must go beyond accuracy and address efficiency and environmental cost as first-class design constraints. To meet this challenge, we introduce Carbon-Taxed Transformers (CTT), a systematic multi-architectural compression principled pipeline ordering inspired by economic carbon taxation principles. Drawing from the economic concept of carbon pricing, CTT operationalizes a computational carbon tax that penalizes architectural inefficiencies and rewards deployment-ready compression. We evaluate CTT across three core SE tasks: code clone detection, code summarization, and code generation, with models spanning encoder-only, encoder-decoder, and decoder-only architecture. Our results show that CTT delivers on inference: (1) up to 49x memory reduction, (2) time reduction up to 8-10x for clone detection, up to 3x for summarization, and 4-7x for generation, (3) up to 81% reduction in CO2 emissions and (4) CTT retains around 98% accuracy on clone detection, around 89% on summarization, and up to 91% (textual metrics) and 68% (pass@1) for generation. Two ablation studies show that pipeline ordering and individual component contributions are both essential, providing empirical justification for CTT's design and effectiveness. This work establishes a viable path toward responsible AI in SE through aggressive yet performance-preserving compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Carbon-Taxed Transformers (CTT)，一种受经济碳税启发的多架构压缩流水线方法，在代码克隆检测、摘要和生成三项SE任务上实现了高达49倍内存缩减、8-10倍加速和81%碳排放降低，同时保持较高准确率。
AI.motivation: LLM在软件工程领域广泛应用但存在计算成本高、部署困难、内存密集和碳排放严重的问题，亟需将效率和环境成本作为一等设计约束来考虑。
AI.method: 借鉴经济碳税概念，提出CTT方法，构建系统性的多架构压缩流水线，通过对架构低效施加"计算碳税"惩罚、奖励可部署性高的压缩方案，形成有序的压缩管道。
AI.result: 在编码器-only、编码器-解码器、解码器-only三种架构上，实现内存缩减49倍、推理时间缩短3-10倍、CO2排放降低81%，同时克隆检测准确率98%、摘要89%、代码生成91%（文本指标）/68%（pass@1）。
AI.conclusion: 通过激进但保持性能的压缩策略，CTT为实现SE领域负责任AI提供了可行路径，消融实验验证了流水线顺序和各组件贡献的必要性。

title: CoreFlow: Low-Rank Matrix Generative Models
summary: Learning matrix-valued distributions from high-dimensional and possibly incomplete training data is challenging: ambient-space generative modeling is computationally expensive and statistically fragile when the matrix dimension is large but the sample size is limited. We propose CoreFlow, a geometry-preserving low-rank flow model that learns shared row/column subspaces across the matrix distribution, and then trains a continuous normalizing flow only on the induced low-dimensional core. CoreFlow is designed for settings where shared low-rank matrix geometry is present, especially in high-dimensional limited-sample regimes. This separates shared matrix geometry from sample-specific variation, preserves matrix structure, and substantially improves training efficiency. The same framework also handles incomplete training matrices through masked Riemannian updates and iterative completion. Across real and synthetic benchmarks, CoreFlow substantially improves spectral and moment-level generation quality in few-sample regimes while remaining competitive in data-rich settings, even under compression to 9% of the ambient dimension and with up to 40% missing training entries.

AI.tldr: CoreFlow是一种几何保持的低秩流模型，通过学习矩阵分布中的共享行列子空间，仅在低维核心上训练连续归一化流，适用于高维小样本场景，即使在压缩至原始维度9%且训练数据缺失40%的情况下仍能保持良好生成质量。
AI.motivation: 高维矩阵分布生成建模面临计算昂贵和统计脆弱性的挑战，尤其在样本量有限时，现有方法难以兼顾效率与质量。
AI.method: 先学习矩阵分布中共享的低秩行列子空间，然后将连续归一化流仅训练在诱导出的低维核心上；通过掩码黎曼更新和迭代补全处理不完整训练矩阵。
AI.result: 在真实和合成基准上，CoreFlow在小样本场景下显著提升了谱和矩层面的生成质量，在数据充足场景下仍保持竞争力，可压缩至原始维度的9%，并容忍高达40%的训练条目缺失。
AI.conclusion: CoreFlow通过分离共享矩阵几何与样本特异性变异，在保留矩阵结构的同时大幅提升训练效率，为高维小样本矩阵分布生成提供了有效方案。

title: Improving Zero-Shot Offline RL via Behavioral Task Sampling
summary: Offline zero-shot reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn agents that optimize unseen reward functions without additional environment interaction. The standard approach to this problem trains task-conditioned policies by sampling task vectors that define linear reward functions over learned state representations. In most existing algorithms, these task vectors are randomly sampled, implicitly assuming this adequately captures the structure of the task space. We argue that doing so leads to suboptimal zero-shot generalization. To address this limitation, we propose extracting task vectors directly from the offline dataset and using them to define the task distribution used for policy training. We introduce a simple and general reward function extraction procedure that integrates into existing offline zero-shot RL algorithms. Across multiple benchmark environments and baselines, our approach improves zero-shot performance by an average of 20%, highlighting the importance of principled task sampling in offline zero-shot RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出从离线数据集中提取任务向量而非随机采样，以改进离线零样本强化学习的泛化性能，平均提升20%。
AI.motivation: 现有离线零样本RL算法随机采样任务向量，未能充分捕捉任务空间的结构，导致次优的零样本泛化性能。
AI.method: 提出一种简单通用的奖励函数提取流程，从离线数据集中直接提取任务向量，用于定义策略训练的任务分布，可集成到现有离线零样本RL算法中。
AI.result: 在多个基准环境和基线方法上，该方法平均提升零样本性能20%。
AI.conclusion: 原则性的任务采样对离线零样本RL至关重要，从数据中提取任务向量比随机采样更有效。

title: LegalMidm: Use-Case-Driven Legal Domain Specialization for Korean Large Language Model
summary: In recent years, the rapid proliferation of open-source large language models (LLMs) has spurred efforts to turn general-purpose models into domain specialists. However, many domain-specialized LLMs are developed using datasets and training protocols that are not aligned with the nuanced requirements of real-world applications. In the legal domain, where precision and reliability are essential, this lack of consideration limits practical utility. In this study, we propose a systematic training framework grounded in the practical needs of the legal domain, with a focus on Korean law. We introduce LegalMidm, a Korean legal-domain LLM, and present a methodology for constructing high-quality, use-case-driven legal datasets and optimized training pipelines. Our approach emphasizes collaboration with legal professionals and rigorous data curation to ensure relevance and factual accuracy, and demonstrates effectiveness in key legal tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对法律领域大语言模型（LLM）在实际应用中缺乏专业适配性的问题，提出了一个基于韩国法律的系统性训练框架LegalMidm，通过与法律专家合作、构建高质量用例驱动数据集和优化训练流程，提升了模型在法律任务中的精度和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有开源LLM在转化为法律领域专用模型时，所使用的数据集和训练协议未能充分契合真实世界的应用需求，导致在法律这类对精度和可靠性要求极高的领域实用性受限。
AI.method: 提出系统性训练框架，包含：① 构建高质量、用例驱动的法律数据集；② 优化训练流水线；③ 与法律专业人士协作进行数据策展，确保相关性和事实准确性；④ 以韩国法律为焦点开发LegalMidm模型。
AI.result: 成功开发出LegalMidm模型，在关键法律任务上证明了其有效性，表明该框架能提升法律领域LLM的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 与法律专业人士合作并进行严格的数据策展，是让LLM适配法律领域实际需求的关键路径，该框架可为其他领域的专业LLM开发提供参考。

title: Personalized Cross-Modal Emotional Correlation Learning for Speech-Preserving Facial Expression Manipulation
summary: Speech-preserving facial expression manipulation (SPFEM) aims to enhance human expressiveness without altering mouth movements tied to the original speech. A primary challenge in this domain is the scarcity of paired data, namely aligned frames of the same individual with identical speech but different expressions, which impedes direct supervision for emotional manipulation. While current Visual-Language Models (VLMs) can extract aligned visual and semantic features, making them a promising source of supervision, their direct application is limited. To this end, we propose a Personalized Cross-Modal Emotional Correlation Learning (PCMECL) algorithm that refines VLM-based supervision through two major improvements. First, standard VLMs rely on a single generic prompt for each emotion, failing to capture expressive variations among individuals. PCMECL addresses this limitation by conditioning on individual visual information to learn personalized prompts, thereby establishing more fine-grained visual-semantic correlations. Second, even with personalization, inherent discrepancies persist between the visual and semantic feature distributions. To bridge this modality gap, PCMECL employs feature differencing to correlate the modalities, providing more precisely aligned supervision by matching the change in visual features to the change in semantic features. As a plug-and-play module, PCMECL can be seamlessly integrated into existing SPFEM models. Extensive experiments across various datasets demonstrate the superior efficacy of our algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出个性化跨模态情感关联学习(PCMECL)算法，通过个性化提示学习和特征差异对齐，解决了语音保留面部表情操作中数据稀缺和视觉-语义模态差异的问题。
AI.motivation: 语音保留面部表情操作面临配对数据稀缺的挑战，现有VLM虽能提供监督但存在两个问题：(1)使用通用提示词无法捕捉个体间表达差异；(2)视觉与语义特征分布存在固有模态差距。
AI.method: 提出PCMECL算法：(1)基于个体视觉信息学习个性化提示词，建立细粒度视觉-语义关联；(2)通过特征差异对齐技术，将视觉特征变化与语义特征变化进行匹配，弥合模态差距。该方法作为即插即用模块可集成到现有SPFEM模型中。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，该算法具有优越的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PCMECL通过个性化提示和特征差异对齐，有效改善了VLM监督在表情操作任务中的应用，为缺乏配对数据的面部表情操作提供了可行方案。

title: Odysseys: Benchmarking Web Agents on Realistic Long Horizon Tasks
summary: Existing web agent benchmarks have largely converged on short, single-site tasks that frontier models are approaching saturation on. However, real world web use consists of long-horizon, multi-site workflows. Common web navigation tasks, such as comparing products across different domains, planning trips across multiple services, or summarizing information from multiple search queries, require sustained context and cross-site reasoning over potentially hours of browsing. To capture and evaluate such behaviors, we introduce Odysseys: a benchmark of 200 long-horizon web tasks derived from real world browsing sessions evaluated on the live Internet. We find that binary pass/fail evaluation is inadequate for long-horizon settings and introduce a rubric-based evaluation, annotating each Odysseys task with an average of 6.1 graded rubrics. We demonstrate that this yields higher agreement with humans and provides a more fine-grained signal than commonly used trajectory-level LLM-as-a-judge evaluation metrics. We tested several leading frontier models and find that the strongest models achieve a success rate of 44.5%, which leaves substantial room for future improvements. Beyond task success, we argue that efficiency is a first-class concern for long-horizon agents. We introduce a Trajectory Efficiency metric (rubric score per step) and find that even frontier agents achieve only 1.15%, marking an evident need for agents that can succeed efficiently and not simply eventually. Odysseys isolates the critical evaluation of long-horizon proficiency in open-web environments, providing a realistic benchmark to measure progress towards computer-use agents that can potentially productively operate for hours. We release our tasks, evaluation scripts, and other results at https://odysseys-website.pages.dev

AI.tldr: 本文提出Odysseys基准，包含200个长周期、跨站点的真实网络任务，使用基于评分标准的细粒度评估（平均6.1个评分维度），发现最强模型成功率仅44.5%，轨迹效率仅1.15%，揭示了当前模型在长周期网络任务上的巨大提升空间。
AI.motivation: 现有Web Agent基准大多集中在短周期、单网站任务上，前沿模型已接近饱和。然而现实世界的网络使用涉及长周期、多站点的工作流，现有基准无法有效评估这种能力。
AI.method: 从真实浏览会话中提取200个长周期网络任务；采用基于评分标准（rubric）的评估方法，每个任务平均标注6.1个分级评分标准；引入轨迹效率指标（rubric得分/步数）来衡量效率。
AI.result: 最强模型在Odysseys上的成功率为44.5%；轨迹效率仅达1.15%；基于评分标准的评估相比轨迹级LLM-as-a-judge评估与人类判断一致性更高。
AI.conclusion: 长周期、多站点的网络任务对当前模型极具挑战性；效率应作为长周期Agent的首要考量指标；现有模型在成功率和效率上均有显著提升空间。

title: PHISHREV: A Hybrid Machine Learning and Post-Hoc Non-monotonic Reasoning Framework for Context-Aware Phishing Website Classification
summary: Phishing detection systems are predominantly rely on statistical machine learning models, which often lack contextual reasoning and are vulnerable to adversarial manipulation. In this work, we propose a hybrid framework that integrates machine learning classifiers with non-monotonic reasoning using Answer Set Programming (ASP) to enable context-aware decision refinement. The proposed post-hoc reasoning layer incorporates expert knowledge to revise classifier predictions through formal belief revisions. Experimental results indicate that the reasoning module modifies 5.08\% of classifier outputs, leading to improved decision consistency. A key advantage is that new domain knowledge can be incorporated into the reasoning layer in $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time, eliminating the need for model retraining.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合框架，将机器学习分类器与基于回答集编程的非单调推理相结合，通过后验推理层修正分类结果，提升钓鱼检测的决策一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有钓鱼检测系统主要依赖统计机器学习模型，缺乏上下文推理能力，且容易受到对抗性操纵。
AI.method: 构建混合框架：机器学习分类器 + 基于回答集编程的非单调推理层，通过后验信念修正整合专家知识，对分类器输出进行上下文感知的决策优化。
AI.result: 推理模块修正了5.08%的分类器输出，提升了决策一致性；新领域知识可在O(n)时间内融入推理层，无需重新训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过可扩展的推理层有效弥补了纯统计模型的不足，兼顾了准确性与灵活性。

title: Faithfulness-QA: A Counterfactual Entity Substitution Dataset for Training Context-Faithful RAG Models
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) models frequently produce answers grounded in parametric memory rather than the retrieved context, undermining the core promise of retrieval augmentation. A fundamental obstacle to fixing this unfaithfulness is the lack of training data that explicitly requires models to prefer context over internal knowledge. We introduce Faithfulness-QA, a large-scale dataset of 99,094 samples constructed through counterfactual entity substitution. Starting from two established extractive QA benchmarks--SQuAD and TriviaQA--we automatically identify answer-bearing named entities in each context, replace them with type-consistent alternatives drawn from a curated bank of 76,953 entities, and thereby manufacture controlled knowledge conflicts between context and parametric memory. Rigorous quality filtering ensures 100% pass rates across four automated checks on random 200-sample audits. We release the full dataset, the construction pipeline, and a typed entity bank covering eight named entity categories. Faithfulness-QA is designed as a training resource for attention-based faithfulness objectives and as an evaluation benchmark for measuring context-grounding behavior in RAG systems. Data and code are available at https://github.com/qzhangFDU/faithfulness-qa-dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Faithfulness-QA数据集（99,094个样本），通过反事实实体替换制造上下文与参数记忆之间的知识冲突，旨在训练和评估RAG模型对检索上下文的忠实程度。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG模型经常依赖参数记忆而非检索到的上下文生成答案，违背了检索增强的核心原则，而缺乏强制模型优先选择上下文的训练数据是解决这一不忠实问题的根本障碍。
AI.method: 基于SQuAD和TriviaQA基准，自动识别上下文中的答案相关命名实体，替换为来自76,953个实体的类型一致替代实体，从而制造可控的知识冲突；经过严格质量过滤确保100%通过率。
AI.result: 构建了包含99,094个样本的大规模数据集Faithfulness-QA，覆盖8种命名实体类别，在随机200样本审计中四项自动检查通过率均为100%。
AI.conclusion: Faithfulness-QA可作为基于注意力的忠实度目标训练资源和衡量RAG系统上下文接地行为的评估基准，数据集和代码已开源。

title: Combating Visual Neglect and Semantic Drift in Large Multimodal Models for Enhanced Cross-Modal Retrieval
summary: Despite significant progress in Unified Multimodal Retrieval (UMR) powered by Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), existing embedding methods primarily focus on sample-level objectives via contrastive learning while overlooking the crucial subject-level semantics. This limitation hinders the model's ability to group semantically coherent subjects in complex multimodal queries, manifesting as semantic alignment deviation--where models fail to accurately localize salient text-referred regions in visual content. Moreover, without explicit guidance to model salient visual subjects, LMMs tend to over-rely on textual cues, resulting in visual modality neglect and suboptimal utilization of visual knowledge. To this end, we propose Salient Subject-Aware Multimodal Embedding (SSA-ME), a novel framework designed to enhance fine-grained representation learning through saliency-aware modeling. SSA-ME leverages LMMs and visual experts to identify and emphasize salient visual concepts in image-text pairs, and introduces a saliency-guided objective to better align cross-modal attention with semantically meaningful regions. Additionally, a feature regeneration module recalibrates visual features based on the derived saliency maps, ensuring a balanced and semantically coherent integration across modalities. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MMEB benchmark, demonstrating that incorporating subject-level modeling substantially improves multimodal retrieval. Comprehensive qualitative analyses further illustrate the interpretability and effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: 提出SSA-ME框架，通过显著性感知建模增强多模态嵌入中的细粒度主体级语义表示，解决现有方法忽视主体级语义导致的语义对齐偏差和视觉模态忽视问题，在MMEB基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态检索方法主要依赖样本级对比学习，忽略了主体级语义建模，导致语义对齐偏差（无法准确定位文本所指的视觉区域）和视觉模态忽视（过度依赖文本线索）。
AI.method: 1) 利用LMM和视觉专家识别并强调图像-文本对中的显著视觉概念；2) 提出显著性引导的目标函数来对齐跨模态注意力与语义重要区域；3) 设计特征再生模块，基于显著性图重新校准视觉特征，实现跨模态的平衡语义融合。
AI.result: 在MMEB基准上达到最先进性能，定性分析验证了方法的可解释性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 引入主体级建模能显著改善多模态检索性能，验证了显著性感知学习的重要性。

title: PolyKV: A Shared Asymmetrically-Compressed KV Cache Pool for Multi-Agent LLM Inference
comment: 10 pages, 6 tables. Code: https://github.com/ishan1410/PolyKV Keywords: KV cache compression, multi-agent LLM inference, asymmetric quantization, FWHT, TurboQuant, shared memory
summary: We present PolyKV, a system in which multiple concurrent inference agents share a single, asymmetrically compressed KV cache pool. Rather than allocating a separate KV cache per agent -- the standard paradigm -- PolyKV writes a compressed cache once and injects it into N independent agent contexts via HuggingFace DynamicCache objects. Compression is asymmetric: Keys are quantized at int8 (q8_0) to preserve softmax stability, while Values are compressed using TurboQuant MSE -- a Fast Walsh-Hadamard Transform (FWHT) rotation followed by 3-bit Lloyd-Max quantization with centroids tuned to N(0,1). We evaluate across two model scales (SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct and Llama-3-8B-Instruct), three context lengths (600-7,194 tokens), and up to 15 concurrent agents. PolyKV achieves a stable 2.91x compression ratio across all configurations. On Llama-3-8B with 15 agents sharing a 4K-token context, PolyKV reduces KV cache memory from 19.8 GB to 0.45 GB -- a 97.7% reduction -- while maintaining only +0.57% perplexity degradation and a mean BERTScore F1 of 0.928. PPL delta does not grow with agent count and improves as context length increases, inverting to -0.26% at 1,851 coherent tokens. To our knowledge, no prior work combines a single shared, lossy-compressed KV pool with multi-reader concurrent agent access.

AI.tldr: PolyKV 提出多智能体共享单一非对称压缩 KV 缓存池的方法，在 Llama-3-8B 上实现 97.7% 显存节省，仅增加 0.57% 困惑度损失。
AI.motivation: 传统方法为每个推理智能体分配独立的 KV 缓存，导致内存爆炸式增长。PolyKV 旨在通过共享压缩缓存池解决多并发智能体场景下的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 设计了非对称压缩策略：Key 使用 int8 (q8_0) 量化以保持 softmax 稳定性；Value 采用 TurboQuant MSE 方法，即 FWHT 旋转后接 3-bit Lloyd-Max 量化，质心按 N(0,1) 调整。通过 HuggingFace DynamicCache 实现单个压缩缓存被 N 个智能体共享读取。
AI.result: 在 SmolLM2-1.7B 和 Llama-3-8B 上测试，15 个智能体共享 4K tokens 时，KV 缓存从 19.8 GB 降至 0.45 GB（减少 97.7%），困惑度仅增加 0.57%，BERTScore F1 达 0.928。压缩率稳定在 2.91x，困惑度损失不随智能体数量增长，长上下文甚至出现逆转为 -0.26%。
AI.conclusion: PolyKV 首次实现了单一共享有损压缩 KV 池与多读并发智能体访问的结合，在几乎不牺牲生成质量的前提下大幅降低内存占用，支持高效的多智能体推理部署。

title: Automated Adversarial Collaboration for Advancing Theory Building in the Cognitive Sciences
summary: Cognitive science often evaluates theories through narrow paradigms and local model comparisons, limiting the integration of evidence across tasks and realizations. We introduce an automated adversarial collaboration framework for adjudicating among competing theories even when the candidate models and experiments must be discovered during the adjudication process. The system combines LLM-based theory agents, program synthesis, and information-theoretic experimental design in a closed loop. In a simulation study spanning three classic categorization theories, the framework recovered the ground-truth theory across noise settings with weaker reliability in the hardest settings. Together, the framework and findings provide a concrete proof of concept for closed-loop, in-silico theory adjudication in cognitive science.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化对抗性协作框架，结合LLM、程序合成和信息论实验设计，用于在认知科学中自动裁定竞争理论，在模拟研究中成功恢复了真实理论。
AI.motivation: 传统认知科学评估理论时依赖狭窄范式和局部模型比较，限制了跨任务和实现的证据整合。需要一种能自动发现模型和实验的对抗性协作框架来裁定竞争理论。
AI.method: 结合基于LLM的理论智能体、程序合成和信息论实验设计，形成闭环系统。系统自动生成竞争理论、设计实验、收集数据并迭代更新模型比较。
AI.result: 在三个经典分类理论的模拟研究中，框架能在不同噪声设置下恢复真实理论，但在最困难设置下可靠性较弱。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为认知科学中闭环、计算机内理论裁定提供了具体概念验证。

title: The Structured Output Benchmark: A Multi-Source Benchmark for Evaluating Structured Output Quality in Large Language Models
comment: 19 pages, 4 figures, 11 tables, submitted to NeurIPS 2026
summary: Large Language Models are increasingly being deployed to extract structured data from unstructured and semi-structured sources: parsing invoices, medical records, and converting PDF documents to database entries. Yet existing benchmarks for structured output generation either focus on schema compliance alone, or evaluate value correctness within a single source domain. We introduce SOB (The Structured Output Benchmark), a multi-source benchmark spanning three source modalities: native text, images, and audio conversations. All models receive a text-normalized representation of their context regardless of source modality; this deliberate design isolates structured-output capability from raw vision or speech-processing quality, ensuring a fair, source-agnostic comparison. Our benchmark comprises 5,000 text evaluation records derived from multi-hop QA drawn from a 25,091-record full corpus, 209 image records from OCR-processed PDFs across seven document types including multi-column layouts, dense tables, scanned historical documents, small-print text, and mathematical typesetting, and 115 audio records from the AMI corpus. Each record pairs a natural-language question with a JSON schema that the model must follow and a ground-truth answer verified against the source context. We evaluate 21 frontier and open-weight models across three source domains and seven metrics. Our results reveal a consistent pattern: models achieve near-perfect schema compliance, yet the best Value Accuracy, measured by exact leaf-value match, reaches only 83.0% on text, 67.2% on images, and 23.7% on audio, where longer context makes extraction substantially harder. We release the dataset, evaluation pipeline, and all related code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SOB（结构化输出基准），一个跨文本、图像、音频三种模态的结构化输出评估基准，包含5000条文本、209条图像和115条音频记录。对21个前沿和开源模型评估发现，模型在模式合规性上表现接近完美，但值准确率在文本上仅83.0%、图像67.2%、音频23.7%，揭示了结构化输出能力的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化输出基准要么只关注模式合规性，要么仅在单一源领域评估值正确性，缺乏跨模态的结构化输出能力评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了SOB基准，包含三种来源模态（文本、图像、音频）的记录，所有模型接收文本归一化的上下文表示以隔离结构化输出能力与原始视觉/语音处理质量。数据集包括5000条文本记录（来自多跳QA）、209条图像记录（OCR处理后的PDF）和115条音频记录（AMI语料库），每条记录包含自然语言问题、JSON模式和真实答案。
AI.result: 评估了21个前沿和开源模型，模型在模式合规性上接近完美，但值准确率（精确叶值匹配）在文本上仅83.0%、图像67.2%、音频23.7%，更长上下文显著增加提取难度。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在结构化输出任务中模式合规性已不成问题，但值的准确提取仍有巨大提升空间，尤其在图像和音频模态下表现更差，长上下文场景是主要挑战。

title: OmniVTG: A Large-Scale Dataset and Training Paradigm for Open-World Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG), the task of localizing video segments from text queries, struggles in open-world settings due to limited dataset scale and semantic diversity, causing performance gaps between common and rare concepts. To overcome these limitations, we introduce OmniVTG, a new large-scale dataset for open-world VTG, coupled with a Self-Correction Chain-of-Thought (CoT) training paradigm designed to enhance the grounding capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Our OmniVTG is constructed via a novel Semantic Coverage Iterative Expansion pipeline, which first identifies gaps in the vocabulary of existing datasets and collects videos that are highly likely to contain these target concepts. For high-quality annotation, we leverage the insight that modern MLLMs excel at dense captioning more than direct grounding and design a caption-centric data engine to prompt MLLMs to generate dense, timestamped descriptions. Beyond the dataset, we observe that simple supervised finetuning (SFT) is insufficient, as a performance gap between rare and common concepts still persists. We find that MLLMs' video understanding ability significantly surpasses their direct grounding ability. Based on this, we propose a Self-Correction Chain-of-Thought (CoT) training paradigm. We train the MLLM to first predict, then use its understanding capabilities to reflect on and refine its own predictions. This capability is instilled via a three-stage pipeline of SFT, CoT finetuning, and reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show our approach not only excels at open-world grounding in our OmniVTG dataset but also achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on four existing VTG benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/OmniVTG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniVTG——一个面向开放世界视频时序定位（VTG）的大规模数据集，以及一种自校正思维链（Self-Correction CoT）训练范式。OmniVTG通过语义覆盖迭代扩展（SCIE）管道自动识别词汇缺口并收集相关视频，并利用MLLM的密集字幕能力进行高质量标注。针对简单SFT无法缩小常见/稀有概念性能差距的问题，提出三步训练（SFT→CoT微调→强化学习），让MLLM先预测、再自我反思修正。在OmniVTG和四个现有基准上取得SOTA零样本性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VTG数据集规模小、语义多样性不足，导致开放世界场景中常见概念与稀有概念之间存在显著性能差距。
AI.method: 1) 语义覆盖迭代扩展（SCIE）管道构建数据集；2) 以密集字幕为中心的数据引擎生成带时间戳描述；3) 自校正思维链（Self-Correction CoT）训练范式：SFT → CoT微调 → 强化学习，让模型先预测再自我反思修正。
AI.result: 在OmniVTG数据集上开放世界定位表现优异，在四个现有VTG基准上达到SOTA零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: 自校正CoT范式有效利用MLLM强理解能力弥补弱定位能力，缩小了常见/稀有概念性能差距，为开放世界视频定位提供了新范式。

title: Laplace-Bridged Randomized Smoothing for Fast Certified Robustness
summary: Randomized Smoothing (RS) offers formal $\ell_2$ guarantees for arbitrary base classifiers but faces two key practical bottlenecks: (i) it often relies on noise-augmented training to achieve nontrivial certificates, which increases training cost, can reduce clean accuracy, and weakens RS as a genuinely post-hoc defense; and (ii) certification is computationally expensive, typically requiring tens of thousands of noisy forward passes per input, which hinders deployment, especially on resource-constrained edge devices. To address both limitations, we propose Laplace-Bridged Smoothing (LBS), an analytic reformulation of RS that replaces high-dimensional input-space Monte Carlo (MC) sampling with efficient computations in a low-dimensional probability space. LBS preserves formal robustness guarantees without requiring noise-augmented training while substantially reducing certification burden. On CIFAR-10 and ImageNet, LBS attains stronger certified robustness than RS and reduces per-sample certification cost by nearly an order of magnitude. Notably, on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and Raspberry Pi 4, LBS achieves speedups of up to $494\times$, enabling practical certified deployment on real-world edge devices. Finally, we provide theoretical justification for the analytic formulation and certificate validity of LBS.

AI.tldr: 提出Laplace-Bridged Smoothing (LBS)，将随机平滑的高维蒙特卡洛采样转化为低维概率空间的高效解析计算，在保持形式化鲁棒性保证的同时，无需噪声增强训练且显著降低认证成本，在边缘设备上实现高达494倍加速。
AI.motivation: 解决随机平滑（RS）的两个关键实际瓶颈：(i) 依赖噪声增强训练，增加训练成本、降低干净准确率，削弱了RS作为事后防御的本质；(ii) 认证计算昂贵，需要数万次噪声前向传播，阻碍在资源受限边缘设备上部署。
AI.method: 提出Laplace-Bridged Smoothing (LBS)，一种将RS重新表述为解析形式的方法，用低维概率空间的高效计算替代高维输入空间的蒙特卡洛采样，无需噪声增强训练即可保持形式化鲁棒性保证。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上，LBS实现了比RS更强的认证鲁棒性，并将每个样本的认证成本降低近一个数量级；在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano和Raspberry Pi 4上，实现了高达494倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: LBS通过解析重公式化解决了RS的两大瓶颈，在保持形式化保证的同时提升了认证效率和鲁棒性，为边缘设备上的实际认证部署提供了可行方案。

title: Sample-efficient Neuro-symbolic Proximal Policy Optimization
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms often require a large amount of data and struggle in sparse-reward domains with long planning horizons and multiple sub-goals. In this paper, we propose a neuro-symbolic extension of Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) that transfers partial logical policy specifications learned in easier instances to guide learning in more challenging settings. We introduce two integrations of symbolic guidance: (i) H-PPO-Product, which biases the action distribution at sampling time, and (ii) H-PPO-SymLoss, which augments the PPO loss with a symbolic regularization term. We evaluate our methods on three benchmarks (OfficeWorld, WaterWorld, and DoorKey), showing consistently faster learning and higher return at convergence than PPO and a Reward Machine baseline, also under imperfect symbolic knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种神经符号化PPO扩展方法（H-PPO-Product和H-PPO-SymLoss），通过在简单实例中学习部分逻辑策略规范并迁移到困难任务中，在三个基准测试上实现了比PPO和Reward Machine基线更快的收敛速度和更高的回报。
AI.motivation: DRL算法在稀疏奖励、长规划周期和多子目标领域需要大量数据且表现不佳，现有方法难以有效利用结构化知识加速学习。
AI.method: 提出两种PPO的神经符号扩展：(i) H-PPO-Product：在采样时用逻辑规范偏置动作分布；(ii) H-PPO-SymLoss：用符号正则化项增强PPO损失函数。两者均通过在简单实例中学习部分逻辑策略规范并迁移到困难设置中引导学习。
AI.result: 在OfficeWorld、WaterWorld和DoorKey三个基准上，所提方法在收敛速度和学习回报上均一致优于PPO和Reward Machine基线，且在符号知识不完美时依然有效。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号方法能有效将逻辑策略规范从简单任务迁移到复杂任务，为稀疏奖励场景下的DRL提供了一种高效的引导机制。

title: Language corpora for the Dutch medical domain
summary: \textbf{Background:} Dutch medical corpora are scarce, limiting NLP development. \\ \textbf{Methods:} We translated English datasets, identified medical text in generic corpora, and extracted open Dutch medical resources. \\ \textbf{Results:} The resulting corpus comprises $\pm$ 35 billion tokens across the medical domain in about 100 million documents, freely available on Hugging Face. \\ \textbf{Conclusion:} This work establishes the first large-scale Dutch medical language corpus for pre-training and downstream NLP tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过翻译英语数据集、识别通用语料库中的医学文本以及提取开放的荷兰语医学资源，构建了首个大规模荷兰语医学语料库，包含约350亿词元和1亿文档，并在Hugging Face上免费开放。
AI.motivation: 荷兰语医学语料库稀缺，限制了自然语言处理（NLP）在该领域的发展。
AI.method: 1）翻译英语医学数据集；2）在通用语料库中识别医学文本；3）提取已有的开放荷兰语医学资源。
AI.result: 构建了包含约350亿词元、约1亿文档的大规模荷兰语医学语料库，并在Hugging Face上免费发布。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了首个可用于预训练和下游NLP任务的大规模荷兰语医学语料库。

title: The Thinking Pixel: Recursive Sparse Reasoning in Multimodal Diffusion Latents
summary: Diffusion models have achieved success in high-fidelity data synthesis, yet their capacity for more complex, structured reasoning like text following tasks remains constrained. While advances in language models have leveraged strategies such as latent reasoning and recursion to enhance text understanding capabilities, extending these to multimodal text-to-image generation tasks is challenging due to the continuous and non-discrete nature of visual tokens. To tackle this problem, we draw inspiration from modular human cognition and propose a recursive, sparse mixture-of-experts framework integrated into conventional diffusion models. Our approach introduces a recursive component within joint attention layers that iteratively refines visual tokens over multiple latent steps while efficiently sharing parameters via sparse selection of neural modules. At each step, a gating network is devised to dynamically select specialized neural modules, conditioned on the current visual tokens, the diffusion timestep, and the conditioning information. Comprehensive evaluation on class-conditioned ImageNet image generation tasks and additional studies on the GenEval and DPG benchmark demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method in enhancing model image generation performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种递归、稀疏的混合专家框架，将其集成到传统扩散模型中，通过迭代精炼视觉token并在注意力层中动态选择神经模块，以增强模型在文本到图像生成任务中的结构化推理能力。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在高保真数据合成上表现出色，但在处理更复杂的结构化推理任务（如文本跟随）方面仍存在局限。受限于视觉token的连续性和非离散性，将语言模型中的潜在推理与递归策略扩展到多模态文本到图像生成任务面临挑战。
AI.method: 受模块化人类认知启发，提出递归、稀疏的混合专家框架。在联合注意力层中引入递归组件，通过多个潜在步骤迭代精炼视觉token，并利用稀疏选择的神经模块高效共享参数。每个步骤中，门控网络根据当前视觉token、扩散时间步和条件信息动态选择专业化神经模块。
AI.result: 在类条件ImageNet图像生成任务、GenEval和DPG基准上的综合评估表明，该方法在提升模型图像生成性能方面具有优越性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的递归稀疏混合专家框架有效增强了扩散模型在图像生成任务中的推理能力，特别是在处理结构化文本跟随等复杂任务时表现优异。

title: DiRe-RAPIDS: Topology-faithful dimensionality reduction at scale
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures; GitHub repositories (https://github.com/sashakolpakov/dire-rapids) (https://github.com/igorrivin/dire-rapids-arxiv); HuggingFace dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/igriv/dire-arxiv-bge-small-embeddings)
summary: Dimensionality reduction methods such as UMAP and t-SNE are central tools for visualising high-dimensional data, but their local-neighborhood objectives can preserve sampling noise while distorting global topology. We show that standard local metrics reward this noise memorisation: top-performing embeddings invent cycles and disconnected islands absent from the data. We introduce a topology-faithfulness benchmark based on noisy manifolds with known homology, tune DiRe against it, and find Pareto-optimal configurations that match or beat GPU-accelerated UMAP on classification while recovering exact first Betti numbers on stress tests. On 723K arXiv paper embeddings, DiRe preserves 3-4 times more topological structure than UMAP at comparable wall-clock.

AI.tldr: 提出DiRe方法，在保持分类性能的同时比UMAP多保留3-4倍的拓扑结构，解决了降维方法中的拓扑失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有降维方法（UMAP、t-SNE）的局部邻域目标会保留采样噪声并扭曲全局拓扑，标准局部指标甚至奖励这种噪声记忆，导致嵌入中出现虚假的环和孤岛。
AI.method: 构建基于已知同调性的噪声流形拓扑保真度基准，在此基础上调优DiRe方法，寻找Pareto最优配置。
AI.result: DiRe在分类任务上匹配或超越GPU加速的UMAP，在压力测试中恢复精确的第一Betti数；在723K arXiv论文嵌入上，以相近时间保留比UMAP多3-4倍的拓扑结构。
AI.conclusion: 局部指标不能保证全局拓扑保真度，DiRe通过针对性调优实现了分类性能与拓扑保真度的帕累托最优平衡。

title: Why Search When You Can Transfer? Amortized Agentic Workflow Design from Structural Priors
summary: Automated agentic workflow design currently relies on per-task iterative search, which is computationally prohibitive and fails to reuse structural knowledge across tasks. We observe that optimized workflows converge to a small family of domain-specific topologies, suggesting that this combinatorial search is largely redundant. Building on this insight, we propose SWIFT (Synthesizing Workflows via Few-shot Transfer), a framework that amortizes workflow design into reusable structural priors. SWIFT first distills compositional heuristics and output-interface contracts from contrastive analysis of prior search trajectories across source tasks. At inference time, it conditions a single LLM generation pass on these priors together with cross-task workflow demonstrations to synthesize a complete, executable workflow for an unseen target task, bypassing iterative search entirely. On five benchmarks, SWIFT outperforms the state-of-the-art search-based method while reducing marginal per-task optimization cost by three orders of magnitude. It further generalizes to four additional unseen benchmarks and transfers successfully from GPT-4o-mini to three additional foundation models (Grok, Qwen, Gemma).
