Controlled ablations reveal that workflow demonstrations primarily transfer topological structure rather than surface semantics: replacing all operator names with random strings still retains over 93% of the full system's average performance.

AI.tldr: 提出SWIFT框架，通过跨任务迁移结构化先验知识来替代每任务迭代搜索的工作流设计方法，在五个基准上超越SOTA搜索方法，同时将每任务优化成本降低三个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化agentic工作流设计依赖每任务的迭代搜索，计算成本高且无法跨任务复用结构知识。作者观察到优化后的工作流会收敛到少量领域特定的拓扑结构，说明组合搜索存在大量冗余。
AI.method: SWIFT先通过对源任务的搜索轨迹进行对比分析，提炼组合式启发式规则和输出接口契约。推理时，只需一次LLM生成，条件于这些先验知识和跨任务工作流演示，即可为未见过的目标任务合成完整、可执行的工作流，完全跳过迭代搜索。
AI.result: 在五个基准上超越基于搜索的SOTA方法；每任务边际优化成本降低三个数量级；泛化到四个未见过的基准；成功从GPT-4o-mini迁移到Grok、Qwen、Gemma三个基础模型；将算子名称替换为随机字符串仍保留93%以上性能。
AI.conclusion: 工作流演示主要迁移的是拓扑结构而非表面语义，验证了跨任务结构先验知识复用的可行性和高效性。

title: DualFact+: A Multimodal Fact Verification Framework for Procedural Video Understanding
summary: We introduce DualFact, a dual-layer, multimodal factuality evaluation framework for procedural video captioning. DualFact separates factual correctness into conceptual facts, capturing abstract semantic roles (e.g., Action, Ingredient, Tool, Location), and contextual facts, capturing their grounded predicate-argument realizations in video. To support complete and role-consistent evaluation, DualFact incorporates implicit argument augmentation (VIA) and contrastive fact sets. We instantiate DualFact in two modes: DualFact-T, which verifies facts against textual evidence, and DualFact-V, which verifies facts against video-grounded visual evidence. Experiments on YouCook3-Fact and CraftBench-Fact show that state-of-the-art multimodal language models produce fluent but often factually incomplete captions, with systematic omissions and role-level inconsistencies. DualFact correlates more strongly with human factuality judgments than standard metrics, particularly for contextual facts, and reveals that caption-only evaluation overestimates hallucinations compared to video-grounded verification. Overall, DualFact offers an interpretable and human-aligned evaluation protocol that highlights persistent challenges in multimodal factual grounding, extending beyond surface-level fluency.

AI.tldr: DualFact是一个双层的多模态事实性评估框架，用于程序性视频字幕生成。它将事实正确性分为概念事实（抽象语义角色）和上下文事实（视频中的谓词-参数实现），通过隐式参数增强和对比事实集来支持完整且角色一致的评估。实验表明，现有模型生成的字幕流畅但事实不完整，DualFact比标准指标更符合人类判断。
AI.motivation: 现有程序性视频字幕评估仅关注表面流畅性，缺乏对事实正确性（特别是抽象语义角色与其视频中具体实现）的细粒度、可解释评估。标准指标与人类事实性判断相关性较弱，且字幕-only评估会高估幻觉。
AI.method: 提出DualFact框架，将事实正确性分为两层：概念事实（Action、Ingredient、Tool、Location等语义角色）和上下文事实（这些角色在视频中的具体谓词-参数实现）。设计了隐式参数增强和对比事实集。提供两种模式：DualFact-T（基于文本证据验证）和DualFact-V（基于视频视觉证据验证）。
AI.result: 在YouCook3-Fact和CraftBench-Fact上，SOTA多模态语言模型生成的字幕流畅但事实不完整，存在系统性遗漏和角色级不一致。DualFact与人类事实性判断的相关性显著强于标准指标，尤其是上下文事实。字幕-only评估相比视频验证会高估幻觉。
AI.conclusion: DualFact提供了一个可解释、与人类对齐的评估协议，揭示了多模态事实性基础中的持续挑战，超越了表面流畅性的评估。

title: Wiki Dumps to Training Corpora: South Slavic Case
summary: This paper presents a methodology for transforming raw Wikimedia dumps into quality textual corpora for seven South Slavic languages. The work is divided into two major phases. The first involves extracting and cleaning text from raw dumps of Wikipedia, Wikisource, Wikibooks, Wikinews, and Wikiquote, where available. This step requires careful handling of raw wiki markup to isolate, first of all, textual articles, and then usable natural language text within them. The second phase addresses the challenge of suspicious or low-quality articles, which are often generated from databases or structured knowledge bases. These articles are characterised by repetitive patterns, generic phrasing, and minimal to no original content. To mitigate their impact, a n-gram-based filtering strategy was employed to detect high levels of textual redundancy between articles and then remove such articles from the corpora entirely. The resulting datasets aim to provide linguistically rich texts suitable for training language models or conducting comparative research across South Slavic languages. By combining systematic extraction with quality control, this work contributes to the creation of reliable, high-information corpora that reflect authentic language use and cultural context. While focused on the South Slavic case in the paper, the approach is mostly language-agnostic and can be generalised to other languages and language families.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将原始维基媒体数据转化为高质量文本语料库的方法，针对七种南斯拉夫语言，通过系统提取和n-gram冗余过滤策略，去除低质量自动生成文章，最终获得语言丰富、适合训练语言模型的语料库。
AI.motivation: 南斯拉夫语言资源匮乏，现有的维基媒体数据虽丰富但包含大量噪音和低质量内容（如自动从数据库生成的重复文本），需要系统性的清洗和过滤方法来构建可靠的、反映真实语言使用的高质量语料库，以支持语言模型训练和比较研究。
AI.method: 分为两个阶段：(1) 从Wikipedia、Wikisource、Wikibooks、Wikinews、Wikiquote等原始dump中提取并清洗文本，处理wiki标记以隔离自然语言文本；(2) 采用n-gram过滤策略检测文章间的高水平文本冗余，识别并移除那些从数据库或结构化知识库自动生成的低质量文章。
AI.result: 成功构建了七种南斯拉夫语言的高质量文本语料库，去除了具有重复模式、通用措辞的自动生成内容，获得了语言丰富性更高、能反映真实语言使用和文化背景的可靠语料数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法虽以南斯拉夫语言为例，但整体上语言无关，可推广到其他语言和语系，为低资源语言的高质量语料库构建提供了可复用的系统化框架。

title: DenseScout: Algorithm-System Co-design for Budgeted Tiny Object Selection on Edge Platforms
summary: Deploying tiny object perception on edge platforms is challenging because practical systems must satisfy both strict compute budgets and end-to-end latency constraints. A common strategy is to first select a small number of candidate patches from a high-resolution image and then apply downstream processing only to the selected regions. However, existing detector-based frontends are not well aligned with this setting: strong offline detection accuracy does not necessarily yield effective low-budget patch prioritization, nor does it guarantee usable performance once transport and inference delays are considered. In this work, we study budgeted tiny object selection on edge platforms from a joint algorithm--system perspective. We present DenseScout, a lightweight dense-response selector with only 1.01M parameters, which directly ranks candidate patch locations from a high-resolution scene via a lightweight proxy input and is better aligned with low-budget tiny-object prioritization than detector-style frontends. To bridge offline selector quality and deployable utility, we further develop a transport-aware runtime realization on heterogeneous edge devices and adopt QoS-constrained recall, which counts a target as successfully perceived only if it is covered by the selected regions and the end-to-end processing finishes before the deadline. Experiments show that DenseScout consistently outperforms detector-based baselines in offline budgeted patch-selection evaluation, especially in low-budget regimes, while cross-platform results on RK3588 and Jetson Orin NX show that deployable performance depends jointly on selector quality and runtime realization efficiency. These results suggest that edge tiny object perception should be optimized as an algorithm--system co-design problem rather than as isolated model selection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DenseScout，一个轻量级密集响应选择器（仅1.01M参数），用于边缘平台上低预算微小目标选择，并从算法-系统协同设计角度优化可部署性能，实验表明其在低预算场景下优于基于检测器的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有检测器前端虽然离线检测精度高，但在低预算场景下难以有效优先选择候选patch，且未考虑传输和推理延迟，导致实际部署性能不佳。
AI.method: 提出DenseScout轻量级密集响应选择器（1.01M参数），通过轻量级代理输入直接对高分辨率场景中的候选patch进行排序；并开发传输感知的运行时方案，采用QoS约束召回率作为评估指标。
AI.result: DenseScout在离线低预算patch选择评估中持续优于检测器基线；在RK3588和Jetson Orin NX等平台上验证了可部署性能取决于选择器质量和运行时实现效率的协同作用。
AI.conclusion: 边缘微小目标感知应被优化为算法-系统协同设计问题，而非孤立的模型选择问题。

title: Agentic Harness Engineering: Observability-Driven Automatic Evolution of Coding-Agent Harnesses
summary: Harnesses have become a central determinant of coding-agent performance, shaping how models interact with repositories, tools, and execution environments. Yet automating harness engineering is hard: a heterogeneous action space, sparse and noisy evaluation signal, multi-million-token trajectories, and edits whose effect is hard to attribute to the next round's outcomes. We introduce Agentic Harness Engineering (AHE), a framework that automates harness-level evolution by instrumenting the three stages of any engineering loop (component editing, trajectory inspection, and decision making) with matched observability pillars: (1) component observability gives every editable harness component a file-level representation so the action space is explicit and revertible; (2) experience observability distills millions of raw trajectory tokens into a layered, drill-down evidence corpus that an evolving agent can actually consume; and (3) decision observability pairs every edit with a self-declared prediction, later verified against the next round's task-level outcomes. Together, these pillars turn every edit into a falsifiable contract, so harness evolution proceeds autonomously without collapsing into trial-and-error. Empirically, ten AHE iterations lift pass@1 on Terminal-Bench 2 from 69.7% to 77.0%, surpassing the human-designed harness Codex-CLI (71.9%) and the self-evolving baselines ACE and TF-GRPO. The frozen harness transfers without re-evolution: on SWE-bench-verified it tops aggregate success at 12% fewer tokens than the seed, and on Terminal-Bench 2 it yields +5.1 to +10.1pp cross-family gains across three alternate model families, indicating the evolved components encode general engineering experience rather than benchmark-specific tuning. These results position observability-driven evolution as a practical pathway to keep coding-agent harnesses continually improving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic Harness Engineering (AHE)框架，通过组件可观测性、经验可观测性和决策可观测性三大支柱，实现编码智能体harness的自动化演进。实验表明，AHE在Terminal-Bench 2上pass@1从69.7%提升至77.0%，超越人工设计的Codex-CLI (71.9%)和自演进基线，且冻结的harness可跨模型家族泛化，验证了可观测性驱动的演进路径。
AI.motivation: 自动化harness工程极具挑战性，原因包括：异构的动作空间、稀疏且嘈杂的评估信号、百万级的轨迹token、以及难以归因编辑效果。现有方法容易退化为试错模式，因此需要一种可观测性驱动的自动化演进框架。
AI.method: AHE框架将工程循环拆分为三个环节（组件编辑、轨迹检查、决策），并为每个环节匹配可观测性支柱：(1) 组件可观测性——为每个可编辑harness组件提供文件级表示；(2) 经验可观测性——将百万级原始轨迹token蒸馏为分层证据语料；(3) 决策可观测性——每次编辑附带自我声明的预测，后续通过任务级结果验证，形成可证伪的契约。
AI.result: 10次AHE迭代将Terminal-Bench 2上的pass@1从69.7%提升至77.0%，超越人工设计的Codex-CLI (71.9%)和ACE、TF-GRPO等基线。冻结的harness在SWE-bench-verified上以少12%的token达到更高成功率，在Terminal-Bench 2上跨三个模型家族获得+5.1至+10.1个百分点的提升。
AI.conclusion: 可观测性驱动的演进是保持编码智能体harness持续改进的实用路径，演化的组件编码了通用的工程经验而非针对特定基准的调优。

title: Dynamic Regret for Online Regression in RKHS via Discounted VAW and Subspace Approximation
summary:
We study online regression with the square loss in a reproducing kernel Hilbert space under a dynamic regret criterion. The learner is compared with a time-varying comparator sequence, and the bounds depend on its path length in the RKHS norm. The proposed method transfers the finite-dimensional discounted Vovk--Azoury--Warmuth approach of Jacobsen \& Cutkosky (2024) to the RKHS setting by means of finite-dimensional subspace approximations. For a fixed subspace, we run a VAW-based ensemble of discounted VAW forecasters over a geometric grid of discount factors. The additional approximation error is controlled by the uniform projection error of kernel sections.
  We then introduce a general orthogonal truncation method: starting from a feature expansion of the kernel, we construct the associated RKHS by introducing an inner product that makes the feature functions orthonormal, and then use the spans of the first basis functions as finite-dimensional approximation spaces. The resulting subspace reduction is applied to several approximation schemes. Explicit feature expansions yield fast-regime bounds for Gaussian and analytic dot-product kernels. Mercer truncations provide a spectral approximation method and lead to dynamic regret bounds in fast and slow regimes, depending on the eigenvalue decay. Finally, we study subspaces spanned by kernel sections and apply this construction to Matérn kernels.

AI.tldr: 本文研究再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中在线回归的动态遗憾问题，通过有限维子空间近似将折扣Vovk-Azoury-Warmuth方法扩展到RKHS设置，并引入正交截断方法处理不同核函数的近似误差。
AI.motivation: 将已有的有限维折扣VAW方法推广到无限维的RKHS场景，以处理动态遗憾准则下的在线回归问题，并控制由子空间近似引入的误差。
AI.method: 1) 通过有限维子空间近似将折扣VAW方法扩展到RKHS，对几何网格的折扣因子运行VAW集成；2) 引入正交截断方法，基于核的特征展开构造正交基函数，使用前几个基函数张成的子空间作为近似空间；3) 分别应用于特征展开、Mercer截断和核截面子空间等不同近似方案。
AI.result: 对于高斯核和解析点积核得到快速界的动态遗憾界；对于Mercer截断，根据特征值衰减速度得到快慢两种动态遗憾界；对Matérn核通过核截面子空间给出了具体分析。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将折扣VAW方法推广到RKHS动态遗憾场景，并提出了通用的正交截断框架，适用于多种核函数和近似方案。

title: OxyGent: Making Multi-Agent Systems Modular, Observable, and Evolvable via Oxy Abstraction
comment: 10 pages, 10 figures, ACL 2026 System Demonstration track
summary: Deploying production-ready multi-agent systems (MAS) in complex industrial environments remains challenging due to limitations in scalability, observability, and autonomous evolution. We present OxyGent, an open-source framework that enables modular, observable, and evolvable MAS via a unified Oxy abstraction, in which agents, tools, LLMs, and reasoning flows are encapsulated as pluggable atomic components. This Lego-like assembly paradigm supports scalable system composition and non-intrusive monitoring. To enhance observability, OxyGent introduces permission-driven dynamic planning that replaces rigid workflows with execution graphs generated at runtime, which provide adaptive visualizations. To support continuous evolution, the framework integrates OxyBank, an AI asset management platform that supports automated data backflow, annotation, and joint evolution. Empirical evaluations and real-world case studies show that OxyGent provides a robust and scalable foundation for MAS. OxyGent is publicly available at https://oxygent.jd.com/.

AI.tldr: OxyGent是一个面向复杂工业环境的多智能体系统开源框架，通过统一Oxy抽象实现模块化、可观测和可进化的MAS，包含动态规划、OxyBank资产管理平台等创新特性。
AI.motivation: 当前生产级多智能体系统在工业环境中面临可扩展性、可观测性和自主演化能力的不足，亟需一个统一框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出Oxy抽象将智能体、工具、LLM和推理流封装为可插拔原子组件；引入权限驱动的动态规划以执行图替代固定工作流；集成OxyBank支持自动化数据回流、标注和联合演化。
AI.result: 实证评估和真实案例表明OxyGent为MAS提供了稳健且可扩展的基础。
AI.conclusion: OxyGent通过乐高式组装、动态规划和AI资产管理三大创新，有效解决了MAS在工业部署中的关键挑战。

title: Benchmarking PyCaret AutoML Against IndoBERT Fine-Tuning for Sentiment Analysis on Indonesian IKN Twitter Data
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Presented as a benchmarking study on Indonesian sentiment analysis using PyCaret and IndoBERT
summary: This paper benchmarks a classical machine learning approach based on PyCaret AutoML against a deep learning approach based on IndoBERT fine-tuning for binary sentiment analysis of Indonesian-language Twitter comments related to Ibu Kota Nusantara (IKN). The dataset contains 1,472 manually labeled samples, consisting of 780 negative and 692 positive comments. In the machine learning setting, Logistic Regression, Naive Bayes, and Support Vector Machine were evaluated using 10-fold cross-validation, with Logistic Regression achieving the best performance among the classical models at 77.57% accuracy and 77.17% F1-score. In the deep learning setting, the indobenchmark/indobert-base-p1 model was fine-tuned for five epochs and achieved 89.59% test accuracy and 89.37% F1-score. The results show that IndoBERT substantially outperforms the machine learning baselines, highlighting the effectiveness of Transformer-based contextual representations for informal Indonesian social media text.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了基于PyCaret AutoML的经典机器学习和基于IndoBERT微调的深度学习方法，在1,472条人工标注的印尼语推特评论（关于努山塔拉首都）上进行二分类情感分析。逻辑回归在经典模型中表现最佳（准确率77.57%，F1-score 77.17%），而IndoBERT微调后显著更优（准确率89.59%，F1-score 89.37%），证明了Transformer上下文表示对非正式印尼语社交媒体文本的有效性。
AI.motivation: 探索印尼语社交媒体非正式文本（关于IKN）的情感分析任务中，经典机器学习和深度学习方法的性能差异，验证IndoBERT在低资源场景下的有效性。
AI.method: 使用PyCaret AutoML评估逻辑回归、朴素贝叶斯、SVM（10折交叉验证），并微调indobenchmark/indobert-base-p1模型5个epoch进行对比。
AI.result: 经典模型中逻辑回归最优（准确率77.57%，F1 77.17%）；IndoBERT显著领先（准确率89.59%，F1 89.37%），提升约12个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的IndoBERT在非正式印尼语社交媒体文本情感分析任务上大幅优于经典机器学习方法，适合处理低资源语言的非规范表达。

title: Rapid tracking through strongly scattering media with physics-informed neuromorphic speckle analysis
summary: This work addresses the critical problem of tracking fast-moving objects through strongly scattering media in a low-light environment. Different from existing approaches that use frame-based cameras with fixed exposure times, which trade off signal-to-noise ratio for temporal resolution, we introduce computational neuromorphic tracking (CNT), a physics-informed framework that combines asynchronous event sensing with task-driven speckle analysis for robust motion estimation. We formulate the neuromorphic speckle aggregation as a spatiotemporal speckle representation, jointly optimizing the temporal and spatial parameters to maximize tracking stability under extreme conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method enables robust motion tracking of 10x faster motion and under 10x dimmer illumination compared to conventional systems. These improvements significantly broaden the operational regime for tracking through scattering media, providing an efficient and scalable solution for demanding scenarios involving rapid motion and low-light conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合异步事件感知与物理信息驱动散斑分析的神经形态追踪框架（CNT），实现了在强散射介质和极低光照条件下对快速运动物体的鲁棒追踪，相比传统方法可追踪快10倍的运动并在暗10倍的光照下工作。
AI.motivation: 现有基于帧相机的固定曝光方法在低光环境下需要在信噪比和时间分辨率之间权衡，难以同时应对快速运动与弱散射介质中的追踪挑战。
AI.method: 提出计算神经形态追踪（CNT）框架，将异步事件传感与任务驱动散斑分析结合，构建时空散斑表征，联合优化时空参数以最大化极端条件下的追踪稳定性。
AI.result: 该方法在强散射介质和低光条件下，可追踪速度比传统系统快10倍的运动，并在暗10倍的照明条件下实现鲁棒追踪，显著扩展了操作范围。
AI.conclusion: CNT框架为散射介质中的快速运动与低光环境追踪提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案，大幅拓宽了实际应用场景的边界。

title: Null Measurability at the Symmetrization Interface in VC Learning
summary: Recent work revisiting measurability in the fundamental theorem of statistical learning imposes Borel measurability of ghost-gap suprema. We show that, at the one-sided ghost-gap interface actually used by the standard symmetrization proof, this requirement is stronger than necessary. For any Borel-parameterized concept class on a Polish domain, the bad event "there exists a hypothesis whose ghost empirical error exceeds its training empirical error by at least ε/2" is analytic. By Choquet capacitability, it is therefore measurable in the completion of every finite Borel measure. We then construct a concept class whose bad event is null-measurable but not Borel, giving a strict separation from the Borel supremum condition. Finally, we prove closure under patching, fixed and countable interpolation, and fiber-product amalgamation, showing that the weaker regularity level is stable under natural concept-class constructors. In the realizable setting, where targets belong to the class and are measurable, these results weaken the measurability hypothesis needed by the symmetrization route from finite VC dimension to PAC learnability. The main results and the descriptive-set-theoretic infrastructure used by them are formalized in Lean 4.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在统计学习基本定理中，对称化证明实际使用的单侧ghost-gap界面所需的可测性条件比Borel可测更弱，证明了坏事件是解析集（在任意有限Borel测度的完备化中可测），构造了零可测而非Borel的概念类，并证明了该弱正则性在自然概念类构造下封闭。结果在Lean 4中形式化。
AI.motivation: 重新审视统计学习基本定理中可测性要求：标准对称化证明实际使用的单侧ghost-gap界面（坏事件）所需的可测性条件是否比近期工作强调的Borel可测性更弱。
AI.method: 1. 证明坏事件（存在假设的ghost经验误差超过训练经验误差至少ε/2）是解析集，由Choquet容量定理得其在任意有限Borel测度的完备化中可测；2. 构造反例展示零可测与Borel可测的严格分离；3. 证明该弱正则性在拼接、固定与可数插值、纤维积合并下封闭；4. 在Lean 4中形式化主要结果和所用描述集合论基础设施。
AI.result: 坏事件（单侧ghost-gap）是解析集，在完备化测度下可测；存在零可测而非Borel的概念类；弱正则性在多种概念类构造下封闭。
AI.conclusion: 在可实现设定下，这些结果弱化了从有限VC维到PAC可学习性的对称化路径所需的可测性假设，证明Borel可测性要求过强。

title: The Nonverbal Syntax Framework: An Evidence-Based Tiered System for Inferring Learner States from Observable Behavioral Cues
summary: Understanding learners' cognitive and affective states underpins adaptive educational systems and effective teaching. Although research links nonverbal cues to internal states, no framework calibrates them to evidence. We present the Nonverbal Syntax Framework, drawn from a systematic review of 908 studies and 17,043 cue-state mappings (Turaev et al., 2026). The framework addresses three challenges: terminological fragmentation (behaviors described inconsistently), evidence heterogeneity (single observations to replicated findings), and state ambiguity (similar patterns indicating multiple states). Normalization consolidated 5,537 state labels into 2,010 canonical states (63.7%) and 11,521 cues into 6,434 normalized cues (44.2%) across nine behavioral channels. Dual-evidence assessment separately evaluates Component Evidence (coverage of cues and states) and Relationship Evidence (independent studies per cue-state link). 52% of "Very High" relationships rest on one paper, so separation enables calibrated rather than overconfident inference from preliminary findings. The framework's four levels comprise a Cue Vocabulary of 6,434 indicators classified as observable/instrumental; State Clusters linking 2,010 states to indicative cues; State Profiles with multimodal behavioral signatures and actionable specifications; and Discriminative Analysis distinguishing 1,215 confusable state pairs. We identify 480 actionable R1-R4 relationships (three or more independent papers), the replicated core of six decades of research, covering 35.5% of mappings across 47 key learning states and 111 distinct indicators. The remaining 91.5% (9,653 single-paper findings) form exploratory hypotheses for replication. The framework gives researchers an empirical foundation for identifying gaps, practitioners evidence-based tools for state inference, and technologists validated features for multimodal detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出非言语句法框架(Nonverbal Syntax Framework)，基于908项研究的17,043条线索-状态映射，通过标准化整合和双重证据评估，构建了包含4个层次、6,434条标准化线索、2,010个规范状态的综合框架，其中480条关系得到三项以上独立研究支持，为教育中的认知与情感状态推断提供循证基础。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽将非言语线索与内部状态关联，但缺乏将线索与证据进行校准的框架，面临术语碎片化（行为描述不一致）、证据异质性（从单次观察到重复发现）和状态模糊性（相似模式指示多种状态）三大挑战。
AI.method: 对908项研究的17,043条线索-状态映射进行系统性综述；通过标准化将5,537个状态标签归约为2,010规范状态（63.7%），11,521条线索归约为6,434标准化线索（44.2%），覆盖9个行为通道；采用双重证据评估分别评估组件证据（线索与状态的覆盖度）和关系证据（每条线索-状态链接的独立研究数量）。
AI.result: 识别出480条R1-R4关系（三项以上独立论文支持），覆盖35.5%的映射关系，涉及47个关键学习状态和111个不同指标。其余91.5%（9,653条单篇论文发现）作为待复制的探索性假设。52%的"非常高"关系仅基于一篇论文，因此分离评估可避免过度自信推断。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究者提供识别研究空白的实证基础，为实践者提供基于证据的状态推断工具，为技术开发者提供多模态检测的验证特征，推动自适应教育系统和有效教学的发展。

title: Scaling Probabilistic Transformer via Efficient Cross-Scale Hyperparameter Transfer
summary: Probabilistic Transformer (PT), a white-box probabilistic model for contextual word representation, has demonstrated substantial similarity to standard Transformers in both computational structure and downstream task performance on small models and small to medium sized datasets. However, PT is less robust to hyperparameter choices than standard Transformers, making it harder to scale efficiently. In this work, we follow Maximal Update Parametrization (muP) to rescale PT's parameters, so that hyperparameters optimized on small models can be transferred to larger models without additional tuning. With this approach, we successfully scale PT to models with up to 0.4B parameters. Experiments show that PT consistently outperforms standard transformer under the same parameter budget on Masked Language Modeling (MLM) tasks. We hope this work will contribute to the practical deployment of probabilistic models at substantially larger scales in the future.

AI.tldr: 本文通过最大更新参数化（muP）方法对概率Transformer（PT）进行重新缩放，使其能够在0.4B参数规模下高效训练，并证明在掩码语言建模任务上优于同参数量的标准Transformer。
AI.motivation: 概率Transformer（PT）虽然在结构和性能上与标准Transformer相似，但对超参数选择不够鲁棒，难以高效扩展到更大规模模型。
AI.method: 采用最大更新参数化（muP）方法重新缩放PT的参数，使得在小模型上优化好的超参数可以直接迁移到更大模型上，无需额外调参。
AI.result: 成功将PT扩展到0.4B参数规模，并在掩码语言建模（MLM）任务上，在相同参数预算下始终优于标准Transformer。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为概率模型在更大规模上的实际部署提供了可行路径。

title: Golden RPG: Confidence-Adaptive Region-Aware Noise for Compositional Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Compositional text-to-image (T2I) generation requires a model to honour multiple sub-prompts that describe distinct image regions. Recent work shows that the \emph{starting noise} of a diffusion model carries significant semantic information: ``golden'' noise predicted from text can substantially raise prompt fidelity. We observe that this noise prediction is, however, fundamentally global: the same network is asked to summarise a long, multi-region prompt with a single text embedding, which becomes the bottleneck whenever the prompt describes scenes with spatially-separated entities. We introduce \textbf{Golden RPG}, a region-aware noise predictor that extends a frozen NPNet with two trainable additions: (i) a per-region \textbf{FiLM adapter} that reshapes the predicted noise according to each sub-prompt; and (ii) a \textbf{Region Cross-Attention} layer injected between two stages of the Swin backbone, allowing different spatial locations to attend to different sub-prompt tokens. To prevent the regional conditioning from degrading samples whose prompts are already easy, we further propose a \textbf{Confidence-Adaptive Blending} head that dynamically predicts, per sample, how strongly the regional signal should override the global signal. We evaluate on the original RPG benchmark (20 prompts, 100 samples) and on four multi-region categories of T2I-CompBench (1{,}200 images, six competing methods). Golden RPG achieves the highest Cross-Region-Coherence score on every category, while matching the strongest baselines on absolute CLIP-Score and CLIP-IQA. A paired user study further shows a $\boldsymbol{\sim}$67\% preference over the strongest baseline. The adapter contains $\sim$2M trainable parameters and adds only $0.6$\,s of inference overhead on top of SDXL.

AI.tldr: Golden RPG 提出一种区域感知噪声预测器，通过 FiLM adapter 和 Region Cross-Attention 增强扩散模型，实现多子提示的精确图像合成，用 Confidence-Adaptive Blending 平衡全局与局部信息，在多个基准上取得最优区域一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型的起始噪声携带语义信息，但噪声预测本质上是全局的——单一文本嵌入难以准确表示包含多个空间分离实体的复杂提示，成为性能瓶颈。
AI.method: (1) 每区域 FiLM adapter 重塑预测噪声； (2) Swin backbone 两阶段间插入 Region Cross-Attention，让不同空间位置关注对应子提示； (3) Confidence-Adaptive Blending 动态调整区域信号与全局信号的融合权重。
AI.result: 在 RPG benchmark 和 T2I-CompBench 四个多区域类别上，Cross-Region-Coherence 得分均最高；用户偏好达 ~67%；仅 2M 可训练参数，推理开销增加 0.6 秒。
AI.conclusion: 区域感知的噪声预测能有效打破全局文本嵌入瓶颈，在几乎不增加计算负担的前提下显著提升多提示组合生成的空间一致性与语义保真度。

title: HotComment: A Benchmark for Evaluating Popularity of Online Comments
summary: Online comments play a crucial role in shaping public sentiment and opinion dynamics on social media. However, evaluating their popularity remains challenging, not only because it depends on linguistic quality, originality, and emotional resonance, but also because stylistic preferences vary widely across platforms and user groups, causing the same comment to resonate differently in different communities. In this work, we present HotComment, a multimodal benchmark integrating video and text modalities that comprehensively quantifies popularity from three enhanced aspects: (1) Content Quality, which evaluates semantic similarity with ground-truth human comments and extends quality assessment through four interpretable dimensions; (2) Popularity Prediction, based on trends from models trained on real-world interaction data; and (3) User Behavior Simulation, which models the distribution of platform users and approximates \textbf{engagement scores} through an agent-based framework. Furthermore, we propose StyleCmt, inspired by social ripple effects, where multiple stylistic dimensions align to amplify socially resonant expressions and suppress incongruent ones.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出HotComment多模态基准，从内容质量、流行度预测和用户行为模拟三个维度量化评论流行度，并基于社交涟漪效应提出StyleCmt风格对齐方法。
AI.motivation: 在线评论的流行度评估具有挑战性，因为它不仅取决于语言质量、原创性和情感共鸣，还因平台和用户群体的风格偏好差异，导致同一评论在不同社区中产生不同反响。
AI.method: 构建HotComment多模态基准（融合视频和文本），从三个方面量化流行度：(1)内容质量——评估与真实人类评论的语义相似度及四个可解释维度；(2)流行度预测——基于真实交互数据训练的模型预测趋势；(3)用户行为模拟——通过智能体框架建模平台用户分布并近似参与度分数。提出StyleCmt，基于社交涟漪效应，通过多个风格维度对齐放大社会共鸣表达并抑制不协调表达。
AI.result: 提出了HotComment基准和StyleCmt方法，具体实验效果待论文正文详述。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态基准和风格对齐方法，为在线评论流行度评估提供了更全面的量化框架。

title: Do LLMs Capture Embodied Cognition and Cultural Variation? Cross-Linguistic Evidence from Demonstratives
summary: Do large language models (LLMs) truly acquire embodied cognition and cultural conventions from text? We introduce demonstratives, fundamental spatial expressions like "this/that" in English and "zhè/nà" in Chinese, as a novel probe for grounded knowledge. Using 6,400 responses from 320 native speakers, we establish a human baseline: English speakers reliably distinguish proximal-distal referents but struggle with perspective-taking, while Chinese speakers switch perspectives fluently but tolerate distal ambiguity. In contrast, five state-of-the-art LLMs fail to inherently understand the proximal-distal contrast and show no cultural differences, defaulting to English-centric reasoning. Our study contributes (i) a new task, based on demonstratives, as a new lens for evaluating embodied cognition and cultural conventions; (ii) empirical evidence of cross-cultural asymmetries in human interpretation; (iii) a new perspective on the egocentric-sociocentric debate, showing both orientations coexist but vary across languages; and (iv) a call to address individual variation in future model design.

AI.tldr: 本文通过"这/那"等指示词探究大语言模型是否真正具备具身认知和文化约定，发现人类存在跨文化差异（英语区分远近但视角转换困难，中文灵活切换但容忍歧义），而五个SOTA模型均无法理解远近对立且缺乏文化差异，表现出英语中心推理。
AI.motivation: 检验LLM是否真正具备具身认知和文化约定，而非仅表面模仿语言模式。
AI.method: 以指示词（this/that, zhè/nà）为探针，收集320名母语者6400条人类基线数据，对比五个SOTA LLM的表现。
AI.result: 人类基线显示英语/中文母语者在远近区分和视角转换上存在显著跨文化不对称；LLM无法理解远近对立，缺乏文化差异，默认英语中心推理。
AI.conclusion: 指示词可作为评估具身认知的新任务；揭示了跨文化解释不对称性；为自我中心-社会中心之争提供新视角；呼吁未来模型设计关注个体差异。

title: SaliencyDecor: Enhancing Neural Network Interpretability through Feature Decorrelation
comment: Accepted for publication at the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Gradient-based saliency methods are widely used to interpret deep neural networks, yet they often produce noisy and unstable explanations that poorly align with semantically meaningful input features. We argue that a fundamental cause of this behavior lies in the geometry of learned representations: correlated feature dimensions diffuse attribution gradients across redundant directions, resulting in blurred and unreliable saliency maps. To address this issue, we identify feature correlation as a structural limitation of gradient-based interpretability and propose SaliencyDecor, a training framework that enforces feature decorrelation to improve attribution fidelity without modifying saliency methods or model architectures by reshaping the feature space toward orthogonality, our approach promotes more concentrated gradient flow and improves the fidelity of saliency-based explanations. SaliencyDecor jointly optimizes classification, prediction consistency under feature masking, and a decorrelation regularizer, requiring no architectural changes or inference-time overhead. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and architectures demonstrate that our method produces substantially sharper and more object-focused saliency maps while simultaneously improving predictive performance, achieving accuracy gains across the datasets. These results establish our method as a principled mechanism for enhancing both interpretability and accuracy, challenging the conventional trade-off between explanation quality and model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SaliencyDecor，通过特征去相关训练框架改善梯度类显著性图的模糊和不稳定问题，在不修改模型架构或显著性方法的前提下，同时提升可解释性和预测性能。
AI.motivation: 梯度显著性方法常产生噪声大、不稳定的解释，原因是学习表征中相关特征维度会扩散梯度归因，导致模糊不可靠的显著性图。
AI.method: 提出SaliencyDecor训练框架，联合优化分类损失、特征掩蔽下预测一致性损失和去相关正则化项，通过重塑特征空间趋向正交性来促进梯度集中流动。
AI.result: 在多个基准和架构上，该方法产生了更清晰、更聚焦于目标的显著性图，同时提升了预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 特征去相关是一种增强可解释性与精度的通用机制，挑战了解释质量与模型性能之间传统此消彼长的关系。

title: Feasible-First Exploration for Constrained ML Deployment Optimization in Crash-Prone Hierarchical Search Spaces
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, 10 tables. Code available at https://github.com/Chrislysen/Constrained-ML-Deployment
summary: Deploying machine learning models under production constraints requires joint optimization over model family, quantization scheme, runtime backend, and serving configuration. This induces a hierarchical mixed-variable search space in which many configurations are invalid: evaluations may crash, exceed memory limits, or violate latency constraints. Standard black-box optimizers such as Tree-structured Parzen Estimators (TPE) and constrained Bayesian optimization are effective when valid configurations are common, but they can spend a large fraction of a small evaluation budget on invalid or uninformative trials in hostile deployment spaces. This paper studies that regime and asks whether optimization should be decomposed into an explicit exploration stage followed by model-guided exploitation. We propose Thermal Budget Annealing (TBA), a feasible-first exploration procedure that maps valid and feasible regions before warm-starting TPE. The method includes two robustness mechanisms for hostile hardware: trial timeouts that abort clearly infeasible evaluations early, and subspace blacklisting that temporarily suppresses categorical subspaces after repeated failures. We also introduce DeployBench, a benchmark suite for deployment optimization with hierarchical structure, hidden crash zones, hard constraints, and unequal evaluation costs. On synthetic benchmarks and real GPU deployment with five pre-trained vision models across five GPU targets (NVIDIA H100, A100, RTX 5080, L4, and T4), the proposed hybrid improves model-family discovery under tight constraints while reducing wasted budget relative to cold-start TPE.

AI.tldr: 针对机器学习模型部署中的层次化混合变量搜索空间优化问题，提出Thermal Budget Annealing (TBA)方法，通过先探索可行区域再热启动TPE的方式，在预算有限且配置常无效的恶劣部署场景下提升优化效率，并引入DeployBench基准套件。
AI.motivation: 生产环境部署ML模型需联合优化模型族、量化方案、运行时后端和服务配置等多个异构变量，形成层次化搜索空间，其中大量配置无效（崩溃、超内存、违反延迟约束）。标准黑箱优化器在有效配置常见时表现良好，但在恶劣空间中，有限评估预算会被大量无效试验浪费。
AI.method: 提出Thermal Budget Annealing (TBA)，分两阶段：先通过可行优先探索（feasible-first exploration）映射有效可行区域，再用该结果热启动TPE。包含两种鲁棒机制：试验超时（提前中止明显不可行的评估）和子空间黑名单（连续失败后临时抑制特定的类别子空间）。同时构建DeployBench基准套件，包含层次结构、隐藏崩溃区、硬约束和不等评估成本。
AI.result: 在合成基准和真实GPU部署（5个预训练视觉模型 × 5种GPU目标：H100, A100, RTX 5080, L4, T4）上，所提混合方法在严格预算限制下提升了模型族发现效果，并相比冷启动TPE减少了预算浪费。
AI.conclusion: 将优化分解为显式探索阶段和模型引导利用阶段，结合超时和子空间黑名单机制，能有效应对恶劣部署空间中的无效配置问题，在有限预算下获得更优结果。

title: Think Before You Act -- A Neurocognitive Governance Model for Autonomous AI Agents
summary: The rapid deployment of autonomous AI agents across enterprise, healthcare, and safety-critical environments has created a fundamental governance gap. Existing approaches, runtime guardrails, training-time alignment, and post-hoc auditing treat governance as an external constraint rather than an internalized behavioral principle, leaving agents vulnerable to unsafe and irreversible actions. We address this gap by drawing on how humans self-govern naturally: before acting, humans engage deliberate cognitive processes grounded in executive function, inhibitory control, and internalized organizational rules to evaluate whether an intended action is permissible, requires modification, or demands escalation. This paper proposes a neurocognitive governance framework that formally maps this human self-governance process to LLM-driven agent reasoning, establishing a structural parallel between the human brain and the large language model as the cognitive core of an agent. We formalize a Pre-Action Governance Reasoning Loop (PAGRL) in which agents consult a four-layer governance rule set: global, workflow-specific, agent-specific, and situational before every consequential action, mirroring how human organizations structure compliance hierarchies across enterprise, department, and role levels. Implemented on a production-grade retail supply chain workflow, the framework achieves 95% compliance accuracy and zero false escalations to human oversight, demonstrating that embedding governance into agent reasoning produces more consistent, explainable, and auditable compliance than external enforcement. This work offers a principled foundation for autonomous AI agents that govern themselves the way humans do: not because rules are imposed upon them, but because deliberation is embedded in how they think.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经认知治理框架（PAGRL），通过将人类自我治理的认知过程形式化地映射到LLM驱动的智能体推理中，使AI智能体在执行行动前进行内化的治理推理。在零售供应链工作流中，该框架实现了95%的合规准确率和零误报升级，证明将治理嵌入智能体推理比外部约束更有效。
AI.motivation: 现有AI治理方法（运行时护栏、训练时对齐、事后审计）将治理视为外部约束而非内化的行为原则，导致智能体容易执行不安全且不可逆的行动。作者希望借鉴人类自我治理的自然机制来解决这一治理鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出Pre-Action Governance Reasoning Loop (PAGRL)框架，包含四层治理规则集（全局、工作流特定、智能体特定、情境特定），在每次重要行动前引导智能体进行治理推理，模仿人类组织在企业、部门和角色层面的合规层级结构，并将人类前额叶的执行功能、抑制控制等认知过程与LLM的推理过程建立结构对应。
AI.result: 在生产级零售供应链工作流中测试，达到95%的合规准确率，零误报升级到人工监督。
AI.conclusion: 将治理嵌入智能体推理内部，比外部强制约束能产生更一致、可解释、可审计的合规行为。为自主AI智能体提供了一种原则性基础，使其像人类一样自我治理——规则不是外部强加的，而是内化在思考过程之中的。

title: One Refiner to Unlock Them All: Inference-Time Reasoning Elicitation via Reinforcement Query Refinement
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often fail to utilize their latent reasoning capabilities due to a distributional mismatch between ambiguous human inquiries and the structured logic required for machine activation. Existing alignment methods either incur prohibitive $O(N)$ costs by fine-tuning each model individually or rely on static prompts that fail to resolve query-level structural complexity. In this paper, we propose ReQueR (\textbf{Re}inforcement \textbf{Que}ry \textbf{R}efinement), a modular framework that treats reasoning elicitation as an inference-time alignment task. We train a specialized Refiner policy via Reinforcement Learning to rewrite raw queries into explicit logical decompositions, treating frozen LLMs as the environment. Rooted in the classical Zone of Proximal Development from educational psychology, we introduce the Adaptive Solver Hierarchy, a curriculum mechanism that stabilizes training by dynamically aligning environmental difficulty with the Refiner's evolving competence. ReQueR yields consistent absolute gains of 1.7\%--7.2\% across diverse architectures and benchmarks, outperforming strong baselines by 2.1\% on average. Crucially, it provides a promising paradigm for one-to-many inference-time reasoning elicitation, enabling a single Refiner trained on a small set of models to effectively unlock reasoning in diverse unseen models. Code is available at https://github.com/newera-xiao/ReQueR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReQueR框架，通过强化学习训练一个Refiner策略，在推理阶段将模糊的用户查询重写为清晰的逻辑分解，从而解锁冻结LLM的潜在推理能力。该框架引入基于"最近发展区"理论的适应性求解器层级（Adaptive Solver Hierarchy）作为课程机制来稳定训练。在多个架构和基准上取得1.7%-7.2%的绝对提升，比强基线平均高出2.1%，并支持一个Refiner泛化到未见过的模型。
AI.motivation: LLM常因人类模糊提问与机器所需结构化逻辑之间的分布不匹配而无法发挥潜在推理能力。现有方法要么对每个模型单独微调（$O(N)$成本过高），要么依赖静态提示词，无法解决查询级别的结构复杂性。
AI.method: 采用模块化框架ReQueR：1）通过强化学习训练一个专用的Refiner策略，将原始查询重写为显式逻辑分解；2）将冻结的LLM作为环境；3）引入Adaptive Solver Hierarchy（基于教育心理学中的"最近发展区"理论），作为课程机制动态调整环境难度以匹配Refiner的能力发展。
AI.result: 在多种架构和基准上取得1.7%-7.2%的绝对提升，平均超越强基线2.1%。关键发现：一个在少量模型上训练的Refiner能有效解锁未见过的不同模型的推理能力（一对多泛化）。
AI.conclusion: ReQueR提供了一种有前景的推理时推理激发范式，以模块化、可泛化的方式解决了LLM推理能力利用问题，避免了昂贵的逐模型微调。

title: Towards Robust Deep Learning-based Rumex Obtusifolius Detection from Drone Images
summary: Domain adaptation (DA) addresses the challenge of transferring a machine learning model trained on a source domain to a target domain with a different data distribution. In this work, we study DA for the task of Rumex obtusifolius (Rumex) image classification. We train models on a published, ground vehicle-based dataset (source) and evaluate their performance on a custom target dataset acquired by unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). We find that Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models, specifically ResNets, generalize poorly to the target domain, even after fine-tuning on the source data. Applying moment-matching and maximum classifier discrepancy, two established DA techniques, substantially improves target-domain performance. However, Vision Transformer (ViT) models pretrained with self-supervised objectives (DINOv2, DINOv3) handle domain shifts intrinsically well, surpassing even moment-matching-trained ResNets, likely due to the rich, general-purpose representations acquired during large-scale pretraining. Using ViTs fine-tuned on the source dataset, we demonstrate high classification performances in the range of F1=0.8 on our target dataset. To support further research on DA for weed detection in grassland systems, we publicly release our UAV-based target dataset AGSMultiRumex, comprising data from 15 flights over Swiss meadows.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Rumex杂草图像分类中的域适应问题，发现ResNet在源域（地面车辆）到目标域（无人机）泛化差，而自监督预训练的Vision Transformer（DINOv2/v3）天然适应域迁移，F1达0.8，并发布了无人机数据集AGSMultiRumex。
AI.motivation: 解决基于地面车辆数据训练的Rumex杂草分类模型在无人机获取的目标域数据上性能下降的问题，探索有效的域适应方法。
AI.method: 对比ResNet（结合moment-matching和最大分类器差异两种DA技术）与自监督预训练ViT（DINOv2/v3）在源域（地面车辆数据集）训练后、目标域（无人机数据集）上的表现。
AI.result: ResNet直接迁移泛化差，DA技术可提升但不如ViT；自监督预训练ViT（DINOv2/v3）无需专门DA即表现出色，在目标域上F1达到0.8。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练的Vision Transformer能天然应对域迁移问题，优于传统CNN加域适应方法，并公开了无人机杂草数据集以推动后续研究。

title: Zero Shot Coordination for Sparse Reward Tasks with Diverse Reward Shapings
summary: Many Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) agents fail to adapt properly to cooperating with agents trained with the same objectives but different seeds, algorithms, or other training differences. This is the problem of Zero-Shot Coordination (ZSC), which focuses on training agents to cooperate well with unknown agents. ZSC has been studied for a variety of tabular cases and simple games such as Hanabi, achieving excellent results. However, existing solutions to ZSC only consider identical rewards for your trained agents and all future partners. This is not realistic for the trained agents, as they do not consider the problem of cooperating with agents that have identical sparse objectives but shape the rewards for those objectives in different manner. To address this issue, we show how to train an ensemble of methods using randomized reward shapings chosen using 4 selection algorithms. Experiments done on the Overcooked environment demonstrate consistent improvements of 62.2%-119.2% in sparse reward over baseline ZSC algorithms when playing with agents that have identical sparse rewards but different reward shapings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过随机奖励塑形集成训练的方法，解决了MARL中零样本协调（ZSC）问题在奖励塑形不一致情况下的局限，在Overcooked环境中相比基线方法提升了62.2%-119.2%的稀疏奖励性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ZSC方法假设训练代理与未来合作者共享完全相同的奖励函数，忽略了实际场景中代理虽具有相同的稀疏目标，但可能会以不同方式对奖励进行塑形（reward shaping）的问题。
AI.method: 使用4种选择算法随机生成的奖励塑形来训练集成方法（ensemble），使代理能够适应不同的奖励塑形策略。
AI.result: 在Overcooked环境中的实验表明，该方法在与具有相同稀疏奖励但不同奖励塑形的代理合作时，稀疏奖励相比基线ZSC算法提升62.2%-119.2%。
AI.conclusion: 通过随机奖励塑形集成训练，能够有效提升代理在零样本协调场景下与不同奖励塑形策略的代理合作的能力。

title: RADD: Retrieval-Augmented Discrete Diffusion for Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph Completion
summary: Most multi-modal knowledge graph completion (MMKGC) models use one embedding scorer to do both retrieval over the full entity set and final decision making. We argue that this coupling is a core bottleneck: global high-recall search and local fine-grained disambiguation require different inductive biases. Therefore, we propose a Retrieval-Augmented Discrete Diffusion (RADD) framework to decouple retrieve and reranking for MMKGC. A relation-aware multimodal KGE retriever serves as both global retriever and distillation teacher, while a conditional discrete denoiser performs shortlist-level entity-identity generation for reranking. Training combines KGE supervision, denoising cross-entropy, and temperature-scaled distillation from the retriever to the denoiser. At inference, the designed Diff-Rerank first forms a top-$K$ shortlist with the retriever and then reranks it with the denoiser, ensuring that recall is a strict prerequisite for precision. Experiments on three MMKGC benchmarks show that RADD achieves the best performance and consistent gains over strong unimodal, multimodal, and LLM-based baselines, while ablations further verify the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: 提出RADD框架，将多模态知识图谱补全中的检索与重排序解耦，通过关系感知多模态KGE检索器进行全局检索，结合条件离散去噪器进行重排序，在三个基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MMKGC模型将全局检索与最终决策耦合在同一嵌入评分器中，但两者需要不同的归纳偏置，成为性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出RADD框架：1) 关系感知多模态KGE检索器作为全局检索器和蒸馏教师；2) 条件离散去噪器对候选列表进行实体身份生成式重排序；3) 结合KGE监督、去噪交叉熵和温度缩放蒸馏训练；4) 推理时Diff-Rerank先检索Top-K候选再重排序。
AI.result: 在三个MMKGC基准上取得最佳性能，一致优于强单模态、多模态和基于LLM的基线方法，消融实验验证了各组件贡献。
AI.conclusion: 将检索与重排序解耦的范式有效提升了多模态知识图谱补全性能，召回率是精度的先决条件这一设计原则得到验证。

title: Navigating Global AI Regulation: A Multi-Jurisdictional Retrieval-Augmented Generation System
comment: Preprint. Accepted at PoliticalNLP Workshop, LREC 2026. 10 pages, 1 figure
summary: Navigating AI regulation across jurisdictions is increasingly difficult for policymakers, legal professionals, and researchers. To address this, we present a multi-jurisdictional Retrieval-Augmented Generation system for global AI regulation. Our corpus includes 242 documents across 68 jurisdictions, ranging from formal legislation like the EU AI Act to unstructured policy documents such as national AI strategies. The system makes three technical contributions: type-specific chunking that preserve legal structure across heterogenous documents; conditional retrieval routing with entity detection and metadata for legal citations; and priority-based re-ranking to boost enacted legislation over policy and secondary sources. Evaluation of 50 queries reveals strong performance across both single-entity and multi-jurisdictional questions, achieving 0.87 average faithfulness and 0.84 average answer relevancy. Single-entity queries achieve 0.86 average faithfulness and 0.92 average answer relevancy, while multi-jurisdictional comparison queries achieve 0.88 average faithfulness and 0.75 average answer relevancy. These findings highlight the effectiveness of domain-specific retrieval strategies for navigating complex, heterogenous regulatory corpora.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个跨司法管辖区的检索增强生成（RAG）系统，用于导航全球AI法规。系统包含68个司法管辖区的242份文件，通过类型特定分块、条件检索路由和基于优先级的重排序三项技术，在50个查询中实现了0.87的平均忠实度和0.84的平均答案相关性。
AI.motivation: 跨司法管辖区的AI法规日益复杂，政策制定者、法律专业人士和研究人员难以有效导航和比较不同地区的监管要求。
AI.method: 构建包含242份文档（68个司法管辖区）的多司法管辖区RAG系统，提出三项技术：类型特定分块（保留异构文档的法律结构）、条件检索路由（结合实体检测和元数据用于法律引用）、基于优先级的重排序（优先呈现已颁布立法）。
AI.result: 50个查询评估：平均忠实度0.87，平均答案相关性0.84。单实体查询忠实度0.86、相关性0.92；多司法管辖区比较查询忠实度0.88、相关性0.75。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定的检索策略对于导航复杂、异构的监管语料库是有效的。

title: Edge-Cloud Collaborative Reconstruction via Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion for Downstream Remote Sensing Perception
summary: The exponential surge in high-resolution remote sensing data faces a severe bottleneck in satellite-to-ground transmission. Limited downlink bandwidth forces the use of extreme high-ratio compression, which irreversibly destroys high-frequency structural details essential for downstream machine perception tasks like object detection. While current super-resolution techniques attempt to recover these details, regression-based methods often yield over-smoothed textures, and generative diffusion models frequently introduce structural hallucinations that mislead detection systems. To address this trade-off, we propose the Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion (SALD) framework, an asymmetric edge-cloud collaborative SR system. At the resource-constrained edge, the system decouples imagery into a highly compressed low-frequency payload and a lightweight soft structural prior. Transmitting this decoupled representation minimizes bandwidth consumption. On the powerful cloud side, we introduce a Structure-Gated Large Kernel (SGLK) module and a Semantic-Guidance Engine (SGE) within the diffusion backbone. These modules leverage the transmitted structural priors to gate large-kernel convolutions, effectively capturing long-range dependencies inherent in aerial scenes while actively suppressing generative hallucinations. Extensive experiments on both the MSCM and UCMerced datasets demonstrate that, even under extreme bandwidth constraints, SALD achieves superior perceptual quality (LPIPS) and significantly enhances downstream performance in both scene classification and small-target detection.

AI.tldr: 针对高分辨率遥感数据星地传输带宽瓶颈，提出SALD框架——一种非对称边缘-云协同超分系统。边缘端将图像解耦为低频率载荷和轻量结构先验以降低传输量，云端通过结构门控大核卷积模块和语义引导引擎，在扩散模型中恢复高频细节并抑制生成幻觉。实验表明，在极端带宽限制下，SALD在感知质量和下游分类/检测任务上均显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有高分辨率遥感数据面临卫星到地面传输带宽严重不足的问题，高倍率压缩不可逆地破坏了高频结构细节，导致下游检测等机器感知任务性能下降。现有超分方法存在过平滑或生成幻觉的问题，无法在压缩率和恢复质量之间取得良好平衡。
AI.method: 提出非对称边缘-云协同超分框架SALD。边缘端将图像解耦为高度压缩的低频载荷和轻量软结构先验，最小化传输带宽。云端引入结构门控大核卷积模块(SGLK)和语义引导引擎(SGE)，在扩散模型骨干中利用结构先验控制大核卷积的门控，捕获遥感场景的长距离依赖并抑制生成幻觉。
AI.result: 在MSCM和UCMerced数据集上，SALD在极端带宽约束下实现了更优的感知质量(LPIPS)，并显著提升了场景分类和小目标检测的下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: SALD通过边缘-云协同的架构设计，有效解决了高压缩率下遥感图像传输与恢复的难题，在带宽限制下同时保证了图像感知质量和下游任务的可用性，为星地遥感数据链路提供了一种可行的解决方案。

title: Knowledge Distillation Must Account for What It Loses
summary: This position paper argues that knowledge distillation must account for what it loses: student models should be judged not only by retained task scores, but by whether they preserve the teacher capabilities that make those scores reliable. This matters because distillation is increasingly used to turn large, often frontier models into deployable systems, yet headline metrics can hide losses in uncertainty, boundary behavior, process reliability, on-policy stability, grounding, privacy, safety, and diversity. We identify the retention assumption behind current evaluation and reframe distillation as a lossy projection of teacher behavior rather than a faithful copy. We then synthesize existing evidence into a taxonomy of off-metric distillation losses, showing that these losses are concrete, recurring, and measurable. To make the position actionable, we propose scenario-specific preservation targets and a Distillation Loss Statement that reports what was preserved, what was lost, and why the remaining losses are acceptable. The goal is not lossless distillation, but accountable distillation.

AI.tldr: 本文主张知识蒸馏必须评估模型丢失了什么能力，而不仅是保留了多少任务分数。蒸馏是教师行为的有损投影，而非忠实复制。作者提出蒸馏损失分类法，并建议通过"蒸馏损失声明"报告保留、丢失及可接受的理由，实现"可问责的蒸馏"而非无损失的蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 当前知识蒸馏评估仅关注保留的任务评分（如准确率），但忽略了蒸馏过程中可能丢失的关键教师能力（如不确定性校准、边界行为、过程可靠性、安全性等）。随着蒸馏被广泛用于将大型前沿模型转化为可部署系统，隐藏的损失可能导致下游风险。作者认为评估范式需要改变。
AI.method: 1）揭示当前评估背后的"保留假设"（retention assumption）；2）将蒸馏重新定义为教师行为的有损投影（lossy projection）；3）综合现有证据，提出指标外蒸馏损失分类法（taxonomy of off-metric distillation losses）；4）提出场景特化的保留目标（scenario-specific preservation targets）和"蒸馏损失声明"（Distillation Loss Statement）作为评估框架。
AI.result: 识别出八类指标外损失：不确定性（uncertainty）、边界行为（boundary behavior）、过程可靠性（process reliability）、策略稳定性（on-policy stability）、接地性（grounding）、隐私（privacy）、安全性（safety）和多样性（diversity）。这些损失是具体、可重复出现且可测量的。
AI.conclusion: 蒸馏的评估应从"任务分数越高越好"转向"承认并报告损失，并论证损失可接受"。目标不是追求无损失蒸馏，而是实现可问责蒸馏（accountable distillation）。

title: Scalable Inference Architectures for Compound AI Systems: A Production Deployment Study
comment: Accepted to the ACM Conference on AI and Agentic Systems (ACM CAIS 2026)
summary: Modern enterprise AI applications increasingly rely on compound AI systems - architectures that compose multiple models, retrievers, and tools to accomplish complex tasks. Deploying such systems in production demands inference infrastructure that can efficiently serve concurrent, heterogeneous model invocations while maintaining cost-effectiveness and low latency. This paper presents a production deployment study of a modular, platform-agnostic inference architecture developed at Salesforce to support compound AI use cases including Agentforce (autonomous AI agents) and ApexGuru (AI-powered code analysis). The system integrates serverless execution, dynamic autoscaling, and MLOps pipelines to deliver consistent low-latency inference across multi-component agent workflows. We report production results demonstrating over 50% reduction in tail latency (P95), up to 3.9x throughput improvement, and 30 to 40% cost savings compared to prior static deployments. We further present a novel analysis of compound-system-specific challenges including multi-model fan-out overhead, cascading cold-start propagation, and heterogeneous scaling dynamics that emerge uniquely when serving agentic workloads. Through detailed case studies and operational lessons, we illustrate how the architecture enables compound AI systems to scale model invocations in parallel, handle bursty multi-agent workloads, and support rapid model iteration - capabilities essential for operationalizing agentic AI at enterprise scale.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Salesforce为支撑复合AI系统（如Agentforce和ApexGuru）而构建的模块化、平台无关的推理架构，该架构集成了无服务器执行、动态自动扩缩和MLOps流水线，在生产环境中实现了P95尾延迟降低50%以上、吞吐量提升最高3.9倍以及30-40%的成本节约。
AI.motivation: 现代企业AI应用日益依赖复合AI系统（多个模型、检索器和工具的组合），但传统静态部署方案难以高效服务于并发、异构的模型调用，存在延迟高、成本高、扩展性差等问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种模块化、平台无关的推理架构，核心包括：(1) 无服务器执行架构支持弹性扩缩；(2) 动态自动扩缩应对突发工作负载；(3) MLOps流水线实现快速模型迭代。系统专门设计了应对多模型扇出开销、级联冷启动传播和异构扩缩动态等复合系统特有挑战的机制。
AI.result: 生产环境结果表明：P95尾延迟降低50%以上，吞吐量提升最高3.9倍，成本节约30-40%。同时有效处理了多模型扇出、冷启动传播、异构扩缩等复合AI系统的特有挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过无服务器化与动态扩缩策略，显著提升了复合AI系统在企业级生产环境中的性能与成本效率，为大规模智能化Agent工作负载的落地提供了实践经验与设计指导。

title: Benchmarking Logistic Regression, SVM, and LightGBM Against BiLSTM with Attention for Sentiment Analysis on Indonesian Product Reviews
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures. Benchmarking study comparing PyCaret-based machine learning models (Logistic Regression, SVM, LightGBM) with a BiLSTM+Attention model for sentiment analysis on Indonesian product reviews
summary: Sentiment analysis of product reviews on e-commerce platforms plays a critical role in automatically understanding customer satisfaction and providing actionable insights for sellers seeking to improve product quality. This paper presents a comprehensive benchmarking study comparing a Machine Learning (ML) approach via the PyCaret AutoML framework against a Deep Learning (DL) approach based on a Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) architecture with an Attention mechanism for binary sentiment classification on Indonesian product reviews. The dataset comprises 19,728 samples balanced equally between positive and negative reviews. For the ML approach, three prominent algorithms were evaluated via 10-fold stratified cross-validation: Logistic Regression (LR), Support Vector Machine (SVM) with a linear kernel, and Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LightGBM). Logistic Regression achieved the best ML performance with an accuracy of 97.26\% and an F1-score of 97.26\%. The BiLSTM with Attention model, evaluated on 3,946 held-out test samples, achieved an accuracy of 97.24\% and an F1-score of 97.24\%. These comparative results demonstrate that traditional ML algorithms with proper preprocessing and feature extraction can compete closely with, and even marginally outperform, more complex sequential DL architectures on high-dimensional datasets, while simultaneously offering greater computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了PyCaret AutoML框架（机器学习方法）与基于注意力机制的BiLSTM（深度学习方法）在印尼产品评论情感二分类上的表现。数据集包含19,728条平衡样本。ML方法中逻辑回归表现最佳（准确率97.26%，F1分数97.26%），BiLSTM+Attention模型在3,946条测试集上准确率97.24%。结果表明传统ML方法在计算效率更优的情况下可与复杂深度学习模型竞争甚至略优。
AI.motivation: 电子商务平台产品评论的情感分析对理解客户满意度和为卖家提供改进建议至关重要。现有方法涉及机器学习和深度学习，但缺乏在印尼语产品评论上的系统对比基准研究。
AI.method: 使用PyCaret AutoML框架评估三种ML算法（逻辑回归、SVM线性核、LightGBM），通过10折分层交叉验证；同时构建基于注意力机制的BiLSTM深度学习模型，在19,728条平衡的印尼语产品评论数据集上进行二分类情感分析对比。
AI.result: 逻辑回归在ML方法中表现最佳，准确率和F1分数均达97.26%；BiLSTM+Attention模型在测试集上准确率和F1分数均为97.24%。传统ML方法略优于深度学习模型，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 在高维数据集上，经过恰当预处理和特征提取的传统机器学习算法可以接近甚至略微超越复杂的序列深度学习架构，同时具有更好的计算效率。这为选择情感分析模型提供了重要参考依据。

title: Assessment of the quantitative impact of occlusal positioning splints on temporomandibular joint conditions
summary: A computational method for quantitative analysis of temporomandibular joint (TMJ) configuration using occlusal positioning splints is proposed and demonstrated. The method models a positioning splint as a physical realization of a predefined rigid transformation of the mandible, derived from multimodal data, including CBCT, facial motion acquisition, and dental scans integrated within a common coordinate system. Splints corresponding to selected mandibular positions are designed and fabricated, and their positioning accuracy is evaluated using repeated scans of plaster models. Discrepancies are represented as error transformations and analyzed statistically in the space of rigid motions. The estimated transformations are propagated to segmented TMJ structures, enabling simulation-based evaluation of joint space changes. Transformation-based error analysis and surface distance metrics are used to quantify differences between planned and achieved configurations. The method enables indirect assessment of TMJ configuration using a single anatomical model and transformation data, reducing the need for repeated imaging across multiple mandibular positions. This study is intended as a methodological demonstration, supported by a clear step-by-step graphical presentation, and does not aim to provide clinical validation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用咬合定位牙合板定量分析颞下颌关节（TMJ）构型的计算方法。该方法将定位牙合板建模为下颌预定刚性变换的物理实现，融合CBCT、面部运动采集和牙科扫描等多模态数据，设计并制造对应下颌位置的牙合板，通过石膏模型重复扫描评估定位精度，利用刚性运动空间中的误差变换进行统计分析，并传播至分割的TMJ结构以模拟评估关节间隙变化。该方法可基于单一解剖模型和变换数据间接评估TMJ构型，减少多次影像检查需求，属于方法学演示，尚未进行临床验证。
AI.motivation: 减少对多次影像检查的依赖，通过单一解剖模型和变换数据间接评估不同下颌位姿下的TMJ构型变化。
AI.method: 融合CBCT、面部运动采集和牙科扫描等多模态数据，将定位牙合板建模为下颌刚性变换的物理实现，设计制造对应牙合板，通过石膏模型重复扫描评估定位精度，在刚性运动空间中进行误差变换统计分析，并将变换传播至分割的TMJ结构以模拟关节间隙变化。
AI.result: 定位牙合板的定位精度通过重复扫描石膏模型进行评估，误差以变换形式表示并统计分析；传播至TMJ结构后实现了关节间隙变化的模拟评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了基于单一解剖模型和变换数据间接评估TMJ构型，减少重复影像需求，但目前仅为方法学演示，尚需临床验证。

title: Evaluation without Generation: Non-Generative Assessment of Harmful Model Specialization with Applications to CSAM
summary: Auditing the fine-tunes of open-weight generative models for harmful specialization has become a new governance challenge for model hosting platforms. The standard toolkit, generative evaluation via curated prompts or red-teaming, does not scale to platform-level auditing and breaks down entirely for domains like CSAM where generation is legally constrained. This motivates the Evaluation without Generation problem: assessing model capabilities without producing outputs. We argue that in such settings, capability must be inferred from the model's state, either its parameters or internal representations, rather than its outputs. We introduce Gaussian probing, a method that characterizes how LoRA adaptors perturb a model's internal representations by measuring responses to Gaussian latent ensembles. Unlike raw-weight baselines, Gaussian probing reliably distinguishes benign from harmful specialization without sampling outputs. We demonstrate effectiveness in high-risk domains, including detecting models specialized for child sexual abuse material (CSAM), where output-based evaluation is legally and ethically constrained. Our results show that Gaussian probing provides a scalable non-generative alternative for evaluating high-risk generative systems and remains robust to weight rescaling, a representative adversarial manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出高斯探测方法，通过分析模型内部表征而非输出，实现对LoRA微调模型有害特化的检测，尤其在CSAM等高危领域无需生成内容即可评估。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成输出的红队评测方法无法扩展到平台级审计，且在CSAM等法律受限领域完全失效，亟需一种不依赖模型输出的能力评估方法。
AI.method: 提出高斯探测（Gaussian probing），通过测量模型对高斯潜变量集成的响应来表征LoRA适配器对内部表征的扰动，从而区分良性微调与有害特化。
AI.result: 在CSAM等高危领域，高斯探测无需采样输出即可可靠区分有害与良性微调，且对权重缩放攻击具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 高斯探测为高危生成式系统的评估提供了一种可扩展的非生成式替代方案，解决了平台级审计中输出受限的核心难题。

title: Toward Scalable Terminal Task Synthesis via Skill Graphs
summary: Terminal agents have demonstrated strong potential for autonomous command-line execution, yet their training remains constrained by the scarcity of high-quality and diverse execution trajectories. Existing approaches mitigate this bottleneck by synthesizing large-scale terminal task instances for trajectory sampling. However, they primarily focus on scaling the number of tasks while providing limited control over the diversity of execution trajectories that agents actually experience during training. In this paper, we present SkillSynth, an automated framework for terminal task synthesis built on a scenario-mediated skill graph. SkillSynth first constructs a large-scale skill graph, where scenarios serve as intermediate transition nodes that connect diverse command-line skills. It then samples paths from this graph as abstractions of real-world workflows, and uses a multi-agent harness to instantiate them into executable task instances. By grounding task synthesis in graph-sampled workflow paths, SkillSynth explicitly controls the diversity of minimal execution trajectories required to solve the synthesized tasks. Experiments on Terminal-Bench demonstrate the effectiveness of SkillSynth. Moreover, task instances synthesized by SkillSynth have been adopted to train Hy3 Preview, contributing to its enhanced agentic capabilities in terminal-based settings.

AI.tldr: 提出SkillSynth框架，通过情景中介技能图自动合成终端任务，控制执行轨迹多样性，提升智能体训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有终端任务合成方法主要关注任务数量扩展，但对智能体训练中执行轨迹多样性的控制有限，导致高质量多样化轨迹稀缺。
AI.method: 构建大规模情景中介技能图，从图中采样路径作为工作流抽象，利用多智能体框架实例化为可执行任务。
AI.result: 在Terminal-Bench上验证有效性，合成任务用于训练Hy3 Preview模型，提升了其终端智能体能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过技能图路径采样可显式控制执行轨迹多样性，是一种有效的终端任务合成方法。

title: An Investigation of Linguistic Biases in LLM-Based Recommendations
summary: We investigate linguistic biases in LLM-based restaurant and product recommendations given prompts varying across Southern American English (AE), Indian English (IE), and Code-Switched Hindi-English dialects, using the Yelp Open dataset (Yelp Inc., 2023) and Walmart product reviews dataset (PromptCloud,2020). We add lists of restaurant and product names balanced by cuisine type and product category to the prompts given to the LLM, and we zero-shot prompt the LLMs in a cold-start setting to select the top-20 restaurant and product recommendations from these lists for each of the dialect-varied prompts. We prompt LLMs using different list samples across 20 seeds for better generalization, and aggregate per cuisine-type and per category response counts for each seed, question/prompt, and LLM model. We run mixed-effects regression models for each model family and topic (restaurant/product) with the aggregate response counts as the dependent, and conduct likelihood ratio tests for the fixed effects with post-hoc pairwise testing of estimated marginal means differences, to investigate group-level differences in recommendation counts by model size and dialect type. Results show that dialect plays a role in the type of restaurant selected across the models tested with the mistral-small-3.1 model and both the llama-3.1 family models tested showing more sensitivity to Indian English and Code-Switched prompts. In terms of product recommendations, the llama-3.1-70B-model is particularly sensitive to Code-Switched prompts in four out of seven categories, and more beauty and home category recommendations are seen when using the Indian English and Code-Switched prompts for larger and smaller models, respectively. No broad trends are seen in the model-size based differences, with differing recommendations based on model sizes conditioned by the type of dialect.

AI.tldr: 研究探究了LLM在餐厅和产品推荐中对不同英语方言（美国英语、印度英语、印地语-英语混用）的语言偏见，发现方言类型显著影响推荐结果，某些模型对印度英语和混用提示更敏感。
AI.motivation: 揭示大语言模型在不同英语方言提示下是否存在系统性推荐偏差，以评估LLM在多语言/多方言环境中的公平性。
AI.method: 使用Yelp和Walmart数据集，构建包含餐厅/产品名称的零样本提示，覆盖3种方言变体；通过20轮种子采样聚合计数，运用混合效应回归模型和似然比检验分析方言与模型大小对推荐的影响。
AI.result: 方言影响餐厅推荐类型；mistral-small-3.1和llama-3.1系列对印度英语和混用提示更敏感；llama-3.1-70B对混用提示在4/7产品类别中更敏感；印度英语和混用提示分别增加美妆和家居类别推荐。
AI.conclusion: LLM推荐存在方言偏见，且偏见模式因模型和方言类型而异，模型大小未呈现统一趋势，提示需关注LLM在多方言场景下的公平性。

title: Benchmarking Layout-Guided Diffusion Models through Unified Semantic-Spatial Evaluation in Closed and Open Settings
summary: Evaluating layout-guided text-to-image generative models requires assessing both semantic alignment with textual prompts and spatial fidelity to prescribed layouts. Assessing layout alignment requires collecting fine-grained annotations, which is costly and labor-intensive. Consequently, current benchmarks rarely provide comprehensive layout evaluation and often remain limited in scale or coverage, making model comparison, ranking, and interpretation difficult. In this work, we introduce a closed-set benchmark (C-Bench) designed to isolate key generative capabilities while providing varying levels of complexity in both prompt structure and layout. To complement this controlled setting, we propose an open-set benchmark (O-Bench) that evaluates models using real-world prompts and layouts, offering a measure of semantic and spatial alignment in the wild. We further develop a unified evaluation protocol that combines semantic and spatial accuracy into a single score, ensuring consistent model ranking. Using our benchmarks, we conduct a large-scale evaluation of six state-of-the-art layout-guided diffusion models, totaling 319,086 generated and evaluated images. We establish a model ranking based on their overall performance and provide detailed breakdowns for text and layout alignment to enhance interpretability. Fine-grained analyses across scenarios and prompt complexities highlight the strengths and limitations of current models. Code is available at https://github.com/lparolari/cobench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两个布局引导文本到图像生成模型的评测基准（C-Bench封闭集和O-Bench开放集），并开发了统一的语义与空间对齐评估协议，对六个最先进的扩散模型进行了大规模评估（超过31.9万张图像），建立了模型排名并分析了各模型的优缺点。
AI.motivation: 现有布局引导的文本到图像生成模型评估缺乏全面性：布局对齐评估需要昂贵的细粒度标注，导致现有基准在规模和覆盖范围上有限，难以进行可靠的模型比较和排名。
AI.method: 提出C-Bench（封闭集基准，控制提示结构和布局复杂度）和O-Bench（开放集基准，使用真实世界的提示和布局），并开发了将语义准确性和空间准确性合并为单一分数的统一评估协议。
AI.result: 对六个最先进的布局引导扩散模型进行了大规模评估，总计生成和评估了319,086张图像，建立了模型排名，并提供了文本对齐和布局对齐的细粒度分析。
AI.conclusion: C-Bench和O-Bench能够全面评估布局引导生成模型的性能，统一评估协议保证了模型排名的一致性，细粒度分析揭示了当前模型在不同场景和提示复杂度下的优势与局限。

title: Towards Unified Multi-task EEG Analysis with Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Recent self-supervised pre-training methods for electroencephalogram (EEG) have shown promising results. However, the pre-trained models typically require full fine-tuning on each downstream task individually to achieve good performance. In practical applications involving multiple tasks, utilizing a separate model for each task is not ideal regarding computational and spatial cost. In this study, we go one step further and explore the simultaneous adaptation of a pre-trained model to multiple different tasks. The EEG signals exhibit significant heterogeneity due to their collection from various subjects using diverse devices and experimental setups, resulting in potential conflicts among different tasks that impede joint optimization. To tackle this challenge, we propose MTEEG, a multi-task EEG analysis framework which incorporates task-specific low-rank adaptation (LoRA) modules to disentangle the parameter space and alleviate task conflicts. To investigate the trade-off between task specification and interaction, we propose three variants of MTEEG that integrate the LoRA modules in different ways and evaluate them on six downstream tasks, demonstrating that MTEEG can surpass state-of-the-art single-task methods on the majority of metrics. MTEEG shows the potential of multi-task EEG analysis and promotes the development of general-purpose brain-computer interfaces in the future.

AI.tldr: 提出MTEEG框架，通过任务特定的LoRA模块实现多任务EEG分析，在6个下游任务上超越单任务方法。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG自监督预训练模型需要为每个下游任务单独微调，计算和存储成本高；同时EEG信号因采集设备、实验设置等因素存在显著异质性，多任务联合优化存在冲突。
AI.method: 提出MTEEG框架，引入任务特定的低秩适配（LoRA）模块来解耦参数空间，缓解多任务冲突；设计了三种LoRA集成变体来探索任务特化与交互之间的权衡。
AI.result: 在6个下游任务上评估，MTEEG在大部分指标上超越了现有的单任务方法。
AI.conclusion: MTEEG展示了多任务EEG分析的潜力，推动了未来通用脑机接口的发展。

title: QAROO: AI-Driven Online Task Offloading for Energy-Efficient and Sustainable MEC Networks
summary: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) and intelligent science, intelligent edge computing has been widely adopted. However, the limitations of traditional methods, such as poor adaptability and the slow convergence of heuristic algorithms, are becoming increasingly evident. To enable sustainable and resource-efficient edge applications, this paper proposes an online task offloading framework for wireless powered mobile edge computing (MEC) networks, called Quantum Attention-based Reinforcement learning for Online Offloading (QAROO). The system employs a binary offloading strategy with the aim of co-optimizing computing and energy resources in dynamic channel environments. In response to the issues of poor adaptability in traditional approaches and the slow convergence of heuristic algorithms, the framework integrates quantum neural networks and attention mechanisms, introducing three key improvements: using recurrent neural networks to enhance temporal modeling capability, proposing an uncertainty-guided quantization method to improve exploration efficiency, and incorporating attention mechanisms into quantum networks to strengthen feature representation. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms comparative schemes in terms of normalized computation speed and processing time, offering an efficient and stable solution for online task offloading in large-scale Internet of Things (IoT) dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 针对传统方法适应性差和启发式算法收敛慢的问题，本文提出了一种基于量子注意力强化学习的在线任务卸载框架QAROO，用于无线供电移动边缘计算网络，通过集成量子神经网络、注意力机制和循环神经网络，在动态信道环境下协同优化计算与能量资源，实验结果表明其在计算速度和处理时间上优于对比方案。
AI.motivation: 传统任务卸载方法存在适应性差、启发式算法收敛慢等问题，难以满足智能边缘计算在动态环境下对资源高效和可持续性的需求。
AI.method: 提出QAROO框架，集成量子神经网络和注意力机制，包含三个关键改进：1）利用循环神经网络增强时序建模能力；2）引入不确定性引导的量化方法提升探索效率；3）在量子网络中融入注意力机制强化特征表示。采用二进制卸载策略，在动态信道环境中协同优化计算与能量资源。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在归一化计算速度和处理时间上均优于对比方案，为大规模IoT动态环境下的在线任务卸载提供了高效稳定的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: QAROO框架有效克服了传统方法的适应性不足和收敛缓慢问题，为无线供电MEC网络中的在线任务卸载提供了一种高效、可持续的解决方案，适用于大规模IoT动态场景。

title: From World-Gen to Quest-Line: A Dependency-Driven Prompt Pipeline for Coherent RPG Generation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for narrative generation, but their use in complex, multi-layered role-playing game (RPG) worlds is still limited by issues of coherence, controllability, and structural consistency. This paper explores a dependency-aware, multi-stage prompt pipeline for procedural RPG content generation that models narrative dependencies through structured intermediate representations. The approach decomposes generation into sequential stages: world building, non-player character creation, player character creation, campaign-level quest planning, and quest expansion. Each stage conditions on structured JSON outputs from previous stages. By enforcing schemas and explicit data flow, the pipeline reduces narrative drift, limits hallucinations, and supports scalable creation of interconnected narrative elements. The system is evaluated qualitatively through human-centered analysis across multiple independent runs. Outputs are assessed using criteria such as structural completeness, internal consistency, narrative coherence, diversity, and actionability. Results show that the pipeline consistently generates logically sound and structurally valid RPG content, without quality degradation as complexity increases. Separating high-level campaign planning from detailed quest expansion improves both global structure and local storytelling. These findings suggest that dependency-aware prompt pipelines with structured intermediate representations are an effective design pattern for LLM-based procedural content generation. This approach may also generalize to other domains requiring sequential reasoning over evolving contextual states.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于依赖感知的多阶段提示流水线，通过结构化中间表示（JSON）逐步生成RPG内容（世界构建、NPC创建、角色创建、战役规划、任务扩展），有效提升了叙事连贯性、可控性和结构一致性。
AI.motivation: LLM在复杂多层RPG世界中的叙事生成面临连贯性差、可控性弱和结构不一致的问题，现有方法难以生成逻辑自洽且可扩展的互联叙事元素。
AI.method: 设计依赖感知的多阶段提示流水线，将生成过程分解为五个有序阶段，每个阶段基于前序阶段的结构化JSON输出进行条件生成，通过显式模式约束和数据流控制减少叙事漂移与幻觉。
AI.result: 通过人工分析评估，流水线能一致生成逻辑合理、结构有效的RPG内容，且随复杂度增加无质量下降；高层战役规划与详细任务扩展的分离同时改善了全局结构与局部叙事。
AI.conclusion: 依赖感知的提示流水线结合结构化中间表示是LLM驱动的程序化内容生成的有效设计模式，并可推广至需要基于演化上下文状态进行序列推理的其他领域。

title: HuM-Eval: A Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Human-Centric Video Evaluation
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME 2026)
summary: Video generation models have developed rapidly in recent years, where generating natural human motion plays a pivotal role. However, accurately evaluating the quality of generated human motion video remains a significant challenge. Existing evaluation metrics primarily focus on global scene statistics, often overlooking fine-grained human details and consequently failing to align with human subjective preference. To bridge this gap, we propose HuM-Eval, a novel human-centric evaluation framework that adopts a coarse-to-fine strategy. Specifically, our framework first utilizes a Vision Language Model to perform a coarse assessment of global video quality. It then proceeds to a fine-grained analysis, using 2D pose to verify anatomical correctness and 3D human motion to evaluate motion stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HuM-Eval achieves an average human correlation of 58.2%, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Furthermore, we introduce HuM-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 1,000 diverse prompts, and conduct a detailed evaluation of existing text-to-video models, paving the way for next-generation human motion generation.

AI.tldr: 提出HuM-Eval，一个从粗到细的人体视频评估框架，先通过VLM全局评估，再用2D姿态验证解剖正确性、3D运动评估稳定性，人类相关性达58.2%，并构建了含1000个提示的HuM-Bench基准。
AI.motivation: 现有视频评估指标主要关注全局场景统计，忽略细粒度人体细节，无法与人类主观偏好对齐，因此需要一个以人为中心的精细评估框架。
AI.method: 粗到细的两阶段策略：(1) 利用Vision Language Model进行全局视频质量粗略评估；(2) 细粒度分析阶段，使用2D姿态验证解剖正确性，并用3D人体运动评估运动稳定性。
AI.result: HuM-Eval在人类相关性上达到58.2%，优于现有基线；同时构建了包含1000个多样化提示的HuM-Bench基准，用于评估现有文本到视频模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效弥补了人体视频评估的细粒度缺失，与人类主观判断更一致，为下一代人体运动生成奠定了评估基础。

title: Gradient-Direction Sensitivity Reveals Linear-Centroid Coupling Hidden by Optimizer Trajectories
summary: We show that replacing the rolling SVD of AdamW updates with a rolling SVD of loss gradients changes the diagnostic by 1-2 orders of magnitude. Performing SVD on the loss gradient instead of the AdamW update increases the measured perturbative coupling between SED directions and Linear Centroid Hypothesis (LCH) features from $ \bar{R}_k \approx 3 $--$9\times$ to $100$--$330\times$ across four single-task modular arithmetic operations, eliminating the apparent operation dependence in the original measurement. On a multitask transformer with a shared encoder, update-based SED gives $ \bar{R}_k \leq 1 $ -- an apparent failure of the diagnostic -- while per-operation gradient-based SED recovers $ \bar{R}_k = 20 $--$45\times$ across all four operations. Gradient aggregation across competing tasks is the main obstruction; performing SVD on per-task gradients resolves it. A causal intervention shows that constraining attention updates to any rank-3 subspace (whether SED-derived or random) accelerates grokking by approximately $2.3\times$ across random seeds and operations, while removing the rank-3 component has negligible effect under proper gradient-projection methodology. The SED-LCH coupling is therefore a strong diagnostic of where feature formation concentrates in parameter space, but it is not a unique causal pathway: the natural full-rank AdamW attention update is highly rank-redundant under our hyperparameters.

AI.tldr: 用损失梯度的滚动SVD代替AdamW更新的滚动SVD，可将SED方向与LCH特征之间的测量耦合提高1-2个数量级；跨任务梯度聚合是诊断失效的主要原因；约束注意更新到任意秩3子空间均可加速学习约2.3倍，表明SED-LCH耦合是强诊断指标但非唯一因果路径。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于AdamW更新的SVD诊断方法在测量SED方向与LCH特征耦合时结果较弱（$ \bar{R}_k \approx 3-9\times $）且存在任务依赖性，甚至在多任务场景下完全失效（$ \bar{R}_k \leq 1 $）。作者希望探究诊断失效的根本原因并改进测量方法。
AI.method: 1) 对比两种SVD分解对象：AdamW更新 vs 损失梯度；2) 在多任务场景下分析梯度聚合的影响；3) 通过因果干预实验，将注意力更新约束到秩3子空间（SED导出或随机）或去除秩3分量，观察对grokking速度的影响。
AI.result: 1) 使用损失梯度SVD后，耦合从$ \bar{R}_k \approx 3-9\times $提升至$100-330\times $，消除了任务依赖性；2) 多任务场景下，基于梯度的SVD恢复耦合至$ \bar{R}_k = 20-45\times $；3) 约束到任意秩3子空间加速grokking约2.3倍，而去除秩3分量效果可忽略。
AI.conclusion: SED-LCH耦合是特征形成在参数空间中集中程度的强诊断指标，但并非唯一的因果通路；在超参数设定下，自然的全秩AdamW注意力更新具有高度秩冗余。

title: StratFormer: Adaptive Opponent Modeling and Exploitation in Imperfect-Information Games
summary: We present StratFormer, a transformer-based meta-agent that learns to simultaneously model and exploit opponents in imperfect-information games through a two-phase curriculum. The first phase trains an opponent modeling head to identify behavioral patterns from action histories while the agent plays a game-theoretic optimal (GTO) policy. The second phase progressively shifts the policy toward best-response (BR) exploitation, guided by a per-opponent regularization schedule tied to exploitability. Our architecture introduces dual-turn tokens -- feature vectors constructed at both agent and opponent decision points -- coupled with bucket-rate features that encode opponent tendencies across five strategic contexts. On Leduc Hold'em, a small poker variant with six cards and two betting rounds, we test against six opponent archetypes at two strength levels each, with exploitability ranging from 0.15 to 1.26 Big Blinds (BB) per hand. StratFormer achieves an average exploitation gain of +0.106 BB per hand over GTO, with peak gains of +0.821 against highly exploitable opponents, while maintaining near-equilibrium safety.

AI.tldr: StratFormer是一个基于Transformer的元智能体，通过两阶段课程学习同时建模和利用不完全信息博弈中的对手，在Leduc Hold'em上实现了对GTO策略的平均+0.106 BB/手的剥削增益，同时保持接近均衡的安全性。
AI.motivation: 在不完全信息博弈中，传统GTO策略虽然安全但无法利用对手弱点，而纯剥削策略可能面临被反剥削的风险。现有方法难以同时实现安全与剥削，因此需要一种既能保持Nash均衡安全性又能有效利用对手模式的方法。
AI.method: 提出StratFormer框架：1) 双阶段课程学习（先训练对手建模头与GTO策略，再通过基于可剥削性的正则化调度逐步转向BR剥削策略）；2) 双回合token（在智能体和对手决策点构建特征向量）；3) 桶率特征（在五种战略情境下编码对手倾向）。
AI.result: 在Leduc Hold'em上，对六种对手原型的两个强度水平进行测试（可剥削性范围0.15-1.26 BB/手），StratFormer平均剥削增益+0.106 BB/手，对高可剥削对手峰值增益达+0.821 BB/手，同时保持接近均衡的安全性。
AI.conclusion: StratFormer通过两阶段课程学习与新颖的架构设计，在不完全信息博弈中成功实现了安全且高效的对手建模与利用，为结合博弈论最优与剥削策略提供了可行方案。

title: From Chatbots to Confidants: A Cross-Cultural Study of LLM Adoption for Emotional Support
comment: 28 pages (9 pages main text, 19 pages references and appendices), 14 figures. The first two authors contributed equally
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used not only for instrumental tasks, but as always-available and non-judgmental confidants for emotional support. Yet what drives adoption and how users perceive emotional support interactions across countries remains unknown. To address this gap, we present the first large-scale cross-cultural study of LLM use for emotional support, surveying 4,641 participants across seven countries (USA, UK, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, and The Netherlands). Our results show that adoption rates vary dramatically across countries (from 20% to 59%). Using mixed models that separate cultural effects from demographic composition, we find that: Being aged 25-44, religious, married, and of higher socioeconomic status are predictors of positive perceptions (trust, usage, perceived benefits), with socioeconomic status being the strongest. English-speaking countries consistently show more positive perceptions than Continental European countries. We further collect a corpus of 731 real multilingual prompts from user interactions, showing that users mainly seek help for loneliness, stress, relationship conflicts, and mental health struggles. Our findings reveal that LLM emotional support use is shaped by a complex sociotechnical landscape and call for a broader research agenda examining how these systems can be developed, deployed, and governed to ensure safe and informed access.

AI.tldr: 这是一项覆盖7个国家4,641名参与者的大规模跨文化研究，发现LLM用于情感支持的采纳率从20%到59%不等，受年龄、宗教、婚姻状况和社会经济地位等因素影响，其中英语国家比欧洲大陆国家更积极。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被用作情感支持工具，但不同国家用户对其采纳率和感知差异尚不清楚，缺乏大规模跨文化研究。
AI.method: 对7个国家（美、英、德、法、西、意、荷）4,641人进行问卷调查，采用混合模型分离文化效应与人口统计效应，并收集731个真实多语言用户提示进行分析。
AI.result: 采纳率在20%-59%之间大幅波动；25-44岁、有宗教信仰、已婚、高社会经济地位者感知更积极；英语国家比欧洲大陆国家更正面；用户主要寻求帮助的问题是孤独、压力、关系冲突和心理健康。
AI.conclusion: LLM情感支持受复杂的社会技术因素影响，呼吁更广泛的研究议程来确保系统的安全开发和治理。

title: Self-DACE++: Robust Low-Light Enhancement via Efficient Adaptive Curve Estimation
summary: In this paper, we present Self-DACE++, an improved unsupervised and lightweight framework for Low-Light Image Enhancement (LLIE), building upon our previous Self-Reference Deep Adaptive Curve Estimation (Self-DACE). To better address the trade-off between computational efficiency and restoration quality, Self-DACE++ introduces enhanced Adaptive Adjustment Curves (AACs). These curves, governed by minimal trainable parameters, flexibly adjust the dynamic range while preserving the color fidelity, structural integrity, and naturalness of the enhanced images.
