To achieve an extremely lightweight architecture without sacrificing performance, we propose a randomized order training strategy coupled with a network fusion mechanism, which compresses the model into an efficient iterative inference structure. Furthermore, we formulate a physics-grounded objective function based on Retinex theory and incorporate a dedicated denoising module to effectively estimate and suppress latent noise in dark regions. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations on multiple real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate that Self-DACE++ outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, delivering superior enhancement quality with real-time inference capability. The code is available at https://github.com/John-Wendell/Self-DACE.

AI.tldr: Self-DACE++ 是一个改进的无监督轻量级低光图像增强框架，通过增强的自适应调整曲线、随机顺序训练策略、网络融合机制、基于Retinex理论的目标函数和去噪模块，在保持实时推理能力的同时实现了优于现有方法的增强效果。
AI.motivation: 解决低光图像增强中计算效率与恢复质量之间的权衡问题，在保持轻量级架构的同时提升增强效果。
AI.method: 1) 增强的自适应调整曲线(AACs)，用少量可训练参数灵活调整动态范围；2) 随机顺序训练策略与网络融合机制，压缩模型为高效迭代推理结构；3) 基于Retinex理论的物理驱动目标函数；4) 专用去噪模块，估计并抑制暗区潜在噪声。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上的定性和定量评估表明，Self-DACE++ 优于现有最先进方法，具备实时推理能力。
AI.conclusion: Self-DACE++ 成功实现了轻量级、无监督的低光图像增强，在效率与质量之间取得了优异平衡，代码已开源。

title: The Role of Symmetry in Optimizing Overparameterized Networks
summary: Overparameterization is central to the success of deep learning, yet the mechanisms by which it improves optimization remain incompletely understood. We analyze weight-space symmetries in neural networks and show that overparameterization introduces additional symmetries that benefit optimization in two distinct ways. First, we prove that these symmetries act as a form of diagonal preconditioning on the Hessian, enabling the existence of better-conditioned minima within each equivalence class of functionally identical solutions. Second, we show that overparameterization increases the probability mass of global minima near typical initializations, making these favorable solutions more reachable. Teacher-student network experiments validate our theoretical predictions: as width increases, the Hessian trace decreases, condition numbers improve, and convergence accelerates. Our analysis provides a unified framework for understanding overparameterization and width growth as a geometric transformation of the loss landscape.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了过参数化通过引入权重空间对称性，从两个机制改善优化：一是作为Hessian的对角预处理改善极值点条件数，二是增加全局最小值在初始化附近的概率质量。实验验证了网络宽度增加时Hessian迹减小、条件数改善、收敛加快。
AI.motivation: 深度学习成功的关键在于过参数化，但其改善优化的机制尚不完全清楚，本文旨在从权重空间对称性角度提供统一理解框架。
AI.method: 理论证明过参数化引入额外对称性，从而构成Hessian的对角预处理并增加全局最小值附近的概率质量；通过teacher-student网络实验验证理论预测。
AI.result: 过参数化使Hessian迹减小、条件数改善、收敛加速。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化和宽度增长可视为损失景观的几何变换，为理解深度学习优化提供了统一框架。

title: TrialCalibre: A Fully Automated Causal Engine for RCT Benchmarking and Observational Trial Calibration
summary: Real-world evidence (RWE) studies that emulate target trials increasingly inform regulatory and clinical decisions, yet residual, hard-to-quantify biases still limit their credibility. The recently proposed BenchExCal framework addresses this challenge via a two-stage Benchmark, Expand, Calibrate process, which first compares an observational emulation against an existing randomized controlled trial (RCT), then uses observed divergence to calibrate a second emulation for a new indication causal effect estimation. While methodologically powerful, BenchExCal is resource intensive and difficult to scale. We introduce TrialCalibre, a conceptualized multiagent system designed to automate and scale the BenchExCal workflow. Our framework features specialized agents such as the Orchestrator, Protocol Design, Data Synthesis, Clinical Validation, and Quantitative Calibration Agents that coordi-nate the the overall process. TrialCalibre incorpo-rates agent learning (e.g., RLHF) and knowledge blackboards to support adaptive, auditable, and transparent causal effect estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 TrialCalibre，一个基于多智能体系统的框架，用于自动化并规模化 BenchExCal 工作流程，从而实现对真实世界证据研究的可靠因果效应估计。
AI.motivation: BenchExCal 方法虽能通过基准测试、扩展和校准提升 RWE 研究的可信度，但其流程资源密集、难以扩展，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计多智能体系统 TrialCalibre，包含 Orchestrator、Protocol Design、Data Synthesis、Clinical Validation 和 Quantitative Calibration 等专用智能体，并引入 RLHF 和知识黑板机制支持自适应和可审计的因果推断。
AI.result: 提出了一个概念化框架，能够自动化 BenchExCal 流程，提升可扩展性、透明性和审计性。
AI.conclusion: TrialCalibre 通过多智能体协作有望降低 RWE 校准方法的应用门槛，推动其在实际监管和临床决策中的大规模部署。

title: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
summary: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\% of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined with upcycling from dense models, enables efficient pre-training on 5T tokens. Our models surpass similarly-sized competitors on English and multilingual benchmarks, achieving a best-in-class performance-to-compute ratio. We further post-train these models to create Marco-MoE-\textsc{Instruct} variants, which surpass the performance of competing models possessing $3$--$14\times$ more activated parameters. Our analysis reveals that Marco-MoE learns structured expert activation patterns shared across related languages, while maintaining highly specialized utilization for linguistically isolated ones. We further show that Marco-MoE allows for scalable language expansion without the interference typical of dense models. To support the community, we disclose our full training datasets, recipes, and model weights.

AI.tldr: Marco-MoE是一套完全开源的多语言稀疏MoE模型，仅激活约5%的参数，在英语和多语言任务上超越同类模型，性能-计算比最优，并支持可扩展的语言扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有密集模型在多语言扩展时存在干扰，且MoE模型的开源程度不足，作者希望构建高效、开源的多语言稀疏MoE模型。
AI.method: 采用高度稀疏的MoE架构（仅5%参数激活），结合从密集模型升级（upcycling）的策略，在5T token上高效预训练，并通过后训练得到Instruct变体。
AI.result: 在英语和多语言基准上超越同类模型，Instruct变体以少3-14倍的激活参数超越竞品；学习到结构化专家激活模式，支持无干扰的语言扩展。
AI.conclusion: Marco-MoE实现了极致的稀疏性与高效多语言建模，完全开源模型、数据与训练配方，对社区有重要贡献。

title: GPT-Image-2 in the Wild: A Twitter Dataset of Self-Reported AI-Generated Images from the First Week of Deployment
comment: 11 pages; GPT-image-2 social media dataset; Twitter API collection and multilingual curation; C2PA watermark stripping on platform upload; browser-automated AI badge verification; CLIP semantic clustering; AI-generated image provenance and attribution
summary:
The release of GPT-image-2 by OpenAI marks a watershed moment in AI-generated imagery: the boundary between photographic reality and synthetic content has never been more difficult to discern. We introduce the GPT-Image-2 Twitter Dataset, the first published dataset of GPT-image-2 generated images, sourced from publicly available Twitter/X posts in the immediate aftermath of the model's April 21, 2026 release. Leveraging the Twitter API v2 and a multi-stage curation pipeline spanning multilingual text heuristics (English, Japanese, and Chinese), browser-automated Twitter "Made with AI" badge verification, and model name variant matching, we curate 10,217 confirmed GPT-image-2 images from 27,662 collected records over a six-day window.
  We characterize the dataset across four analyses: CLIP-based zero-shot subject taxonomy, OCR text legibility (82.0% of images contain detectable text), face detection (59.2% of images, 22,583 total faces), and semantic clustering (137 CLIP ViT-L/14 clusters).
  A key negative result is that C2PA content credentials are systematically stripped by Twitter's CDN on upload, rendering cryptographic provenance verification infeasible for social-media-sourced AI images. The dataset and all curation code are released publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文发布了首个GPT-Image-2图像数据集，包含10,217张经多语言验证的AI生成图像，并分析了其文本识别率（82%）、人脸检测率（59.2%）等特征，同时发现C2PA内容凭证在Twitter上传过程中被系统性剥离。
AI.motivation: GPT-Image-2的发布使得AI生成图像与真实摄影的边界愈发模糊，亟需一个公开数据集来研究这类AI图像的特征与传播模式，尤其是社交媒体场景下的溯源与验证问题。
AI.method: 通过Twitter API v2收集数据，结合多语言文本启发式过滤、浏览器自动化"Made with AI"徽章验证和模型名变体匹配，在6天内从27,662条记录中筛选出10,217张确认由GPT-Image-2生成的图像。
AI.result: 82.0%图像含可检测文本；59.2%图像含人脸（共22,583张人脸）；通过CLIP聚类得到137个语义簇。关键发现：C2PA凭证被Twitter CDN系统性剥离。
AI.conclusion: 社交媒体中AI图像的加密溯源面临根本性障碍（C2PA被剥离），公开数据集为后续AI生成内容检测、可信机制研究提供了重要基准。

title: Prior-Aligned Data Cleaning for Tabular Foundation Models
summary: Tabular Foundation Models (TFMs) achieve state-of-the-art zero-shot accuracy on small tabular datasets by meta-learning over synthetic data-generating processes -- making them highly attractive for practitioners who cannot afford large annotated corpora. However, their in-context learning mechanism assumes approximately clean inputs: missing values, outliers, and duplicates in the real-world data create a prior mismatch that degrades both accuracy and confidence calibration simultaneously. Correcting this mismatch requires sequential decisions over cleaning operators whose interactions no static preprocessing rule can anticipate -a natural fit for reinforcement learning~(RL). We introduce L2C2, the first deep RL framework framing tabular data cleaning as prior alignment: a learned policy sequences operators to minimize the distributional gap between dirty input and the TFM's synthetic prior. Six experiments on ten OpenML benchmark datasets establish: 1) three of seven reward designs collapse to degenerate trivial cleaning strategies -- principled reward engineering is scientifically non-trivial; 2) the novel TFMAwareReward reward we propose selects structurally distinct pipelines on 4/10 datasets and achieves higher TabPFN accuracy on those diverging cases (mean 0.851 vs. 0.843; Wilcoxon p=0.063, n=4) while never underperforming; 3) parameterized cleaning actions improve best-found pipeline reward on 9/10 datasets (Wilcoxon p=0.004); and 4) a policy pre-trained on one single source dataset exceeds scratch training at the 2,000-step fine-tuning checkpoint on all three held-out datasets (up to +28.8% after full fine-tuning) demonstrating cross-dataset transfer of prior-alignment knowledge. These findings establish that prior alignment is a principled data preparation strategy for TFM deployment on real-world tabular data.

AI.tldr: 提出L2C2，首个用深度强化学习框架对齐表格基础模型(TFM)先验分布的数据清洗方法，通过策略学习选择清洗算子来缩小脏数据与TFM合成先验之间的分布差距。实验证明该方法在10个OpenML基准数据集上有效，且能跨数据集迁移先验对齐知识。
AI.motivation: 表格基础模型(TFM)在零样本场景下表现优异，但其上下文学习机制假设输入数据近似干净。真实数据中的缺失值、异常值、重复值等脏数据造成先验分布不匹配，同时降低准确率和置信度校准。传统静态预处理规则无法应对清洗算子间的交互效应，需要自适应决策。
AI.method: 提出L2C2框架，将表格数据清洗建模为先验对齐问题。用深度强化学习学习一个策略，该策略按顺序选择清洗算子(如处理缺失值、去除异常值、去重等)，以最小化脏数据与TFM合成先验之间的分布差距。设计了TFMAwareReward奖励函数来引导策略学习。
AI.result: 1）7种奖励设计中3种导致退化策略（只做简单清洗），证明奖励工程的重要性；2）提出的TFMAwareReward在4/10数据集上选出结构不同的清洗流水线，且在这些差异案例上取得更高准确率（均值0.851 vs 0.843）；3）参数化清洗动作在9/10数据集上改进了最佳流水线奖励（p=0.004）；4）在单个源数据集上预训练的策略在微调2000步后超越所有三个保留数据集上的从头训练（完全微调后最高提升28.8%）。
AI.conclusion: 先验对齐是一种原则性的数据准备策略，可有效提升TFM在真实表格数据上的部署效果。深度强化学习框架能自动学习适应不同数据集的清洗策略，且清洗知识可跨数据集迁移。

title: Bye Bye Perspective API: Lessons for Measurement Infrastructure in NLP, CSS and LLM Evaluation
summary: The closure of Perspective API at the end of 2026 discards what has functioned as the de facto standard for automated toxicity measurement in NLP, CSS, and LLM evaluation research. We document the structural dependence that the communities built on this single proprietary tool and discuss how this dependence caused epistemic problems that have affected - and will likely continue to affect - collective research efforts. Perspective's model was periodically updated without versioning or disclosure, its annotation structure reflected a single corporate operationalisation of a contested concept, and its scores were used simultaneously as an evaluation target and an evaluation standard. Its closure leaves behind non-updatable benchmarks, irreproducible results, and ultimately a field at risk of perpetuating these issues by turning to closed-source LLMs. We use Perspective's announced termination as an opportunity to call for an independent, valid, adaptable, and reproducible toxicity and hate speech measurement infrastructure, with the technical and governance requirements outlined in this paper.

AI.tldr: Perspective API 将于2026年底关闭，这暴露了NLP、CSS和LLM评估领域对该单一专有工具的严重依赖，导致了不可复制的结果、不可更新的基准，以及将问题延续到闭源LLM的风险。论文呼吁建立独立、有效、可适应、可复现的毒性测量基础设施。
AI.motivation: 指出学术界对Perspective API这一单一专有工具的"结构性依赖"造成了认知层面的问题（epistemic problems），并借此关闭契机呼吁改革毒性检测研究的基础设施。
AI.method: 通过分析Perspective API的三大问题：无版本控制的更新、单一公司的概念操作化、同时作为评估目标和评估标准的双重角色，揭示其对该领域系统性影响。
AI.result: Perspective API的关闭将导致非可更新基准、不可复现的结果，且该领域有转向闭源LLM从而延续问题的风险。
AI.conclusion: 需要建立独立、有效、可适应且可复现的毒性和仇恨言论测量基础设施，并提出相应的技术与管理要求。

title: CoRE: Concept-Reasoning Expansion for Continual Brain Lesion Segmentation
summary: Accurate brain lesion segmentation in MRI is vital for effective clinical diagnosis and treatment planning. Due to high annotation costs and strict data privacy regulations, universal models require employing Continual Learning (CL) to adapt to evolving clinical tasks without losing previously acquired knowledge. However, existing CL paradigms often suffer from capacity limits or redundant parameter growth, and even advanced dynamic methods rely mostly on image-perception strategies that struggle to handle the substantial pathological and multimodal heterogeneity inherent in brain imaging. To address this issue, we propose Concept-Reasoning Expansion (CoRE) framework, which establishes a joint decision-making mechanism by integrating visual features with structured concepts. Through the alignment of image tokens with a hierarchical concept library, CoRE simulates clinical reasoning to guide both interpretable expert routing and demand-based model growth. This collaborative process ensures model evolution is grounded in clinical priors, preventing redundant parameter expansion while maximizing knowledge reuse. Extensive evaluations across 12 sequential brain lesion MRI tasks demonstrate that CoRE achieves state-of-the-art performance and provides a high knowledge starting point for efficient future adaptation. Its superior few-shot transferability and clinical interpretability further validate its effectiveness in managing non-stationary clinical data streams. Our code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 提出Concept-Reasoning Expansion (CoRE)框架，通过整合视觉特征与结构化概念，在脑病变MRI分割的持续学习中实现可解释的专家路由和按需模型扩展，在12个序列任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法在脑病变分割中存在容量限制或冗余参数增长，且依赖纯视觉策略难以处理脑部影像中显著的病理和模态异质性。
AI.method: CoRE框架通过将图像标记与层次化概念库对齐，模拟临床推理过程，联合视觉特征与结构化概念进行决策，实现可解释的专家路由和基于需求的模型增长。
AI.result: 在12个序列脑病变MRI任务上达到SOTA性能，具备出色的少样本迁移能力和临床可解释性，为未来高效适应提供高知识起点。
AI.conclusion: CoRE通过基于临床先验的协作进化过程，有效防止冗余参数扩展并最大化知识复用，在管理非平稳临床数据流方面优于现有方法。

title: Accurate and Robust Generative Approach for Overcoming Data Sparsity and Imbalance in Landslide Modeling with A Tabular Foundation Model
summary: Landslide investigation relies on sufficient and well-balanced observational data influenced by geological, hydrological, and anthropogenic factors. Available landslide inventories are often sparse and imbalanced, which limits understanding of triggering conditions and failure mechanisms. Data generation provides an effective approach to help capture feature dependencies from limited landslide observations. However, existing generation approaches for landslides often struggle to capture complex relationships among features and lack robustness across multiple scenarios and interacting factors. Here, we propose an accurate and robust approach for generating multi-feature landslide datasets by utilizing a tabular foundation model. By leveraging the capacity to learn from limited observations, the proposed approach effectively preserves the multivariate dependencies and statistical characteristics inherent in landslide occurrences. Comparative experiments on 20 landslide inventories demonstrate that the generated datasets closely align with observed distributions, maintain realistic feature dependencies, and exhibit robustness across different environmental contexts. This work provides an effective approach to overcome data sparsity and imbalance and strengthens landslide susceptibility modeling and risk assessment under limited observations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用表格基础模型生成多特征滑坡数据集，以解决滑坡观测数据稀疏和不平衡的问题。该方法能从有限观测中学习并保留多变量依赖关系和统计特征，在20个滑坡数据集上验证了其生成数据的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有滑坡清单数据稀疏且不平衡，限制了人们对触发条件和破坏机制的理解。虽然数据生成方法可以捕捉特征依赖关系，但现有方法难以处理复杂特征关系，且在不同场景下缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出利用表格基础模型（tabular foundation model）生成多特征滑坡数据集，通过从有限观测中学习，有效保留滑坡发生事件中固有的多变量依赖性和统计特征。
AI.result: 在20个滑坡清单上的对比实验表明，生成的数据集与观测分布高度一致，保持了真实的特征依赖关系，并在不同环境背景下表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服了数据稀疏和不平衡问题，在有限观测条件下能够增强滑坡易发性建模和风险评估的能力。

title: Semi-Markov Reinforcement Learning for City-Scale EV Ride-Hailing with Feasibility-Guaranteed Actions
summary: We study city-scale control of electric-vehicle (EV) ride-hailing fleets where dispatch, repositioning, and charging decisions must respect charger and feeder limits under uncertain, spatially correlated demand and travel times. We formulate the problem as a hex-grid semi-Markov decision process (semi-MDP) with mixed actions -- discrete actions for serving, repositioning, and charging, together with continuous charging power -- and variable action durations. To guarantee physical feasibility during both training and deployment, the policy learns over high-level intentions produced by a masked, temperature-annealed actor. These intentions are projected at every decision step through a time-limited rolling mixed-integer linear program (MILP) that strictly enforces state-of-charge, port, and feeder constraints. To mitigate distributional shifts, we optimize a Soft Actor--Critic (SAC) agent against a Wasserstein-1 ambiguity set with a graph-aligned Mahalanobis ground metric that captures spatial correlations. The robust backup uses the Kantorovich--Rubinstein dual, a projected subgradient inner loop, and a primal--dual risk-budget update. Our architecture combines a two-layer Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) encoder, twin critics, and a value network that drives the adversary. Experiments on a large-scale EV fleet simulator built from NYC taxi data show that PD--RSAC achieves the highest net profit, reaching \$1.22M, compared with \$0.58M--\$0.70M for strong heuristic, single-agent RL, and multi-agent RL baselines, including Greedy, SAC, MAPPO, and MADDPG, while maintaining zero feeder-limit violations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PD-RSAC框架，将电动汽车网约车车队的调度、重新分配和充电决策建模为半马尔可夫决策过程，结合混合动作、掩码温度退火演员、时间限制滚动MILP投影和Wasserstein-1鲁棒优化，在纽约市出租车数据模拟中实现$122万净利润且零馈线违规。
AI.motivation: 城市级电动汽车网约车车队的调度、重新分配和充电决策面临充电桩容量、馈线限制以及空间相关的不确定需求与行驶时间等多重约束，现有方法难以同时保证物理可行性、处理连续-离散混合动作并应对分布偏移。
AI.method: 将问题建模为六边形网格半马尔可夫决策过程，采用混合动作（离散的服务/重新分配/充电动作与连续充电功率）；通过掩码温度退火演员学习高层意图，再经时间限制滚动混合整数线性规划投影确保物理可行性；使用Soft Actor-Critic优化Wasserstein-1模糊集，结合图对齐马氏距离度量空间相关性，通过Kantorovich-Rubinstein对偶和投影次梯度内环实现鲁棒备份；采用双层图卷积网络编码器、双评论家及值网络驱动对抗者。
AI.result: 在基于纽约出租车数据的大规模EV车队模拟器中，PD-RSAC实现最高净利润$122万，远超Greedy、SAC、MAPPO、MADDPG等基线（$58万-$70万），且保持零馈线违规。
AI.conclusion: 所提PD-RSAC框架在满足严格物理约束的同时，显著优于多种启发式和强化学习基线，证明了鲁棒优化与物理可行性投影相结合的有效性。

title: WhisperPipe: A Resource-Efficient Streaming Architecture for Real-Time Automatic Speech Recognition
comment: 36 pages, 14 figures. Open-source implementation available at PyPI
summary: Real-time automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems face a fundamental trade-off between transcription accuracy and computational efficiency, particularly when deploying large-scale transformer models like Whisper. Existing streaming approaches either sacrifice accuracy through aggressive chunking or incur prohibitive memory costs through unbounded context accumulation. We present WhisperPipe, a novel streaming architecture that achieves bounded memory consumption while maintaining transcription quality through three key innovations a hybrid Voice Activity Detection (VAD) pipeline combining Silero VAD with energy-based filtering to reduce false activations by 34%, a dynamic buffering mechanism with overlapping context windows that prevents information loss at segment boundaries, and an adaptive processing strategy that balances latency and accuracy based on speech characteristics. Evaluated on 2.5 hours of diverse audio data, WhisperPipe demonstrates a median end-to-end latency of 89ms (90th percentile: 142ms) while consuming 48% less peak GPU memory and 80.9% lower average GPU utilization compared to baseline Whisper implementations. The system maintains stable memory usage over extended sessions, with zero growth rate across 150-minute continuous operation. Comparative analysis against related work shows that WhisperPipe achieves competitive accuracy (WER within 2% of offline Whisper) while operating at 3-5x lower latency than existing streaming solutions. The architecture's modular design enables deployment across resource-constrained environments, from edge devices to cloud infrastructure. Our results demonstrate that careful architectural design can reconcile the competing demands of real-time responsiveness and model sophistication in production ASR systems.

AI.tldr: WhisperPipe是一种新型流式语音识别架构，通过混合VAD、动态缓冲和自适应处理策略，在保持与离线Whisper相近准确率（WER差距<2%）的同时，实现89ms中位延迟、48%峰值GPU显存节省和零内存增长，解决了流式Transformer部署中准确率与效率的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有流式ASR方案面临两难：激进分块会牺牲识别准确率，无限制的上下文累积则导致显存成本过高。亟需一种既能保持Whisper模型精度、又能实现有界内存消耗的流式架构，以支持大规模Transformer模型在生产环境中的实时部署。
AI.method: 1) 混合VAD流水线：Silero VAD结合能量滤波，将误激活率降低34%；2) 动态缓冲机制：引入重叠上下文窗口，防止片段边界信息丢失；3) 自适应处理策略：根据语音特征动态平衡延迟与准确率。整体架构采用模块化设计。
AI.result: 在2.5小时多样化音频上测试：中位端到端延迟89ms（P90: 142ms），峰值GPU显存减少48%，平均GPU利用率降低80.9%，连续运行150分钟内存零增长。WER与离线Whisper差距在2%以内，延迟比现有流式方案低3-5倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心的架构设计，可以在生产级ASR系统中协调实时响应性与模型复杂性之间的竞争需求，验证了流式场景下兼顾准确率与效率的可行性。

title: Benchmarking and Improving GUI Agents in High-Dynamic Environments
summary: Recent advancements in Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have predominantly focused on training paradigms like supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). However, the challenge of high-dynamic GUI environments remains largely underexplored. Existing agents typically rely on a single screenshot after each action for decision-making, leading to a partially observable (or even unobservable) Markov decision process, where the key GUI state including important information for actions is often inadequately captured. To systematically explore this challenge, we introduce DynamicGUIBench, a comprehensive online GUI benchmark spanning ten applications and diverse interaction scenarios characterized by important interface changes between actions. Furthermore, we present DynamicUI, an agent designed for dynamic interfaces, which takes screen-recording videos of the interaction process as input and consists of three components: a dynamic perceiver, a refinement strategy, and a reflection. Specifically, the dynamic perceiver clusters frames of the GUI video, generates captions for the centroids, and iteratively selects the most informative frames as the salient dynamic context. Considering that there may be inconsistencies and noise between the selected frames and the textual context of the agent, the refinement strategy employs an action-conditioned filtering to refine thoughts to mitigate thought-action inconsistency and redundancy. Based on the refined agent trajectories, the reflection module provides effective and accurate guidance for further actions. Experiments on DynamicGUIBench demonstrate that DynamicUI significantly improves the performance in dynamic GUI environments, while maintaining competitive performance on other public benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynamicGUIBench基准和DynamicUI智能体，通过视频帧聚类、动作条件过滤和反思机制解决GUI动态环境中部分可观测问题，实验表明在动态场景下性能显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体主要关注SFT和RL训练范式，但忽略了高动态GUI环境的挑战——仅依赖单张截图导致关键状态信息捕获不足，形成部分可观测MDP问题。
AI.method: 提出DynamicUI智能体，包含三个组件：(1) 动态感知器：对GUI交互视频进行帧聚类、生成质心描述、迭代选择最信息量帧作为动态上下文；(2) 优化策略：采用动作条件过滤机制减少思维-动作不一致和冗余；(3) 反思模块：基于优化轨迹提供有效准确的后续动作指导。
AI.result: 在DynamicGUIBench上DynamicUI显著提升了动态GUI环境下的表现，同时在其它公开基准上保持有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 引入视频级动态上下文感知机制能有效克服传统单帧输入在动态GUI环境中的局限性，为构建更鲁棒的GUI智能体提供了新思路。

title: Shearlet Neural Operators for Anisotropic-Shock-Dominated and Multi-scale parametric partial differential equations
summary: Neural operators have emerged as powerful data-driven surrogates for learning solution operators of parametric partial differential equations (PDEs). However, widely used Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) rely on global Fourier representations, which can be inefficient for resolving anisotropic structures, sharp gradients, and spatially localized discontinuities that arise in shock-dominated and multiscale regimes. To address these limitations, we introduce the Shearlet Neural Operator (SNO), a neural operator architecture that replaces the Fourier transform with a shearlet-based representation. Shearlets offer directional, multiscale, and spatially localized atoms with near-optimal sparse approximation of anisotropic features, providing an inductive bias aligned with PDE solutions containing edges, fronts, and shocks. SNO learns in the shearlet domain and reconstructs predictions via the inverse transform, retaining efficient spectral computation while improving locality and directional selectivity. Across seven benchmark PDE families, including strongly anisotropic advection, anisotropic diffusion, and nonlinear conservation laws with straight, curved, interacting, spiral, and polygonal shock structures, SNO consistently improves predictive accuracy and feature fidelity over FNO baselines, with the largest gains observed in anisotropic and discontinuity-dominated settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出剪切波神经算子(SNO)，用剪切波表示替换傅里叶变换，以更好地处理各向异性结构、尖锐梯度和局部不连续等PDE求解问题，在七个基准PDE族上优于传统傅里叶神经算子(FNO)。
AI.motivation: 傅里叶神经算子(FNO)依赖全局傅里叶表示，在求解各向异性结构、尖锐梯度和局部不连续（如激波主导和多尺度问题）时效率低下，需要新的表示方法以更好地捕捉这些特征。
AI.method: 提出剪切波神经算子(SNO)，用具有方向性、多尺度和空间局部化特性的剪切波表示替代傅里叶变换，在剪切波域学习后通过逆变换重建预测，保持高效谱计算的同时提升局域性和方向选择性。
AI.result: 在七个基准PDE族（包括强各向异性平流、各向异性扩散以及含直线/曲线/螺旋/多边形激波结构的非线性守恒律）上，SNO在预测精度和特征保真度上均一致优于FNO基线，各向异性和不连续主导场景下提升最为显著。
AI.conclusion: 剪切波神经算子(SNO)通过引入方向性多尺度局部化表示，有效克服了FNO在捕捉各向异性和不连续PDE解结构方面的局限，为科学计算中的神经算子设计提供了新方向。

title: ADEMA: A Knowledge-State Orchestration Architecture for Long-Horizon Knowledge Synthesis with LLMAgents
summary: Long-horizon LLM tasks often fail not because a single answer is unattainable, but because knowledge states drift across rounds, intermediate commitments remain implicit, and interruption fractures the evolving evidence chain. This paper presents ADEMA as a knowledge-state orchestration architecture for long-horizon knowledge synthesis rather than as a generic multi-agent runtime. The architecture combines explicit epistemic bookkeeping, heterogeneous dual-evaluator governance, adaptive task-mode switching, reputation-shaped resource allocation, checkpoint-resumable persistence, segment-level memory condensation, artifact-first assembly, and final-validity checking with safe fallback. Evidence is drawn entirely from existing materials: a four-scenario showcase package, a fixed 60-run mechanism matrix, targeted micro-ablation and artifact-chain supplements, and a repaired protocol-level benchmark in which code-oriented evaluation is the clearest quality-sensitive mechanism block. Across the fixed matrix, removing checkpoint/resume produced the only invalid run, and it did so in the interruption-sensitive resume condition. By contrast, dual evaluation, segment synthesis, and dynamic governance are best interpreted as supporting control mechanisms that shape trajectory discipline, explicit artifact progression, and cost-quality behavior rather than as universal binary prerequisites for completion. The contribution is therefore a knowledge-state orchestration architecture in which explicit epistemic state transition, evidence-bearing artifact progression, and recoverable continuity are the primary design commitments.

AI.tldr: ADEMA是一种面向长视域知识合成的知识状态编排架构，通过显式认知记账、双评估治理、自适应模式切换等机制解决LLM在长任务中知识状态漂移、中间承诺隐式化、证据链断裂等问题。实验表明检查点/恢复机制是唯一关键依赖，其他机制为辅助控制手段。
AI.motivation: 长视域LLM任务失败的主要原因并非无法得到单一答案，而是知识状态在多轮交互中漂移(drift)、中间承诺保持隐式(implicit)、中断导致证据链断裂(fracture)，亟需一种显式管理知识状态演化的架构。
AI.method: 提出ADEMA架构，包含八个核心机制：(1)显式认知记账(epistemic bookkeeping); (2)异构双评估治理; (3)自适应任务模式切换; (4)声誉形塑的资源分配; (5)检查点可恢复持久化; (6)片段级记忆凝缩; (7)工件优先组装; (8)最终有效性检查与安全回退。通过60次运行的固定机制矩阵实验进行机制有效性评估。
AI.result: 在固定矩阵中，仅移除检查点/恢复机制导致一次运行失效（发生在中断敏感的恢复条件场景）。双重评估、片段合成、动态治理等机制主要塑造轨迹纪律、显式工件进展和成本-质量行为，而非完成任务的通用二进制前提。
AI.conclusion: ADEMA的核心贡献在于提出了一个知识状态编排架构，其首要设计承诺是：显式认知状态转换、承载证据的工件进展、以及可恢复的连续性——而非依赖单一通用机制。

title: Progressing beyond Art Masterpieces or Touristic Clichés: how to assess your LLMs for cultural alignment?
summary: Although the cultural (mis)alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) has attracted increasing attention -- often framed in terms of cultural bias -- until recently there has been limited work on the design and development of datasets for cultural assessment. Here, we review existing approaches to such datasets and identify their main limitations. To address these issues, we propose design guidelines for annotators and report on the construction of a dataset built according to these principles. We further present a series of contrastive experiments conducted with this dataset. The results demonstrate that our design yields test sets with greater discriminative power, effectively distinguishing between models specialized for a given culture and those that are not, ceteris paribus.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了用于评估大语言模型文化（误）对齐的数据集，指出现有方法的局限性，提出了新的标注设计指南，并构建了相应数据集。实验表明，该设计能更好地区分针对特定文化优化的模型与非优化模型。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于LLM的文化偏差，但缺乏专门用于文化评估的数据集设计工作，因此需要系统化方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 1. 回顾现有文化评估数据集并识别其局限性；2. 提出面向标注者的设计指南；3. 根据指南构建新数据集；4. 开展对比实验验证数据集性能。
AI.result: 新设计产生的测试集具有更强的区分能力，能够有效识别针对特定文化优化的模型与未优化的模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数据集设计方法能够提升文化评估的区分度，为LLM文化对齐研究提供了更可靠的评估工具。

title: COMPASS: COmpact Multi-channel Prior-map And Scene Signature for Floor-Plan-Based Visual Localization
summary: Architectural floor plans are widely available priors which contain not only geometry but also the semantic information of the environment, yet existing localization methods largely ignore this semantic information. To address this, we present COMPASS, an algorithm that exploits both geometric and semantic priors from floor plans to estimate the pose of a robot equipped with dual fisheye cameras. Inspired by scan context descriptor from LiDAR-based place recognition, we design a multi-channel radial descriptor that encodes the geometric layout surrounding a position. From the floor plan, rays are cast in 360 azimuth bins and the results are encoded into five channels: normalized range, structural hit type (wall, window, or opening), range gradient, inverse range, and local range variance. From the image side, the same descriptor structure is populated by detecting structural elements in the fisheye imagery. As a first step toward full cross-modal matching, we present a window detection algorithm for fisheye images that uses a line segment detector to identify window frames via vertical edge clustering and brightness verification. Detected windows are projected to azimuthal bearings through the fisheye camera model, producing the hit-type channel of the visual descriptor. As a proof of concept, we generate both descriptors at a single known pose from the Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026 dataset and demonstrate that the wall-window pattern extracted from the first frame of each camera closely matches the floor plan descriptor, validating the feasibility of cross-modal structural matching.

AI.tldr: COMPASS是一种利用建筑平面图的几何和语义先验信息（如墙壁、窗户、开口），通过多通道径向描述子实现双鱼眼相机机器人定位的方法，并在Hilti-Trimble数据集上验证了跨模态结构匹配的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有定位方法大多忽略建筑平面图中蕴含的语义信息（如窗户、门等），未能充分利用这一广泛可用的先验知识。
AI.method: 受LiDAR场景扫描上下文描述子启发，设计多通道径向描述子（归一化距离、结构类型、距离梯度、逆距离、局部距离方差），分别从平面图（射线投射）和鱼眼图像（结构元素检测，尤其是窗户检测算法）构建，实现跨模态匹配。
AI.result: 在Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026数据集上，从已知位姿生成的平面图描述子与鱼眼图像第一帧提取的墙壁-窗户模式高度匹配，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态的结构语义匹配是可行的，为未来端到端的平面图-视觉定位提供了基础。

title: Knowledge-Data Dually Driven Paradigm for Accurate Landslide Susceptibility Prediction under Data-Scarce Conditions Using Geomorphic Priors and Tabular Foundation Model
summary: Landslide susceptibility prediction is critical for geohazard risk assessment and mitigation. Conventional data-driven paradigm achieves high predictive accuracy but require sufficient conditioning factors and large-scale landslide inventories. However, in practical engineering applications across mountainous and plateau regions, data-scarce conditions are commonly observed, where such data requirements are rarely satisfied, rendering conventional data-driven paradigm inapplicable. To address this issue, we propose a knowledge-data dually driven paradigm for accurate landslide susceptibility prediction under data-scarce conditions. The essential idea behind the proposed novel paradigm is the integration of the geomorphic prior knowledge with scarce landslide data. To validate the proposed paradigm, we first applied it to a data-rich region in central Italy, where a conventional data-driven paradigm trained on the full dataset served as the baseline. By utilizing only 30% of the available landslide data, the proposed paradigm achieved comparable predictive accuracy to the baseline, demonstrating its effectiveness under data-scarce conditions. The paradigm was further evaluated in a genuinely data-scarce environment for application, the Qilian Permafrost Region of the Tibetan Plateau, where it also yielded reliable susceptibility predictions, confirming its applicability under data-scarce conditions.

AI.tldr: 针对数据稀缺条件下滑坡易发性预测难题，提出知识-数据双驱动范式，通过融合地貌先验知识与少量滑坡数据，在仅用30%数据时即达到与完整数据传统方法相当的预测精度，并在青藏高原祁连冻土区验证了实用性。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动范式在高精度预测上表现优异，但依赖充足的 conditioning factors 和大规模滑坡编目；然而山区和高原地区的实际工程中常面临数据稀缺条件，传统范式无法适用，亟需新方法解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 提出知识-数据双驱动范式，核心思想是将地貌先验知识与稀缺的滑坡数据相融合，在数据稀缺条件下实现高精度滑坡易发性预测。
AI.result: 在意大利中部数据充足区域，仅用30%滑坡数据即达到与全数据基线相当的精度；在青藏高原祁连冻土区真正数据稀缺环境中，也获得了可靠的易发性预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提知识-数据双驱动范式能有效克服数据稀缺瓶颈，在保障预测精度的同时大幅降低对数据量的需求，为山区和高原工程实践提供了可行方案。

title: Recursive Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Recursive or looped language models have recently emerged as a new scaling axis by iteratively refining the same model computation over latent states to deepen reasoning. We extend such scaling principle from a single model to multi-agent systems, and ask: Can agent collaboration itself be scaled through recursion? To this end, we introduce RecursiveMAS, a recursive multi-agent framework that casts the entire system as a unified latent-space recursive computation. RecursiveMAS connects heterogeneous agents as a collaboration loop through the lightweight RecursiveLink module, enabling in-distribution latent thoughts generation and cross-agent latent state transfer. To optimize our framework, we develop an inner-outer loop learning algorithm for iterative whole-system co-optimization through shared gradient-based credit assignment across recursion rounds. Theoretical analyses of runtime complexity and learning dynamics establish that RecursiveMAS is more efficient than standard text-based MAS and maintains stable gradients during recursive training. Empirically, we instantiate RecursiveMAS under 4 representative agent collaboration patterns and evaluate across 9 benchmarks spanning mathematics, science, medicine, search, and code generation. In comparison with advanced single/multi-agent and recursive computation baselines, RecursiveMAS consistently delivers an average accuracy improvement of 8.3%, together with 1.2$\times$-2.4$\times$ end-to-end inference speedup, and 34.6%-75.6% token usage reduction. Code and Data are provided in https://recursivemas.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RecursiveMAS，一种递归多智能体框架，将整个系统视为统一的潜在空间递归计算，通过RecursiveLink模块实现异构智能体之间的协作循环，并设计内外环学习算法进行系统级协同优化。实验表明，相比基线方法，RecursiveMAS在9个基准上平均提升8.3%准确率，同时实现1.2-2.4倍推理加速和34.6%-75.6%的token使用减少。
AI.motivation: 将递归/循环语言模型从单一模型扩展到多智能体系统，探究智能体协作本身是否可以通过递归方式实现规模化扩展。
AI.method: 提出RecursiveMAS框架：(1) RecursiveLink模块连接异构智能体形成协作循环，实现潜在空间内隐式思维生成与跨智能体状态传递；(2) 内外环学习算法，通过共享梯度驱动的信用分配实现跨递归轮次的系统级协同优化。
AI.result: 在9个基准（数学、科学、医学、搜索、代码生成）上，相比单/多智能体及递归计算基线，平均准确率提升8.3%，推理速度提升1.2-2.4倍，token使用减少34.6%-75.6%。
AI.conclusion: 递归多智能体协作是一种高效且可扩展的范式，RecursiveMAS在性能、速度和效率上均优于现有方法，且理论分析表明其运行时复杂度和学习动态更优。

title: Leveraging Previous-Traversal Point Cloud Map Priors for Camera-Based 3D Object Detection and Tracking
summary: Camera-based 3D object detection and tracking are central to autonomous driving, yet precise 3D object localization remains fundamentally constrained by depth ambiguity when no expensive, depth-rich online LiDAR is available at inference. In many deployments, however, vehicles repeatedly traverse the same environments, making static point cloud maps from prior traversals a practical source of geometric priors. We propose DualViewMapDet, a camera-only inference framework that retrieves such map priors online and leverages them to mitigate the absence of a LiDAR sensor during deployment. The key idea is a dual-space camera-map fusion strategy that avoids one-sided view conversion. Specifically, we (i) project the map into perspective view (PV) and encode multi-channel geometric cues to enrich image features and support BEV lifting, and (ii) encode the map directly in bird's-eye view (BEV) with a sparse voxel backbone and fuse it with lifted camera features in a shared metric space. Extensive evaluations on nuScenes and Argoverse 2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong camera-only baselines, with particularly strong gains in object localization. Ablations further validate the contributions of PV/BEV fusion and prior-map coverage. We make the code and pre-trained models available at https://dualviewmapdet.cs.uni-freiburg.de .

AI.tldr: DualViewMapDet提出了一种双空间相机-地图融合策略，在推理时利用预先构建的静态点云地图来增强纯相机3D目标检测，无需在线LiDAR。该方法分别在透视视图和鸟瞰视图中编码地图信息，并与相机特征融合，在nuScenes和Argoverse 2上显著提升了定位精度。
AI.motivation: 纯相机3D目标检测受限于深度模糊性，而在线LiDAR成本高昂。但自动驾驶车辆会重复经过相同环境，因此可以利用预先采集的静态点云地图作为几何先验，弥补推理时缺失LiDAR的问题。
AI.method: 提出双空间相机-地图融合策略：(1) 将地图投影到透视视图(PV)，编码多通道几何线索以增强图像特征并辅助BEV提升；(2) 在鸟瞰视图(BEV)中用稀疏体素骨干直接编码地图，与提升后的相机特征在共享度量空间中融合。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2数据集上，相比强纯相机基线方法，该方法在3D目标检测和定位上取得了一致且显著的改进。
AI.conclusion: 双空间融合策略有效利用了先验地图信息，弥补了推理时无LiDAR的不足，PV和BEV两个视角的融合以及先验地图的覆盖范围都对性能提升有贡献。

title: Back to Repair: A Minimal Denoising Network for Time Series Anomaly Detection
summary: We introduce JuRe (Just Repair), a minimal denoising network for time series anomaly detection that exposes a central finding: architectural complexity is unnecessary when the training objective correctly implements the manifold-projection principle. JuRe consists of a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block with hidden dimension 128, trained to repair corrupted time series windows and scored at inference by a fixed, parameter-free structural discrepancy function. Despite using no attention, no latent variable, and no adversarial component, JuRe ranks second on the TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404, 180 series, 17 datasets) and second on the UCR univariate archive by AUC-PR (0.198, 250 series), leading all neural baselines on AUC-PR and VUS-PR. Component ablation on TSB-AD identifies training-time corruption as the dominant factor ($Δ$AUC-PR $= 0.047$ on removal), confirming that the denoising objective, not network capacity, drives detection quality. Pairwise Wilcoxon signed-rank tests establish statistical significance against 21 of 25 baselines on TSB-AD. Code is available at the URL https://github.com/iis-esslingen/JuRe.

AI.tldr: JuRe提出一个极简去噪网络用于时间序列异常检测，仅用单个深度可分离卷积残差块（隐藏维128），无注意力、无潜变量、无对抗组件，在TSB-AD和UCR基准上达到第二名，超越所有神经基线，证明训练目标（去噪）而非网络容量才是检测质量的关键。
AI.motivation: 挑战时间序列异常检测中日益复杂的网络架构趋势（注意力、潜变量、对抗训练等），验证流形投影原则是否能在极简设计下实现高效异常检测。
AI.method: 单块深度可分离卷积残差网络（隐藏维128），训练时通过修复损坏的时间序列窗口（去噪任务）隐式学习正常数据的流形结构；推理时使用无参数的固定结构差异函数进行异常评分。
AI.result: TSB-AD多变量基准AUC-PR 0.404（第二名），UCR单变量档案AUC-PR 0.198（第二名），均超越所有神经基线；消融实验发现训练时损坏机制移除导致AUC-PR下降0.047，为最关键组件。
AI.conclusion: 时间序列异常检测中，去噪训练目标（流形投影原则）比网络架构复杂度更重要；极简设计足以达到SOTA水平，并通过对25个基线中21个的Wilcoxon检验验证了统计显著性。

title: Modeling Human-Like Color Naming Behavior in Context
summary: Modeling the emergence of human-like lexicons in computational systems has advanced through the use of interacting neural agents, which simulate both learning and communicative pressures. The NeLLCom-Lex framework (Zhang et al., 2025) allows neural agents to develop pragmatic color naming behavior and human-like lexicons through supervised learning (SL) from human data and reinforcement learning (RL) in referential games. Despite these successes, the lexicons that emerge diverge systematically from human color categories, producing highly non-convex regions in color space, which contrast with the convexity typical of human categories. To address this, we introduce two factors, upsampling rare color terms during SL and multi-listener RL interactions, and adopt a convexity measure to quantify geometric coherence. We find that upsampling improves lexical diversity and system-level informativeness of the color lexicon, while many-listener setups promote more convex color categories. The combination of moderate upsampling and multiple listeners produces lexicons most similar to human systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过上采样稀有颜色术语和多监听器强化学习，使神经代理生成的色彩词汇更接近人类语言的凸性特征，解决现有框架生成非凸色彩类别的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经代理框架（NeLLCom-Lex）虽能生成类人词汇，但产生的色彩类别高度非凸，与人类色彩类别的凸性特征存在系统性偏差。
AI.method: 引入两种策略：1）在监督学习阶段对稀有颜色术语进行上采样；2）采用多监听器强化学习交互。并使用凸性度量量化几何一致性。
AI.result: 上采样提升了词汇多样性和系统信息性；多监听器设置促进了更凸的色彩类别；两者的结合产生了最接近人类系统的词汇。
AI.conclusion: 适度的上采样与多监听器组合是生成类人色彩词汇的关键因素。

title: Beyond Fidelity: Semantic Similarity Assessment in Low-Level Image Processing
summary: Low-level image processing has long been evaluated mainly from the perspective of visual fidelity. However, with the rise of deep learning and generative models, processed images may preserve perceptual quality while altering semantic content, making conventional Image Quality Assessment (IQA) insufficient for semantic-level assessment. In this paper, we formalize \textit{Semantic Similarity} as a new evaluation task for low-level image processing, aimed at measuring whether semantic content is preserved after processing. We further present a structured formulation of image semantics based on semantic entities and their relations, and discuss the desired properties and constraints of a valid semantic similarity index. Based on this formulation, we propose Triplet-based Semantic Similarity Score (T3S), which models image semantics through foreground entities, background entities, and relations. T3S combines semantic entity extraction, foreground-background disentanglement, and open-world class/relation modeling. Experiments on COCO and SPA-Data show that T3S consistently outperforms existing fidelity-oriented metrics and representative semantic-level baselines, while better reflecting progressive semantic changes under diverse degradations. These results highlight the importance of semantic assessment in modern low-level vision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向低层图像处理的语义相似度评估任务，并设计了三元组语义相似度分数(T3S)，通过前景实体、背景实体及其关系建模图像语义，实验证明其优于传统保真度指标和现有语义级基线。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估(IQA)主要关注视觉保真度，但随着深度学习与生成模型的发展，处理后图像可能保持感知质量但改变语义内容，这使得传统IQA无法有效评估语义层面的变化。因此亟需一种新的评估方法来衡量低层图像处理中语义内容的保持程度。
AI.method: 提出T3S（Triplet-based Semantic Similarity Score）方法。首先形式化定义了图像语义的结构化表示——包含前景实体、背景实体及其关系。T3S结合语义实体提取、前景-背景解耦以及开放世界的类别/关系建模，通过三元组结构对图像语义进行量化评估。
AI.result: 在COCO和SPA-Data数据集上的实验表明，T3S在反映语义变化方面一致优于现有的保真度导向指标（如PSNR、SSIM）以及有代表性的语义级基线方法，能更好地捕捉多样化退化下的渐进语义变化。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了在现代低层视觉中引入语义评估的重要性，T3S提供了一种有效的语义相似度度量方式，填补了传统IQA在语义层面的不足。

title: VLM Judges Can Rank but Cannot Score: Task-Dependent Uncertainty in Multimodal Evaluation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used as automated judges for multimodal systems, yet their scores provide no indication of reliability. We study this problem through conformal prediction, a distribution-free framework that converts a judge's point score into a calibrated prediction interval using only score-token log-probabilities, with no retraining. We present the first systematic analysis of conformal prediction for VLM-as-a-Judge across 3 judges and 14 visual task categories. Our results show that evaluation uncertainty is strongly task-dependent: intervals cover ~40% of the score range for aesthetics and natural images but expand to ~70% for chart and mathematical reasoning, yielding a quantitative reliability map for multimodal evaluation. We further identify a failure mode not captured by standard evaluation metrics, ranking-scoring decoupling, where judges achieve high ranking correlation while producing wide, uninformative intervals, correctly ordering responses but failing to assign reliable absolute scores. Finally, we show that interval width is driven primarily by task difficulty and annotation quality, i.e., the same judge and method yield 4.5x narrower intervals on a clean, multi-annotator captioning benchmark. Code: https://github.com/divake/VLM-Judge-Uncertainty

AI.tldr: 本文研究将保形预测（Conformal Prediction）应用于VLM评估系统，仅利用得分token的对数概率为VLM裁判生成校准的预测区间，无需重新训练。实验发现评估不确定性高度依赖任务类型，并揭示了“排序-评分解耦”这一新失效模式。
AI.motivation: VLM作为自动化评估系统日益普及，但其输出的分数缺乏可靠性指示，无法量化评估的不确定性。
AI.method: 采用保形预测框架，利用VLM输出分数token的对数概率，将点估计转换为校准的预测区间，无需重新训练模型。
AI.result: 在3个裁判模型和14个视觉任务类别上实验：不确定性高度任务依赖（美学/自然图像区间覆盖~40%分数范围，图表/数学推理达~70%）；发现排序-评分解耦失效模式；区间宽度主要受任务难度和标注质量驱动（干净基准上区间窄4.5倍）。
AI.conclusion: 保形预测能为VLM评估提供有效的可靠性映射，揭示了任务依赖的不确定性和新的失效模式，对多模态评估系统的可信度提升有重要意义。

title: CORAL: Adaptive Retrieval Loop for Culturally-Aligned Multilingual RAG
summary: Multilingual retrieval-augmented generation (mRAG) is often implemented within a fixed retrieval space, typically via query or document translation or multilingual embedding vector representations. However, this approach may be inadequate for culturally grounded queries, in which retrieval-condition misalignment may occur. Even strong retrievers and generators may struggle to produce culturally relevant answers when sourcing evidence from inappropriate linguistic or regional contexts. To this end, we introduce CORAL (COntext-aware Retrieval with Agentic Loop, an adaptive retrieval methodology for mRAG that enables iterative refinement of both the retrieval space (corpora) and the retrieval probe (query) based on the quality of the evidence. The overall process includes: (1) selecting corpora, (2) retrieving documents, (3) critiquing evidence for relevance and cultural alignment, and (4) checking sufficiency. If the retrieved documents are insufficient to answer the query correctly, the system (5) reselects corpora and rewrites the query. Across two cultural QA benchmarks, CORAL achieves up to a 3.58%p accuracy improvement on low-resource languages relative to the strongest baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORAL，一种基于智能体循环的自适应检索方法，通过迭代优化检索空间和查询来解决多语言RAG中文化相关查询的检索-条件不匹配问题，在文化QA基准上对低资源语言提升达3.58%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有mRAG在固定检索空间下处理文化相关查询时，检索条件可能不匹配，即使强大的检索器和生成器也会因检索到不恰当语言或地域背景的证据而无法产生文化相关的答案。
AI.method: CORAL构建自适应检索循环，包括：(1)选择语料库、(2)检索文档、(3)评估证据的相关性和文化对齐、(4)检查是否充分、(5)若不充分则重新选择语料库并重写查询，形成迭代优化闭环。
AI.result: 在两个文化QA基准测试中，CORAL在低资源语言上相比最强基线实现了最高3.58%的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: CORAL证明了对检索空间和查询进行自适应迭代优化能够有效改善文化相关查询的多语言检索增强生成效果，尤其对低资源语言表现显著。

title: A Systematic Post-Train Framework for Video Generation
summary: While large-scale video diffusion models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in generating high-resolution and semantically rich content, a significant gap remains between their pretraining performance and real-world deployment requirements due to critical issues such as prompt sensitivity, temporal inconsistency, and prohibitive inference costs. To bridge this gap, we propose a comprehensive post-training framework that systematically aligns pretrained models with user intentions through four synergistic stages: we first employ Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to transform the base model into a stable instruction-following policy, followed by a Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) stage that utilizes a novel Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) method tailored for video diffusion to enhance perceptual quality and temporal coherence; subsequently, we integrate Prompt Enhancement via a specialized language model to refine user inputs, and finally address system efficiency through Inference Optimization. Together, these components provide a systematic approach to improving visual quality, temporal coherence, and instruction following, while preserving the controllability learned during pretraining. The result is a practical blueprint for building scalable post-training pipelines that are stable, adaptable, and effective in real-world deployment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this unified pipeline effectively mitigates common artifacts and significantly improves controllability and visual aesthetics while adhering to strict sampling cost constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个四阶段后训练框架（SFT、RLHF/GRPO、提示增强、推理优化），系统性地将大规模视频扩散模型与用户意图对齐，解决提示敏感性、时间不一致性和推理成本问题，显著提升视觉质量和可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在预训练后存在提示敏感性、时间不一致性和推理成本过高等问题，导致与真实部署需求之间存在显著差距。
AI.method: 提出四阶段后训练框架：(1) 监督微调(SFT)实现稳定指令跟随；(2) RLHF阶段采用专为视频扩散设计的Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)方法提升感知质量和时序连贯性；(3) 通过专用语言模型进行提示增强；(4) 推理优化提升系统效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该统一流程有效减少了常见伪影，在严格采样成本约束下显著提升了可控性和视觉美学质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建可扩展、稳定、适应性强且真实部署有效的后训练流程提供了实用蓝图。

title: Categorical Optimization with Bayesian Anchored Latent Trust Regions for Structural Design under High-Dimensional Uncertainty
summary:
Categorical structural optimization under aleatoric uncertainty is challenging because each design variable must be selected from a finite catalog of admissible instances, while each candidate design may require expensive stochastic finite-element evaluations.
  Existing latent-space optimization strategies can reduce the dimensionality of catalog attributes, but they often treat the reduced space as a continuous search domain.
  The resulting continuous optimum must then be rounded off to a nearby catalog instance, which may alter the objective value, constraint status, or physical interpretation of the design.
  To address this issue, this paper proposes the \textbf{C}ategorical \textbf{O}ptimization with \textbf{B}ayesian \textbf{A}nchored \textbf{L}atent \textbf{T}rust Regions (\textbf{COBALT}) framework for high-dimensional categorical Optimization Under Uncertainty.
  COBALT first embeds the physical catalog into a low-dimensional latent representation and locks the mapped instances as a discrete anchored graph.
  A data-independent random tree decomposition is then used to provide bounded-complexity additive modeling over high-dimensional categorical variables.
  On this anchored domain, an additive SAAS-GP surrogate is fitted to heteroscedastic MC-FEA observations, and a trust-region discrete graph acquisition search selects the next admissible catalog configuration without continuous relaxation or rounding-off.
  The proposed strategy is applied to robust design optimization of complex bar structures, considering structural weight, strain energy, and local buckling performance.
  By evaluating only valid catalog designs through the MC-FEA oracle, COBALT preserves physical admissibility throughout the active learning loop and improves the efficiency of robust categorical structural optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COBALT框架，通过潜在空间离散锚定图与信任域离散图搜索，解决高维分类变量在不确定性下的结构优化问题，避免连续松弛带来的设计失真。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在空间优化策略将分类变量连续化处理，导致最优解需圆整到邻近实例，可能改变目标值、约束状态或物理含义。亟需一种无需连续松弛即可直接在高维分类空间中搜索的优化方法。
AI.method: (1) 将物理目录嵌入低维潜在表示，锁定为离散锚定图；(2) 用数据无关随机树分解对高维分类变量进行有界复杂度的加性建模；(3) 在锚定域上拟合加性SAAS-GP代理模型；(4) 通过信任域离散图采集搜索直接选择合法目录配置，无需连续松弛或圆整。
AI.result: 在复杂杆结构鲁棒设计中，COBALT仅评估合法目录设计（通过MC-FEA评估），在整个主动学习循环中保持物理合法性，提高了鲁棒分类结构优化的效率。
AI.conclusion: COBALT通过离散锚定图与信任域搜索，有效解决了高维分类不确定优化中的连续松弛-圆整问题，在保持物理可解释性的同时提升优化效率。

title: Backtranslation Augmented Direct Preference Optimization for Neural Machine Translation
summary: Contemporary neural machine translation (NMT) systems are almost exclusively built by training on supervised parallel data. Despite the tremendous progress achieved, these systems still exhibit persistent translation errors. This paper proposes that a post-training paradigm based on reinforcement learning (RL) can effectively rectify such mistakes. We introduce a novel framework that requires only a general text corpus and an expert translator which can be either human or an AI system to provide iterative feedback. In our experiments, we focus specifically on English-to-German translation as a representative high-resource language pair. Crucially, we implement this RL-based post-training using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Applying our DPO-driven framework to the gemma3-1b model yields a significant improvement in translation quality, elevating it's COMET score from 0.703 to 0.747 on the English to German task. The results demonstrate that DPO offers an efficient and stable pathway for enhancing pre-trained NMT models through preference-based post-training.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于强化学习（DPO）的后训练框架，通过在通用文本语料上使用专家反馈来纠正NMT系统的翻译错误，在英德任务上将gemma3-1b模型的COMET分数从0.703提升至0.747。
AI.motivation: 当前NMT系统尽管取得了巨大进步，但仍然存在持续的翻译错误，而传统监督训练难以有效消除这些错误。
AI.method: 提出一种基于强化学习的后训练范式，利用Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) 方法，仅需通用文本语料和专家（人类或AI）提供的迭代反馈即可优化模型。
AI.result: 在英译德任务上，对gemma3-1b模型应用DPO后训练，COMET分数从0.703提升至0.747。
AI.conclusion: DPO提供了一条高效且稳定的路径，能够通过偏好-based后训练增强预训练NMT模型的翻译质量。

title: SARU: A Shadow-Aware and Removal Unified Framework for Remote Sensing Images with New Benchmarks
summary: Shadows are a prevalent problem in remote sensing imagery (RSI), degrading visual quality and severely limiting the performance of downstream tasks like object detection and semantic segmentation. Most prior works treat shadow detection and removal as separate, cascaded tasks, which can lead to cumbersome process and error accumulation. Furthermore, many deep learning methods rely on paired shadow and non-shadow images for training, which are often unavailable in practice. To address these challenges, we propose Shadow-Aware and Removal Unified (SARU) Framework , a cohesive two-stage framework. First, its dual-branch detection module (DBCSF-Net) fuses multi-color space and semantic features to generate high-fidelity shadow masks, effectively distinguishing shadows from dark objects. Then, leveraging these masks, a novel, training-free physical algorithm (N$^2$SGSR) restores illumination by transferring properties from adjacent non-shadow regions within the single input image. To facilitate rigorous evaluation and foster future work, we also introduce two new benchmark datasets: the RSI Shadow Detection (RSISD) dataset and the Single-image Shadow Removal Benchmark (SiSRB). Extensive experiments demonstrate that SARU achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the public AISD dataset and our newly introduced benchmarks. By holistically integrating shadow detection and removal to mitigate error propagation and eliminating the dependency on paired training data, SARU establishes a robust, practical framework for real-world RSI analysis. The source code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/SARU-Framework.

AI.tldr: 提出SARU统一框架，将阴影检测与去除集成于两阶段流程（DBCSF-Net检测+N²SGSR无训练物理恢复），无需配对训练数据，并在新基准数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将阴影检测与去除视为独立级联任务，流程繁琐且易产生误差累积；深度学习方法依赖配对的阴影/无阴影图像，实际中难以获取。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：(1) 双分支检测模块DBCSF-Net融合多色彩空间与语义特征生成高质量阴影掩膜；(2) 基于掩膜的无训练物理算法N²SGSR，通过单幅图像内相邻非阴影区域的光照属性传递实现光照恢复。
AI.result: 在公开AISD数据集及新构建的RSISD、SiSRB基准上均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SARU通过整体集成阴影检测与去除，缓解了误差传播，消除了对配对训练数据的依赖，为实际遥感图像分析建立了鲁棒且实用的框架。

title: DGLight: DQN-Guided GRPO Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models for Traffic Signal Control
summary: Traffic signal control (TSC) plays a central role in reducing congestion and maintaining urban mobility. This dissertation introduces DGLight, a critic-guided reinforcement-learning framework for adapting a pretrained large language model to TSC. DGLight first trains a CoLight-based Deep Q-Network critic to estimate traffic-aware action values from structured intersection states, then uses the frozen critic to score candidate language-model actions and optimize the policy with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The resulting controller maps traffic states to interpretable reasoning traces and signal decisions while learning from dense per-state supervision rather than raw cumulative environment rewards. Experiments on TSC benchmarks covering Jinan and Hangzhou show that DGLight is the strongest overall method among the compared LLM-based controllers, remains competitive with strong RL baselines, and transfers well to city datasets not used to fit the critic. Qualitative examples further show that the model's generated reasoning is interpretable and aligned with the chosen signal phase. The project code is available $\href{https://github.com/yyccbb/FYP_LLMTSC}{here}$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DGLight框架，通过预训练LLM结合CoLight批评器与GRPO优化，实现可解释的交通信号控制，在济南和杭州数据集上表现优于其他LLM方法，接近强RL基线，并具备良好迁移性。
AI.motivation: 传统TSC方法缺乏可解释性，强化学习虽然有效但奖励稀疏且难以理解决策过程。LLM具备推理能力但直接应用于TSC效果不佳，因此需要一种能结合LLM推理优势与RL学习效率的框架。
AI.method: 先训练一个基于CoLight的Deep Q-Network批评器来评估结构化交通状态的动作价值，然后冻结该批评器，利用GRPO优化LLM策略，使模型从密集的每状态监督信号中学习，而非仅依赖累积环境奖励。
AI.result: 在济南和杭州的TSC基准测试中，DGLight在所有LLM方法中表现最强，与强RL基线竞争力相当，且能良好迁移到未参与批评器训练的城市数据集。
AI.conclusion: DGLight成功将LLM的推理能力与RL的学习效率结合，实现了可解释且高性能的交通信号控制，为LLM在结构化决策任务中的应用提供了有效范式。

title: Cross-Lingual Jailbreak Detection via Semantic Codebooks
summary: Safety mechanisms for large language models (LLMs) remain predominantly English-centric, creating systematic vulnerabilities in multilingual deployment. Prior work shows that translating malicious prompts into other languages can substantially increase jailbreak success rates, exposing a structural cross-lingual security gap. We investigate whether such attacks can be mitigated through language-agnostic semantic similarity without retraining or language-specific adaptation. Our approach compares multilingual query embeddings against a fixed English codebook of jailbreak prompts, operating as a training-free external guardrail for black-box LLMs. We conduct a systematic evaluation across four languages, two translation pipelines, four safety benchmarks, three embedding models, and three target LLMs (Qwen, Llama, GPT-3.5). Our results reveal two distinct regimes of cross-lingual transfer. On curated benchmarks containing canonical jailbreak templates, semantic similarity generalizes reliably across languages, achieving near-perfect separability (AUC up to 0.99) and substantial reductions in absolute attack success rates under strict low-false-positive constraints. However, under distribution shift - on behaviorally diverse and heterogeneous unsafe benchmarks - separability degrades markedly (AUC $\approx$ 0.60-0.70), and recall in the security-critical low-FPR regime drops across all embedding models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语言无关语义相似度的跨语言越狱攻击检测方法，实验表明该方法在规范化基准上效果优异（AUC最高0.99），但在分布偏移下性能显著下降（AUC约0.60-0.70）。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM安全机制以英语为中心，导致多语言部署中存在系统性的安全漏洞。将恶意提示翻译成其他语言可以显著提高越狱成功率，因此亟需一种无需重新训练或语言适配的跨语言防御方法。
AI.method: 将多语言查询嵌入与固定的英语越狱提示代码簿进行语义相似度比较，作为黑盒LLM的训练无关外部护栏。在四种语言、两条翻译流水线、四个安全基准、三种嵌入模型和三种目标LLM上进行系统评估。
AI.result: 在规范化越狱模板基准上语义相似度泛化可靠，AUC最高达0.99；但在行为多样化的不安全基准上（分布偏移），可分性显著下降至AUC约0.60-0.70，低假阳性率下的召回率普遍下降。
AI.conclusion: 基于语义相似度的跨语言防御在规范化场景下有效，但在分布偏移下存在明显局限，揭示了两种不同的跨语言迁移机制。

title: GramSR: Visual Feature Conditioning for Diffusion-Based Super-Resolution
comment: Accepted at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition
summary: Despite recent advances, single-image super-resolution (SR) remains challenging, especially in real-world scenarios with complex degradations. Diffusion-based SR methods, particularly those built on Stable Diffusion, leverage strong generative priors but commonly rely on text conditioning derived from semantic captioning. Such textual descriptions provide only high-level semantics and lack the spatially aligned visual information required for faithful restoration, leading to a representation gap between abstract semantics and spatially aligned visual details. To address this limitation, we propose GramSR, a one-step diffusion-based SR framework that replaces text conditioning with dense visual features extracted from the low-resolution input using a pre-trained DINOv3 encoder. GramSR adopts a three-stage LoRA architecture, where pixel-level, semantic-level, and texture-level LoRA modules are trained sequentially. The pixel-level module focuses on degradation removal using $\ell_2$ loss, the semantic-level module enhances perceptual details via LPIPS and CSD losses, and the texture-level module enforces feature correlation consistency through a Gram matrix loss computed from DINOv3 features. At inference, independent guidance scales enable flexible control over degradation removal, semantic enhancement, and texture preservation. Extensive experiments on standard SR benchmarks demonstrate that GramSR consistently outperforms existing one-step diffusion-based methods, achieving superior structural fidelity and texture realism. The code for this work is available at: https://github.com/aimagelab/GramSR.

AI.tldr: GramSR提出了一种基于一步扩散的超分辨率框架，用DINOv3提取的密集视觉特征替代文本条件，通过三级LoRA（像素级、语义级、纹理级）顺序训练，在保持结构真实性的同时实现卓越的纹理重建。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散超分辨率方法依赖文本描述（语义字幕）作为条件，但文本只能提供高层语义，缺乏空间对齐的视觉细节信息，导致抽象语义与空间视觉细节之间存在表示鸿沟，影响忠实恢复。
AI.method: 提出GramSR，用预训练DINOv3编码器从低分辨率输入中提取密集视觉特征替代文本条件；采用三级LoRA架构顺序训练：像素级（ℓ2损失去退化）、语义级（LPIPS+CSD损失增强感知细节）、纹理级（DINOv3特征的Gram矩阵损失保持纹理一致性）；推理时各模块独立引导尺度实现灵活控制。
AI.result: 在标准超分辨率基准上，GramSR在结构保真度和纹理真实感方面一致优于现有一步扩散超分辨率方法。
AI.conclusion: 用密集视觉特征替代文本条件能有效桥接语义-视觉表示鸿沟，三级LoRA顺序训练策略和独立引导机制为超分辨率中的退化去除、语义增强和纹理保持提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。

title: Online combinatorial optimization with stochastic decision sets and adversarial losses
comment: Published at Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2014
summary: Most work on sequential learning assumes a fixed set of actions that are available all the time. However, in practice, actions can consist of picking subsets of readings from sensors that may break from time to time, road segments that can be blocked or goods that are out of stock. In this paper we study learning algorithms that are able to deal with stochastic availability of such unreliable composite actions. We propose and analyze algorithms based on the Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader prediction method for several learning settings differing in the feedback provided to the learner. Our algorithms rely on a novel loss estimation technique that we call Counting Asleep Times. We deliver regret bounds for our algorithms for the previously studied full information and (semi-)bandit settings, as well as a natural middle point between the two that we call the restricted information setting. A special consequence of our results is a significant improvement of the best known performance guarantees achieved by an efficient algorithm for the sleeping bandit problem with stochastic availability. Finally, we evaluate our algorithms empirically and show their improvement over the known approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在复合动作（如传感器子集、路段等）随机不可用情况下的序列学习问题，提出基于Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader的算法，并采用名为"Counting Asleep Times"的新型损失估计技术，在完全信息、半赌博及新提出的限制信息设置下给出遗憾界，显著改进了睡眠赌博机问题的已知性能保证。
AI.motivation: 传统序列学习假设动作集固定且始终可用，但现实中动作（如传感器子集、路段、商品）可能因故障、堵塞或断货而随机不可用，现有算法无法处理这种不可靠复合动作的随机可用性问题。
AI.method: 基于Follow-The-Perturbed-Leader预测方法，提出新的损失估计技术"Counting Asleep Times"（计数休眠时间），在完全信息、半赌博以及新提出的"限制信息"设置下分别设计算法。
AI.result: 在多个学习设置下给出了算法的遗憾界，显著改进了睡眠赌博机问题中已知的最佳性能保证，并通过实验验证了算法优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法能有效处理复合动作随机不可用的序列学习问题，在理论保证和实证表现上均优于已有方法。

title: CGU-ILALab at FoodBench-QA 2026: Comparing Traditional and LLM-based Approaches for Recipe Nutrient Estimation
comment: Accepted by the Third Workshop on Patient-oriented Language Processing (CL4Health) at LREC 2026
summary: Accurate nutrient estimation from unstructured recipe text is an important yet challenging problem in dietary monitoring, due to ambiguous ingredient terminology and highly variable quantity expressions. We systematically evaluate models spanning a wide range of representational capacity, from lexical matching methods (TF-IDF with Ridge Regression), to deep semantic encoders (DeBERTa-v3), to generative reasoning with large language models (LLMs). Under the strict tolerance criteria defined by EU Regulation 1169/2011, our empirical results reveal a clear trade-off between predictive accuracy and computational efficiency. The TF-IDF baseline achieves moderate nutrient estimation performance with near-instantaneous inference, whereas the DeBERTa-v3 encoder performs poorly under task-specific data scarcity. In contrast, few-shot LLM inference (e.g., Gemini 2.5 Flash) and a hybrid LLM refinement pipeline (TF-IDF combined with Gemini 2.5 Flash) deliver the highest validation accuracy across all nutrient categories. These improvements likely arise from the ability of LLMs to leverage pre-trained world knowledge to resolve ambiguous terminology and normalize non-standard units, which remain difficult for purely lexical approaches. However, these gains come at the cost of substantially higher inference latency, highlighting a practical deployment trade-off between real-time efficiency and nutritional precision in dietary monitoring systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了从非结构化食谱文本中估算营养成分的方法，发现LLM（如Gemini 2.5 Flash）和混合方法在欧盟严格标准下精度最高，但推理延迟显著高于TF-IDF基线，存在精度与效率的权衡。
AI.motivation: 准确从非结构化食谱文本中估算营养成分对饮食监测至关重要，但面临模糊的食材术语和高度可变的数量表达两大挑战，现有方法缺乏系统性比较。
AI.method: 系统评估三类模型：TF-IDF+Ridge回归（词法匹配）、DeBERTa-v3（深度语义编码）、LLM生成推理（Gemini 2.5 Flash）及混合LLM精炼管道，在EU Regulation 1169/2011严格容差标准下进行对比。
AI.result: TF-IDF基线推理速度快但精度中等；DeBERTa-v3在任务特定数据稀缺时表现差；少样本LLM和混合LLM管道在所有营养类别中验证精度最高；LLM的优势源于预训练世界知识解决歧义和标准化非标准单位的能力，但推理延迟显著更高。
AI.conclusion: 高精度营养估算需依赖LLM，但必须权衡实时部署中的推理效率，混合方法可能是兼顾精度与效率的折中方案。

title: Image Compression with Bubble-Aware Frame Rate Adaptation for Energy-Efficient Video Capsule Endoscopy
summary: Video Capsule Endoscopy (VCE) is a promising method for improving the medical examination of the small intestine in the gastrointestinal tract. A key challenge is their limited size, resulting in a short battery lifetime which conflicts with high energy consumption for image capturing and transmission to an on-body device. Thus, we propose an image compression pipeline that substantially reduces the transmitted data while preserving diagnostic image quality. Furthermore, we exploit characteristics of the compression process to identify frames with low diagnostic value mainly caused by bubbles, without requiring additional image analysis. For low-visibility frames, a dynamic bubble-aware frame rate adaptation strategy reduces image acquisition and transmission during these phases while preserving sensitivity to potential anomalies. The proposed compression and frame rate adaptation are evaluated on a RISC-V platform using the Kvasir-Capsule and Galar datasets. The compression method achieves a compression ratio of 5.748 (82.6%) at a peak signal-to-noise ratio of 40.3 dB, indicating negligible loss of visual quality. The compression accomplished a mean energy reduction of the whole system by 20.58%. Additionally, the proposed bubble-aware frame rate adaptation reduced the energy consumption by up to 40%. These results demonstrate the potential of our method to increase the applicability of VCE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对视频胶囊内窥镜（VCE）的图像压缩与气泡感知帧率自适应方法，在RISC-V平台上实现了5.748倍压缩比（82.6%）、40.3 dB的PSNR，系统能耗降低20.58%，帧率自适应进一步降低能耗达40%。
AI.motivation: VCE胶囊尺寸有限导致电池寿命短，而图像采集和传输能耗高，亟需在保证诊断质量的前提下降低数据传输量和能耗。
AI.method: 提出图像压缩流水线减少传输数据量；利用压缩过程特征识别低诊断价值帧（如气泡干扰），无需额外图像分析；对低可见度帧实施动态气泡感知帧率自适应策略。
AI.result: 压缩比5.748（82.6%），PSNR 40.3 dB（视觉质量损失可忽略）；系统能耗降低20.58%；气泡感知帧率自适应进一步降低能耗40%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效提升VCE的实用性和续航能力，在不牺牲诊断质量的前提下显著降低能耗。

title: Exploring Time Conditioning in Diffusion Generative Models from Disjoint Noisy Data Manifolds
summary: Practically, training diffusion models typically requires explicit time conditioning to guide the network through the denoising sampling process. Especially in deterministic methods like DDIM, the absence of time conditioning leads to significant performance degradation. However, other deterministic sampling approaches, such as flow matching, can generate high-quality content without this conditioning, raising the question of its necessity. In this work, we revisit the role of time conditioning from a geometric perspective. We analyze the evolution of noisy data distributions under the forward diffusion process and demonstrate that, in high-dimensional spaces, these distributions concentrate on low-dimensional hyper-cylinder-like manifolds embedded within the input space. Successful generation, we argue, stems from the disentanglement of these manifolds in high-dimensional space. Based on this insight, we modify the forward process of DDIM to align the noisy data manifold with the flow-matching approach, proving that DDIM can generate high-quality content without time conditioning, provided the noisy manifold evolves according to the flow-matching method. Additionally, we extend our framework to class-conditioned generation by decoupling classes into distinct time spaces, enabling class-conditioned synthesis with a class-unconditional denoising model. Extensive experiments validate our theoretical analysis and show that high-quality generation is achievable without explicit conditional embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文从几何视角重新审视扩散模型中的时间条件机制，发现高维空间中的噪声数据分布集中在低维超圆柱流形上，成功生成来源于这些流形的解缠。基于此，作者修改DDIM的前向过程使其与流匹配方法对齐，证明无需时间条件即可生成高质量内容，并扩展至无类别条件的类别条件生成。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型通常需要显式的时间条件来引导去噪过程，尤其在DDIM等确定性方法中，缺少时间条件会导致性能显著下降。然而流匹配等确定性方法无需此条件也能生成高质量内容，这引发了对时间条件必要性的疑问。本文旨在从几何角度重新审视并回答这一问题。
AI.method: 从几何视角分析前向扩散过程中噪声数据分布的演化，证明高维空间中噪声分布集中在低维超圆柱流形上。提出将DDIM的前向过程修改为与流匹配方法对齐，使得噪声流形按照流匹配方式演化，从而消除对时间条件编码的依赖。此外，通过将不同类别解耦到不同的时间空间，实现无需类别条件编码的类别条件生成。
AI.result: 实验验证了理论分析的正确性，证明在不使用显式条件嵌入的情况下，DDIM仍能生成高质量内容。同时，所提出的框架在无类别条件模型上实现了有效的类别条件生成。
AI.conclusion: 时间条件并非扩散模型成功生成的必要条件，关键在于噪声数据流形的演化方式是否与流匹配方法对齐。该发现为简化扩散模型设计、减少条件编码依赖提供了新的理论依据和实用方案。

title: Unrequited Emotions: Investigating the Gaps in Motivation and Practice in Speech Emotion Recognition Research
comment: Accepted to the Workshop on Computational Affective Science (CAS) at LREC 2026
summary: Critical analyses of emotion recognition technology have raised ethical concerns around task validity and potential downstream impacts, urging researchers to ensure alignment between their stated motivations and practice. However, these discussions have not adequately influenced or drawn from research on speech emotion recognition (SER). We address this gap by conducting a systematic survey of SER research to uncover what stated motivations drive this work and if they align with the datasets and emotions studied. We find that while SER research identifies appealing goals, such as well-situated voice-activated systems or healthcare applications, commonly-used datasets do not reflect these proposed deployment contexts, thus presenting a gap between motivations and research practices. We argue that such gaps engender ethical concerns, and that SER research should reassert itself with concrete use-cases to prevent misinterpretations, misuse, and downstream harms.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述发现语音情感识别（SER）研究中存在动机与实践脱节的问题：研究声称的应用目标（如医疗、语音助手）与常用的数据集和情感类别不匹配，由此引发伦理风险。作者呼吁SER研究应回归具体使用场景，防止误用和潜在危害。
AI.motivation: 现有情感识别技术的伦理讨论未能充分影响语音情感识别（SER）领域，作者希望系统性地揭示SER研究中声称的动机与实际研究实践（所用数据集和情感类别）之间的偏差，填补这一伦理反思的空白。
AI.method: 对SER研究进行系统性综述，梳理研究声称的动机、使用的数据集以及研究的情感类别，通过对比分析揭示动机与实践之间的差距。
AI.result: 发现SER研究虽声称有明确的积极应用目标（如医疗、语音助手），但普遍使用的数据集并不能反映这些实际部署场景，存在显著的动机-实践脱节。
AI.conclusion: 这种脱节会引发伦理问题（如误读、滥用），SER研究应当重新聚焦于具体的使用案例，以防止误解和下游危害。

title: Generalizable Human Gaussian Splatting via Multi-view Semantic Consistency
summary: Recently, generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs has been actively studied for the photorealistic human rendering. Most existing methods rely on explicit geometric constraints or predefined structural representations to accurately position 3D Gaussians. Although these approaches have shown the remarkable progress in this field, they still suffer from inconsistent feature representations across multi-view inputs due to complex articulations of the human body and limited overlaps between different views. To address this problem, we propose a novel method to accurately localize 3D Gaussians and ultimately improve the quality of human rendering. The key idea is to unproject latent embeddings encoded from each viewpoint into a shared 3D space through predicted depth maps and recalibrate them belonging to the same body part based on cross-view attention. This helps the model resolve the spatial ambiguity occurring in highly textured regions as well as occluded body parts, thus leading to the accurate localization of 3D Gaussians. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show that the proposed method efficiently improves the performance of generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过跨视图注意力机制对齐多视角潜在特征的方法，解决了稀疏视角下人体高斯泼溅中的空间模糊性，提升了渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有通用化人体高斯泼溅方法依赖显式几何约束或预定义结构表示，但人体复杂关节运动和多视角重叠有限导致特征表示不一致，影响3D高斯定位精度和渲染质量。
AI.method: 将每个视角的潜在嵌入通过预测深度图反投影到共享3D空间，并利用跨视图注意力机制重新校准属于同一身体部位的特征，解决高纹理区域和遮挡部位的空间模糊性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效提升了稀疏视角下通用化人体高斯泼溅的性能。
AI.conclusion: 跨视图注意力机制结合深度图反投影能够解决多视角特征不一致问题，实现更精确的3D高斯定位，从而改善人体渲染质量。

title: Optimization-Free Topological Sort for Causal Discovery via the Schur Complement of Score Jacobians
summary: Continuous causal discovery typically couples representation learning with structural optimization via non-convex acyclicity penalties, which subjects solvers to local optima and restricts scalability in high-dimensional regimes. We propose a decoupled paradigm that shifts the causal discovery bottleneck from non-convex optimization to statistical score estimation. We introduce the Score-Schur Topological Sort (SSTS), an algorithm that extracts topological order directly from unconstrained generative models, bypassing constrained structure optimization. We establish that the causal hierarchy leaves a geometric signature within the score function: iterative graph marginalization is mathematically equivalent to computing the Schur complement of the Score-Jacobian Information Matrix (SJIM) under linear conditions. This translates the acyclicity constraint into an algebraic procedure with a dominant cost of O(d^3) operations. For non-linear systems, we formulate the expectation gap of Schur marginalization and introduce Block-SSTS to compress extraction depth, bounding structural error. Empirically, SSTS allows causal structural analysis on non-linear graphs up to d=1000. At this scale, our framework indicates that once the non-convex optimization bottleneck is mathematically bypassed, the structural fidelity of continuous causal discovery is bounded by the finite-sample estimation variance of the global score geometry. By reducing graph extraction to matrix operations, this work reframes scalable causal discovery from a constrained optimization problem to a statistical estimation challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出解耦的因果发现范式SSTS，通过Score-Jacobian信息矩阵的Schur补从无条件生成模型中直接提取拓扑顺序，将非凸优化瓶颈转化为统计估计问题，支持高达d=1000的非线性图结构分析。
AI.motivation: 现有连续因果发现方法将表示学习与结构优化耦合，依赖非凸无环性惩罚，导致求解器陷入局部最优且难以扩展到高维场景。
AI.method: 提出Score-Schur拓扑排序算法(SSTS)，从无条件生成模型直接提取拓扑顺序。理论上证明线性条件下迭代图边际化等价于Score-Jacobian信息矩阵的Schur补计算；针对非线性系统引入Block-SSTS压缩提取深度并约束结构误差。
AI.result: 在d=1000的非线性图上成功进行因果结构分析，计算主导复杂度为O(d³)，表明结构保真度受限于全局评分几何的有限样本估计方差。
AI.conclusion: 将可扩展因果发现从约束优化问题重新定义为统计估计挑战，为高维因果结构学习提供了新的理论框架和实践路径。

title: Subliminal Steering: Stronger Encoding of Hidden Signals
summary: Subliminal learning describes a student language model inheriting a behavioral bias by fine-tuning on seemingly innocuous data generated by a biased teacher model. Prior work has begun to characterize this phenomenon but leaves open questions about the scope of signals it can transfer, the mechanisms that explain it, and the precision with which a bias can be encoded by seemingly unrelated data. We tackle all three problems by introducing subliminal steering, a variant of subliminal learning in which the teacher's bias is implemented not via a system prompt, as in prior work, but through a steering vector trained to maximize the likelihood of a set of target samples. First, we show that subliminal steering transfers complex multi-word biases, whereas prior work focused on single-word preferences, demonstrating a large scope of subliminally transferrable signals. Second, we provide mechanistic evidence that subliminal learning transfers not only the target behavioral bias, but also the steering vector itself, localized to the layers at which the teacher was steered. Finally, we show that the bias is encoded with surprising precision. We train a new steering vector directly on the subliminally-laden dataset and find that it attains high cosine similarity with the original vector.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"潜意识引导"（subliminal steering）方法，研究学生语言模型如何通过微调有偏教师模型生成的看似无害数据，继承行为偏差。实验表明，该方法能传递复杂多词偏差、偏差机制可定位到特定层，且偏差编码具有惊人精度。
AI.motivation: 先前研究虽发现潜意识学习现象，但对其传递信号的范围、内在机制以及偏差编码的精确度仍不清楚。本文旨在系统性地回答这三个问题。
AI.method: 提出"潜意识引导"方法：教师模型的偏差不是通过系统提示实现，而是通过训练一个引导向量（steering vector）来最大化目标样本的似然；随后让学生模型在该有偏数据上微调。
AI.result: 1) 能够传递复杂多词偏差（此前仅研究单词偏好）；2) 偏差机制可定位到教师被引导的特定层；3) 从潜意识数据中训练的新引导向量与原向量具有高余弦相似度。
AI.conclusion: 潜意识学习不仅能传递行为偏差，还能传递引导向量本身，且偏差编码具有惊人的精确性，对理解模型安全性和可控性有重要启示。

title: DDA-Thinker: Decoupled Dual-Atomic Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning-Driven Image Editing
summary: Recent image editing models have achieved strong visual fidelity but often struggle with tasks requiring complex reasoning. To investigate and enhance the reasoning-grounded planning for image editing, we propose DDA-Thinker, a Thinker-centric framework designed for the independent optimization of a planning module (Thinker) over a fixed generative model (Editor). This decoupled Thinker-centric paradigm facilitates a controlled analysis of the planning module and makes its contribution under a fixed Editor easier to assess. To effectively guide this Thinker, we introduce a dual-atomic reinforcement learning framework. This framework decomposes feedback into two distinct atomic rewards implemented through verifiable checklists: a cognitive-atomic reward to directly assess the quality of the Thinker's executable plan, which serves as the actionable outcome of the Thinker's reasoning, and a visual-atomic reward to assess the final image quality. To improve checklist quality, our checklist synthesis is grounded not only in the source image and user instruction but also in a rational reference description of the ideal post-edit scene. To support this training, we further develop a two-stage data curation pipeline that first synthesizes a diverse and reasoning-focused dataset, then applies difficulty-aware refinement to curate an effective training curriculum for reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments on reasoning-driven image editing benchmarks, including RISE-Bench and KRIS-Bench, demonstrate that our approach substantially improves overall performance. Our method enables a community model to achieve results competitive with strong proprietary models, highlighting the practical potential of Thinker-centric optimization under a fixed-editor setting.

AI.tldr: 提出DDA-Thinker框架，通过解耦的Thinker模块和双原子强化学习，在固定生成模型上独立优化推理规划能力，显著提升复杂推理驱动的图像编辑性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑模型在需要复杂推理的任务中表现不佳，且缺乏对规划模块的独立分析和优化方法。
AI.method: 提出Thinker-centric解耦框架，将规划模块(Thinker)与生成模型(Editor)分离；设计双原子强化学习框架，包含认知原子奖励（评估规划质量）和视觉原子奖励（评估图像质量）；引入基于参考描述的清单合成机制；构建两阶段数据流水线（多样性合成+难度感知精炼）。
AI.result: 在RISE-Bench和KRIS-Bench等推理驱动图像编辑基准上，方法显著提升整体性能，使社区模型与强专有模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: 解耦的Thinker-centric优化范式在固定编辑器设置下具有实际潜力，为提升图像编辑的推理能力提供了有效路径。

title: RCProb: Probabilistic Rule Extraction for Efficient Simplification of Tree Ensembles
comment: 20 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to Information Sciences, currently under review
summary: Tree ensembles are widely used in industrial machine learning due to their strong predictive performance and efficient training procedures. However, as the number of trees in an ensemble grows, the resulting models become increasingly difficult for humans to interpret. To address this limitation, explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) studies methods that generate interpretable models capable of explaining complex predictors.
